(b. 31st Dec., 1872).—Minister in charge of agric., excise and forest depts., Burma, Jan., 1923; apptd. judge, high ct., Rangoon, Nov., 1924; member of govt's exec. council, Burma, July, 1926; kt., Jan., 1927; actg.-govt., Burma, Aug., 1930; minister, govt. of Burma, May, 1932; minister for transf. subjects, Jan., 1933; member, Burma legisl. council, Oct., 1932; pres. of the Senate, Aug., 1940.

GYI, U MAUNG MAUNG, K.S.M., Burma Land Records (b. 24th Dec., 1890).—Apptd. asst. supt. land records, 15th Dec., 1914; left behind in Burma; commr. of settlement and land records, 16th Oct., 1945.

GYI, U MAUNG MAUNG, Burma Engrg. Serv., (cl. I) (Asst. exec. engr., P.W.D., Sept., 1936.—Apptd. to Burma engng. serv., Oct., 1937; exec. engr. Feb., 1939.

GYI, U THA DIN, Barr., Burma Judl. Service (b. 18th Oct., 1890).—Apptd. second judge, small cause courts, Rangoon, 21st Apl., 1925; offg. ch. judge, ditto, Nov., 1932.

GYI, U WA, M.B.E., (b. 14th Oct., 1893).—Supt. of govt. printing Burma, Jan., 1941; ditto, 1945-46; M.B.E., Jan., 1946.

HABIBLLUAH, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammed H.).

HABIBUR, RAHMAN, Khan Bahadur, Indian Police (supt.) (b. 10th May, 1894).—Joined the service, 2nd Jan., 1918; Khan Bahadur, 1933; appointed to I.P. as supt., Bengal, Apl., 1937.

HACKNEY, NORMAN, B.Sc., Indian State Rlys. (chemist and metallurgist, N.W. Rly.) (b. 18th Nov., 1891).—Apptd. asst. chemist and metallurgist, G.I.P. rly., 26th June, 1919; chemist and metallurgist, N.W. rly., Apl., 1927; dep. dir., munitions production, dept. of supply.

HADDOW, JOHN REID, O.B.E., B.Sc., M.R.C.V.S., D.V.S.M., Indian Vety. Service (vety. research officer) (b. 4th Apl., 1896).—Joined the service, 24th Aug., 1923; dep. dir., imp. vety. serum inst., May, 1930; vety. research officer (serology), May, 1933; dep. director, Impl. vety. research inst., and offr.-in-charge, pathology and bacteriology sect., July, 1940; O.B.E., Jan., 1941.

HADOW, SIR RAYMOND PATRICK, Kt., C.I.E., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 26th March, 1879).—Retd., March, 1934.*

HADOW, REGINALD MICHAEL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commn., Cent. Provs.) (b. 17th Aug., 1915).—Educ. at Berkhamsted and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 5th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the Cent. Provs. as asst. commr.; a.d.c. to govr., May, 1941; pol. offr., Trucial coast, May, 1944; vice commr., Bushire, Nov., 1944; H.M.'s vice-consul, Bandar Abbas, Feb., 1945; I.P.S. (confd.) Mar., 1945; Consul, Bandar Abbas, Oct., 1945.

HAEGERT, GOTTFRIED ERNEST JOHN, late Public Works Dept., Punjab (b. 8th Aug., 1883).—Retd., Aug., 1938.*

HAFAZAT HUSSAIN, Indian C.S. (collr. and mag., United Provs.) (b. 28th Feb., 1902).—Educ.

at Univ. of Patna and Allahabad, and Caius Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; under-secty., industries and labour dept., govt. of India, June, 1930; offg. mag. and collr., Jan., 1934; dep. secty. to govt., United Provs., industries branch (temp.), Apl., 1935; collr. and mag. (confd.), Aug., 1939; dir. of industries, etc., Assam, Feb., 1941; sec. to govt., United Provs., Oct., 1942.

HAFIZUDDIN, A. K. MUHAMMAD, B.A., Indian Police (b. 15th Jan., 1909).—Joined the service as asst. supt. of police, Bengal, on probn., 21st Apl., 1933; confd., May, 1935.

HAFEEZ, MUHAMMAD ABDUL (see Abdul, H. M.).

HAGER, KATHERINE CONSTANCE, India Office, (actg. hr. exec offr., acct.-gen.'s dept.) (b. 27th June, 1902).—Apptd. cler. offr. 4th Apl., 1932; actg. exec. offr., Apl., 1940; actg. hr. ditto, Dec., 1945.

HAIDER, AGHA (see Agha Haider), HAIG, GEOFFREY ALEXANDER, O.B.E., Indian C.S. (sec. civil suppl., Un. Provs.) (b. 19th May, 1909).—Educ. at Winchester and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arr. in India, Nov., 1931; and served in Un. Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. settlt. offr., Oct., 1936; on spec. duty, Dec., 1937 to May, 1938; sec. civil supplies, Un. Provs., Apl., 1945; O.B.E., June, 1946.

HAIG, SIR HARRY GRAHAM, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 13th Apl., 1881).—Retd., May, 1940.†

HAIG, WOLSELEY DE HAGA, C.I.E., D.S.O., Lieut.-Col., R.E., ret'd., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 25th Aug., 1884).—Retd., Aug., 1939.*

HAIGH, FRANK FRASER, C.I.E., Indian Service of Engineers (Punjab) (b. 4th Feb., 1891).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1913; in milty. employ, 1916-19; exec. engr., Oct., 1922; under-sec. to govt. P.W.D. (irrign.), Apl., 1927; chief engr. and sec., govt. Punjab, Sept., 1941; C.I.E., June, 1944, onl.p.r., Dec., 1945.

HAILES, MARTIN HUNTER, Indian State Rlys. (dist. traffic supt., Burma Rlys.) (b. 19th Apl., 1885).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 29th July, 1908; dist. traffic supt., Nov., 1928.

HAILEY, PHILIP COTES, Maj., O.B.E., I.A., Indian Polit. Serv., (b. 20th Jan., 1903).—First commn., 1st Feb., 1923; in milty. employ to Sept., 1927; under-secty. to A.G.G. and ch. commr. in Baluchistan, Dec., 1929; asst. to pol. agent, Kalat, Apl., 1930; asst. pol. agt., S. Waziristan, Oct., 1931; offg. under-secty., for. and pol. dept., June, 1933; Brit. trade agent, Gyantse, and asst. to pol. officer in Sikkim, Dec., 1933; confd., March, 1937; offcr. on spec. duty, f. & p. dept., July, 1936; under-secty., f. and p. dept., Aug., 1936; under-secty. pol. dept., Apl., 1937; dep. ditto, March, 1938; first asst. to resdt. in Kashmir, Oct., 1938; counsellor, Brit. Legn., Kabul, Oct., 1940; sec., to resdt., Baroda and Gujarat states, Feb., 1943; pol. agt. W. Kathiawar agency, Nov., 1944; O.B.E., Jan., 1946.

HAILEY, BARON, WILLIAM MALCOLM HAILEY OF SHAHPUR AND NEWPORT PAGNELL, G.C.S.I., G.C.M.G., G.C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 15th Feb., 1872).—Retd., Dec., 1934.*

HAJARA, KARUNA KUMAR, M.A. (Cal.), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b.

22nd Aug., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta, and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 5th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928; and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1930; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1934; offg. dist. and sess. judge, var. from May, 1935; offg. dist. judge, Tippera, Feb., 1946.

HAKEWILL, CHARLES THOMAS LANCELOT, Indian Police (b. 31st Oct., 1915).—Apptd. asst. supt., Central Provs., on probn., Oct., 1936; addl. supt., Nov., 1941.

HAKIM RAI, LALA, Rai Bahadur, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 2nd Sept., 1897).—Joined the service, 17th Oct., 1921; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1931.

HAKSAR, SUNDAR NARAIN, M.A., B.Sc., Indian C.S. (regr. high cl., Lahore) (b. 4th Dec., 1909).—Educ. at D.N. High Sch., Delhi, Punjab Univ., Delhi Univ., and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub. divl. offr., Apl., 1935; p.a. to commr., Dec., 1936; addtl. dist. and sess. judge, Sept., 1940; dist. and sess. judge, April, 1941; regr., high ct., Lahore, July, 1945.

HAKUMAT RAI, DIWAN, M.C., M.D., Col., I.M.S. (b. 15th May 1883).—Late Insp.-gen. civ. hosps., Central Provs., July, 1937.†

HALDAR, MAYARTARU, M.A., B.L., late Bengal C.S. (b. 1st Feb., 1888).—Joined the service, Aug., 1912; sub. judge, Dec., 1934; dist. and sess. judge, May, 1938; ret'd., Feb., 1943.

HALDAR, SUDHANSU KUMAR, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 6th Dec., 1901).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ., and King's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1926; arrived, Dec., 1926, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Dec., 1927; commr. of excise and salt, Oct., 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1933; confd., May, 1939.

HALDAR, SUDHINDRA KUMAR, C.I.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (commr., Bengal) (b. 4th Oct., 1891).—Educ. at Calcutta and London Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 21st Nov., 1915, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; asst. mag. and collr., Bengal, Apl., 1919; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1923; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1926; mag. and collr., July, 1928; dep. secty. to govt. of Bengal, fin., commerce and marine depts., July, 1929; sec., retrencht. ctee., Bengal, May, 1932; commr. of excise and salt, Bengal, Oct. to June, 1935; secty. to govt., local self govt. dept., June, 1935; secty., dept. of communications and works, Bengal, Apl., 1937; commr., June, 1939; C.I.E., June, 1943; addl. memb., bd. of rev. and ex-officio sec. land rev. and fin. depts., Dec., 1945.

HALE, HARRY WILLIAM, B.Sc., Indian Police (b. 5th Feb., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. supt., N.W.F.P., on 20th Nov., 1923; dist. officer, frontier constaby., March, 1930; secty., frontier regns. ctee., May, 1931; on spi. duty under dir., intel. bureau, Nov., 1936, to Sept., 1937; asst. inspr.-genl., traffic and sec., Punjab provl. transp. authy., Sept., 1941; on spec. duty, addtl. I.G. police office, Oct., 1941; princpl., police trng. sch., Phillaur, March, 1942; Indian police medal, Jan., 1946.

HALES, THOMAS CHRISTMAS, V.D., late

Indian State Rlys. (b. 15th Dec., 1885).—Ret'd., Dec., 1940.†

HALFHIDE, ROBERT ALFRED, M.B.E., late Printing and Stationery Dept. (b. 5th Dec., 1886).—Ret'd., Dec., 1941.†

HALFORD, DAVID REECE CHARLES, B.A., B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Sind) (b. 14th Sept., 1910).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge, and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934; asst. collr., Sind, Apl., 1936; offg. var., Sept., 1937; forest settlmt. offr., Sept., 1941; offg. var., from July, 1943.

HALIFAX, VISCOUNT, Rt. HON. EDWARD FREDERICK LINDLEY WOOD, K.G., P.C., G.C.S.I., G.C.I.E.—Viceroy and governor-general of India, 3rd Apl., 1926, to 17th Apl., 1931.

HALL, ARTHUR GEORGE, M.B.E., Indian State Rlys. (gen. mgr. N.W. Rly.) (b. 7th Nov., 1894).—Joined the serv. as asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; confd., Jan., 1922; M.B.E., June, 1926; exec. engr., June, 1929; govt. insp. rlys., Burma, Apl., 1937, to Apl., 1938; exec. engr., N.W. rly., Apl., 1938; confd. (provl.), March, 1939; gen. mgr., N.W. Rly., Feb., 1946.

HALL, C. E. Indian State Rlys. (b. 16th Oct., 1891).—Joined 15th Sept., 1919; fincl. advr. and ch. accts. offr., G.I.P. Rly, Apl., 1945.

HALL, DOUGLAS WILFRED, Major, Burma Front. Serv. (b. 1st June, 1920).—Apptd., 11th June, 1946.

HALL, GEOFFREY FOWLER, Capt., C.I.E., M.C., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bihar) (b. 9th March, 1888).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1911; asst. engr., Nov., 1911; exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. suptg. engr., March, 1931, and again, Oct., 1933; confd., May, 1934; C.I.E., June, 1935; ch. engr. (tempy.), Jan., 1936; offg. ch. engr. and secty. to govt. of Bihar, p.w.d., May, 1937; temp. ch. engr. and dep. secty. to govt. (irrign.), Oct., 1937; ch. engr. and secty. to govt. p.w.d., Apl., 1938; ret'd., Aug., 1945.

HALL, HAROLD PERCIVAL, Capt., I.A. (b. 9th Sept., 1913).—Apptd. to I.P.S. on probn., Nov., 1937; asst. pol. agt. and colonisation, offcr., Nasirabad, Feb., 1944; confd. in I.P.S., May, 1944; dep. dir. of food supplies in Baluchistan, July, 1945; dir. ditto, May, 1946.

HALL, SIR JOHN FREDERICK, C.S.I., C.I.E., O.B.E., late Indian C.S. (chairman, Madras pub. serv. commn.) (b. 14th Apl., 1882).—Educ. at Hymer's Coll., Hull, and Clare Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1904; arrived, 11th Dec., 1905, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub. collr. and joint mag., Feb., 1913; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Feb., 1919; confd., Apl., 1925; O.B.E., Dec., 1919; sec. to govt. rev. dept., March, 1928; C.I.E., June, 1931; offg. 3rd member, bd. of rev., Madras, and commr. of land rev. and settlt., Feb., 1933; offg. 2nd member, ditto, July, 1933; 2nd member, ditto (provl.), and 1st member offg., May, 1935; C.S.I., Feb., 1937; kt., June, 1938; ret'd., Apl., 1940; chairman, Madras public serv. commn., Apl., 1940.

HALL, RIDLEY MARTIN, Burma Police (cl. I) (b. 25th Mar., 1898).—Apptd., asst. supt., 22nd Oct. 1923; dist. supt. Dec., 1936; on mil. serv. Dec., 1940; civ. aff. serv., up to 16th Oct., 1945; dist. supt. 1946.

HALL, WILLIAM ÆNEAS, B.A., late Indian

Service of Engrs. (Burma) (b. 26th March, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1912; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1921; offg. exec. engr., Aug., 1926; confd., Apl., 1928; offg. supt. engr., June, 1932; confd., Apl., 1938; ret'd., 26th March, 1944.

HALL, REV. WILLIAM JOHN, B.A., Indian Eccles. Establishment (United Provs.) (junr. chaplain) (b. 17th Feb., 1911).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 17th Feb., 1938; junr. chaplain, Feb., 1940.

HALL, WILLIAM STIRLING, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 26th March, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr. on 20th Oct., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1931; on mil. duty, Jan., 1942.

HALL, WILLIAM Telford, C.I.E., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (ch. consvr., United Provs.) (b. 2nd June, 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 27th Feb., 1921; dep. consvr., Oct., 1922; instr., Forest coll., Dehra Dun., March, 1935, to Apl., 1938; consvr. (confd.), 1938; C.I.E., June, 1942; confd. as ch. consvr., Aug., 1941.

HALLETT, SIR MAURICE GARNIER, G.C.I.E., K.S.C.I., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 28th Oct., 1883).—Educ. at Winchester and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arr., 25th Nov., 1907, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; trfd. to Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1912; under-sec. to govt., pol. appt. and educn. depts., Mar., 1913; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Apl., 1915; under-sec. to govt., pol. appt. and educn. depts., Nov., 1915 to Feb., 1916; mag. and collr., Nov., 1920; ditto and sec. to govt., local self-govt. dept., Sept., 1922; offg. commr., Patna divn., 16th Aug., 1925, to 15th Oct., 1925; offg. ch. sec. to govt., Apl., 1927, and again June, 1930; offg. commr., Bhagalpur, March, 1929; C.I.E., Jan., 1930; offg. secty., govt. of India, home dept., July, 1932; confd., March, 1933; C.S.I., June, 1934; member, council of state, March, 1936; K.C.S.I., Feb., 1937; govr. of Bihar, March, 1937; actg. govr., United Provs., May to Sept., 1938; govr., United Provs., Dec., 1939; G.C.I.E., Jan., 1943; ret'd., Dec., 1945.

HALLIDAY, A. (b. 21st Mar., 1909).—Joined the service as spec. duty offr. home dept., 15th Oct., 1945.

HALLIDAY, ROBERT STIRRAT, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 11th Feb., 1909).—Educ. at Greenock High Sch., Glasgow Univ., and Wadham Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; asst. judge (under trng.), Aug., 1938.

HALLIDAY, REV. SYDNEY LANG, Indian Eccles. Estabt. (junr. chaplain).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., Bihar and Orissa, 12th Oct., 1932; confd., Oct., 1934.

HALLOWES, BASIL JOHN KNIGHT, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 27th Aug., 1884).—Educ. at Mill Hill, Caius College, Cambridge and University College, London; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived in India, 2nd Dec., 1909, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; sec., municipal bd., Agra, Aug., 1913; under-sec. to govt., United Provs., Sept., 1916, to Apl., 1918; jt. mag., May, 1918; offg. as mag. and collr. from Nov. 1920; offg. dy. sec. to govt., industries dept., Oct., 1924; confd. as mag. and collr., Oct., 1925; dep. commr., Nov., 1927; offg. commr., variously from July, 1928; commr., Ajmer-Merwara, Apl., 1937; confd.

as commr., Jan., 1940; C.I.E., Jan., 1941; ret'd., Feb., 1945.

HALLOWS, HENRY COLIN, Indian Police (b. 23rd May, 1911).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, 24th Nov., 1930; confd., Nov., 1932.

HALLOWS, RALPH INGHAM, Indian Police (b. 4th May, 1913).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, Nov., 1932; confd., Nov., 1934; joined Indian police serv. on probn. under trng., Hyderabad, Oct., 1937; ditto, Punjab, June, 1938; asst. pol. agent, Bahrein, May, 1939; under-sec. to pol. resdt. in Persian Gulf, Oct., 1941; asst. pol. agt., Punjab hill states, March, 1943; ditto, Muscat, Oct., 1944.

HALLOWS, RICHARD MILNES, Indian Police (b. 14th Feb., 1916).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., 10th Nov., 1935; confd., Nov., 1937.

HALLOWS, WILLIAM, late Factory Dept., Bombay (b. 28th July, 1891).—Ret'd., Aug., 1939.*

HAMBLING, REV. VICTOR FREDERICK, Indian Eccles. Estabt. (b. 27th Nov., 1896).—Apptd. junr. chaplain, 23rd Oct., 1929.

HAMBLY, D. M., Indian State Rlys. (b. 31st July, 1899).—Joined 1st Oct., 1921; dep. genl. mgr., N.W. Rly., Mar., 1945.

HAMID, AGHA ABDUL, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 2nd Aug., 1912).—Educ. at Nuslim High Sch., Lyallpur, and Punjab Univ.; joined the service, 20th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; dep. regr. co-op. societies, Dec., 1945.

HAMID ALI, MUHAMMAD, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. coll., Bengal) (b. 4th Sept., 1906).—Educ. at Lucknow Univ. and Peterhouse Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 13th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, 19th Nov., 1931, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1934; addl. dist. mag., Apl., 1939; spec. offcr., home dept., Sept., 1944; dep. sec., ditto, Oct., 1944; jt. sec., ch. minister's dept., Jan., 1946.

HAMID, KHAN, M.B.E., Indian Posts and Tels. (b. 15th Oct., 1894).—Joined the serv. as proby. supt., Dec., 1918; confd., Aug., 1920; dep. p.m.g., Jan., 1946.

HAMID, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Hamid)

HAMID, MUHAMMAD ABDUL (see Muhammad Abdul H.)

HAMID MOIZUDIN ABDUL ALI (see Abdul Ali, H. M.)

HAMIL, HARRY, B.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 3rd Aug., 1891).—Joined the service as prof'r. of English, Deccan Coll., Poona, 27th Sept., 1919; offg. princpl., Gujarat Coll., Ahmedabad, June, 1924; princpl., Elph. Coll., Bombay, June, 1926; secty., fed. public service commn., Sept., 1936 to Feb., 1940; dep. dir. of instrn., Bombay, Sept., 1941; ret'd., Aug., 1945.

HAMILTON, ARCHIBALD HENRY DE BURGH, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 4th July, 1886).—Educ. at King's Sch., Canterbury, Corpus Christi Coll., Cambridge, and Univ. Coll. Lond.; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 28th Nov., 1910, and served in the Un. Provs. as asst. commr., and asst. mag. and collr., jt. mag., Oct., 1916; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1920; sess. and sub-judge and ditto, Aug., 1924; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1925, and again, May, 1936; offg. legal remembr. to govt., Apl., 1928; offg. judl. commr., N.W.F.P., Jan., 1936; offg. judge, high ct., Allahabad, July,

1937; judge, ch. ct., Oudh, Oct., 1937; puisne judge, high ct., Allhd., July, 1940; retd., July, 1946.

HAMILTON, ARTHUR PLUMPTRE FAUNCE, O.B.E., B.A., M.C., Indian Forest Service (ch. consvr., Punjab) (b. 7th Oct., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 17th Dec., 1921; dep. consvr., Nov., 1925; instr., Rangers' coll., Dehra Dun, June, 1933; O.B.E., June, 1938; ch. consvr., Oct., 1943 to Mar., 1945; inspr. gen. forests, Mar., 1945; mem. cttee. on forest educn., 1946.

HAMILTON, JOHN, Civil Aviation Directe. (b. 10th Apl., 1897).—Apptd. admin. offr., 22nd May, 1938; on depn. to dept. of supply, Mar., 1943 to Feb., 1946; ch. admin. offr., Feb., 1946.

HAMILTON, WILLIAM FRANCIS ALFRED, O.B.E., Indian Police (dist. supt., Madras) (b. 28th Dec., 1907).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 3rd Dec., 1928; confd., Dec., 1930; M.B.E., June, 1931; asst. dir., intelligence bureau, Nov., 1934; awarded Indian police medal, Jan., 1934; confd. as dist. supt., Oct., 1941; O.B.E., June, 1944.

HAMMETT, ROY HESSELTINE, C.I.E., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Serv. of Engrs. (ch. engr., Bombay) (b. 17th Oct., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Dec., 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1925; dep. secty. to govt., Bombay, p.w.d. (rds. and bldgs.), Dec., 1937; suptg. engr. (confd.), Apl., 1943; temp. addtl. sec., govt. of Bombay (p.w.d.), Jan., 1944; sec., ditto (temp.), Apl., 1944; C.I.E., Jan., 1946.

HAMPTON, CYRIL HERBERT, Indian Police (dist. supt., Burma) (b. 7th Apl., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, on 29th Oct., 1921; offg. dist. supt. variously from Sept., 1924; civ. aff. serv. to Oct., 1945; dist. supt., 1945-46.

HAMPTON, HAROLD JOHN CHARLES, Office of the High Commr. for India (exec. officer, store dept.) (b. 23rd Jan., 1903).—Apptd. clerical officer, 11th Oct., 1920; exec. officer, 1st Nov., 1932.

HAMPTON, HENRY VERNER, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (Bombay) (b. 1st May, 1890).—Retd., Apl., 1942; member Bombay-Sind public serv. commn., from Apl., 1941.†

HAN, MAUNG SAW, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 9th Oct., 1908).—Educ. at Government High Sch., Rangoon, Rangoon Univ., and Wadham Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; examr., local fund acct., Nov., 1939; civ. aff. serv., Sept., 1945; collr. (Rangoon) Nov., 1945; sec., natl. planning dept. Feb., 1946.

HANCE, SIR JAMES BENNETT, C.I.E., O.B.E., M.D.; Maj.-Gen., I.M.S., retd. (Cent. Provs. and Behar) (b. 2nd Apl., 1887).—First commn. dated 27th July, 1912; offg. civil surg., Quetta, Nov., 1919; O.B.E., Oct., 1920; ditto, D.I. Khan., March, 1923; M.O., S.W. Scouts, Aug., 1923; civil surg., D.I. Khan, Sept., 1924; on foreign service in Jodhpur State from 20th Aug., 1925; ch. medl. officer, W.I. states agency and resdy. surg., Rajkot, July, 1928; resdy. surg., Mysore, Oct., 1933; C.I.E., Jan., 1939; inspr.-genl., civil hosp., Cent. Provs. and Behar; also dir. of pub. health in addn., June, 1941; dir.-genl., Oct., 1943; member, med. council of India, Oct., 1943; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1946.

HANCHET, CAROLINE EMILY, India Office, (pol. dept.) (b. 9th Feb. 1898).—Apptd. cler.

offr., 29th Aug., 1921; actg. hr. ditto, Oct., 1937; confd. Dec., 1937; actg. asst. princpl., Feb., 1941; staff offr. for pol. intell., Nov., 1946.

HANCOCK, SIR CYRIL PERCY, K.C.I.E., O.B.E., M.C., Maj., I.A., Indian Political Serv. (b. 18th Sept., 1896).—First commn. dated 16th Dec., 1914; in milty. dept. prior to 29th March, 1920; tempy. asst. pte. sec. to govr., Bombay, Nov., 1922; asst. pte. sec. to Viceroy, Feb., 1923; sec. to agent to govr.-genl. in states of Western India, March, 1926; O.B.E., June, 1930; offg. dep. secty. to govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., July, 1930; secty. to agent to govr.-genl. in Rajputana, etc., Oct., 1930; presdt., council of state, Bharatpur, May, 1932; offg. pol. agent, E. Rajputana states, in addn. to his duties in Bharatpur, Feb., 1933, and Aug., 1935; dep. secty., pol. dept., Oct., 1938; confd., Feb., 1939; C.I.E., Jan., 1941; resdt. in Eastern states, Oct., 1941; resdt. (cl. I) and resdt., Baroda and states of W.I. and Gujarat, Nov., 1944; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1946.

HANCOX, LESLIE PASCOE, C.I.E., O.B.E., Indian C.S. (fin. sec., United Provs.) (b. 18th May, 1906).—Educ. at St. Olave's Gr. Sch., and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, 1st Dec., 1929, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and coll.; jt. mag., March, 1931; city mag., Lucknow, Apl., 1935; offg. mag. and collr., Feb., 1936; O.B.E., Jan., 1939; sec. to govt., United Provs. (civil supplies), Nov., 1942; mag. and collr. (confd) Dec., 1944; fin. sec., Apl., 1945; C.I.E., Jan., 1946.

HANDOO, GOPI KRISHNA, M.B.E., Indian Police (supt. United Provs.) (b. 24th Mar., 1905).—Joined the service as dep. supt. of police, 29th Dec., 1927; confd., Apl., 1933; supt. of police (confd.), Feb., 1944.

HANDS, ARTHUR SHELDON, C.S.I., C.I.E., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr. Bengal) (b. 26th Apl. 1896).—Educ. at Epsom Coll., Middlesex Hosp., and Med. Sch., and Oxford Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1920; arrived, 3rd Jan., 1921, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr., offg. mag. and collr., Feb., 1926; and again, Dec., 1931; confd., July, 1933; offg. dep. commr. Aug., 1927; C.I.E., July, 1933; dep. secty. to the govt. of India, home dept., May, 1935, to May, 1938; sec., agric. edl. dept., May, 1940; a.r.p. offr., March, 1941; contr., ditto, March, 1941; commr., presdy. div. Apl., 1944; C.S.I., June, 1946.

HANDS, PATRICK LANCELOT JOHN, late Ind. State Rly. (b. 13th Dec., 1889).—Apptd. dist. contr. of stores, on probn., 6th Dec., 1919; confd., Oct., 1920; offg. dep. contr., Aug., 1934; dep. contr. of stores, provl., July, 1940; contr. of stores, Aug., 1941; retd., Dec., 1945.

HANIFKHAN, MUHD, SHARIFF KHAN, B.A., Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 15th Feb., 1908).—Joined, 2nd Dec., 1930; confd., supt., police, Apl., 1941.

HANLEY, PERCY JOSEPH, Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr. central p.w.d.) (b. 20th Jan., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Punjab, 16th Oct., 1927; transfed. to Central p.w.d., May, 1935; exec. engr. Apl., 1940; suptg. engr., July, 1942.

HANNA, CHARLES HUGH, India Audit Office (suptg. executive officer) (b. 23rd Feb., 1894).—Educ. at Alleyne's Sch., Dulwich; apptd. 2nd-class clerk, 15th July, 1912; higher exec. officer, Apl., 1922; suptg. ditto, Sept., 1938; lent to min. of shipping, July, 1940.

HANNAY, SIR HUGH AUGUSTUS MACNISH, Kt., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 14th May, 1878).—Retd., Jan., 1936.*

HANSEN, REV. JAMES LAWRENCE, Indian Eccles. Estabt., Punjab (b. 2nd July, 1907)—Appdtd. junr. chaplain on probn., Jan. 1940.

HAPPELL, SIR ALEXANDER JOHN, O.B.E., late Indian Police (Madras) (b. 13th June, 1887).—Joined the service, Nov., 1907; supt. Dec., 1917; dep. commr. of police, Madras City, March, 1921; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1924; O.B.E., June, 1925; supt., govt. railway police, Oct., 1927; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., June, 1931; confd., Feb., 1936; kt., June, 1942; retd., 1942.

HAPPELL, ARTHUR COMYN, Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Madras) (b. 20th Oct., 1891).—Educ. at Tonbridge, and King's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 4th Oct., 1921; arrived, 1st Dec., 1921, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., July, 1924; offg. dep. sec. to govt., fin. dept., May, 1925; offg. under-sec. to govt., public dept., July, 1925; ditto, dev. dept., Apl., 1926; regr., high ct., Oct., 1926; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1930; confd., Sept., 1932; judge, high ct., Madras, June, 1941.

HAPPER, WILLIAM, M.B., CH., B., M.R.C.P. (Edin.) D.T.M. & H. (Edin.), Maj., I.M.S., (b. 4th Nov., 1901).—First commn., 2nd Feb., 1932; in mil. employ. to Dec., 1937; recalled to mil., May, 1941; in civil employ Jan., 1946.

HAQ, SHEIKH ANWARUL, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 11th May, 1917).—Educ. at Government High Sch., Jullandar City, Punjab Univ., and University Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 23rd Oct., 1939; confd., 27th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.; sec., Punjab and N.W.F.P. public serv. commn., Aug., 1942, to 1944.

HAQ, S. M., B.A., LL.B., Khan Bahadur, Punjab C.S., Judl. Bch. (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 13th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 8th July, 1932, as offg. dist. and sess. judge; confd., Jan., 1934.

HAQUE, KAZI ANWARUL, B.A., Indian Police b. 8th Feb., 1909).—Joined the service as asst. supt. of police, Bengal, on probn., 20th Feb., 1933; confd., May, 1935.

HAQUE, SHEIKH IKRAMUL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 23rd Oct., 1915).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 15th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.

HARBAN, SINGH BAWA, M.R.C.V.S., (Sind) (b. 21st Nov., 1906).—Joined Jan., 1937; vet. investign. offr., July, 1937; dir. vet. services, Dec., 1944.

HARBANS LAL, VEDHERA, Rai Bahadur, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 11th Jan., 1901).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 23rd Oct., 1924; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1925; exec. engr., Oct., 1934; under-sec., govt. Punjab (irrign.), Oct., 1943.

HARCOURT, ROBERT MAURICE, Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 5th Sept., 1916).—Educ. at Dulwich and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1939; confd., 23rd Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.; sub. divl. offr., Dec., 1942; settlmt., offr., Jan., 1946.

HARDASMAL BANASING HINGORANI, B.A., LL.B., (Sind) (b. 17th March, 1896).—Joined

Oct., 1926; sub. judge, (2nd Cl. confd.) Oct., 1928; on training in legis. dept., govt. of India, Apl., to Oct., 1937; dep. sec., legal dept., and remembrancer, legal aff., Sind, June, 1938; on spl. duty, Sind-Punjab dispute, Apl., 1941; and in P.W.D., Sept., 1942; dep. sec. legal dept. etc., again, Dec., 1942.

HARDIE, ROBERT, M.A., late Indian Police (Burma) (b. 6th June, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 4th Dec., 1909; dist. supt., Dec., 1917; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Nov., 1926, offg. commr. of police, Dec., 1932; confd. Sept., 1933; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1934; dep. inspr.-genl., Jan., 1937; retd., 23rd Dec., 1942.

HARDING, GEORGE TREVOR HAMILTON, C.I.E., Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 18th June, 1895).—Joined the service, 28th Nov., 1925; on milty. duty from 26th July, 1916, to 9th Apl., 1919; asst. supt., Dec., 1920; supt., March, 1925; C.I.E., Jan., 1931; dep. inspr.-genl., March, 1941; inspr.-genl., Patiala (on depn.), Apl., 1944.

HARDING, REV. JOHN AMBROSE, M.A., Burma Eccl. Estabt. (senr. chaplain, Burma) (b. 12th Sept., 1894).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 7th May, 1926; junr. chaplain, May, 1928; transfed. to Burma, Feb., 1938; senr. chaplain, May, 1938; served with govt. of U.P. from Sept., 1942.

HARDMAN, JAMES SNELSON, O.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (sec. fin. dept., Bihar) (b. 7th June, 1905).—Educ. at Manchester Grammar School, and Trinity College, Cambridge; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1929; arrived, 29th Nov., 1929, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and coll.; under-secty. to govt., pol. and appts. dept., Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1934; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1936; attaché, dept. of education, health and lands, Nov., 1938; under-secty., ditto, May, 1939; O.B.E., June, 1944; sec. fin. dept., Bihar, Sept., 1944; mag. and collr. (confd.) Oct., 1945; again fin. sec., Apl., 1946.

HARDWICK, DONALD ROSS, Indian Police (inspr.-genl., Bengal) (b. 26th Feb., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 18th Dec., 1914; offg. supt., May, 1924; confd., Dec., 1925; asst. inspr.-genl., Jan., 1933 to Dec., 1935; Indian Police medal, 1939; confd. inspr.-genl., Dec., 1942.

HARDY, THE RT. REV. ALEXANDER OGILVY, M.A., D.D., (b. 18th Sept., 1891).—Apptd. Bishop of Nagpur, 21st Dec., 1937.

HARDY, DONALD PEYERIL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., U.P.) (b. 29th July, 1912).—Educated at High School, Middlesbrough, and Selwyn College, Cambridge; appointed after exam. of 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1935 and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. commr., Nov., 1937.

HARDY, JAMES DOUGLAS, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 8th June, 1915).—Educ. at Penistone Grammar School and Caius College, Cambridge; joined the service, 23rd Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; p.a. to commr., March, 1939; sub. divl. offr., Nov., 1940; judge, small cause ct., Simla, Apl., 1942; dist. and sees. judge, July, 1944.

HARE, REV. ARTHUR NEVILLE, B.A., late Indian Eccles. Establ. (United Provs.) (b. 28th Feb., 1886).—Retd., Feb., 1939.*

HARE, REGINALD ARTHUR PROCTOR, O.B.E., Indian Police (dep. inspr.-gen., Bihar) (b. 13th

Feb., 1896).—Joined the serv. as asst. supt. on 10th March, 1921; supt., July, 1925; O.B.E., June, 1944; D.I.G., (confd.) Oct., 1944.

HARE-DUKE, ARTUHR ROBERT AUBREY, M.A., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Rlys., E.I. Rly, (b. 13th July, 1885).—Retd., July, 1940.

HARGREAVE, HERBERT NEWTON, late Ind. Police (Orissa) (b. 21st Jan., 1905).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, on 8th Dec., 1924; offg. supt., Feb., 1933; confd., sept., 1937; transfed. to Orissa, Dec., 1939; retd., Dec., 1945.

HARI CHAND, M.C., M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (civil surg., Punjab) (b. 26th Aug., 1886).—First commn., dated 31st Jan., 1914; in milty. employ. to 30th Jan., 1924; civil surg., Jan., 1924.

HARICHAND, D. E., P.H.E., D.Litt. (Paris) late Indian Educl. Service (b. 26th Apr., 1889).—Apptd. supt. of Sanskrit studies, Bihar and Orissa, 8th Apr., 1918; profr. of Sanskrit, Patna, Apr., 1929; on for. serv. as princpl. T.N.J. Coll., Bhagalpur, July, 1934 to July, 1939; princpl., Patna Coll., July, 1939; retd., 2nd June, 1944.

HARIHARAN, M. K., Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. 26th Dec., 1909).—dep. fincl. advr., mil. fin., May, 1945.

HARISH CHANDRA, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, United Provs.) (b. 15th Sept., 1894).—Educ. at Muir Central Coll., Allahabad, and Oxford Univ. (Non-Coll.), apptd. proby. dep. collr., 4th March, 1918; asst. mag. and collr., 1st March, 1922; jt. mag., Oct., 1924; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1925; offg. sess. and sub. judge, Dec., 1926; confd., June, 1929; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1929; judicial secty., and legal remembrancer, United Provs., Nov., 1939.

HARISH CHANDRA, KHANNA, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 4th Nov., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., on 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Dec., 1928; on depts. to forest research inst., Dehra Dun Apr., 1929.

HARIVANSH LAL, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 6th Dec., 1912). Educ. at D.A.V. High School, Lahore, Punjab Univ., and Jesus College, Oxford; joined the service, 15th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; transfed. to Orissa; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1940; dir. of dev., and elections officer Jan., 1944; sec. to govt., development dep., June, 1946.

HARLOW, CHRISTOPHER MILLWARD, C.I.E., B.Sc., late Indian Forest Service (Cent. Provs.) (b. 5th Jan., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 23rd Dec., 1911; on milty. duty from 30th Sept., 1916 to 1st May, 1917; dep. consvr., Dec., 1916; employed under Rewa Durbar, Nov., 1929; offg. consvr., May, 1931; confd., Aug., 1936; chief consvr., March, 1940; C.I.E., June, 1942; retd., Jan., 1944; and re-empld. as sec. divnl. and resettlement dept., Jan., 1944; retd., Mar., 1946.

HARNAM DAS BHANOT (see Bhanot, H. D.)
HARNETT, WALTER LIDWELL, C.I.E., M.B., F.R.C.S., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. retd. (b. 7th June, 1879).—Retd., Dec., 1934.* (addl. member, India Office medl. bd. and examiner of surgical instruments, India Store Dept., May, 1941 to Nov., 1945.

HARPER, REGINALD KIRMAN, M.C., late Indian C.S. (Burma) (b. 31st Dec., 1895).

—Educated at King Edward VII Grammar School, Morpeth; joined the service, 29th Oct., 1923; and served in Burma as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Dec., 1927; offg. regr., co-op. societies, Burma, March, 1932; exr., local fund accts., Burma, June, 1936; commr. of income-tax, March, 1938; on duty in recon. dept., May to July, 1943; retd., Dec., 1945.

HARRIES, SIR ARTHUR TREVOR, Bengal Judl. Dept. (chief justice, high ct. Calcutta).—Apptd. judge, high ct., Allahabad, July, 1934; chief justice, high ct., Patna, Oct., 1938; Knighted, Jan., 1939; ch. justice high ct. Calcutta, Nov., 1946.

HARRIS, SIR DOUGLAS GORDON, K.B.E., C.S.I., C.I.E., M.I.E. (Ind.), late Dept. of Industries and Labour, Govt. of India (b. 19th Oct., 1883).—Retd., May, 1934; offi. member, exec. council of Palestine, Jan., 1936; K.B.E., Jan., 1942.*

HARRIS, HENRY WILLIAM, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 30th May, 1883).—Retd., March, 1940.*

HARRIS, HUBERT ARNOLD, O.B.E., Indian Serv. of Engrs. (ch. engr., Punjab) (b. 22nd July, 1896).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Dec., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1928; offg. under-secty. to govt., Punjab, p.w.d., bldgs. and road bch., May, 1933; and again, Oct., 1936; under-secty., p.w.d., Punjab, Nov., 1939; suptg. engr. (subst.) July, 1944; ch. engr. and sec. to govt., Nov., 1945. O.B.E., June, 1946.

HARRIS, JOHN FREDERICK WILLOUGHBY, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 19th June, 1912).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., United Provs., 1st Nov., 1931; confd., Apr., 1934; offg. supt., July, 1936; (confd.) Nov., 1944.

HARRIS, JOHN RUSSELL, Indian Police (dep. commr., Bombay) (b. 19th March, 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, 14th Nov., 1927; confd., Nov., 1929; offg. supt., Sind, May, 1932; cent. intell. offr., Sind., Sept., 1939; confd. Oct., 1940; dep. commr., Bombay, Dec., 1945.

HARRIS, REGINALD JOHN, Indian State Rlys. (asst. tel. supt., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 29th Jan., 1901).—Asst. tel. supt., Jan., 1902; asst. transportation supt. tel. (junior), Nov., 1922; senior scale, Jan., 1939.

HARRIS, RONALD MONTAGUE JOSEPH, M.V.O., B.A., India Office (acting principal) (b. 6th May, 1913).—Educ. at Harrow and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. asst. principal, India Office, 16th November, 1936; posted to Burma Office, Apr., 1937; services loaned to the Cabinet Offices, Jan., 1939 to Oct., 1944; actg. princpl., June, 1941; M.V.O., Jan., 1943; pte. sec. to sec. of state for India, Sept., 1946.

HARRISON, ARTHUR NEVILLE JOHN, C.I.E., B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 15th Sept., 1881).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1904; asst. examr., Jan., 1905; dep. examr., Apr., 1909; dep. chief auditor, B.B. & C.I. Rly., Apr., 1924; chief auditor, ditto, Dec., 1925; C.I.E., June, 1936.

HARRISON, SIR CHARLTON SCOTT CHOLMELEY, Kt., C.I.E., M.I.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 13th May, 1881).—Retd., June, 1935.*

HARRISON, CLIFFORD PEVENSEY MATTISON, M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bengal) (b. 23rd Feb., 1884).—Retd., Jan., 1939.*

HARRISON, CAPT. D. H., M.B.B.S. (Lond.),

M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., D.R.C.O.G., I.M.S., (b. Sept., 1914).—Date of first commn. 1st Nov., 1937; medl. offr. and vice-consul Zahidan, July, 1943; civil surgeon in Baluchistan var. from Feb., 1945.

HARRISON, FRANCIS ANTHONY KITCHENER, M.A., India Office (actg. princpl., ext. dept.) (b. 28th Aug., 1914).—Educ. at Winchester and New College, Oxford; apptd. asst. princpl., 1st Nov., 1917; asst. priv. sec. to the sec. of state, Feb. 1941; actg. princpl., Aug., 1943.

HARRISON, GEORGE FRANCIS, Indian Police (dist. supt., Madras) (b. 3rd July, 1909).—Joined the service as proby; asst. supt., 3rd Dec., 1928; confd., Jan., 1931; confd. as dist. supt., Aug., 1942.

HARRISON, JAMES LEES, Indian Forest Service (b. 3rd May, 1893).—Joined the service as forest engr., Coorg, 24th Nov., 1921; ditto, Assam, 4th Dec., 1927; dep. consvr., Oct., 1932; lecturer, Indian Forest College, Dehra Dun, Sept., 1938.

HARRISON, JOSEPH RICHARD, C.S.I., C.I.E., F.G.S., Indian State Ryls. (ch. mining engr., rly. bd.) (b. 25th Feb., 1888).—Joined the service as asst. coal supt., 13th March, 1916; colliery supt., Kargali colliery, G.I.P. Rly., Feb., 1923; supt. of collieries, Oct., 1925; offg. chief mining engr., rly. board, variously from Apl., 1927; confd., June, 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1942; C.S.I., June, 1946; dep. coal commr., (prodcn.), June 1944.

HARRISON, WALTER LEONARD, M.B.E., Office of the priv. secy. to H.E. the Viceroy (asst. secy.) (b. 20th Dec., 1889).—Joined A.H.Q. India, Sept., 1919; supt. def. dept., Jan., 1936; asst. secy., Nov., 1937 to Jan'y. 1938; on spl. duty, office of P.S.V., 1st July, 1939; asst. secy., ditto, 15th Jul., 1939; M.B.E., Jan., 1946.

HARRISON, WILLIAM, late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 22nd Jan., 1877).—Retd., May, 1938.*

HART, FRANK ANTHONY ALBERT, O.B.E., B.A., Indian Forest Service (asst. consvr., Orissa) (b. 30th Oct., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Bihar and Orissa, on 29th Nov., 1921; agency forest officer, Nov., 1930; O.B.E., Jan., 1936.

HART, FREDERIC JOHN ALBERT, O.B.E., Indian Forest Serv., (dep. consvr. Bengal) (b. 2nd Jan., 1896).—Joined the serv., as asst. consvr. on 15th Nov., 1921; dep. consvr., Nov., 1922; O.B.E., June, 1945.

HARTLEY, ARTHUR COULTON, C.I.E., O.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr. Bengal) (b. 24th March, 1906).—Educ. at University of Manchester and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and coll.; jt. mag. and dep. coll., May, 1931; settlmt. offr., Dec., 1934; asst. secy. to govr., Bengal, Oct., 1938; O.B.E., Jan., 1943; dir. of rationing, Jan., 1945; dir. genl. of food, Aug., 1945; C.I.E., Jan., 1946; on l.p.r., Feb., 1947.

HARTLEY, GEORGE EDWARD, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 2nd Apl., 1907).—Apptd. asst. exec. engr., United Provs., 24th Oct., 1930; exec. engr., Oct., 1939; on depn. to R.I.N. June, 1940.

HARTNOLL, ERIC STEWART, B.A., late Indian Forest Service (Burma) (b. 5th Jan., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 21st Dec., 1915; dep. consvr., Feb., 1914; offg. consvr., Apl., 1936; confd., Mar., 1938; ret'd., Jan., 1947.

HARTOG, SIR PHILIP JOSEPH, K.B.E., C.I.E., M.A., B.Sc. (b. 2nd March, 1864).—Ret'd., Apl., 1930.*

HARTY, ARTHUR HENRY, C.I.E., M.R.C.S. (Eng.) L.R.C.P. (Lond.) Maj.-Genl., I.M.S.—Apptd. offg. supt., central mental hosp., Yervada, Aug., 1925; confd., Sept., 1926; offg. civil-surg., Dec., 1929; C.I.E., Jan., 1942; inspr. gen., civil hosp., Aug., 1943; surg. genl., govt. of Bombay, Oct., 1945.

HARVEY, ALEXANDER FORDYCE, F.C.H., late Indian State Railways (b. 24th March, 1884).—Retd., March, 1939.*

HARVEY, BERNARD ALEXANDER MACLEOD FORTESQUE, B.A., Indian Police (b. 19th Nov., 1916).—Appointed asst. supt., Madras, on probn. 20th Feb., 1939.

HARVEY, CECIL WALTER LEWERY, C.I.E., O.B.E., M.C., Lieut.-Col. I.A., Indian Polit. Serv. (b. 27th Oct., 1897).—First commn. dated 12th Nov., 1914; in milty. employ to 30th Apl., 1924; asst. mag. and collr., Agra, May, 1924; on foreign service as adviser and pte. sec. to Raja of Poonch, Jan., 1925; offg. under-sec. to govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., Jan., 1927; under-sec. to A.G.G. in Rajputana and C.C. in Ajmer Merwara, March, 1927; under-sec. to resident of Hyderabad, Apl., 1927; ditto to agent to gov. genl. in Rajputana, May, 1928; offg. under-secy. to govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., March, 1929; confd., Sept., 1929; on foreign service in Manipur States, Dec., 1930; first asst. to resdt., Baroda, Feb., 1933; secy. to A.G.G., Gujarat states, Apl., 1933; pol. agent, W. Kathiawar agency, Oct., 1934; secy. to A.G.G. states of Western India, March, 1936; O.B.E., Jan., 1938; Prime Minister, Alwar State, Sept., 1938; pol. agt., Malwa, Feb., 1942; sec. resdt. C. India, June, 1942; pol. agt., Bhopal, Apl., 1944; offg. resdt. cl. II and resdt. for Kolhapur and the Deccan States, Mar., 1945; C.I.E., June, 1945.

HARVEY, H. Capt. (E), R.I.N., (b. 4th Nov., 1899).—First commd. 4th Nov., 1919; eng. and harbour master, Port Blair.

HARVEY, THOMAS, M.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs., (Bombay) (b. 13th Nov., 1885).—Retd., Feb., 1938.*

HASAN, ALI (see Ali Hasan).

HASAN SAIYID WAZIR (see Wazir Hasan, S.). HASAN, SHEIKH MAHMUD, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (sub. collr., Madras) (b. 14th June, 1908).—Educ. at Government Jubilee High School, Lucknow, Lucknow University and Magdalen College, Cambridge; joined the service, 9th October, 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933; sub. collr., Feb., 1936; ch. presdcy. mag., Oct., 1945.

HASAN, SYED IBN-I., Capt. I.A. (b. 10th Oct., 1910).—Apptd. to I.P.S. on probn., Nov., 1936; confd. in I.P.S., Jan., 1942; under sec., external affairs dept., Oct., 1944; asst. pol. agt. and asst. commr., Sibi, Jan., 1945; asst. pol. agt. and colonization offr., Nasirabad, July, 1945; pol., agt. and dep. commr., Sibi (addl. charge), July, 1945.

HASAN, SYED IMDAD, M.Sc., Indian Police, United Provs. (b. 10th Dec., 1920).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn. after exam. of 1942.

HASAN, SYED SIDDIQUE, Indian C.S. (mag. and collr. United Provs.) (b. 4th Feb., 1904).—Educ. at Univ. of Lucknow and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 14th Oct., 1929; arrived, 19th Nov., 1929, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; offg.

mag. and collr., Aug., 1933; regr. of co-op. societies, Jan., 1941; mag. and collr. (confid.), Dec., 1944.

HASAN, ZAFAR (see Zafar Hasan).

HASAN ZAHEER, SAIVID, B.A., Indian C.S. (educ. secty. to govt., United Provs. (b. 16th Nov., 1899).)—Educ. at Allahabad Univ. and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 9th Nov., 1923; arrived, 14th Dec., 1923, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. commr., March, 1925; jt. mag., Apl., 1926; offg. mag. and collr., Nov., 1928; and again, Sept., 1933; addl. dep. secty., genl. bch., United Provs. (temp.), Apl., 1935; dep. secty. to govt., U.P., March, 1937; ditto, India, mag. and collr. (confid.), Oct., 1938; temp. addtl. dep. secty., govt. of India, lab. dept., June, 1940; educen. sec. govt., U.P., Jan., 1944.

HASAN, ZIA-UL (see Zia-ul Hasan).

HASHIM, RAZA SAIVID, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 16th Feb., 1910).—Educ. at Government High School, Hardoi, Lucknow Christian College, University of Lucknow and Jesus College, Oxford; joined the Service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bombay as asst. commr.; served in Sind from Jan., 1939; dep. sec. to govt., May, 1940; provl. press advr., Sept., 1941.

HASLEHURST, HAROLD MAITLAND, M.B.E., Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Bombay) (b. 30th Nov., 1888).—Joined, 10th Dec., 1908; on milty. duty from May, 1915 to Feb., 1919; M.B.E., June, 1919; supt. of police, June, 1921; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1923; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., March, 1936; confd. May, 1936.

HASNAIN, KHAN BAHADUR, S. G. (b. 13th Jan., 1891).—Apptd. asst. secty., legislative assembly dept., Apl., 1939; retd., Jan., 1946.

HASSAN, AHMAD, Khan Bahadur, M.A., Punjab C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. 20th Jan., 1885).—Joined the service, 3rd Nov., 1908; extra asst. commr., July, 1912; dep. commr., subst. perm., July, 1933.

HASSAN, KHWAJA MUHAMMAD, Khan Bahadur, B.A., Indian State Rlys. (b. 20th March., 1891).—Joined the service, 14th Oct., 1914; dep. dir., estabt., rly. bd., May, 1932; supervisor of rly. lab., May, 1937 to June, 1945.

HASSAN, M. Major.—Offr. on spec. duty, commerce dept., Oct., 1944; Indian Govt. Trade Commr., Teheran, June, 1945.

HASSAN, SYED IBN-I, Capt., I.A., Indian Politic. Serv.—First sec. to ajt.-genl. for India in China, June, 1946; H.M. chargé d'affaires, Indian agency-genl. in China, June, 1946.

HASSAN, S. MANZOOR, Punjab Serv. of Engr. (b. 1st Dec., 1898).—joined the serv., 4th Jan., 1933; confd., Jan., 1936; asst. engr., Mar., 1936; exec. engr. (confd.), June, 1939; offg. var. as suptg. engr.

HASSAN, SYED FIDA, O.B.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr. Punjab) (b. 4th Dec., 1908).—Educ. at D.S. High School, Lahore, Punjab University, the School of Oriental Studies, London, and Oriel College Oxford; joined the service, 5th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub-divl. offcr., Apl., 1936; offr. on spec. duty, taxation, finr. commd's office, Jan., 1941; spec. offr., home dept., Sept., 1941; colonization offr., Haveli project, 1944 rev. sec. to fin. commrs., May, 1945; regl. dir. Mar., 1946 O.B.E., Jan., 1946.

HASTINGS, ARCHIBALD WILLIAMS, late

mil. accts. dept. (b. 18th Aug., 1880).—Joined the service as mil. acct., 2nd cl., Feb., 1912; confd., cl. I offcr., Nov., 1934; retd., Aug., 1944.

HATCH-BARNWELL, ANTHONY WILLIAM CHARLES, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 6th March 1912).—Educ. at Sherborne and Worcester College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1934; arrived in India, Dec., 1935, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1938; addl. mag., Apl., 1941; settlement offr. Sept., 1941; mag. and collr., Jan., 1945.

HATCH-BARNWELL, STEPHEN BENEDICT, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 26th June, 1909).—Educ. at Malvern College and Keble College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1935; mag. and collr., July, 1941; dep. dir. civil supplies, Dec., 1943; dir., ditto, Feb., 1946.

HATFIELD, MORGAN BESLEY, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (supig. engr., United Provs.) (b. 16th Jan. 1893).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1919; asst. engr., Jan., 1920; asst. exec. engr., March, 1921; exec. engr., Oct., 1925; confd. as suptg. engr., Nov., 1943.

HATT-COOK, ROWLAND, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 14th Sept., 1885).—Retd., Jan., 1937.*

HAWES, CHARLES GEORGE, C.I.E., M.C., B.Sc. (Lon.), A.C.G.I., A.M.I.C.E., M.R.San.I., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Sind) (b. 7th March, 1890).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1912; in milty. employ from 19th June, 1915 to 7th Feb., 1919; exec. engr., Dec., 1919; C.I.E., June, 1939; retd., Aug., 1945.

HAWES, DERRICK GORDON HARRINGTON, Capt. I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 22nd May, 1907).—First commn., 29th Jan., 1927; in mil employ up to 23rd March, 1934; p.a. to Resident, Kashmir, March, 1934; under training in the Punjab, Oct., 1934; under-secty. to A.G.G. to C.I., March, 1936; pol. agent, Bhopal, Sept., 1936; under-secty. to the A.G.G. in C.I., Nov., 1936; offg. dep. opium agent in Malwa, in addn., Nov., 1936; confd. in the Indian pol. service, Apl., 1937; on foreign service in Alwar State, Dec., 1937; under secty., pol. dept., Mar., 1938; confd. Nov. 1938; first asst. to resdt. in Kashmir, Sept., 1940; sec. resdt., E. States, July, 1942; ditto, Hyderabad, March, 1943; dep. sec., pol. dept., July, 1945.

HAWES, RONALD NISBETT, C.B.E., Capt., R.E., retd., India Posts and Tels. (chief tele. commn., engr.) (b. 11th Nov., 1895).—Joined the service, 5th Jan., 1920; divl. engr., wireless, Oct., 1923; dir., Calcutta stn., Indian State broadcasting service, in addn., Apl., to Oct. 1933; chief tele. commn. engr., Burma, Apl., 1937; C.B.E., June, 1941.

HAWKER, REGINALD JAMES, O.B.E., Office of High commr. for India (hr. exec. offr., stores dept.) (b. 9th Dec., 1884).—Apptd. 2nd cl. clerk, India store depot, 21st Sept., 1903; transf. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. officer, Apl., 1922; higher clerical offr., May, 1922; higher exec. officer, May, 1926; actg. princpl. ditto, Dec., 1939; actg. controller May, 1940; O.B.E., Jan., 1946.

HAWKES, FRANK ROXBURGH, O.B.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 9th Oct., 1885).—Retd., Oct., 1940.†

HAWLEY, GEORGE ALBERT, Lieut. Comdr., R.I.N.R., (b. 18th Dec., 1907).—Port Officer, Burma, Apl., 1939; served with R.I.N.S. from

16th Apr., 1942; port offr. again, Jan., 1946.

HAWLEY, HERBERT, O.B.E., M.Sc., F.I.C., Medical Dept., Madras (b. 4th Nov., 1887).—Apptd. govt. analyst, King Inst., Guindy, 9th Jan., 1924; ret'd., Nov., 1943; re-empld. as govt. analyst, Nov., 1943; O.B.E., Jap., 1944.

HAWORTH, SIR LIONEL BERKELEY HOLT K.B.E., Lieut.-Col., I.A. (ret'd.); late Indian Political Service).—Ret'd., May, 1929.*

HAWTHORN, GEORGE THOMAS, Office of the High Commr. for India (exec. officer, store dept.) (b. 20th June, 1892).—Apptd. to store dept., Nov., 1919; clerical officer, July, 1921; exec. officer, Jan., 1926.

HAY, ALLAN SELWOOD, late Indian State Rlys. (N.W. Rly.) (21st July, 1888).—Ret'd., Jul., 1943.†

HAY, BROUGHTON, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Orissa) (b. 2nd Nov., 1914).—Educ. at Radley and New College, Oxford; joined the service, 21st Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in B. and O. as asst. mag. and collr.; posted to Orissa from May, 1938; asst. pol. agent, Chhattisgarh states, June, 1941; under-sec. to resdt. for Baroda states, July, 1942; asst. commr., Peshawar, May, 1943; sup. asst. commr. Bannu, Apr., 1944; city mag., Peshawar, July, 1944; asst. commr., Nowshera, Dec., 1944; confd. in the I.P.S., Mar., 1945; dep. commr., Bannu, June, 1946.

HAY, NORMAN TREVOR CARLTON, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr. 8th Feb., 1931; exec. engr., Dec., 1940; admin. offr., irrign. dept., 1944; again exec. engr., Feb., 1946.

HAY, ROBERT, C.I.E., M.B., Major-Gen., I.M.S. (dep. dir. genl., I.M.S.) (b. 8th March, 1889).—First commn. dated 23rd Jan., 1917; in milty. employ. to 25th June, 1925; offg. agency surgn., Bundelkhand, July, 1925; offg. medl. officer, Seistan consulate, Feb., 1926; agency surgn., D.I. Khan, Nov., 1928; ditto, Kurram, Apr., 1930; resdy. surgn., Kashmir, Apr., 1931; agency surgn., Bundelkhand, Dec., 1931; civil surgn., Quetta, Nov., 1933; ch. medl. officer, Baluchistan, March, 1935; resdy. surgn., Mewar, Sept., 1935; ch. medl. officer, Rajputana, Dec., 1935; dep. dir. genl., I.M.S., Jan., 1939; inspr.-gen. civil hosp., Punjab, Oct., 1942 to May, 1944; surgeon-general with Bombay govt. (offg.) from July, 1944; confd., Jan., 1945; C.I.E., Jan., 1942.

HAY, WILLIAM RUPERT, C.S.I., C.I.E., Lieut.-Col., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 16th Dec., 1893).—First commn. dated 3rd July, 1915; joined pol. dept., 25th May, 1920; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, Aug., 1921; asst. commr., Bannu, Dec., 1923; ditto, Tonk, March, 1924; pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Nov., 1925; asst. commr., Mardan, Dec., 1928; jt. dep. commr., Peshawar, Aug., 1930; spl. mag. in D.I. Khan dist., Aug., 1931; on special duty, Dokalim Boundary commn., June, 1932; pol. agent, Dir, Swat and Chitral, July, 1932; and again, Jan., 1933; offg. ch. secty. to govt., N.W.F.P., Nov., 1932; C.I.E., Jan., 1934; counsellor, Brit. legn., Kabul, Nov., 1934; offg. dep. secty., F. and P. dept., Govt. of India, Oct., 1936; confd., as dep. secty., external affairs dept., Apr., 1937; ditto, Nov., 1938; resdt. in Waziristan, Nov., 1940; resdt. in Persian Gulf, Nov., 1941; C.S.I., Jan., 1943; confd., resdt., cl. I, and A.G.G. resdt., and C.C. in Baluchistan, Aug., 1944.

HAY-NEAVE, DAVID REGINALD, Burma Frontier Serv., (b. 5th Sept., 1912).—Apptd., 22nd Oct., 1946.

HAYAT, SIR UMAR (see Umar Hayat Khan).

HAYDEN, ARTHUR BARTRUM, Major, R.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b. 16th Nov., 1901).—First commn. dated 13th July, 1921; asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1925; exec. engr., Nov., 1933; mil. duty, Nov., 1939 to Nov., 1945; civ. aff. serv., Nov., 1945 to Jan., 1946.

HAYES, ARTHUR ANDERSON, late Indian Police, Burma (b. 26th July, 1894).—Ret'd., Oct., 1938.*

HAYES, CYRIL BEAUCHAMP, M.C., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 30th Apr., 1894).—Ret'd., Feb., 1940.†

HAYFIELD, WILLIAM MONTAGUE, late Indian Service of Engrs., Burma (b. 16th Feb., 1883).—Ret'd., Feb., 1938.*

HAYLEY, THOMAS THEODORE STEIGER, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 4th Oct., 1913).—Educated at Clifton College and Peterhouse College, Cambridge; appointed on prob., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 13th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Nov., 1938, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; under-secty., govt. of Assam, June, 1940; publicity offr., June, 1940; dir. of publicity, June, 1945.

HAYWARD, SIR MAURICE HENRY WESTON, Kt., K.C.S.I. LL.B., Barr., late Indian C.S., Bombay—Ret'd. July, 1926.*

HAYWARD, REV. WILLIAM GEORGE, B.A., late Indian Eccles. Estab. (b. 18th June, 1888).—Ret'd., March, 1942.†

HAYWOOD, WILLIAM GERALD, late Indian Police (United Prov.) (b. 5th Sept., 1908).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 25th Nov., 1929; confd., Nov., 1931; ret'd., 3rd Apr., 1943.

HAZARI, RAJENDRA NATH, B.A., LL.B. (b. 4th Nov., 1901) (Military Accounts Dept.).—Joined service as an officer in class II, March, 1926; F.A. and secty., Quetta reconstruction committee Apr., 1939; revtd. to mil. accts. dept., June, 1940.

HAZRATULLAH, HABIBULLAH KHAN MOULVI, (b. 25th Sept., 1894).—Joined the service 1st Aug., 1914; senr. asst. to consult. surveyor, govt. of Sind, Aug., 1935 to Aug., 1937; consult. surveyor to govt. of Sind, Sept., 1937; ditto, Bombay, on prob., June, 1943; ditto, (confd.) June, 1944.

HEAD, WALTER RALPH TREVELYAN, Indian Police (Bengal) (b. 10th Aug., 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt. on prob., Oct., 1939.

HEALE, DAVID HERBERT, Indian Police (b. 4th Feb., 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on prob., Nov., 1938; confd., Sept., 1940.

HEALY, DANIEL, C.I.E., late Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 22nd Aug., 1884).—Ret'd., Aug., 1939.*

HEALY, ROWLAND HENRY SAVAGE, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Burma) (b. 13th Nov., 1905).—Educ. at Earlsfort House School, Dublin, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 19th Oct., 1929; arrived, Dec., 1929, and served in Burma as asst. commr. dep. regr., high ct., Rangoon, Aug., 1932; asst. dist. judge, Nov., 1934; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1936; confd., Oct., 1938; dist. and sess. judge, 1941; on spl. duty as evac. supply offr., May, 1942; dep. sec., reconstrn. dept. (Simla), Aug., 1943; spl. judge, April to

Aug., 1944; civ. off. serv., Aug., 1944; dist. and sess. judge, 1946.

HEANEY, GEORGE FREDERICK, C.B.E., Lieut-Col., R.E., Survey of India (dir.) (b. 1st June, 1897).—First commn., dated 26th May, 1916; in milty. employ to 10th Aug., 1921; asst. supt., Aug., 1921; offg. supt., March, 1929; confd., Aug., 1929; offg. dir., July, 1943; C.B.E., July, 1943; dir., Oct., 1944.

HEAPE, ROBERT H., A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr.) (b. 8th Aug., 1894).—Joined the service as resdnt. engr., G.I.P. rly., 30th June, 1921; exec. engr., Apl., 1935.

HEARN, GEORGE WILLIAM, India Office (supgt. executive officer, acctn.-gen'l's dept.) (b. 23rd June, 1889).—Educ. at Central Foundation Sch., London; apptd. clerk, 2nd class, 4th Dec., 1907; minor staff clerk, Jan., 1920; actg. staff clerk, Apl., 1921; higher exec. officer (acting), Apl., 1922; confd., Nov., 1922; also assessor of income-tax; suptg. exec. officer, Sept., 1935; lent to min. of aircraft prodn., May, 1940; actg. asst. acct.-gen. (in absentia), Nov., 1945.

HEARN, SIR GORDON RISLEY, Kt., C.M.E., D.S.O., A.M.I.C.E., Lieut.-Col., R.E., late Railway Dept.—Retd., Sept., 1926.*

HEARN, JOHN WHITCOMBE, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., LL.B., late Indian C.S. (Punjab) (b. 27th Nov., 1885).—Educ. at Blundell's Sch., Tiverton, Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge, and University Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 28th Nov., 1910, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under-sec. to govt. of India, rev. and agric. dept., Oct., 1920; dep. commr. (provl.), Oct., 1924; ditto (perm.), Oct., 1927; home secty. to govt., Punjab, Oct., 1930; offg. commr., Feb., 1936; addl. secty. to govt., Punjab, Feb., 1936; commr., March, 1936; C.I.E., Jan., 1941; addl. fin. commr. and addl. sec. to govt. (rev.), Dec., 1941; C.S.I., June, 1945; ret'd., May, 1946.

HEATH, CLEMENT JOHN, late Indian Police (Burma) (b. 10th June, 1890).—Retd., Jan., 1943.†

HEATHCOCK, REV. DOUGLAS WILLIAM, Indian Eccles. Estabt. (junr. chaplain) (b. 2nd Jan., 1897).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., Lahore Diocese, 14th Apl., 1942.

HECTOR, JOHN ALEXANDER ERNEST, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b. 11th Feb., 1901).—Joined the service on 1st Oct., 1923; exec. engr., Oct., 1932; ditto, temp. aviation divn., central p.w.d., Rangoon, Feb., 1935 served in Indian Army to May, 1946.

HEDDON, HAROLD, late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 13th Oct., 1882).—Retd., Oct., 1942.†

HEENAN, JOHN LAWDER, Indian Police (b. 21st Apl., 1896) (dep. inspr.-genl. Burma).—Joined the serv. as asst. dist. supt., on 7th Feb., 1921; offg. dist. supt., July, 1924; confd. May, 1929; served under govt. of Bihar to Aug., 1944; civ. aff. serv., to Jan., 1946; dep. inspr.-genl., May, 1946.

HEINING, JOSEPH ERIS, B.Sc., Indian State Rlys. (N.W. Rly.) (b. 27th Jan., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., 1st Oct., 1919; offg. exec. engr., Oct., 1925; confd., June, 1935; dep. gen. mangr. Oct., 1941; ch. engr. (confd.) Mar., 1945; on l.p.r., May, 1946.

HEJMADI, VASUDEO SUNRAO, Indian C.S. (collr., Madras) (b. 26th Jan., 1900).—Educ. at St. Xavier's High School, Bombay, and Caius Coll., Camb.; apptd. after exam. of 1923; arrived, 3rd Dec. 1923; sub-collr., Jan., 1925;

offg. collr. and dist. mag., Feb., 1931; temp. dep. sec., developmt. dept., Apl., 1940; collr. (confd.), Nov., 1943; sec., revenue dept., Jan., 1943; and again, July, 1945.

HEMEON, CLARENCE REID, Indian C.S. (judge high ct., Nagpur) (b. 30th Jan., 1897).—Educ. at Cork Gr. Sch., and Univ. Coll., Cork; apptd. by nomination; joined the service, 1st Nov., 1921; arrived, 12th Apl., 1922, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; sub-judge, June, 1925; offg. dist. and sess. judge March, 1927; confd., Jan., 1935; offg. legal, remembr. and sec. legal dept., Central Provs. June, 1932; confd., Jan., 1935; addl. sec. govt. of India legisl. dept., Oct., 1939 to Feb. 1940; judge, high ct., Nagpur, June, 1944.

HEMMINGS, LEONARD, Indian State Rlys. (b. 11th Apl., 1894).—Production engr., E.I. rly., Apl., 1927; confd., senr. scale, Sept., 1937; govt. of India, dept. supply, dir. civil maintce. and planning in D.G.M.P., Sept., 1942; temp. D.D.G. (tech.) in D.G.A., Apl., 1945; dep. dir.-genl., Dec., 1945.

HEMSWORTH, THOMAS GARRETT FREDERICK, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Burma) (b. 2nd Aug., 1890).—Retired Aug., 1942.†

HENDERSON, SIR ALAN GERALD RUSSELL, B.A., late Ind. C.S. (Bengal) (b. 22nd Mar., 1886).—Educated at Westminster School and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after examination of 1909; arrived in India, 27th Nov., 1910, and served in E. Bengal and Assam as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to Bengal, Apl., 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Dec., 1915; I.A.R.O., Jan. to March, 1918; dist. and sessions judge, March, 1923; offg. secty., judicial dept., and supt. and remembr. of legal affairs, Apl., 1932; confd., July, 1932; offg. addl. judge, high ct., Calcutta, variously from Apl., 1933; actg. judge, ditto, Apl., 1934; confd., March, 1937; kt., June, 1945; ret'd., March, 1946.

HENDERSON, CHARLES ALEXANDER, C.S.I., V.D., late Indian C.S. (Madras) (b. 2nd May, 1882).—Retd., 11th Dec., 1940.†

HENDERSON, JOHN WILMOT, late Indian State Rlys. (N.W. Rly.) (b. 11th July, 1893).—Joined the service, 4th June, 1912; asst. transpn. traffic officer, Oct., 1924; offg. divl. personnel officer, N.W. rly., March, 1930; divl. transpn. officer, March, 1931; divl. supt., junr., Dec., 1940; ret'd., Mar., 1946.

HENDERSON, KENNETH HARVEY, O.B.E., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 24th Dec., 1906).—Educ. at Mill Hill, New College, Oxford, and King's College, London; joined the service, 15th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; pol. asst. and comdt. border milty. police, June, 1933; offg. dep. commr., March, 1935; dep. commr. sub. provl., Dec., 1941; O.B.E., Jan., 1944; dep. sec. to govt. and dep. transpt. contr., Jan., 1945.

HENDRY, J.T., Indian State Rlys. (b. 10th May, 1892).—Dep. ch. engr., S.I. Rly., Mar., 1945.

HENNESSY, JOSEPH MARTIN REEVES, O.B.E., L.R.C.P. & S. (Edin.), D.T.M. & H. (Lond.), Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.), late Medical Dept. Central Provs. (b. 7th May, 1886).—Retd., May, 1941.†

HENNESSY, JOSSELYN, B.A. Hons. (Oxon.) (b. 17th Nov., 1902).—Educ. at Charterhouse and New Coll., Oxford; chev. of legion of honr., 1937; apptd. dir. of public information, govt. of India, Sept. 1937 to Nov., 1941; on spl. duty,

inform. and bctg. dept. to Jan., 1942; fincl. sec. and pub. relns. offr. with agent genl. for India in U.S.A., Jan., 1942 to Mar., 1945; retd., 28th Sept., 1945.

HENNIKER-GOTLEY, GEORGE RAINALD, C.I.E., B.A., D.S.O., Indian Forest Service (ch. consvr., Punjab) (b. 5th Sept., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Punjab, 18th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., Aug., 1926; C.I.E., June, 1944; ch. consvr., March, 1945.

HENRY, COLIN, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 23rd Feb., 1902).—Educ. at King Edward VII School, Sheffield, and Wadham College, Oxford; joined the service, 23rd Oct., 1926; arrived, Dec., 1926, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, variously from June, 1931; confd., Nov., 1936; attd. govt. of India legisl. dept., Apl., 1938; on spec. duty, legal remembr.'s office, Aug., 1938; dep. commr., Nov., 1940.

HENSHAW, LEWIS, O.B.E., A.M.I.Mech.E., A.M.I.E.E., A.M.I.Struct.E., M.I.E. (Ind.) (Madras) (b. 2nd May, 1888).—Joined the service as elec. inspr. to govt., on 8th Nov., 1920; elec. engr. March, 1921; confd., Apl., 1924; suptg. engr. offr., Aug., 1935; confd., Aug., 1937; O.B.E., Jan., 1943; retd., May, 1945.

HERBERT, CHARLES GORDON, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 28th Feb., 1893).—Educ. at Merchant Taylor's Sch., and Wadham Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 14th Feb., 1920; arrived, 11th May, 1920; sub-collr. and jt. mag., May, 1923; offg. collr. and dist. mag., March, 1928; ditto (provl. subs.), Jan., 1936; secty. to A.G.G., in Rajputana, March, 1936; jt. secty., pol. dept., May, 1938; confd. in the Indian Political Service, Apl., 1939; C.I.E., June, 1939; secty. to H.E. the Crown Repres.; March, 1930; addl. secty., pol. dept., Dec., 1940; pol. agt., Jaipur, Apl., 1941; C.S.I., June, 1944; resdt. Gwalior, July, 1942; again, July, 1944; on sp. duty in pol. dept., Apl., 1946; resdt., cl. II (confd), May, 1946.

HERBERT, CHRISTOPHER ALFRED, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. sec. govt. United Provs.) (b. 15th June, 1913).—Educ. at Mountjoy School, Dublin, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 22nd Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in the U.P., as asst. mag. and collr., dep. sec., govt. United Provs., Feb., 1946.

HERDON, GERALD CHARLES ROUTH, Indian Police (supt., N.W.F.P.) (b. 30th July, 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 27th Dec., 1919; offg. supt., March, 1925; confd., May, 1926; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1928.

HERLIHY, JAMES MICHAEL, Burma Police (Cl. I) (b. 8th Apl., 1923).—Apptd. on probn. after seln., Aug., 1946.

HERON, ALEXANDER MACMILLAN, D.Sc., F.G.S., late Geological Survey of India (b. 31st July, 1884).—Retd., July, 1939.*

HERVEY, ARTHUR CHARLES CONSTANTINE, M.A. (Cantab.), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 18th Dec., 1886).—Retd., 1st May, 1942.†

HERVEY, W. F. Indian State Rlys. (b. 21st March, 1898).—Joined 16th Feb., 1923; dep. traffic mgr., G.I.P. Rly., July, 1945.

HESTERLOW, ALFRED MAURICE VICTOR, M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. retd. (Assam) (b. 4th May, 1887).—Retd., 1941.†

ETHERINGTON, THEODORE JOHN HOSTE,

B.A., late Indian C.S. (U.P.) (b. 29th Apl., 1914).—Retd., Apl., 1939.*

HEWETSON, CYRIL EDWARD, B.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr. Cent. Provs.) (b. 18th June, 1903).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. 25th Dec., 1926; dep. consvr., Dec., 1930.

HEWETT, DECIMUS HENRY, Indian State Rly. (dep. ch., mech. engr., G.I.P. rly.) (b. 30th Jan., 1893).—Joined the service, 12th March, 1926, production engr., G.I.P. rly., March, 1926; offg. works manager, G.I.P. rly., May, 1928; confd., Oct., 1932; dep. ch. mech. engr. provl., Nov., 1938; confd., Dec., 1940.

HEWITT, RICHARD CLAUDE LIFFORD, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bihar) (b. 10th Aug., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1912; exec. engr., Oct., 1921; offg. suptg. engr., variously from May, 1934; retd., March, 1944.

HEWLETT, GEORGE GORDON, India Office (actg. suptg. exec. officer mil. dept.) (b. 6th Aug., 1894).—Apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 7th Jan., 1913, and attd. to library; transf. to acctnt.-genls' dept., March, 1913; on mil. service from Dec., 1915 to Jan., 1919; exec. officer, Apl., 1922; asst. clk. to council, Feb. 1932 to Feb. 1935; actg. hr. exec. officer Feb., 1934; confd. Dec., 1934; actg. suptg. exec. offr., Jan., 1946.

HEYSHAM, ERIC HENRY BERKELEY, Indian State Rlys (dep. ch. optg. supt.) (b. 2nd March, 1896).—Joined the service, 28th Nov., 1919 as asst. supt., E.I. rly.; transptn. supt (traffic comml.), May, 1935; dep. ch. optg. supt. provl., Aug., 1941.

HEZLETT, JAMES, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S., Assam (b. 26th June, 1875).—Retd., Nov., 1934.*; chairman, pub. serv. commn., Assam, Apl., 1937 to March, 1940.

HIBBERT, RICHARD OSWALD, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 16th Dec., 1914).—Educ. at Shrewsbury and St. John's College, Cambridge; joined the service, 14th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; pol. asst. and comdt. border mil. police, Apl., 1941; dep. commr., July, 1942; chairman, improvement trust Lahore, May, 1945.

HICKEY, PATRICK FRANCIS BURKE, D.S.O., late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 14th Dec., 1885).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1909; in mil. employ from 18th June, 1915 to 5th May, 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1917; offg. suptg. engr., Nov., 1930; confd., Nov., 1931; offg. ch. engr., variously from Mar., 1935; confd., Dec., 1939; retd., 1st Feb., 1944.

HICKINBOTHAM, Tom, C.I.E., O.B.E., Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 27th Apl., 1903).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1923; in military employ until 15th March, 1930; offg. under-secty. to A.G.G., Punjab States, Dec., 1932; civil secty. to ch. commr., Aden, Dec., 1933; asst. pol. agent, Bahrain, Apl., 1936; offg. pol. agent, Bahrain, May, 1936; secty. to pol. resdt. in Persian Gulf, Nov., 1937; civil secty., member of exec. cl., Colony of Aden and passport offr., Aden, March, 1938; O.B.E., Jan., 1939; under sec. to pol. resdt., Persian Gulf, Feb., 1939; pol. agent, Muscat, Apl., 1939; pol. agt., Kuwait, Aug., 1941; C.I.E., Jan., 1944; pol. agt., Bahrain, Aug., 1943; again, Nov., 1944; pol. agt. in Kalat and pol. agt. in charge Bolan Pass, Sept., 1945.

HICKS, HENRY ARTHUR HUGH GERARD, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 31st Oct., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., on 11th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., Nov., 1926.

HICKS, VERNON WILLIAM FARQUHARSON, O.B.E., Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 30th Jan., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., on 27th Dec., 1919; addl. supt., March, 1926; supt., Aug., 1929; O.B.E., Jan., 1935; on depn. under govt. of India (rly. bd.) for employ. as supt., watch and ward dept., E.B. Rly., May, 1936 to Aug., 1939; temp. dep. inspr.-gen. prisons, Feb., 1943 to Aug., 1944.

HIDAYATULLAH, KHAN BAHADUR SHAIKH, SIR GHULAM HUSAIN, K.C.S.I., B.A., LL.B.—Member of govr.'s exec. council, Bombay, June 1928 to June, 1934; delegate to Indian round table conf., London, Nov., 1930—Jan., 1931; Second Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; services placed at disposal of Govt. of India, Reform Office, Oct., 1931; K.C.S.I., June, 1933.

HIGGINS, JOHN COMYN, C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (Assam) (b. 21st May, 1882).—Educ. at Bradfield and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived 22nd Dec., 1906, and served in E. Bengal and Assam as asst. mag., and collr.; vice-presdt. Manipur Durbar, May 1910; asst. commr., Assam, and ditto, Apl., 1912; C.I.E., June, 1920; dep. commr. March 1921; pol. agent, Manipur, Apl., 1924; offg. commr., March, 1934; ditto (provl. subs.), Feb., 1935; confd., Oct., 1935; member, rev. tribunal, Apl., 1939; retd., 22nd Dec., 1941; civ. liaison offr., Dec., 1941, to Jan., 1944; chairman, publ. serv. commn., Assam, Jan., 1944.

HIGGINS RICHARD, Indian Police (dep. inspr.-gen., Bengal) (b. 19th Apl., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 15th March, 1921; addl. supt., Feb., 1925, and again March, 1927; offg. supt., March, 1926; offg. dep. comm. of police, Calcutta, March, 1928; confd., Jan., 1931; confd., dep. inspr.-genl., May, 1943; Indian police medal, 1944; offr. of the Order of St. John.

HIGGS, MERVYN ARMSTRONG, M.B.E., M.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (U.P.) (b. 8th Oct., 1887).—Retd., July, 1938.†

HIGHAM, Rev. PHILIP, M.A., late Indian Ecclesi. Estabt. (b. 21st Sept., 1888).—Retd. April, 1942.†

HIGHET, JAMES COCHRANE, F.C.H., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Railways (N.W. Ry.) (b. 19th May, 1884).—Retd., May, 1939.*

HIGMAN, WALTER FREDERICK BARON, A.M.Inst.T., Indian State Rlys. (transpn. traffic-commel. supt., E.I. rly.) (b. 18th May, 1902); joined the service, 29th July, 1921; asst. supt. Apl., 1922; senr. scale (provl.), Aug., 1937; confd., July, 1938.

HILDERSLET, STANLEY HECTOR HAMILTON.—Apptd. commr. of Income Tax, Oct., 1945.

HILEY, ARTHUR CLIFFORD, C.I.E., late Indian Forest Service (b. 11th September, 1887).—Joined the service, Dec., 1910, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Dec., 1915; offg. consvr., July, 1927; confd., Aug., 1928; chief consvr., Bombay, Apl., 1937; C.I.E., Jan., 1939; retd., Jan., 1943.

HILL, KENNETH ARTHUR LULHAM, B.A. (Cantab.), Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 22nd Apl., 1899).—Educ. at Dulwich Coll. and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 30th Oct., 1922; confd., 13th Dec.,

1922, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., variously from March, 1932; confd., Feb., 1936; commr. presdy. divn., Nov., 1940; sec., forest and excise dept., Apl., 1941; sec., agric. dept., Feb., 1942; jt. sec. co-op. credit dept., Oct., 1942 to Apl., 1944; offg. commr. Rajshahi div., Feb., 1946.

HILL, NEVILLE CHARLES, B.A., Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 9th Sept., 1909).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Burma, 26th Jan., 1933; confd., Jan., 1935; civ. aff. serv. to Oct., 1945; dist. supt., 1945.

HILL, REGINALD JOHN JAMES, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 1st July, 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Edinburgh, and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1928; arrived, 12th Nov., 1928, and served in the Central Provinces as asst. commr., under-sec. to govt., Jan., 1931; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1932; sec. to govt. of India (fin.), July, 1944.

HILL, ROBERT HUGHES, C.I.E., M.A., Indian Agricl. Service (dep. dir. of agric. Cent. Provs.) (b. 5th Nov., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. dir. of agric., Dec., 1920; economic botanist. Dec., 1925; dep. dir. of agric., Oct., 1926; C.I.E., Jan., 1946.

HILL, RONALD ARTHUR CHARLES, O.B.E., Indian Police (dep. inspr.-gen., Punjab) (b. 11th July, 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th Oct., 1921; offg. supt., Feb., 1926; confd., July, 1927; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931; O.B.E., May, 1937; asst. inspr., gen.-rly. police, May, 1943; dep. inspr.-gen., police, Apl., 1944.

HILL, ROWLAND ALFRED KIRHKAM, M.B.E., late Indian Political Service (b. 26th March, 1884).—Retd., March, 1939.*

HILLS, GEORGE RICHARD, Burma Frontier Serv., (b. 13th Dec., 1916).—Apptd. on probn. after seln. Aug., 1946.

HILTON, KENNETH JOHN, Burma Civil Serv., (cl. I) (b. 20th June, 1920).—Educ. Swansea Grammar Sch. and Univ. Coll., Swansea; apptd. on probn. after seln. Aug., 1946.

HIND, NEVILLE GODFREY, C.S.I., M.C., Major-Gen., I.A.; (b. 8th Jan., 1892).—First commn., 6th Sept., 1911; in mil. employ until 18th May, 1938; dep. secty. to Govt. of India, def. dept., May, 1938 to 4th March, 1940; C.S.I., June, 1943.

HINDLEY, NOEL LANYON, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 24th Dec., 1893).—Educ. at Marlborough Coll. and Cambridge Univ.; apptd., after exam. of 1920; arrived, 4th Dec., 1920, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1925; dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1931; registrar, high ct., appellate side, Nov., 1931 to March, 1935; dist. and sess. judge. Assam, Nov., 1936; L.R. and sec. Assam legis. dept., Jan., 1946.

HIRA, H. P. Indian State Rlys. (b. 18th Jan., 1900).—Joined the serv., Jan., 1925; dep. traffic mgr., G.I.P. Rly., July, 1945.

HITCHCOCK, RONALD VICTOR, V.D., B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E. late Indian State Rlys. (b. 22nd June, 1885).—Retd., May, 1939.*

HITCHCOCK, WILLIAM SURRIDGE, late Indian Police (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 14th Nov., 1889).—Retd. 29th Jan., 1942.†

HLA, UTHA, B.A., Burma Educ. Serv. (b. 24th Mar., 1897).—Apptd. to Burma Educ. Serv. (cl. I), 2nd Dec., 1930; head master and inspr.

of schools, 30th Aug., 1934; asst. dir. pub. instrn. Dec., 1945.

HMUNG, RICHARD TUANG, Burma Front-Serv. (b. 11th Mar., 1917).—Apptd. 13th Nov., 1941.

HO, KWAY FOUNG, B.A., Burma C.S. (Cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 20th March, 1913).—Educ. at, Rangoon Univ.; joined the service, 8th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Dec., 1938, and served as asst. commr.; on military service, Nov., 1940; training with acct.-genl., Punjab, Jan., 1943; dep. acct.-gen., p. and t. accts. Delhi; asst. to audr.-genl., Burma (Simla) May to June, 1944; training with A.G. Burma, 1944-45; examr., local fund accts., June, 1946.

HOARE, CHARLES EDGAR, India Office (higher exec. officer, mil. dept.) (b. 1st Jan., 1891).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 13th Nov., 1913; war services—European war, 1914-16; exec. officer, Apl., 1922; joint editor, India Office List, May, 1932 to Oct., 1937; actg. higher exec. officer, March, 1933; confd., Sept., 1935; actg. supply officer, March, 1941; actg. suptg. exec. offr., June, 1945.

HOARE, THE RIGHT HON. SIR SAMUEL, Bt., P.C., G.C.S.I., G.B.E., C.M.G., Hon. LL.D. (Cantab.), M.P. (Lord Templewood), Secty. of State for India, Aug., 1931 to June, 1935.

HOBART, ROBERT CHARLES ARTHUR STANLEY, C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 27th July, 1881).—Retd., Apl., 1939.*

HOBSON, JAMES, Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 24th August, 1895).—Joined the serv., 16th Dec., 1922; offg. supt., November, 1925; confd., Nov., 1932; asst. to dep. inspr.-gen. of police, C.I.D., Poona, Oct., 1938 to Oct., 1939; dep. commr. police, Bombay, Nov., 1941 to June, 1943; dist. supt., Mar., 1944; Ind. Police medal, 1945, on I.p.r. Nov., 1945.

HOCKLEY, L. T., Indian State Rlys. (b. 13th Oct., 1899).—Joined the serv., 16th Sept., 1920; ch. comml. supt., S.I. Rly., 1st Jan., 1946.

HODDER, WILFORD OWEN PENDEREL, O.B.E., Indian Police Service (supt., N.W.F.P.) (b. 10th May, 1903).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 30th Nov., 1922; offg. dist. officer, frontier constabulary, March, 1926; offg. supt., Sept., 1930; supt. (provl. subs.), June, 1935; offg. asst. dir., intel., Govt. of India, July, 1939; supt., Nov., 1938; on spec. duty, C.I.D., Apl., 1940; asst. inspr.-gen., C.I.D., June, 1940; O.B.E., June, 1940; snr. asst. dir. intell., Quetta, Jan., 1944.

HODDER, WILLIAM ST. LAWRENCE, Indian Police (b. 10th Aug., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 16th Nov., 1927; addtl. supt., Oct., 1940; confd. as supt., Jan., 1943; under central govt., C.I.D., Delhi, June, 1944.

HODGE, EDWARD HUMFREY VERE, C.I.E., Lieut.-Col. retd., late I.M.S. (b. 28th Aug., 1883).—Retd., Aug., 1938.*

HODGE, JOHN DOUGLAS VERE, C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (Bengal) (b. 17th Oct., 1887).—Retd., Jan., 1939.*

HODGE, WILLIAM ERIC, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bengal) (b. 2nd Apl., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 6th Oct., 1921; dep. consvr., Nov., 1923.

HODGSON, V. O. J. (b. 10th Nov., 1901).—asst. govt. examr. of questioned docs., March, 1938; govt. examr., ditto, Nov., 1944.

HODSON, ERIC, O.B.E., Ind. Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Bengal) (b. 19th Mar., 1894).—Joined the serv. as proby. asst. supt., 2nd Dec., 1913; confd. June, 1915; addl. supt., April, 1922;

awarded King's police medal, 1924; supt., July, 1925; dep. commr. of police, Calcutta, Feb., 1934; dep. inspr.-gen., June, 1942; comdt. civil pioneer force, Bengal, Dec., 1942; O.B.E., Jun., 1945.

HODSON, ROBERT VIVIAN ERIC, Capt. I.A. (b. 20th July, 1914).—Apptd. to I.P.S. on probn., Oct., 1939; under-sec. to res. Baroda and for states of W.I. and Gujarat, Nov., 1944; confd., in the I.P.S., Feb., 1946; to N.W.F.P., 1946.

HOGG, SIR GILBERT PITCAIRN, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 2nd Feb., 1884).—Retd., Feb., 1941†

HOGG, SIR MALCOLM NICHOLSON, Kt., member of council of India, May, 1920, to Apl., 1925.

HOGSHAW, FRANCIS HENRY, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. 16th Dec., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 10th Oct., 1915; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. suptg. engr., Nov., 1934.

HOLBERTON, NELSON VAUGHAN, late Indian Forest Service (Burma) (b. 27th May, 1885).—Retd., Feb., 1938.*

HOLGATE, MAURICE JAMES, O.B.E., M.B., B.S. (Lon.), Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., ret. (b. 15th May, 1884).—Retd., May, 1939.*

HOLLAND, ARCHER SELWYN, late Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 23rd Oct., 1886).—Retd. 23rd Oct., 1941†

HOLLAND, EDGAR WILLIAM, C.I.E., Indian C.S.
