JOHNSTON, WILLIAM, M.A., late Indian C.S. (Bengal) (b. 13th May, 1888).—Retd., Aug., 1938.*

JOHNSTONE, THOMAS WHITE, O.B.E., A.R.C.Sc., D.I.C., late Factory Dept., Bombay (b. 31st Aug., 1887).—Joined the service as inspr. of factories, Bombay, 28th March, 1913; offg. ch. inspr., June, 1920; confd., May, 1923; O.B.E., Jan., 1936; retd., Aug., 1944.

JOLLEY, G. C. K., Indian State Rlys. (b. 12th Feb., 1893).—contr. of stores, B.B. & C.I. rly., Jan., 1946.

JOLLY, SIR GORDON GRAY, K.C.I.E., M.B., Ch.B., D.P.H., D.I.M., and H., K.H.P. Major-Gen., I.M.S. (dir.-genl., I.M.S.) (b. 6th Apl., 1886).—First commn., dated 1st Aug., 1908; C.I.E., June, 1919; in mil. employ to 7th March, 1922; asst. dir. of public health, Burma, March, 1922; offg. dir. of public health, March, 1927; confd., Feb., 1928; dep. dir.-genl., I.M.S., Dec., 1933; offg. public health commr. with the govt. of India, Nov., 1935; dir. pub. health, Burma, July, 1937; inspr.-genl., civil hosp., Punjab, Nov., 1937; dir.-genl., I.M.S., Sept., 1939; K.H.P., Aug., 1939; local rank of lieut.-genl., Oct., 1940; commdt., Order of St. John, June, 1941; K.C.I.E., June, 1941; K.-i-H. Gold Medal, June, 1946.

JOLLYE, HUMPHREY CYPRIAN BEVERLY, B.A., late Indian Forest Service (Orissa) (b. 26th Sept., 1888).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 5th Dec., 1912; with army dept. from 24th Sept., 1916, to 6th March, 1919; dep. consvr., Jan., 1920; employed

under govt. of India, rly. dept., as timber advisory officer, Oct., 1931; consvr. (confd.); retd., March, 1944.

JONES, ALFRED JOSEPH, M.B.E., Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Burma) (b. 25th July, 1901).—Joined the serv. as asst. dist. supt., Burma, on 27th Nov., 1922; offg. dist. supt. July, 1932; confd., Feb., 1937; M.B.E., Jan., 1943; civ. aff. serv., Jan. to Oct., 1945; dep. inspr.-genl., 1945.

JONES, ARTHUR DOUGLAS, Indian Police (b. 23rd Feb., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal, on probn., Dec., 1937; confd. Dec., 1939.

JONES, A. I. W., Indian State Rlys. (b. 24th Apl., 1895).—Joined 4th Aug., 1922; dep. ch. engr., S.I. Rly., Jan., 1946.

JONES, ASHLEY NORMAN POSTANCE, Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 5th Apl., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., on 2nd July, 1923; offg. dist. supt., March, 1927; confd., July, 1939; comdt., specl. armed constabulary, March, 1942.

JONES, SIR, CYRIL EDGAR, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., Ind. C.S. (princl. sec. to govt. of India, fin. dept.) (b. 29th Dec., 1891).—Educ. at Jesus Coll., Cambridge, apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 10th Dec., 1915; spl. asst. settlmt. officer; on mil. duty from Oct., 1917 to Jan., 1919; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Sept., 1918; spl. settlt. officer, Nov., 1920; dep. secty. to govt., fin. dept., Nov., 1929; offg. addl. secty., ditto, Apl., 1932; ditto, public dept., Apl., 1933; collr. (provl. subs.), Aug., 1933; secty. to govt., fin. dept., Madras, July, 1934; collr., Oct., 1934; C.I.E., Feb., 1937; secty. to govt. of India, fin. dept., Apl., 1939; C.S.I., June, 1941; K.C.I.E., June, 1944; offg. member of govr.-genl.'s exec. cl., May to Sept., 1944; sec. govt. of India, fin. dept., Oct., 1944; principal sec., ditto, Jan., 1946.

JONES, EDMUND BRYAN, C.I.E., Indian Police (Bengal) (b. 3rd June, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 26th Nov., 1909; supt., Dec., 1919; asst. to inspr.-genl., Nov., 1927; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Oct., 1932; awarded Ind. police medal, 1933; ditto (provl. subs.), July, 1934; confd., July, 1938; C.I.E., June, 1939; retd., 3 June, 1944.

JONES, EDMUND DOUGLAS JOHN, Indian Police (dist. supt., Central Provs.) (b. 13th March, 1892).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Nov., 1911; dist. supt., July, 1924; employed as dep. supt., watch and ward depot, E.I. Rly., Apl., 1928.

JONES, EDWARD ELLIS, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 23rd May, 1883).—Retd., Nov., 1938.*

JONES, FREDERICK THEODORE, C.I.E., M.V.O., late Indian Service as Engrs. (b. 30th July, 1885).—Joined the service, 18th Sept., 1907 asst. engr., Sept., 1908; M.V.O., Dec., 1911; exec. engr., May, 1917; C.I.E., Jan., 1931; offg. suptg. engr., variously, since May, 1925; confd., Aug., 1933; offg. ch. engr., Nov., 1932; and again, Apl., 1936; K.-i-H. Medal, 1st class, Jan., 1936; confd. as ch. engr., cent. pub. wks. dept., Aug., 1938; retd., July, 1940; apptd. consltg. engr., cent. public wks. dept., July, 1940; retd., Aug., 1945.

JONES, REV. GRYFFYDD WATCYN, B.A., late Indian Eccles. Estabt. (Punjab) (b. 2nd May, 1889).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 12th May, 1921; junr. chaplain, May, 1923; senr. ditto, Sept. 1929; retd., 1945.

JONES, HAROLD GORDON, late Indian State Railways (b. 5th April, 1890).—Joined the service, 4th April, 1920; asst. rolling stock

officer, Feb., 1925; transptn. (power) supt. E.I. rly., Aug., 1934; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., Apl., 1936; confd. Jan., 1938; retd., 1945.

JONES, IVAN ELLIS, C.I.E., Indian Civil Service (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 26th June, 1903).—Educ. at the High School, Harcourt Street, Dublin, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr. under-secty. to govt., home dept., Nov., 1929; offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1931; dep. commr. (subs. provl.), Oct., 1934; chairman, Lahore improvemnt. trust, Nov., 1935, variously, to Oct., 1937; dep. commr. (provl.), Oct., 1937; ditto, sub-permt., Feb., 1940; regr. co-op. socs., Apl., 1940; ditto, and dir., rural reconstrn., March, 1941; dir. of food purchases and dep. sec., govt., Punjab (supplies), March, 1944; C.I.E., June, 1944.

JONES, IVOR RHYS, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub. collr. and jt. mag.) (b. 4th Apl., 1916).—Educ. at West Ham Secondary School, Brasenose Coll., Oxford, and Clare Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1939; confd., 28th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940; sub. collr. and jt. mag. Oct., 1942; jt. sec., board of rev., civil supplies, Madras, Apl., 1944; and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

JONES, PHILIP NORTON, Indian Police (supt. and dep. commr., Bengal) (b. 27th March, 1903).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, on 7th Dec., 1922; offg. addl. supt., Jan., 1929; awarded King's police medal, Oct., 1933; supt., March, 1933; dep. commr. of police, Calcutta, June, 1935; bar to King's Police Medal, Nov., 1946.

JONES, REGINALD TREVOR, C.I.E., M.C., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 19th Dec., 1888).—Retd., 13th Apl., 1944.†

JONES, THOMAS, India Office (actg. hr. exec. offr., milit. dept.) (b. 20th June, 1900).—Apptd. cler. offr., Apl., 1920; actg. exec. offr., May, 1939; actg. hr. ditto, Oct., 1942.

JONES, THOMAS HENRY BERTRAM, Indian State Ry's. (divl. mech. engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 3rd Oct., 1900).—Asst. loco. supt., junr. scale, 11th Dec., 1922; divl. mech. engr. (provl.), senr. scale, Feb., 1937; confd., Jan., 1939.

JONES, THOMAS KIRKHAM, M.C., Indian Service of Engineers (b. 11th Aug., 1893).—Joined the service as forest engr., Punjab, on 27th Nov., 1921; under-secty. to govt., pub. wks. dept. (elect.), Punjab, Jan., 1930; apptd. to I.S.E. irrign. bch., Punjab, Jan., 1935; prinpl. govt. sch. of engr., Rasul, Apl., 1936; served in def. dept., Aug., 1941.

JONES, WILLIAM JOHNSTONE, late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 2nd Apl., 1884).—Retd., Apl., 1939.*

JORDAN, DAVID JOHN, Burma Front. Serv. (b. 28th Aug., 1920).—Apptd. on probn. after sehn. Aug., 1946.

JOSCELYNE, HAROLD AVELING, B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Ry's. (b. 9th March, 1886).—Retd., Apl., 1941.†

JOSEPH, K. A., M.B.E., Imp. Sectt. Serv., (b. March, 1891).—Joined the service, 21st Nov., 1916; asst. fincl. advr., mil. fin. Oct., 1938.

JOSEPH, NADUVATHUSERI JOSEPH, RAO BAHADUR, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Madras) (b. 22nd Apl., 1897).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 19th June, 1919; asst. exec. engr., June, 1920; offg. exec. engr., Apl., 1927; confd., June, 1939.

JOSEPH, PALAKUNNATH MATHAI, M.A., B.L.,

Indian Audit Dept. (b. 24th Apl., 1897).—Joined the service, 4th Apl., 1921; asst. acct.-genl., Bombay, Aug., 1922; asst. dir. of audit, United Provs., Apl., 1929; dep. acct.-genl., Burma, June, 1930; asst. dir., army audit, western cmd., May, 1931; dep. contr., Assam, Aug., 1932; dep. dir. of comml. intell. and statistics, commerce dept., govt. of India, June, 1934; reverted to Indian audit dept., from Apl., 1937, and posted to Madras as dep. acct.-genl.; comptr. Orissa, Jan., 1939; fin. offr. purchase, Sept., 1940; dy. ch. accts., officer N.W. Rly., Apl., 1941; comptr., Sind, 1941; Indian audit and accts. serv., cl. I (confd.), May, 1945; dir. rly. clearing accts. offr. Delhi, July, 1946.

JOSHI, DATTATRAYA SHRIDHAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (under-secy. to govt. of India, dept. of lab.) (b. 11th Oct., 1908).—Educ. at the New English School, Poona, Bombay Univ., the School of Economics, London, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933; and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; under secty., home pol. depts. and passport offcr., Dec., 1937; under-secty., govt. of India, dept. of labour, July, 1941; dep. sec., ditto, Oct., 1943.

JOSHI, GAJANAN KRISHNA, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 27th Oct., 1899).—Retd., 29th Jan., 1942.†

JOSHI, JAGANNATH VISHWANATH, O.B.E., M.A. (Cantab.), Commerce Dept., Govt. of India (dep. dir. of statistical research) (b. 21st May, 1898).—Apptd. asst. secty. to the govt. of Bombay, finance dept., on probn., Jan., 1924; confd., Jan., 1925; dep. dir. of comml. intelligence and statistics, on probn., Dec., 1928; confd., Dec., 1929; apptd. dep. dir. of statistical research, Jan., 1933; O.B.E., June, 1943.

JOSHI, KESHO DAT (see Kesho Dat Joshi).

JOSHI, SIR MOROFONT VISHWANATH, K.C.I.E., late member of govr.'s exec. council, Central Provs.—Retd., Dec., 1925.*

JOSHI, RAMACHANDRA CHINTAMAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr. and mag.) (b. 1st March, 1916).—Educ. at Bombay Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1940, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

JOSHI, SITARAM CHINTAMAN, (b. 10th Apl., 1897).—Chief lab. commr. (central) Feb., 1945.

JOSHI, VINAAYK MAHADEO, B.A., B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 10th July, 1914).—Educ. at New English School, Poona, Bombay Univ. and Caius College, Cambridge; joined the service, 20th Sept., 1937; arrived in India Oct., 1937, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

JOSHUA, JOSH S., B.Sc., Indian Police, Bengal (b. 27th Feb, 1920).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., after exam. of 1940.

JOTISH, CHANDRA GHOSH, Indian Police (b. 28th Nov., 1912).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, on probn., Jan., 1937.

JOYCE, ALEC HOUGHTON, C.I.E., O.B.E., India Office (advr. on publicity questions) (b. 5th March, 1894).—On mil. service from Dec., 1914, to Sept., 1919; apptd. clerical officer, Feb., 1922; higher clerical officer, Aug., 1924; asst. to information officer, March, 1930; jt. publicity officer, Indian round table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; 3rd Session, Nov.-Dec., 1932; ditto, Burma round table conf., London, Dec., 1931; pers. asst. to prime minister, monetary and econ. conf., London, June-Aug., 1933; officer on spl. duty under govt. of India, home dept., Apl.—

Nov., 1935; asst. information officer, Nov., 1935; again on spl. duty with the govt. of India, home dept., from Oct., 1936 to Nov., 1937; information officer, Dec., 1937; O.B.E., June, 1938; advr. on publicity questions, March, 1941; C.I.E., Jan., 1943; on staff of Cabinet Mission to India, Mar.-June, 1946.

JOYCE, GARRETT JOSEPH, Major, I.M.S. 5th March, 1904).—Date of first commn., 22nd Dec., 1923; civil surgeon and supt. dist. jail, Punjab, Apr., 1937.

JUDGE, DIGBY THOMAS BENJAMIN, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 9th July, 1891).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 13th Apr., 1910 to 19th July, 1915, and from 7th Dec., 1920, to 3rd Dec., 1924; on milty. duty from Sept., 1915 to June, 1920; asst. supt., Dec., 1924; offg. supt., Feb., 1932, and again, Apr., 1933; supt (confd.), Aug., 1939; King's police medal, June, 1943.

JUGAL KISHORE, THAKUR, B.A., LL.B., Indian Police Service (b. 23rd Aug., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., 1st May, 1926; offg. dist. supt., May, 1932; confd., Nov., 1941.

JUNE, Major, LAPHAI ZAU, M.C., Burma Front Serv., (b. 13th May, 1917).—Apptd. 15th Apr., 1946.

JUPP, STANLEY DERRINGTON, Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 2nd May, 1909).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., 6th Dec., 1928; confd., Dec., 1930; civ. aff. serv. to Oct., 1945; dist. Supt., 1945.

JYOTSNANATH GHOSAL (see Ghosal, J.).

KABIR, ALAMGIR MAHINUDDIN AMIRE, B.A., Indian Police (b. 25th Nov., 1911).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal, on probn., 1st March, 1935; confd., 1937.

KADRI, WAHID BAKSH, Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.)—Apptd. on probn., after exam. of 1942; served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

KAHAI, HARDEV SINGH, Sardar Bahadur (p.w.d., Sind).—Joined, 1st Feb., 1921; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1940; on depn. as soil classific. offr., Dec., 1939; exec. engr., Aug., 1945.

KAHLON, GYAN SINGH, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 13th March, 1913); educ. at Govt. Inter. Coll., Ludhiana and Punjab Univ.; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1938; arrived in India, Jan., 1939, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1940; addl. dist., mag., Feb., 1944; offg. mag. and collr., Malda, Oct., 1945.

KAISER, KHWAJA MUHAMMAD, B.A., Indian Police, Bengal (b. 13th Sept., 1918).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., after exam. of 1940.

KAIWAR, SETU RAO, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub. collr. and jt. mag.) (b. 2nd July, 1911).—Educ. at the Hindu High School, Triplican, University of Madras, University Coll., London, and Worcester Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934; sub. collr. and jt. mag., Feb., 1937; under-secty., educn. and pub. health dept., Jan., 1938; under-sec. govr.-genl. (def. co-ordn.), July, 1941; under-sec., govt. of India (defence), July, 1942; sec., Indian sailors' soldiers' and airman's bd. (in addn.) Nov., 1942; dep. commr. of civil supplies; dep. sec. educ. and p.h. dept., May, 1946.

KAJI, HIRALAL LALLUBHAI, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (prof. coll. of commerce, Bombay) (b. 8th Apr., 1886).—Held non-gazetted

appts. in Rajkot from 11th Apr., 1910 to 2nd Aug., 1916; lecturer in geography, Bombay, 3rd Aug., 1916; prof. ditto, Feb., 1919; I.E.S. from 5th Feb., 1921; prof. of statistics, Feb., 1921; K.-i-H. Medal, 2nd class, June, 1930.

KALE, CHINTAMAN GOVIND, C.I.E., B.A., B.Sc. B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (chief engr., Bombay) (b. 5th Oct., 1890).—Joined the service, 25th Aug., 1917; asst. engr. (prov. service), Aug., 1918; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; offg. exec. engr., July, 1923; confd., Aug., 1927; dep. sec., Bombay govt., p.w.d., Sept., 1942 to Feb., 1944; suptg. engr., March, 1944; offg. ch. engr. and sec. to govt. P.W.D., roads and bridges, Apr., 1945; ditto, irrign., Sept., 1945; ch. engr. p.w. reconstrn., Jan., 1946; C.I.E., June, 1945.

KALI CHARAN, M.A., Indian Audit Department (b. 28th Oct., 1900).—Joined the service, 24th Feb., 1926; asst. dir. of audit, def. services, Northern Command, May, 1936; asst. acctnt.-genl., Punjab, May, 1938; dep. ditto, Oct., 1939 dep. comptr., Assam, Oct., 1940.

KALIA, GUR SARAN DAS, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 22nd Feb., 1915).—Educ. at D.A.V. High School, Lahore, Punjab University and Oriel College, Oxford; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 6th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

KALYANARAMAN, AYYASWAMI, B.S., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 18th Jan., 1903).—Joined the service, 22nd March, 1926; depy. chief auditor, G.I.P. Rly., Apr., 1934; depy. govt. examiner of accts., B. & N.W. Rly., May, 1936; asst. acctnt.-gen., United Provs., Aug., 1937; dep. acctnt. gen., United Provs., Dec., 1937; depy. acctnt.-genl., Madras, March, 1939; ditto, posts and tels., Madras, June, 1940.

KALYANARAMAN, CHELLAMIER, B.A., B.L., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 21st Sept., 1906).—Educ. at School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. under-secty. to govt., fin. dept., Bihar and Orissa, Oct., 1935; under-secty. to govt., Orissa, Apr., 1936 to March, 1937; dep. secty. to govt., Bihar, educ., dev., and empl. depts., March, 1940; dep., sec. P.W.D., emerg. rrign. scheme, Oct., 1943; addl. dir. agric., Bihar; dir. industries, Jan., 1945; sec. to govt., educn. etc., March, 1946.

KAMA KAKA, BURJORJI HORMASJI, M.C., Lieut.-Col., ret'd., late I.M.S. (b. 24th Aug., 1883).—Retd., Aug., 1938.*

KAMAT, GAJANAN RAOJI, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 26th Dec., 1908).—Educ. at Bombay University, R.I. College of Science and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; offg. under-secty. to govt., Assam, in the depts. under the chief secty., Nov., 1934; confd., March, 1935; headquarters asst. to collr. of salt rev., Madras, May, 1937; on spec. duty, govt. of India, fin. dept., Apr., 1938; asst. finl. advr., mil. fin., Sept., 1938; dep. fin. advr., mil. fin., July, 1940.

KAMATH, HUNDI SRINIVASA, C.I.E., B.A. (Mad.), Ind. C.S. (asst. commr., Cent. Provs.) (b. 21st Jan., 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Madras, Univ. Coll. and Sch. of Economics, London, and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1928; arrived, 16th Nov., 1928, and

served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Dec., 1935; snr. dpy. regr., co-op. socs., Nov., 1940; addtl. sec., food dept., June, 1942; sec., ditto, Jan., 1943; C.I.E., June, 1946.

KAMATH, HUNDI VISHNU, late Indian C.S. (Central Provs.) (b. 15th July 1907.)—Retd., Apl., 1938.*

KAMTA PRASHAD, O.B.E., M.Sc., B.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 11th Feb., 1890).—Joined the service, 9th Dec., 1919; prof. of physics, Patna, July, 1920; prof., Ravenshaw Coll., March, 1922; princpl. science coll., Patna, Jan., 1941; O.B.E., Jan., 1944; ret'd., Feb., 1945.

KAMTE, NARAYANRAY MARUTIRAV, M.B.E., B.A., Indian Police (sup't. Bombay) (b. 11th Sept., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. sup't., Bombay, 18th Aug., 1923; offg. sup't., variously from May, 1929; confd., May, 1936; dep. commr., Bombay, Apl., 1938 to Aug., 1941; Indian police medal, June 1942; dep. contr. civil supplies, Bombay, Feb., 1945 to May, 1946; M.B.E., June, 1946.

KANCHI PRASAD RAI BAHADUR, late Indian State Rlys. (E.I. Rly.) (b. 17th Nov., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 13th Sept., 1914; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; dep. ch. engr., Jan., 1940; ret'd., 1946.

KANADE, E. V., Stationery and Printing dept. (b. Jan., 1897).—Apptd. asst. contr. printing, Feb., 1937; manager of publicns., Aug., 1941; dep. contr. stationery, Apl., 1946.

KANDASAMY, M.B., B.A., B.E., Elec. Dept., Madras, (b. 27th Aug., 1900).—Joined the serv. 8th July, 1928, as asst. engr.; exec. engr. (confd.) 27th Mar., 1938; suptg. engr., Nov., 1944.

KANGA, SIR JAMSHEDIJI BEHRAMJI, Kt., M.A., LL.B., Barr., late Judl. Dept., Bombay.—Advocate-genl., 16th Apl., 1922 to Feb., 1935.

KANIA, SIR HARILAL JEKISONDAS, LL.B., Judicial dept., Bombay, (judge, fed. ct.).—Apptd. offg. judge, high ct., Bombay, 17th June, 1930; actg. addl. judge, Oct., 1932; judge, high ct., Bombay, June, 1933; chairman, disturbances enquiry comtee., Bombay, Jan., 1939; kt., June, 1943; offg. ch. judge, high ct., Bombay, June to Oct., 1945; puisne judge, ditto, Oct., 1945; judge, fed. ct., June, 1946.

KANJILAL PROPHULLA C. (see Prophulla, C. K.).

KANWAR SAIN, O.B.E., LALA RAI BAHADUR, Indian Serv. of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 2nd Jan., 1899).—Joined the service, 9th Oct., 1922; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1923; exec. engr., Oct., 1932; under-secty. (Haveli), May, 1937; dir., irrgn. research, Jan., 1943; author of "A Guide for the Young Men" (in Urdu) regarding social reforms; O.B.E., June, 1946.

KAO, RAMESHWAR NATH, Indian Police (United Provs.) (b. 10th May, 1918).—Apptd. asst. sup't., on probn., March, 1940.

KAPADIA, JAMSHED DINSHA, B.A., Indian C.S., (dep. sec. govt. of India, I & S. dept.) (b. 15th Feb., 1908).—Educ. at Camb. Univ. (non colleg.) joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Dec., 1931, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1940; dep. sec., govt. of India, indus. dept., May, 1944; sec. I. and S. dept., Jan., 1946.

KAPADIA, MANEKSHA PHIROZSHAH, B.A., Income Tax Dept., Bombay (asst. commr. of income-tax) (b. 12th Oct., 1887).—Held temp. and permanent non-gazetted appts. from 21st Dec., 1908 to 7th Feb., 1924; income-tax

officer, Bombay City, Feb., 1924; asst. commr. of income-tax, Apl., 1925; on spec. duty with central bd. of rev., June, 1937 to Feb., 1938; asst. commr. of income-tax, March, 1938.

KAPOOR, NANAK CHAND, Indian State Rlys. (sup't., transportation, E.I. Rly.) (b. 12th March, 1902).—Joined service on E.B. Rly., Jan., 1926; asst. dist. sup't., Jan., 1928; transportation (traffic commercial) supt., senior scale provl., Jan., 1939.

KAPUR, BALKISHAN (see Balkishan Kapur). KAPUR, BALRAJ KRISHNA, Capt., M.B.E., I.A., Indian Pol. Serv. (b. 12th Jan., 1910).—First Commn., 30th Jan., 1930; under trng. in the Punjab, Nov., 1934; asst. commr., Bannu, Apl., 1936; ditto, Dera Ismail Khan, Jan., 1938; confd., Sept., 1938; asst. commr., Manschra, Dec., 1939; settlement offr., Sept., 1941; M.B.E., June, 1944; dep. sec., ext. aff. dept., April, 1946.

KAPUR, H. K., (b. 2nd Feb., 1904).—Joined the service, 1st May, 1920; held non-gaz. posts to May, 1942; gaz. posts in civil def. and comm. depts. to June, 1946.

KAPUR, RAGHU PATI, B.A., B.Sc. Econ., Indian C.S. (sub. collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 2nd Sept., 1914).—Educ. at D.A.V. High School, Lahore, Punjab University, University College, London, and London School of Oriental Studies; appointed on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 8th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, sub. collr. and jt. mag., July, 1941; asst. commr. civil supplies, Trichinopoly, March, 1946.

KAPUR SINGH, M.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 2nd March, 1909).—Educ. at the Khalsa High School, Lyallpur, the Punjab Univ. and St. Catherine's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933; and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub-divl. officr., May, 1936 to May, 1938; addl. dep. commr., June, 1941; dep. commr., Oct., 1943; offr. on spl. duty, medical etc. dept., Feb., 1945.

KAPUR, DR. SHANKAR NATH, Ph.D., (b. 20th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service as Impl. asst., timber seasoning sect., forest research inst., Dehra Dun, 1924; on depn. from Feb., 1927; offr. in charge, seasoning sect., June, 1928; served with Defence dept., June, 1940; o.i.c., wood workshop sect., forest research inst., Dehra Dun, Dec., 1945.

KARAMATULLAH, MUHAMMAD, Indian C.S., (sub. collr., Madras) (b. 1st May, 1904).—Educ. at University of Madras, and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1928; arrived, Dec., 1928, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Nov., 1930; under-secty., dev. dept., Madras, Apl., 1935 to July, 1936; dist. judge, Sept., 1938; collr. and dist. mag., Mar., 1940.

KARANTHA, KATTA VASUDEVA, M.A. (b. 23rd July, 1900).—Joined the serv. as ch. elec. inspec. to govt., on contract from Apl., 1945; suptg. engr., Nov., 1944.

KARANDIKAR, SHANKAR KESHAV, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 6th Apl., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bombay, 9th Feb., 1926; offg. exec. engr., March, 1930; confd., Feb., 1935.

KARIM, A. (see Abdul Karim).

KARIM, FAZL AHMAD, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 5th Dec., 1907).—Educated at Allahabad University and New College, Oxford; joined the service, 10th

Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1934; addl. dist. mag., June, 1939; mag. and collr., July, 1940; empt. advr. to govt., Jan., 1942; addl. dist. sess. judge, July, 1943.

KARIM, MUHAMMAD FAZLUL, see Muhammad, F. K.

KARNIK, RAGHUNATH RAVJI, B.A., (Hons.) LL.B., (b. 11th July, 1896).—Joined 29th June, 1925; served in Bombay judl. dept. from 29th June, 1925; dist. and sess. judge (confd.), Oct., 1943.

KARTAR SINGH, BHAI, Sardar Bahadur, late Indian Forest Service, Punjab (b. 2nd Oct., 1885).—Retd., Oct., 1940.†

KARUNAKARA MENON, C. P., DIWAN BAHADUR.—Sec., Madras serv. commn., Oct., 1932 and offg. var., Jan., 1938 to 1940; sec., developmt. dept., govt. of Madras, Jan., 1940; regl. food commr., Madras, Apl., 1943.

KASHYAP, NARINDAR NATH, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 26th May, 1917).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1941; served in Punjab as asst. commr.; sub. divl., offr., June, 1944.

KATETKAR, V. G., Indian Police.—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., 30th Jan., 1934; confd., June, 1935; grp. testing offcr., civil seln. bd., govt of India, Feb., 1946.

KATHPALIA, K. N. (see Krishna Narayan K.).

KAUL, BRAHMA KUMAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 11th Nov., 1917).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1940, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.

KAUL, K. N., Income-tax dept.—Apptd. under sec., govt. of India, fin. dept., Feb., 1945; dep. sec., ditto, Nov., 1945.

KAUL, MADAN GOPAL, M.A., Indian C.S. (b. 16th Jan., 1921).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1943, and served in Bengal.

KAUL, M. K., Indian State rlys. (b. 12th May, 1905).—Dep. contr. of stores, B.B. & C.I. rly., Aug., 1945.

KAUL MAHESHWAR NATH, M.A. (Cantab.), Barr. (b. 16th Sept., 1901).—Apptd. dep. secty., Legisl. Assembly dept., Sept., 1937.

KAUL, PARDUMAN KISHAN, B.A., LL.B., RAI BAHADUR, (b. 23rd Jan., 1890).—Joined the serv. as Munsif, 24th May, 1919; confd., May, 1921; civil and sess. judge, (confd.) Jul., 1935; dist. and sess. judge (confd.), Jan., 1943; addl. judge, Oudh ch. court, Dec., 1944; judge, ch. ct., June, 1946.

KAUL, PRADEYUMNA KRISHNA, B.A., Indian C.S. (addl. judge, ch. ct., Oudh) (b. 14th Jan., 1900).—Educ. at Punjab Univ. and Queen's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 15th Oct., 1923; arrived, 10th Dec., 1923, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; dep. commr. (subs. provl.), Apl., 1931; confd., March, 1935.

KAUL, TRILOKI NATH, B.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 27th Dec., 1912).—Educ. at S.P. High School, Srinagar, Kashmir, Punjab Univ., Allahabad Univ., and King's College, London; joined the service, 15th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.; group testing offcr., civil select. bd., govt. of India, Oct., 1945.

KAULA, SIR GANGARAM, Kt., C.I.E., B.A.,

late India Finance Dept. (b. 9th May, 1877).—Retd., Oct., 1932.†

KAUNG U, Burma Educn. Serv. (cl. I) (b. 30th Oct., 1904).—Apptd. 1st Apl., 1934; head master, I. and G. schools, 9th Oct., 1940; addl. asst. dir. pub. instrn. Dec., 1945.

KAYANI, MALIK RUSTUM, Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Punjab) (b. 18th Oct., 1902).—Educ. at Univ. of the Punjab and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 29th Oct., 1927; arrived, Nov., 1927; and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1934; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1935; confd., Nov., 1936; on depn. to N.W.F.P. as dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1942 to May, 1946.

KAYE, JOHN FREDERIC BARKER, late Indian Police (Madras) (b. 29th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 22nd Apl., 1919; asst. supt., Apl., 1921; offg. dist. supt., March, 1924; confd., May, 1930; pers. asst. to inspr.-genl. of rlys., and C.I.D., May, 1931; princpl. police training sch., June, 1943; retd., Aug., 1947.

KAZI, AFTAB GHULAM NABI, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (b. 6th Nov., 1919).—Educ. at N.J. High Sch., Karachi and Bombay Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1943, and served in Bihar.

KAZIM RAZA, SAIVID, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 25th Jan., 1898).—Joined the service, 18th Feb., 1921; offg. supt., Apl., 1924, and again, Apl., 1927; confd., Nov., 1932; asst. to D.I.G., C.I.D., Apl., 1925; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1930.

KE, U BA, Burma Front. Serv. (b. 1st July, 1901).—Apptd. 15th Feb., 1929.

KEALY, SIR EDWARD HERBERT, Kt., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 7th June, 1873).—Retd., Dec., 1932.*

KEDAR NATH AGARWAL, late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 30th June, 1890).—Retd., March, 1938.*

KEEGAN, DENIS FRANK, late Imperial Customs Service (b. 2nd Dec., 1896).—Apptd. probr., Impl. Customs Service, 18th Feb., 1924; asst. collr., Madras, Feb., 1926; secty., tariff bd., cotton textile industry enquiry, July, 1926; asst. collr., Bombay, Jan., 1928; and again, Dec., 1932; ditto, Karachi, June, 1931; ditto, Bombay, Aug., 1934; offg. collr., Karachi, Oct., 1936; transfd. to Madras, Feb., 1939; addtl. opium agt. and mangr., opium factory, Gazipur, May, 1940; retd., 1946.

KEELAN, CYRIL JOHN (late Indian State Rly.) (b. 8th June, 1885).—Retd., Mar., 1941.†

KEELAN, ESMOND HARDING, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 28th Sept., 1882).—Retd., Oct., 1936.*

KEELING, SIR HUGH TROWBRIDGE, Kt., C.S.I., A.M.I.C.E., late Madras Public Works Dept.—Retd., Apl., 1920.*

KEEN, PATRICK JOHN, M.B.E., Capt., I.A. (b. 30th June, 1911).—Apptd. to I.P.S. on probn., Oct., 1936; under-sec. to resdt., Central India, Nov., 1944; under sec. pol. dept., Mar., 1945; offg. dep. sec., pol., dept., July, 1945; under sec., ditto, July, 1945.

KEENE, HUGH, Indian Police (dep. inspr. genl., Madras) (b. 22nd Nov., 1897).—Joined the service, 7th Oct., 1920; confd. asst. supt., July, 1922; offg. dist. supt., Apl., 1928; confd., Oct., 1930; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1924; asst. inspr.-genl., Nov., 1935; awarded Indian police medal, Jan., 1939; cent. intell. offr., Madras, March, 1939; confd. as dep. inspr.-gen., Aug. 1942.

KEITH, ROBERT FARQUHARSON, B.A., Indian

C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 22nd June, 1912).—Educ. at Fettes College, Gonville and Caius Coll., Cambridge, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1935; arrived in India, Jan., 1937, and served in Bombay, as asst. collr.; under-sec., govt. of Bombay, Apl., 1940; supt., Yeravac gaol, Nov., 1942; served in Sind from July, 1943; offg. var. as collr. and dist. mag., Feb., 1944.

KELAVKAR, MADHAV KRISHNA, O.B.E., M.B., B.S., D.T.M. & H., M.R.C.P., Lieut.-Col. I.M.S. (asst. dir.-genl., I.M.S.) (b. 30th Apl., 1893).—First commn. dated 26th Aug., 1926; in mil. employ prior to 31st May, 1933, when he joined medl. store dept., asst. dir.-genl., I.M.S., Oct., 1938; O.B.E., Jan., 1943.

KELEHER, DENIS, Burma Serv. Engrs. (b. 23rd Jul., 1904).—Apptd. asst. exec. engr., p.w.d., Burma Serv. Engrs., Oct., 1930; confd., Nov., 1933; exec. engr. Feb., 1939; on mil. duty, Sept., 1944 to Dec., 1946.

KELLAWAY, HERBERT FRANK, late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 7th Feb., 1883).—Apptd. clerk, 2nd class, India store depot, 27th Dec., 1901; on mil. service, Oct., 1917 to Feb., 1919; transfld. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; higher clerical officer, Apl., 1922; ret'd., Feb., 1943.

KELLY, CHARLES SPENCER, Indian C.S. (Burma) (b. 15th June, 1907).—Educ. at King Edward's School, Stafford, and Balliol College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served as asst. commr. in Burma; asst. supt. Shan states, Aug., 1935; dep. secty., defence dept., Apl., 1939; ditto comm. and indust., March, 1940; dep. contr. of supplies, Aug., 1940, served with govt. of India (supply) July, 1942; and with Treasury Lond., Aug., 1944.

KELLY, JOHN WILLIAM, C.I.E., B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (contr. of currency, Bombay) (b. 28th Sept., 1885).—Joined the service, 14th Oct., 1910; asst. acctnt.-gen., United Provs., May, 1912; ditto, Madras, Dec., 1913; asst. acct.-gen., United Provs., May, 1915; ditto, Central Provs., May, 1921; currency officer, Bombay, Apl., 1922; offg. dep. contr. of currency, Calcutta, Sept., 1925; ditto, Bombay, Oct., 1926; offg. contr. of the currency, Apl., 1931; June, 1932, and again, Feb., 1933; confd., Feb., 1935; C.I.E., June, 1934; dir., res. bank of India, Nov., 1935.

KELLY, NORMAN WILSON, O.B.E., Burma Front. Serv. (b. 4th July, 1904).—Apptd. asst. supt. Nov., 1927; O.B.E., June, 1938; civ. aff. serv. Feb., 1943 to Jul., 1945; addl. sec. to govr. of Burma, Mar., 1946.

KELLY, SIR PATRICK ALOYSIUS, Kt., C.I.E., late Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 14th July, 1880).—Ret'd., Apl., 1935.*

KELLY, PATRICK JOSEPH, M.B., Ch.B., B.A.O. (N.I.U.), L.M. (Dub.), Maj., I.M.S., Madras Medl. Serv. (b. 7th Apl., 1902).—First commn, 7th Mar., 1927; in mil. employ. to July, 1934; dist. medl. offr., July, 1934; recalled to mil., June, 1941; reverted to civil, June, 1945; dist. medl. offr., July, 1945.

KELLY, PHILIP DESMOND LORNE, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 13th Sept., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 22nd Dec., 1919; offg. supt., July, 1924; confd., Apl., 1930; dep. commr., Feb., 1939 to March, 1944; supt., rly. police, Oct., 1944.

KEMP, ARTHUR HUGH, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. coll., Bihar) (b. 28th Feb., 1905).—

Educ. at Portsmouth Grammar Sch., and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. coll. and mag.; jt. mag., Nov., 1928; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1935; sec. to govt., Orissa, rev. and devel. dept., June, 1944; ditto, planning and reconstr. dept., Orissa, Dec., 1944; commr., Bihar, Sept., 1945; ch. sec. to govt. June, 1946.

KEMP, CYRIL KENNETH, India Police (supt.) (b. 2nd Apl., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 2nd Dec., 1922; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1932; offg. supt., Nov., 1933; confd., March, 1934.

KEMP, SIR KENNETH MCINTYRE (legal advr. and solr. to the sec. of state) (b. 13th Dec., 1883).—Editor, Indian law reports, June, 1921; offg. judge, high ct., Bombay, June, 1928; ret'd., May, 1931; apptd. advocate-genl., Bombay, Feb., 1935; knighted, May, 1937; ret'd., Dec., 1937; apptd. legal advr. and solr. to the sec. of state, Dec., 1938.

KENNEDY, ALWYNE JOSEPH, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 13th Sept. 1895).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 27th Nov., 1920; offg. supt., May, 1924; confd., Apl., 1929.

KENNEDY, ROBERT STEWART, late India Office (b. 29th Dec., 1879).—Ret'd., July, 1940.†

KENNEDY, WILLIAM GEORGE, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 29th Jan., 1909).—Educ. at Calday Grange Grammar School, West Kirby, Cheshire, and Jesus College, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1936; spec. offr., home dept., Jan., 1940; ditto, petrol. Dec., 1941; ch. offr. corpn. of Lahore, Nov., 1943.

KENNY, WILLIAM JOHN, Indian Police (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 27th Nov., 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Oct., 1939.

KER, CHARLES MURRAY, O.B.E., Indian C.S. (mag. and coll. United Provs.) (b. 2nd Sept. 1906).—Educ. at Rugby and Hertford Coll., Oxford; joined the serv., 17th Oct., 1930; arr. in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr., secty., spl. tariff bd., Oct., 1935; under secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of indust. and lab., Nov., 1936; under-secy., dept. of lab., Nov., 1937; M.B.E., June, 1939; O.B.E., June, 1944; home sec. to govt. U.P., Nov., 1944; mag. and collr. (confd.) May, 1945.

KER, NALINI BEHARI, M.B.E., Off. of High Commr. for Ind. (educn. offr., exec. grade, educn. dept. (b. 4th Jan., 1891).—Apptd. educn. officer, 15th July, 1929; actg. educn. officer (prin. exec. grade), May, 1941; M.B.E., June, 1946.

KER, STANLEY DARLING, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 31st March, 1888).—Ret'd., July, 1942.

KERMODE, CHARLES WILLIAM DALY, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 19th Sept., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 27th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Nov., 1928; sylviculturist, Apl., 1935; on mil. serv., Feb., to Dec., 1945.

KERR, PERCIVAL JAMES, M.R.C.V.S., late Indian Veterinary Service (b. 2nd Feb., 1885).—Ret'd., Feb., 1940.†

KERSHAW, SIR LOUIS JAMES, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S., and India Office (b. 20th Dec., 1869).—Ret'd., Dec., 1934.*

KESAVANUNNI, NAYAR, M.B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 25th June, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr.,

9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927; per. asst. to ch. consvr. of forests, Apr., 1945.

KESHAVA RAO, NEELAMANGALA, B.A., B.E. (C.E.), late Indian Service of Engrs. (Madras) (b. 29th March, 1889).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 4th July, 1913; asst. engr., July, 1914; exec. engr., July, 1923; suptg. engr., Nov., 1941; ret'd., March, 1944.

KESHO DAT JOSHI, B.Sc., late Indian Forest Service (United Provs.) (b. 29th Nov., 1890).—Joined the service as proby. extra asst. consvr., July, 1915; confd., Apr., 1917; promoted to I.F.S., 15th Apr., 1931; dep. consvr., Apr., 1931; ret'd., Nov., 1945.

KESWANI, GOPALDAS HASSANAND, M.B.E., DIWAN BAHADUR, I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engineers, Sind (b. 7th March, 1883).—Ret'd., July, 1939.*

KEWALRAMANI, RAMCHAND MALHANDAS, late Indian Posts and Tels. (b. 3rd Oct., 1883).—Ret'd., Sept., 1938.*

KEYMER, EDWARD STUART, M.B.E., (b. 20th Nov., 1890).—Joined the serv. 16th Feb., 1912; on field serv., 1916-18; supt. home dept., Mar., 1932; offg. asst. secty. home dept., Oct., 1943; offg. under sec., govt. of India, home dept., Sept., 1945.

KHAIRAZ, GULAM HUSSAIN RAHIMTULLA, Barr., late Bombay Judicial Dept. (b. 24th Dec., 1882).—Ret'd., Sept., 1940.†

KHAJA MUHI-UD-DIN HUSSAIN SAHIB, M.A., Indian Police, Madras (b. 9th Sept., 1896).—Joined the service, 4th Dec., 1920; promoted to the I.P. as supt., July, 1940.

KHALEELI, ABBAS, Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 14th Sept., 1908).—Educ. at Brasenose College, Oxford; joined the service, 13th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931; sub-collr., Feb., 1935; under-secty., dev. dept., Madras, May, 1936; served under central govt., July, 1939 to Nov., 1942; dir. of indus. and commerce, Feb., 1943; and again, March, 1946.

KHALIK, MUHAMMAD ABDUL (see Muhammad A. K.).

KHAMBATTA, BURJOR FRAMJI, O.B.E., M.B., B.S. (Bom.), D.P.H. (Lond.) (port health officer, Karachi) (b. 30th July, 1892); joined the Bombay medical service on 1st March, 1921; asst. port health officer, Bombay, Nov., 1922 to Jan., 1924; port health officer, Karachi, Jan., 1924; M.B.E., May, 1937; O.B.E., June, 1946.

KHAN, ABBAS ALI (see Abbas Ali Khan).

KHAN, ABDUL ALI (see Abdul Ali Khan).

KHAN, ABDUL GHAFOOR (see Abdul Ghafoor Khan).

KHAN, A. G., K.B., C.I.E., Dir. of Inpn., 1940; dep. contr. genl. of inspec., May, 1942; ch. contr. of purchase (munitions) dept. supply, Apr., 1945; dep. dir. genl. (disposals) dept. of indus. and supplies, Jan., 1946.

KHAN, ABDUS GHAYUR, Indian State Rlys. (supt. transportation, E.I. Rly.) (b. 17th Aug., 1900).—Joined the service, May, 1921; asst. supt., E.I. rly., Feb., 1925; asst. supt. junior scale, Apr., 1928; senior scale, Jan., 1939.

KHAN, ABDUL HAMID (see Abdul Hamid Khan).

KHAN, A. K. (see Abdul Kaiyum Khan).

KHAN, ABDUL HAMID, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr.).—Apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1941; served in Bombay as asst. collr.

KHAN, ABDUL MAJID (see Abdul Majid Khan).

KHAN, ABDUL RASHID RAHSID (see Abdul Rashid Khan).

KHAN, AFTAB AHMAD, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 10th Oct., 1917).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1941; served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

KHAN, A. S. (see Abdus Samad Khan).

KHAN, AITIZAZ-UD-DIN AHMAD (see Aitizaz-ud-Din Ahmad Khan).

KHAN, AKHTER HAMI' (see Akhter Hamid Khan).

KHAN, ALLAH YAR (see Allah Yar Khan).

KHAN, AURELIUS DAVID, B.A. (Cantab.), Indian Civil Service (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 21st March, 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta, and Selwyn Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 21st Oct., 1927; arrived Dec., 1928, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. addl. dist. and sess. judge, March, and again, Oct., 1933; addtl. dist. mag., Feb., 1937; mag. and collr., Oct., 1938; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1939; spec. offr., fin. dept., Bengal, March, 1940; sec. civil supplies dept., Jan., 1945.

KHAN, B. A., K.B., Indian State Rlys. (b. 16th Jan., 1898).—Joined 7th Aug., 1933; dep. genl. mgr., N.W. Rly., Feb., 1945.

KHAN, DILAWAR HUSAIN (see Dilawar Husain Khan).

KHAN, F. M. Indian State Rlys. (b. 1st July, 1895).—Joined 30th May, 1918; director rly. bd., Dec., 1945.

KHAN, FAIYAZ BAHADUR, M.Sc., L.T., Khan Bahadur, United Provs. educn. serv. cl. I (b. 20th Apr., 1896).—Lec. trng. coll. July, 1922; princpl. intern. coll., Nov., 1931; inspr. schools, U.P., Apr., 1933; princpl. trng. coll., Agra, July, 1939.

KHAN, FATEH MOHAMMED, M.D., Ch.B., D.T.M., D.P.H., Major, I.M.S. (b. 21st Aug., 1901).—First commission dated 23rd Oct., 1930; in milty. employ prior to 14th Sept., 1937, when he was transferred to civil employ, medl. officer of health, Simla, Sept., 1937; in temp. milty. employ from Jan., 1941.

KHAN, FATEH MUHAMMAD, KHAN BAHADUR, Indian State Rlys. (divl. transportation officer, N.W. Rly.) (b. 1895).—Joined service, May, 1918; asst. traffic supt., junior scale, May, 1920; divl. transportation (traffic commercial) officer; senior scale, Jan., 1939.

KHAN, FAZL MUHAMMAD (see Fazel, M.K.).

KHAN, IKRAM AHMED, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr.) (b. 1st June, 1915).—Ed. at Fzia-I-Am High Sch., Meerut, Aligarh Univ., and Queen's College, Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 21st Oct., 1939; confd., 26th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940; and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1945.

KHAN, INAYAT ULLAH (see Inayat Ullah Khan).

KHAN, KHURSHED AHMAD (see Khurshed Ahmad Khan).

KHAN, KURBAN ALI (see Kurban, A. K.).

KHAN, MAJID ULLAH, B.A., Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 8th Oct., 1900).—Joined the service as temp. dep. supt. of police, 19th Jan., 1926; confd. June, 1928; supt. of pol. (confd.) Jan., 1941.

KHAN, MUHAMMAD INAMULLAH (see Muhammad I. K.).

KHAN, MUHAMMAD MOOSA (see Muhammad M. K.).

KHAN, NIAZ MUHUMMAD (see Niaz., M. K.).

KHAN, SAADAT-UL-LAH (see Saadat-ul-lah Khan).

KHAN, SAHIBZADA SARDAR MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Khan, S.S.).

KHAN, SAID ULLAH (see Said Ullah Khan).

KHAN, SARDAR ATA MUHAMMAD (see Ata Muhammad S. Khan).

KHAN, SIR SHAFAAAT AHMAD (b. 1893).—High Commr. for India in S. Africa, 1941–1945; Health, educn., and arts member of govr.-gen.'s council, Sept., to Oct., 1946.

KHAN, SHUJA-UD-DIN (see Shuja-ud-din, K.).

KHAN, TALIA MUHAMMAD (see Talia Muhammad Khan).

KHAN, ZAHID HASAN (see Zahid Hasan Khan).

KHANDALAVALA, DORAB N. D., B.A., LL.B., late Bombay Judicial Dept. (b. 14th June, 1884).—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

KHANDEKAR, SADASHIV BALVANT, late Income Tax Dept., Bombay (b. 21st July, 1884).—Retd., July, 1939.*

KHAN-LEGHARI, SARDAR ATA MUHAMMAD, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 23rd Nov., 1913).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., Julapaha and Christ Church Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 5th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.

KHANNA, GYAN CHAND, Rai Bahadur, B.A., LL.B. (b. Sept., 1893).—Apptd. income-tax offr., Punjab, May, 1924; O.S.D. under cent. bd. of rev., Feb., 1941; regr., I.T.A.T., Apl., 1942.

KHANNA, Rai Bahadur, M.A. (b. 17th Oct., 1891).—Joined 18th Feb., 1915; supt. Apl., 1932; asst. sec., govt. of India, (commerce) Sept., 1940; dep. ch. contr. imports, Apl., 1944.

KHANNA, RATAN CHAND, M.A., F.R.E.S., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 21st March, 1899).—Joined the service, 17th Feb., 1922; asst. auditor, E.B. rly., Apl., 1927; asst. dir., army audit, E. Cmd., Apl., 1932; asst. acct.-genl., Central revs., Apl., 1936; dep. acct.-genl., United Provs., Oct., 1938; dy. fin. advr., supply finance, March, 1941; jt. fin. advr. (ditto) (temp.) Dec., 1942; ditto (Cotton Textiles) Bombay; ch. auditor, N.W.R. and O.T. rly., Apl., 1946; Indian Audit and Accts. Serv., cl. I (prov.), May, 1946.

KHARAG SINGH, THAKUR, B.A., Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 1st June, 1895).—Joined the service as dep. supt. of police, 1st Jan., 1920; supt. (confd.), July, 1937.

KHARAS, JAMSHED GUSTADJI, Indian C.S. (asst. collr.) (b. 28th July, 1919).—Educ. at St. Aloysins' Coll. and Owen's Sch., London, and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. on probn. after seln. in Aug., 1941, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; served in Sind, July, 1943.

KHAREGAT, P. M. (see Pheroze Merwan Kharegat).

KHARE, NARATAM BHASKAR, B.A., M.D. (b. 1884).—Late Central Provs. medl. service; member Central Provs. legis. council, 1923–29; member centr. legis. assembly, 1935–37; prime minister, Central Provs. and Berar, 1937–38; member govr.-genl.'s exec. council, (commonwealth relations), May, 1943 to July, 1946.

KHAREGAT, RUSTAM MERWAN, M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (agency surgeon) (b. 3rd Feb., 1889).—First commn. dated 23rd Jan., 1917; civil surg., Ajmer, July, 1924; offg. agency surg., Bundelkhand, Apl., 1927; confd., July, 1927; ditto, Sistan, Feb., 1928; ditto, Bannu, Jan., 1930; civil surg., Hazara and supt., jail, Abbottabad, March, 1931; C.M.O., in C.I., and

resdy. surg., Indore, June, 1934; agency surg., Bundelkhand, Oct., 1934; civ. surg., Ajmer and C.M.O., in Rajputana, Apl., 1938.

KHATTRI, BAINJNATH (see Baijnath, K.).

KHER, RAO SAHIB PANDIT, L. S. R. (see Lachman Sitaram Kher.)

KHER, GOPAL SAKHARAM, B.A., LL.B., late Judi. Dept., Central Provs. (b. 16th Nov., 1885).—Retd., Nov., 1940.†

KHER, VASUDEO RAMKRISHNA, B.Sc., Indian Police, Central Provs. (b. 15th Aug., 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., after exam. of 1940.

KHERA, S. S., Indian C.S. (name changed from Sucha Singh) (dir. of industries, United Provs.) (b., 3rd Apl., 1903.—Educ. at King's Coll., London; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1927; arrived, Nov., 1927, and served in the United Provs. as asst. commr.; jt. mag., March, 1930; exec. offcr., improvement trust, Cawnpore, May, 1936; collr. and mag. (confd.), Apl., 1941; dir. industries, Oct., 1945.

KHIN, HENRY AUNG, M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd., late Burma Medl. Dept. (b. 8th Dec., 1887).—Retd., Dec., 1942.

KHIN, U, B.Sc., Burma Agric. Serv. (b. 11th Nov., 1905).—Apptd. asst. dir. agric., Sept., 1937; civ. aff. serv. May to Oct., 1945; dep. dir. of agric., Oct., 1945.

KHINE, MAUNG YIN (see Yin Khin Maung).

KHINE, MAUNG KYAW, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr. Burma.) (b. 10th Dec., 1903).—Educ. at Rangoon Univ. and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931; and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dep. regr. high ct., Sept., 1937; dep. commr., 1940; commdte. refugee camp, July, 1942; spec. duty offr. (immigr.) ind. and labour dept., 1945; served with fin. and rev. dept., Aug., 1946.

KHONDKAR, FAZLE SOBHAN, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 5th Jan., 1905).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 17th Dec., 1925; confd., Apl., 1928; offg. addl. supt., Apl., 1932; dep. commr. of police, Calcutta, Nov., 1937; confd. supt., March, 1939; on spec. duty, civil supplies, govt. of India, Jan., 1944.

KHONDKAR, FAZLUR RAHMAN (see Fazlur, R. K.).

KHONDKAR GHOLAM MURSHED, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 25th Jan., 1901).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Oxford Univ. (non-coll.); joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 8th Dec., 1924; and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr., offg. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1930; and again, Sept., 1933; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1931; and again, May, 1933; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1933; chief contr. of purchase (supply), dept. of supply, Aug., 1941–Aug., 1944.

KHOSLA, GOPAL DAS, B.A., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Punjab) (b. 15th Dec., 1901).—Educ. at Univ. of Edinburgh and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 21st Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; confd., Jan., 1937; dist. and sess. addtl. judge, high ct., Lahore, Nov., 1944; and again Oct., 1946; judge high ct. Dec., 1946.

KHOT, GAJANAN WAMAN, B.A., LL.B., Indian Police (supt., Sind) (b. 24th July, 1908).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Bombay, 1st March, 1932; confd., Apl., 1933; supt. (confd.), Nov., 1942; asst. to D.I.G., July, 1943; Indian police medal, June, 1943; dist. supt., Sholapur, May, 1945.

KHUNDHAR, SIR NURAL AZEEM, B.A., LL.B., Judl. Dept., Bengal (judge, high ct., Calcutta) (b. 17th March, 1890).—Joined the service, 27th Oct., 1921; dept. supt. and remembr. of legal affairs, Jan., 1924; offg. judge, high ct., Calcutta, variously, from Apl., 1934; confd., Nov., 1937; kt., June, 1946.

KHURANA, DWARKA NATH, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 5th June, 1904).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 18th Nov., 1927; asst. exec. engr. (proby.), Nov., 1928; confd., July, 1930; exec. engr., March, 1940.

KHURSHID MUHAMMAD, KEAN BAHADUR, Shaikh, O.B.E., M.A., Punjab Civil Service (dep. commr.) (b. 7th Jan., 1883).—Joined the service as proby. extra asst. commr., 11th Jan., 1907; confd., Sept., 1911; junr. secty. to finl. commrs., Aug., 1927; dep. commr., Aug., 1931; offg. dep. secty., govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, Oct., 1932 to Dec., 1933; O.B.E., Jan., 1941.

KHURSHED AHMAD KHAN, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 15th March, 1897).—Educ. at Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr., from 31st Jan., 1922; jt. mag., Oct., 1924; offg. mag. and collr. variously, from Sept., 1925; offg. dep. commr. Apl., 1928; repres. of U.P. govt. in central legisl. assembly, Jan., 1931; mag. and collr., May, 1937; C.I.E., Jan., 1945.

KHUSHI RAM, SUD, LALA RAI BAHADUR, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 14th Dec., 1898).—Joined the service, 9th Oct., 1922; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1923; offg. exec. engr., Apl., 1932; confd., Oct., 1932.

KHURSHID, MOHAMMED, O.B.E., Ind. C.S. (dep. commr. Assam) (b. 8th Dec., 1907).—Ed. at the Punjab University and St. Catherine's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Assam as asst. commr., under-secty., fin. and rev. depts., March, 1938; ditto, govt. of India, infm. and broadcasting, Oct., 1941; dep. sec., ditto to June, 1942; dep. commr., Feb., 1943; O.B.E., Jan., 1946.

KHURSHID, SAHIBZADA MUHAMMAD, Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 21st July, 1901).—First commn., 31st Aug., 1922; in milty. employ. to 29th June, 1927; asst. pol. agent and asst. commr., Sibi, Jan., 1929; ditto, Zhob, May, 1929; ditto, Loralai, Apl., 1931; asst. for Mekran to pol. agt. in Kalat, Apl., 1932; Adjt. Mekran levy corps, in addn., from Oct., 1933 to Nov., 1933; asst. pol. agent and comdt. refugees camp, Quetta, June, 1935; transfid. to for. service in Kalat State, Aug., 1935; addtl. asst. pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Dec., 1937; asst. pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Apl., 1938; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, Oct., 1938; pol. agent, Dir., Surat and Chitral, Apl., 1939; ditto in Chagai, March, 1940; dep. commr., Mardan, March, 1944; dep. commr., Peshawar, Feb., 1945; pol. agt., Khyber, Nov., 1945.

KHUSROO, BYRAM, M.A., Ph.D.—Apptd. dep. educn. advr., govt. of India, Dec., 1945.

KHWAJA MUHAMMAD AKRAM KHAN (see Muhammad Akram Khan, K.).

KHWAJA MUHAMMAD HUSAIN (see Muhammad Husain, K.).

KIDD, FREDERICK WILLIAM, C.I.E., late Indian Police (b. 1st Sept., 1896).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 4th Dec.,

1911; confd., May, 1914; supt. and dep. commr. of police Calcutta, Oct., 1923; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931; on depn. under G. of I. Home dept., intell. bureau, as cent. intell. offic., Bengal and Assam, from Dec., 1937; dep. dir., intell. bureau, Feb., 1940; dep. inspr.-gen., June, 1942; C.I.E., Jan., 1943; ret'd., Dec., 1945.

KIDD, HUGH BERESFORD, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 20th July, 1894).—Joined the service, 20th Nov., 1914; on mil. duty from 23rd July, 1918 to 24th March, 1919; supt., March, 1926; dep. commr. (temp.), Bombay, Dec., 1937 to Apl., 1938; confd. supt. (sel. grade), Apl., 1942; King's police medal, 8th June, 1944; dep. inspr.-gen. police (confd.), Apl., 1945.

KIDWAI, AHMED NAZIR, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 16th Feb., 1916).—Educ. at Lucknow Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1940, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; under sec. to govt., July, 1944; addl. dep. commr. and addl. dist. mag., Jan., 1945.

KIDWAI, MUBASHIR HUSAIN.—Apptd. addl. judge, chief court, Oudh, July, 1946.

KILBURN, DENYS, O.B.E., Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl. Punjab) (b. 12th Sept. 1899).—Joined the serv. as asst. supt., 15th Mar., 1921; asst. to dep. inspr.-gen., C.I.D., Punjab, Apl., 1926; offg. supt., Dec., 1926; confd., Oct., 1931; O.B.E., Jan., 1939; asst. inspr.-genl., March, 1946; dep. ditto, June, 1946.

KING, SIR ARCHIBALD JOHN, late Indian C.S. (Madras) (b. 27th July, 1887).—Educ. at Liverpool Coll. and Lincoln Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 22nd Nov., 1911, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Feb., 1927; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1923; confd., Apl., 1926; offg. judge, high ct., Madras, July, 1934; confd., Jan., 1935; kt., Jan., 1944; ret'd., July, 1945.

KING, ARNOLD JESSE, late Indian Police, Madras (b. 18th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 4th Dec., 1920; asst. supt., Dec., 1924; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1923; offg. supt., March, 1927; confd., Apl., 1930; on depn. to govt., Ceylon, Apl., 1942 to Oct., 1943; ret'd., Mar., 1946.

KING, SIR CARLETON MOSS, Kt., C.I.E., late Indian C.S., United Provs. (b. 17th July, 1878).—Ret'd., Oct., 1937.*

KING, CUTHBERT, C.I.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (addl. commr. Punjab) (b. 27th Jan., 1889).—Ed. at Sherborne, Christ Church, Oxford, and Göttingen; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 22nd Nov., 1913, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; on milty. duty from Feb., 1917; on spl. duty under H.B.M.'s consul-gen. and agent to the govt. of India, Khorasan, from Jan., 1919 to Apl., 1920; dep. commr. (provl.), Apl., 1926; ditto, perm., Aug., 1928; addtl. commr., March, 1938; C.I.E., Jan., 1946; granted unrestricted permission by H.M. the King to wear decoration of Yun Hui, spl. cravat, conferred by presdt., Chinese republic, Sept., 1946.

KING, FRANK JEROME MAITLAND, Col., R.E., late Survey of India (b. 30th March, 1884).—Ret'd., March, 1939.*

KING, FREDERICK CHARLES, B.A., Barr., late Indian C.S. (b. 6th Jan., 1888).—Ret'd., July, 1941.†

KING, GERALD STANLEY WEATHRAL, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 14th Feb., 1884).—Ret'd., Feb., 1939.*

KING, REV. WILLIAM, B.A., Indian Eccles. Establ., Bombay (b. 17th March, 1905).—Apptd. junr. chaplain on probn., 18th Dec., 1939.

KINGSLEY, EDWIN MAXIMILIAN, late Burma Frontier Service (b. 11th July, 1883).—Retd., July, 1939.*

KINGSTON, ARTHUR EDWARD, O.B.E., I.M.S., Burma Medl. Serv. (b. 25th Dec., 1904).—Date of first commn. 1st Feb., 1933, Burma medl. dept., Nov., 1936; on mil. duty, Dec., 1941; civil surgeon, 1946.

KIRBY, HAROLD LEPINE, M.C., Indian Forest Service (Burma) (b. 13th July, 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 14th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., Dec., 1925; civ. aff. serv., Sept., 1939 to March, 1946; on l.p.r.

KIRBY, WALTER, C.I.E., B.Sc., Dept. of Mines in India (ch. inspr.) (b. 6th Dec., 1891).—Joined the serv. as junr. inspr., 27th Apr., 1921; inspr., Oct., 1925; ch. inspr., Apr., 1938; C.I.E., June, 1945.

KIRKBRIDE, GEORGE, Lieut.-Col. I.A. Indian Political Service (b. 16th Apr., 1894).—First commn. dated 1st June, 1915; joined pol. dept., 22nd March, 1922; asst. commr., Nowshera, March, 1924; secty., British Legation, Kabul, Dec., 1926; asst. commr., Mansehra, Dec., 1928; and again, July, 1929; dep. commr., Hazara, Apr., 1929; dist. judge, Peshawar, Oct., 1929; secty. to resdt. in Mysore, March, 1931; pol. agent, Gilgit, Sept., 1934; ditto, Malwa, March, 1938; ditto, Chhattisgarh State, Nov., 1941; ditto, Mewar, Oct., 1943.

KIRKMAN, CHARLES ALFRED, B.A., Burma C.S. (cl. I) (b. 14th Mar. 1922).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital, Horsham and Magdalen Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn. after seln. Aug., 1946.

KIRKNESS, LEWIS HAWKER, C.I.E., O.B.E., D.S.O., late Indian State Rlys.—Joined the service, 15th Aug., 1929; dir., estabt., rly. bd., Dec., 1932; secty., rly. bd., Feb., 1933; C.I.E., June, 1936; rettd.

KIRKPATRICK, WILLIAM, C.I.E., B.E., B.A., M.Inst.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr. Sind) (b. 15th Sept., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1910; in milty. employ from 29th July, 1916 to 31st Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1918; offg. suptg. engr., Apr., 1925; Apr., 1928, and again Apr., 1929; confd., May, 1936; C.I.E., June, 1941.

KIRPALANI, HIRANAND KHUSHIRAM, C.I.E., M.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (collr. Bombay) (b. 28th Jan., 1888).—Educ. at Schs. in India, Bombay Univ. and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 15th Nov., 1912, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; munpl. commr., Surat, June, 1919 to Jan., 1920; dep. munpl. commr., Bombay, Apr. to Nov., 1921; offg. collr., dist. mag. and pol. agent, May, 1923; dep. sec. to govt., rev. dept. (tempy.), March, 1924; ditto (permanent), Aug., 1925; actg. munpl. commr. for city of Bombay, Apr. to Dec., 1926; on deputation out of India as dep. secty. to Indian Central Comee. to Indian Statutory commn., Apr., 1929; municipal commr. for city of Bombay, July, 1931; offg. secty. to govt., Bombay, genl. and eduel. depts., Apr., 1935; ch. secty. to govt., Sind, Apr., 1936; C.I.E., Feb., 1937; chairman Bombay port trust, 1938–1941; ch. sec. to the govt. of Bombay, 1942; advr. to the govr. of Bombay, 1943; indust. advr. to the govt. of India, Feb., 1945; ex officio addl. sec. planning and devel. dept., May, 1946; addl. sec. indus. and supplies dept., July, 1946.

KIRPALANI, J. T. (Sind) (b. 26th Oct., 1894).—Held non-gaz. appts., supt. of salt rev., Sind (confd.), Apr., 1944.

KIRPALANI, MOTIRAM KHUSHIRAM, C.I.E., B.A. (Oxon.), Indian C.S. (dep. sec. to govt. fin. dep. Bengal) (b. 15th Aug., 1901).—Educ. at Univ. of Bombay, New College, Oxford, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1926; arrived, Dec., 1926, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Dec., 1927; offg. mag. and collr., Jan., 1932; and again, Feb., 1936; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, July, 1934; commr. of salt and exc., Bengal, 1938; mag. and collr., June, 1939; dep. secty. to govt., fin. dept., Bengal, May, 1940; confd. mag. and collr., March, 1941; sec. comm. and lab. dept. March, 1943; C.I.E., June, 1945.

KIRPALANI, SANTDAS KHUSHIRAM, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (secty. elec. and ind. depts. Punjab) (b. 7th Apr., 1899).—Educ. at Bombay Univ. and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 31st Oct., 1922; arrived, 20th Dec., 1922, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr., offg. dep. commr., May, 1926; dep. commr. (provl.), Dec., 1929; confd., March, 1933; junr. secty. to finl. commrs., Dec., 1929; offg. rev. secty. to govt., Punjab, Dec., 1931; settlement offcr., Jan., 1936; secty. unempl. cttee., Dec., 1937; secty. elec. and ind. depts., Apr., 1938; offr. on special duty, dept. of supply, Apr., 1941; jt. sec. to govt. of India, dept. of supply, May, 1941; C.I.E., Jan., 1943; on spec. duty, commerce dept., govt. of India, Dec., 1943; Indian trade commr., New York, May, 1944.

KIRPA RAM, RAI BAHADUR, B.A. (dep. dir. of admin. and intell.) (b. 20th June, 1890).—Joined the service on 27th Oct., 1913, and held non-gaz. posts up to 9th May, 1930; asst. chief contr. of stores, Ind. Stores Dept., May, 1930, and asst. dir. of admin. and intell., June, 1930; dep. ditto, June, 1937; asst. supt. of clothing, production, directorate-genl. of supply, Nov., 1940; dep. dir. directorate-genl. of supply, Aug., 1941, dir., ditto, Aug., 1941.

KIRWAN, ERNEST WILLIAM O'GORMAN, C.I.E., Lieut.-Col., late I.M.S. (b. 18th May, 1887).—Joined the service, 29th Jan., 1910; apptd. prof. of ophthalm. surg., med. coll., Calcutta, Oct., 1930; C.I.E., Jan., 1939; rettd., Nov., 1944.

KISCH, SIR CECIL HERMANN, K.C.I.E., C.B., M.A., late India Office (b. 31st March, 1884).—Educ. at Clifton and Trinity College, Oxford; served in sec.'s office at post office until 27th July, 1908, when he was apptd. junior clerk, India Office; resdt. clerk, March to Sept. 1910; pte. sec. to under-sec. of state, May, 1911; senr. clerk, fincl. dept., April, 1914; acting as pte. sec. to under-sec. of state, from June, 1915, and to parly. under-sec. of state (in addn.) from Dec., 1915; pte. sec. (temp.) to the sec. of state, May, 1917, to June, 1919; on deputn. to India in connection with visit of sec. of state, Oct., 1917, to May, 1918; C.B., Jan., 1919; sec. to commtee. on Indian exchange and currency, June to Dec., 1919; assist. sec. British Empire Delegation at Peace Conference, Paris, 1918–19; dep. sec., finl. dept., Dec., 1919; sec. finl. dept., Apr., 1921; acting under-secy. of state, Jan.–Apr., 1932; K.C.I.E., June, 1932; member, Ind. staty. rly. bd. cttee., June, 1933; ditto, Ind. res. bank cttee., July, 1933; adviser to Ind. delegation to mone-

KRISHNA AIYAR, SAMBASIVA, B.A., B.L., tary and economic conf., London, June, 1933; asst. under-sec. of state, Dec., 1933; commr. of inc.-tax, Dec., 1933; services loaned to the mines dept., Nov., 1939 to June, 1943; actg. dep. under-sec. of state, July, 1943; retd., Jan., 1946.

KISHAN, RAM (see Ram Kishan).

KISHINCHAND KUNDANMAL (Sind) (b. 3rd Nov., 1898).—Joined Mar., 1942 and held non-gaz. posts; asst. sec. to govt., legal dept., Dec., 1945.

KISHOR, CHANDRA (see Chandra, K.).

KISHORE, THAKUR JUGAL (see Jugal Kishore, T.).

KITCHEN, HUGH MELVILLE, M.C., Indian State Rlys. (dep. chief operating supt.) (b. 13th Dec., 1894).—Joined the service, 9th Dec., 1919; asst. supt., E.I. Rly., Nov., 1926; transptn. supt. (traffic comml.), May, 1935; dep. ch. operating supt., provisional, Aug., 1941.

KITCHIN, ERIC ROBERT, B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 31st March, 1911).—Educ. at Malvern, Christ's College, Cambridge, and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; apptd. asst. pte. sec. to Viceroy, Jan., 1938; asst. sec. to govt., Bengal, July, 1940; addl. sec., home dept., Bengal, Jan., 1942, on l.p.r., Jan. 1947.

KITCHINGMAN, GERALD DAWSON, M.A., Indian Forest Service (Punjab) (b. 6th March, 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., March, 1921; dep. consvr., Nov., 1926; offg. consvr., variously, from July, 1934; consvr., Apl., 1940.

KNAPP, SIR ARTHUR ROWLAND, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., C.B.E., late Indian C.S., Madras.—Retd., Jan., 1927.*

KNASTER, ROLAND MARCUS JULIUS, B.A., Office of High Commr. for India (educ. officer, principl. exec. grade, education dept.) (b. 19th July, 1890).—Educ. at the Perse School and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; apptd. asst. to local adviser to Indian students, London, Sept., 1919; warden, 21, Cromwell Road, S.W.7, Feb., 1920 to July, 1923; transf. to office of high commr. for India as asst. to joint secs., Indian students' dept., Oct., 1920; principal exec. officer, education dept., Apl., 1925.

KNIGHT, SIR HENRY FOLEY, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 19th Jan., 1886).—Educ. at Haileybury School, and Caius College, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 14th Nov., 1910, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; on mil. duty from July, 1916 to March, 1919; under-sec. to govt., rev. and fin. depts., Oct., 1919; temp. dep. sec., ditto, Jan., 1920; dir. of comml. intellig., Bombay, Jan., 1922; addl. dep. sec. to govt., fin. dept., Oct., 1922; dir. of industries, May, 1923; actg. collr. and dist. mag., Nov., 1924; March, 1926, and June, 1928; confd., Jan., 1929; secty., home and eccl. depts., Jan., 1929, and again, Apl., 1935; offg. secty., genl. and educ. depts., Bombay, Feb., 1934; confd., May, 1934; secty., home and eccles. depts., Apl., 1935; C.I.E., June, 1936; offg. commr. of excise, Bombay, Sept., 1936; commr., Dec., 1936; ditto, 1st gr., Dec., 1937; advr. to govt. of Bombay, Nov., 1939; C.S.I., June, 1941; K.C.S.I., June, 1944; actg. govt. of Bombay, March to June, 1945; advr. to govt. of Bombay, Nov., 1945; actg. govt. Madras, Feb. to May, 1946; actg. govt.

Burma, Jan., to Aug., 1946; actg. govt. Assam, Sept., 1946; advr. to sec. of state for India, Feb., 1947.

KOHLI, DALIP RAI, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 7th June, 1919).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1942; served in Assam as asst. commr.

KOHLI, DHARAMNATH PRASAD, M.Sc., Indian Police (supt.) (b. 8th Feb., 1907).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., United Provs., 5th Jan., 1931; confd., Feb., 1933; confd. as supt., July, 1944.

KOLAND VICTOR SAMUEL, B.E., Indian State Rlys. (dist. loco. supt., E.B. Rly.) (b. 20th May, 1894).—Asst. loco. supt. (junior scale), 5th May, 1922; dist. loco. supt. (senr. scale), Nov., 1936.

KOMAN, MALIKAYAL CHANDAPPA BALACHANDRA (see Balachandra Koman, M. C.).

KORDIK, OSCAR, M.M., India Office (higher executive officer, acctnt.-genl.'s dept.) (b. 19th May, 1893).—Apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 30th Jan., 1913, and attd. to finl. dept.; on mily. service, from Sept., 1915 to Feb., 1919 (awarded the Military Medal); exec. officer, Apl., 1922; higher ditto, Aug., 1931; actg. suptg. exec. offr., Nov., 1945.

KORGAOKAR, HARISH CHANDRA KRISHNARAO, M.A., B.Sc., A.C.G.I., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Rlys. (E.B. Rly.) (b. 16th Sept., 1885).—Retd., Sept., 1940.†

KOTHAVALA, SIAVASH RUSTAM, M.A., Khan Bahadur, late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 15th May, 1888).—Joined the service as probn. supt., 17th March, 1911; confd., Feb., 1913; Khan Bahadur, Jan., 1935; dep. p.m.g., Oct., 1937; dep. dir.-genl., postal services, July, 1941; senr.; ditto, March, 1942; retd., May, 1944.

KOTHAVALA, TEHMAS TEMULJI, C.I.E., M.A., B.Sc., Bombay C.S. (collr. and dist. mag.) (b. 6th Feb., 1893).—Dep. collr., Jan., 1920; collr. and dist. mag., Nov., 1935; under Government of Sind, Sept., 1938; C.I.E., June, 1943; sec., provl. transp. authority, Bombay, May, 1944.

KOTHAVALLA, ZAL RUSTUM, B.Ag. (Bom.) B.Sc. (Edin.), (b. 13th June, 1896).—Joined the serv., 30th Nov., 1925 as asst., Impl. Dairy dept., Bangalore; confd. as Impl. Dairy expert, June, 1932; dairy dev. advr. govt. of India, Sept., 1944.

KOTHAWALA, DARASHAH DHANJISHAH, Khan Bahadur, M.B.E., late Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 22nd Feb., 1885).—Retd., Feb., 1940.†

KRIPAL, SINGH, B.A., Indian Police (supt. United Provs.) (b. 17th Nov., 1903).—Joined the serv., 1st Jan., 1926 as temp. dep. supt. of police; confd. Apl., 1928; supt. ditto (confd.), July, 1940.

KRISHEN, PREM, M.A., Indian C.S. (b. 20th Nov., 1911).—Educ. at St. Edward's High Sch., Simla, Delhi Univ., and Christ Church, Oxford; joined the service, 4th Sept., 1935; arrived in India, Sept., 1935, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., July, 1937; offg. mag. and collr., Oct., 1941; under-secty., educn., health and lands dept., May, 1943.

KRISHEN, SAROOP, M.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 18th Jan., 1915).—Educ. at Arya High School, Ludhiana, Punjab Univ., Univ. Coll., London, and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. on probn., 23rd Oct., 1939; confd., 24th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.

late Indian Audit Dept. (b. 10th July, 1884).—Retd., July, 1939.*

KRISHNA, DAYA KHANNA (see Daya Krishna, K.).

KRISHNA, DR. S., C.I.E., (b. 6th July, 1896).—Joined the service as Bio-chemist (temp.), F.R.I., 23rd June, 1928; bio-chem. (confd.), Mar., 1934; C.I.E., 1942.

KRISHNA MENON, MANAKAT, B.A., Indian Police (dist. supt., Madras) (b. 14th Dec., 1906).—Joined, 19th Jan., 1931; confd. as asst. supt., Madras, Jan., 1933; dist. supt., (confd.), Oct., 1944; addl. asst. inspr.-genl.

KRISHNAMMA ACHARYA, SIR VANGAL TIRUVENKATA, K.C.S.I., K.C.I.E., B.A., B.L., Rao Bahadur, late Madras C.S. (b. 8th Feb., 1881).—Retd., Feb., 1936.*

KRISHNAMMA, NOBLE RATNAM, Rao Bahadur, B.A. (Cantab.), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 1st June, 1887).—Joined the service, 2nd Apl., 1910; prin., govt., arts coll., Rajamundry, July, 1921; ditto, Coimbatore, Apl., 1925; offg. dist. eduel. offr., Dec., 1925; prin. ceded districts coll., Anantapur, Apl., 1926; retd. June, 1942.

KRISHNAMORTHY, ENNAPPADAM SUNDERA, Ayyar, B.A., Imperial Customs Service (dep. secty., Govt. of India, Commerce Dept.) (b. 15th Nov., 1905).—Joined the service, Apl., 1930; asst. collr. of customs, Nov., 1931; on spec. duty fin. dept., govt. of India, Apl., 1938; attaché to the govt. of India, commerce dept., Oct., 1938; under-secty., ditto, Feb., 1939; dep. ditto, Dec., 1942.

KRISHNAMURTHI, N., Rao Sahib, Elec. Dept., Madras (b. 26th Apl., 1893).—Confed. as asst. engr. in P.W.D., Apl., 1930.

KRISHNAMURTHI, Rao Bahadur, SATHANUR RAMACHANDRA, Elec. Dept., Madras (b. 15th July, 1896).—Joined the serv., 16th Aug., 1928 as asst. engr. (civil); exec. engr. (confd.), Apl., 1943.

KRISHNAMURTHY, PATTADARAL VENKANNA, M.Sc., F.I.A. (b. 2nd Dec., 1907).—Appdt. asst. supt. of insurance, govt. of India, commerce dept., May, 1939.

KRISHNAMURTHI, VEPRA, Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr.) (b. 13th Sept., 1910).—Joined the service as proby. asst. exec. engr., Madras, 30th Apl., 1933; confd., Jan., 1934; exec. engr., Apl., 1942; under Central govt. from March, 1942; suptg. engr., Sept., 1945.

KRISHNA NARAYAN KATHPALIA, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 19th Jan., 1902).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 3rd Nov., 1924; asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1925; offg. exec. engr., Nov., 1929; confd., Oct., 1934.

KRISHNA PRASADA, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (dir.-gen. posts and tels) (b. 4th Aug., 1894).—Educ. at New College, Oxford; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived in India, 6th Jan., 1922, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Nov., 1925; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1926; confd., Aug., 1935; p.m.g., Central circle, Feb., 1935; ditto. Madras, June, 1937; del. to internl. conf., Cairo, 1938; dep. dir.-gen., postal services, Apl., 1938; post-master-genl., Bombay, March, 1939; p.m.g., Punjab and N.W.F. circle, Nov., 1939; C.I.E., Jan., 1943; p.m.g., B. and A. circle, July, 1941; offg. dir.-gen., posts and tels., Apl., 1946.

KRISHNA RAO, KARNAD, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 17th Nov., 1899).—Joined the

service, 5th May, 1924; dep. dir. of rly. audit, Apl., 1934; dep. acct. genl., Punjab, Apl., 1937; asst. dir. audit (def.), May, 1938; ditto, def. services, southern cmd., Dec., 1939.

KRISHNA RAO, NANDALIKE DEVARAO, Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Madras) (b. 19th July, 1904).—Educ. at University of Madras, School of Economics, London, and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 28th Sept., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub.-collr. and jt. mag. March, 1930; dist. and sess. judge, June, 1939.

KRISHNAN, HARIKESANALUR RAMASASTRI, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bihar) (b. 9th Jan., 1910).—Educated at Tirthpathi High Sch., University of Madras, University of Benares and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 6th Sept., 1935; arrived in India, Oct., 1935, and served in B. & O. as asst. mag. and collr.; sub.-divl. offr., Feb., 1937; served in fin. and comm. provl. Cent. govt., May, 1942; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1943; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1943.

KRISHNAN, MAHARAJAPURAM SITARAMAN, M.A., A.R.C.S., Ph.D., Geol. Survey of India (b. 24th Aug., 1898).—Joined the serv. as asst. supt. (geologist), 19th Dec., 1924.

KRISHNAN, ODAYATH, B.A., Imperial Customs Service (asst. collr.) (b. 15th June, 1900).—Joined the service, Apl., 1925; asst. collr. of customs, March, 1927.

KRISHNAN, SIVARAMA (see Sivarama Krishnan).

KRISHNASWAMI AYYANGAR, KOMBUR RAMASWAMI, O.B.E., Lieut.-Col., ret'd., late I.M.S. (b. 5th July, 1883).—Appdt. dir., Pasteur Institute, Coonoor, 11th Apl., 1928; ret'd., July, 1938; O.B.E., Jan., 1939.

KRISHNASWAMI AYYAR, Diwan Bahadur, SIR ALLADI, Kt., B.A., B.L., Judl. Dept., Madras (b. 13th May, 1883).—Appdt. Advocate-genl. for presdy. of Madras, Jan., 1929.

KRISHNASWAMI, V. S., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr.) (b. 12th Aug., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Madras, 4th Oct., 1929; dep. consvr., Oct., 1934; dep.-commr. fuel, Madras, Feb., 1944 to Mar., 1945.

KRISHNASWAMY, RANGACHARI SRINIVASADESIKA, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 2nd June, 1906).—Educ. at Madras University and London School of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May., 1933; addtl. dist. mag., March, 1938 to Jan., 1939; addtl. dist. judge, Aug., 1938; mag. and collr., June, 1940.

KRISHNASWAMY, SUCHEENDRUM YEGNA-NARAYANA, O.B.E., Indian C.S. (sub.-collr., Madras) (b. 30th Sept., 1906).—Educ. at Univ. of Madras and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929; sub.-collr., Aug., 1932; spcl. sett. offr., Apl., 1937; spcl. rev. offr., Apl., 1940; sec., bd. of rev., Jan., 1942; spcl. develmt. offr., Dec., 1943; jt. sec., dev. dept., Jan., 1945; addl. sec., ditto, Dec., 1945; O.B.E., June, 1946.

KUDVA VENKATARAYA NARAYANA, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (collr. Madras) (b. 13th Nov., 1898).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Clare Coll., Cambridge; joined the serv., 1st Nov., 1922; arrived, 13th Dec., 1922; sub.-collr. and jt. mag., Jan., 1925; on for service as estate collr., Sivaganga, Nov., 1930; offg. collr. and mag.,

July, 1933; supt. of stationery, Madras, Jan., 1936; collr. (confd.), Apl., 1943; sec., local admin. dept., Sept., 1941; sec. to govt., P.W.D., Feb., 1946; C.I.E., June, 1946.

KUMAR ASANAND (see Asanand Kumar).

KUMAR, ASHWANI, B.A., Indian Police, Punjab (b. 27th Dec., 1920).—Apptd. asst. supt., on probn., after exam. of 1942.

KUMAR, VIRENDRA, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (b. 30th Apl., 1920).—Educ. at Lucknow Univ.; apptd., on probn., after exam. of 1943, and served in Bombay.

KUMTHEKAR, KONDO MAHADEV, B.A., LL.B., late Judl. Dept., Bombay (b. 8th Jan., 1882).—Retd., Jan., 1937.*

KUNDAN LAL, late India Posts and Tels. (b. 12th Apl., 1883).—Retd., Apl., 1938.*

KUNDAN LAL AGGARWAL, M.B.E., M.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 21st Aug., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. om 8th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Nov., 1928; M.B.E., June, 1941; on depn. to Chamba State, Apl., 1943.

KUNDAN LAL, LALA RAI BAHADUR, B.A., A.M.I.E. (Ind.), late Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 21st Aug., 1888).—Joined the service, 5th Oct., 1911; asst. engr., Oct., 1912; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1921; subst. suptg. engr., Nov., 1939; retd., 21st Aug., 1943; dep. presdt., civil seln. bd., govt. of India, Nov., 1945.

KUNHIRAMAN, CHURYA, B.A., B.L., Judl. Dept., Madras (addtl. judge, Madras high ct.) (b. 1st March, 1888).—Apptd. offg. asst. profr., law coll., Madras, 10th July, 1911; confd., July, 1916; prof. ditto, July, 1921; 3rd judge, small cause ct., Feb., 1927; 2nd ditto, Feb., 1928; temp. judge, city civil ct., Madras, June, 1932; ch. judge, small cause ct., July, 1933; addtl. judge, Madras high ct., July, 1941.

KUNHIRAMAN NAMBIYAR, AMANDA KALOTH, Indian Police (asst. supt., Madras) (b. 15th May, 1911).—Apptd. asst. supt., on probn., 13th Feb., 1935; confd., Feb., 1937.

KUNJ BEHARILAL SETH (see Seth, K. B.). KUPPUSWAMI AYYAR, C. N., Diwan Bahadur, B.A., B.L., Judl. Dept., Madras (high ct. judge, Madras) (b. 1st Apl., 1887).—Joined the service, 21st Oct., 1908; sub.-judge, Apl., 1934; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1936; retd., Apl., 1942; addtl. judge, Madras high ct., June, 1942.

KUPPUSWAMI RAMASWAMI AYYANGAR, Income Tax Dept., Madras (asst. commr.) (b. 28th Dec., 1887).—Held non-gaz. appts.; joined the service, Sept., 1918; income-tax officer, Oct., 1923; confd. as asst. commr. of income-tax, March, 1937.

KUPPUSWAMI, VALAVANUR SUBRAHMANYA, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 1st July, 1899).—Joined the service, 5th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Nov., 1928; served under Central govt. from Oct., 1940.

KUPPUSWAMY, IYENGAR, KRISHNASWAMY, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 5th Apl., 1905).—Joined the service, 12th Apl., 1930; asst. acct. genl., Madras, Apl., 1932; ditto, Bengal, Apl., 1936; dep. govt. exmr. accts., A.B. Rly., Dec., 1939.

KURBAN ALI KHAN, KHAN, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b., 11th May, 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 8th Nov., 1921; offg. supt., March, 1927; confd., Apl., 1933.

KURESHI, BASHIR AHMAD, B.A., Indian

C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b., 1st Dec., 1914).—Educ. at Sandamen Sch., Quetta, Punjab Univ. and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn. 30th Sept., 1938; confd. 11th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.; sub.-divl. offr., May, 1942; under-sec., govt., Punjab (elec.) and sec., Punjab and N.W.F.P. jt. publ. serv. commn., Nov., 1942; dir. of industries; dir. of panchayats, June, 1946.

KURIYAN, JOHN, Elec. Dept., Madras (b. 25th Feb., 1897).—Joined 22nd June, 1928 as junr. elec. inspr. to govt.; elec. engr. (confd.), Apl., 1935; suptg. engr., Apl., 1944.

KURVA, SHUJAUDDIN ESMAILJI, M.B.E., Barr., late Bombay Judicial Dept. (b. 13th July, 1885).—Retd., July, 1940.

KYA, BA, Barr., Judl. dept., Burma (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 14th Nov., 1892).—Joined the service, March, 1921, dist. and sess. judge (confd.) Nov., 1937; and again 1945-46.

KYAW, MAUNG BA, B.A., Burma C.S. (Cl. I.) (addl. dep. commr.) (b. 11th June, 1914).—Educ. at Rangoon Univ.; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 5th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Oct., 1938, and served as asst. commr.; civ. aff. serv., May, 1945; addl. dep. commr., Feb., 1946.

KYAW MIN, MAUNG (see Min, Maung Kyaw). KYAW NYUN, U, Burma C.S. (Cl. I.) Apptd. on probn., Rangoon Examin., Jan., 1940; serv. commenced 8th Apl., 1942; S.D.O. Paungde. Oct., 1945.

KYIN, MAUNG, O.B.E., M.Sc., Ind. C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. 25th Apl., 1904).—Educ. at Univ. of Rangoon, and Oriel Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 28th Sept., 1928; arrived, Oct., 1928, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secy., educn. dept., Aug., 1932; offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1934; jt. regr., co-op. soc., Dec., 1935; offg. regr., ditto, March, 1937; dep. commr. (confd.), Jan., 1939; sec. agric. and forest dept., Feb., 1941; civ. aff. serv., May to Oct., 1945; O.B.E., 1946; sec. soc. services dept., Oct., 1945.

KYIN, U PO, late Indian Police (Burma) (b. 1st June, 1885).—Retd., Feb., 1939.*

LABERN, REGINALD ALBERT, M.B.E., Off. of High Commr. for India (exec. offr., general dept.) (b. 29th Oct., 1897).—Apptd. temp. clerk, India Office, Oct., 1920; transf. to H.C.'s Office, Apl., 1922; clerical officr., Jan., 1924; exec. ditto, June, 1927; office secty. to Indian del. to Indo-British trade negotiations, June, 1937 to Sept. 1938; M.B.E., June, 1945.

LABORDA, FELIX EDWARD RICARDO, Indian State Rlys. (b. 1st Apl., 1908).—Joined the service as dist. medl. offr., 17th Oct., 1919; offg. C.M.O., E.I. Rly., variously from May, 1933; confd., Jan., 1940.

LABOUCARDIERE, BASIL RICHARD EMILE (supt., Bombay) Indian Police.—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., 22nd Jan., 1936; confd., Oct., 1937; served in Sind from Feb., 1943; pers. asst. to inspr.-gen., Dec., 1944.
