High Sch. and Edinburgh Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1916; arrived, 19th Dec., 1917, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; I.A.R.O., May, 1918 to Jan., 1919; addl. dist. mag., Nov., 1923; and settlt. officer, July, 1924; offg. mag. and collr., Apl., 1926; confd., March, 1929; offg. secty., bd. of rev., March, 1929; confd., Sept., 1930; offg. commr. of excise and salt, Bengal, June, 1935; confd., June, 1937; confd. mag. and collr., Oct., 1942; div. commr. (confd.) Jan., 1946; C.I.E., Jan., 1946; I.p.r., Jan., 1947.

McPHERSON, SIR HUGH, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., late Indian C.S. (Bihar and Orissa).—Retd., Nov., 1926.*

McPHERSON, REV. KENNETH CECIL, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estab. (archdeacon of Bombay) (b. 8th July, 1890).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., Bombay, 10th Oct., 1931; confd., July, 1932; senr. chaplain, July, 1942; archdeacon of Bombay, June, 1943.

MACPHERSON, SIR THOMAS STEWART, Kt., C.I.E., M.A., Barr., late Indian C.S. (Bihar) (b. 21st Aug., 1876).—Retd., Aug., 1936.*

MACQUEEN, PERCY, late Indian C.S. (Madras) (b. 13th Nov., 1883).—Retd., 11th May, 1942.†

McRAE, HENRY WARREN, M.B.E., Office of High Commr. for India higher exec. officer, store dept. (b. 13th July, 1884).—Educ. at City of London Sch.; apptd. 2nd class clerk, India store depôt, 19th Aug., 1902; transfid. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; higher clerical officer, Apl., 1922; higher exec. offir., March, 1926; actg. princpl. ditto, Sept., 1939; M.B.E., Jan., 1945.

MACRAE, IAN MACPHERSON, C.B., C.I.E., O.B.E., M.B., Maj.-Genl., I.M.S., retd., late Jail Dept., Bihar and Orissa (b. 2nd Oct., 1882).—Asst. dir. medl. service, Bombay, Nov., 1933.†

McROBERT, GEORGE REID, Lieut.-Col., C.I.E., I.M.S., Medl. Dept., Madras (supt. govt. genl. hosp., Madras) (b. 21st Jan., 1895).—Date of first commn., 15th March, 1920; apptd. profir. of medicine, medl. coll., Madras, Oct., 1934; supt. govt. gen. hosp., March, 1940; surgeon to the govr., Nov., 1941.

McROBERT, RONALD, M.C., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., (b. 19th Sept., 1896).—Date of first commn. 22nd Feb., 1924; served with govt. of Burma, 20th Jan., 1932; ditto govt. of India May, 1943 to Nov., 1944; civ. aff. serv., Aug., 1945; supt., Dufferin hosp. Rangoon, Jan., 1946.

McRURY, REV. DONALD ARCHIBALD, M.A., Indian Ecclesl. Estabt. (Madras) (b. 29th Dec., 1902).—Apptd. junr. chaplain, 7th Oct., 1935;

McSWEENEY, DENIS LÉON, M.C., Office of High Commr. for India (suptg. exec. officer, accounts dept.) (b. 26th Jan., 1883).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, store depôt, 14th March, 1904; on mily. service from Aug., 1914 to May, 1919; transfid. to office of high commr. for India,

Oct. 1920; higher exec. offr., Apl., 1922; suptg. exec. officer., Nov., 1934.

McTURK, JOHN, B.A., Burma C.S. (Cl. I.) (asst. commr.). (b. 26th July, 1914).—Educ. at Stowe and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 30th Sept., 1937; arrived in Burma, Nov., 1937, and served as asst. commr.; asst. sec. to govr., Sept., 1940; civ. aff. serv., Sept., 1943.

MACWATT, SIR ROBERT CHARLES, Kt., C.I.E., M.B., Major-Gen., late I.M.S.—Retd., Sept., 1926.*

McWATTERS, SIR ARTHUR CECIL, Kt., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 13th Sept., 1880).—Retd., Dec., 1931*

McWILLIAM, PETER NEISH, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 21st Oct., 1906).—Educ. at Tottenham County School and East London College and Downing College, Cambridge; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1931; addtl. dist. mag., March, 1938; mag. and collr., Apl., 1939; dep. commr., Apl., 1943; addl. labour commr., Mar., 1945.

MADAN, FRANCIS FALCONER, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bihar) (b. 27th Oct., 1886).—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

MADAN, FRAMROZ RUSTJONI, B.A., late Indian Forest Service (Madras) (b. 3rd March, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Dec., 1911; dep. consvr., Dec., 1916; offg. consvr. Apl., 1926; confd., Oct., 1931; retd., Mar., 1943.

MADAN GOPAL SARDHANA, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 29th Jan., 1886).—Retd., 17th Jan., 1940.

MADAN, SIR JANARDAN ATMARAM, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 12th Feb., 1885).—Retd., Apl., 1942.*

MADAN LAL, PURI, Lieut.-Col. retd., late I.M.S. (Punjab) (b. 13th Apl., 1885).—Retd., Apl., 1940.†

MADAN MOHAN SINHA, RAI BAHADUR, M.B.E., (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 3rd Jan., 1886).—Joined the service, 26th Apl., 1913, as dep. collr.; M.B.E., Dec., 1919; asst. sec. to govr., March, 1921; sec., U.P. committee for the British Empire Exhibition, Feb., 1923; dep. dir. of industries, Dec., 1925; offg. mag. and collr., Feb., 1933; confd., May, 1933.

MADANI, GHULAM AHMED (see Ghulam Ahmed Madani).

MADELEY, WILLIAM YORKE, B.A., Indian C.S. (judge, chief ct., Oudh) (b. 26th Nov., 1887).—Educ. at Woodbridge Gr. Sch., and Jesus Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1912, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr. and asst. commr.; jt. mag., July, 1917; on mil. duty (I.A.R.O.), Aug., 1918 to Jan., 1919; actg. mag. and collr., May, 1920; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1922; confd., Feb., 1927; actg. judge, chief. ct. of Oudh, July, 1941; addtl. judge, Oudh, 11th May, 1943; judge, ditto, Nov., 1944.

MADGAONKAR, SIR GOVIND DINANATH, Kt., B.A. late Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 21st May, 1871).—Retd., Apl., 1931*

MADHU SUDAN DAYAL, MITHAL, Lala, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 17th Feb., 1899).—Joined the service, 16th Oct., 1922; asst. exec. engr., Oct.,

1923; exec. engr. March, 1935; under govt. of India, from Nov., 1945.

MAFFEY, SIR JOHN LOADER, G.C.M.G., K.C.B., K.C.V.O., C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (N.W.F.P.)—Retd., Nov., 1925.*

MAGNIAC, SIR CHARLES LANE, Kt., C.M.G., C.B.E., Brig.-Gen., R.E. (ret'd.), late Railway Dept.—Retd., March, 1922.*

MAGOR, EDWARD WALTER MOYLE, Capt. I.A., Ind. Political Service (b. 1st June, 1911).—Apptd. to I.P.S. on probn., Oct., 1937; under sec. to resdt., Rajputana, March, 1943; confd., in I.P.S., May, 1944; offr. on spec. duty in Kolhapur resdcy. Jan., 1945; sec. to resdt. for Kolhapur and the Deccan states, Feb., 1945.

MAGRATH, WILLIAM CHRISTOPHER McLEAN, O.B.E., Ind. Police (supt. Bihar) (b. 25th July, 1898).—Joined the serv. as asst. 12th Sept., 1921; offg. supt., Jan., 1924; confd., Apl., 1932; awarded Indian police medal, Feb., 1937; O.B.E., Jan., 1946.

MAGUB, GEORGE DOUGLAS, Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., C.P.) (b. 11th Oct., 1916).—Educ. at Dover County School and Caius Coll., Cambridge; appointed on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; conf., 11th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in C.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

MAGUIRE, ANGUS DENYS, Indian Police, (asst. supt., Bihar) (b. 2nd Oct., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 17th Nov., 1927; offg. supt., June, 1934; supt. (confd.) Sept., 1944.

MAHABIR PRASAD, C.I.E., B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 7th Nov., 1888).—Joined the service, 19th Sept., 1911; asst. engr., Sept., 1912; exec. engr., Sept., 1921; offg. dep. dir. of industries, Jan., 1931; profr. of civil engrg., Thomason Coll., Dec., 1934 to Apl., 1937; suptg. engr., U.P.,; confd., Aug., 1939; C.I.E., June, 1944; retd., 7th Nov., 1943.

MAHADEVAN, RAM MOHUN, Indian Police, (Madras) (b. 1st Feb., 1918).—Asst. supt. of police on probn. Apl., 1940; confd. Apl., 1942.

MAHAJAN, MEHR CHAND (judge, high ct., Lahore).—Apptd., June, 1943.

MAHALANABIS, PRASANTA CHANDRA, O.B.E., M.A. (Cantab.), B.Sc., Indian Educ. Service (profr., presy. coll., Calcutta) (b. 29th June, 1893).—Joined the service, 1st Sept., 1917; profr., Dacca coll., May, 1919; profr. presy. coll., July, 1920; O.B.E., Jan., 1942.

MAHAMADI, RASHID AHMED, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. sec., govt. of India, dept. of I. and S.) (b. 24th July, 1909).—Educ. at Madrasra-i-Aliya Hyderabad, Madras Univ. and School of Oriental Studies, London, joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; dep. sec. govt. Sind., Jan., 1939; collr. and dist. mag., Sept., 1939; dep. sec. govt. of India, I. and C.S. dept., Sept., 1943; dep. sec., I. and S. dept., Jan., 1946.

MAHANTI, PRAN NATH, Rai Sahib, M.A., (b. 14th Oct., 1908).—Joined provl. civ. serv. (ex Bihar and Orissa) Feb., 1934; asst. sec. to govt. and price contr., Orissa, Feb., 1944; Rai Sahib, June, 1945; under sec., govt. of India, commonwealth relations dept., Aug., 1945.

MAHANTY, DIRAKAR (see Dibakar, M.).

MAHARAJ NAGENDRASINGH, see Nagendra Singh, Maharaj.

MAHARAJ SINGH, KUNWAR, SIR, C.I.E., M.A., Barr., late United Provs., C.S. (b. 17th May, 1878).—Retd., May, 1933.*

MAHBUB ALI KHAN, KHAN BAHADUR SHAIKH, O.B.E., Indian Political Service (b. March, 1894).—Joined the service, March, 1915; asst. commr., Peshawar, May, 1930; ditto, Mansehra, March, 1935; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, May, 1936; asst. commr., Thal, March, 1937; dep. commr., Kohat, March, 1938; pol. agt. Dir, Swat, and Chitral, Jan., 1945; pol. agt., ditto, Jan., 1946.

MAHBUB, ILAHI CHARAGH, SHAIKH, KHAN BAHADUR, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 14th March, 1904).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 30th Oct., 1925; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1926; exec. eng., Oct., 1935; sec. p.w.d. (irrgn.), Oct., 1941; under-sec. (estabt.) ditto, Oct., 1942; on depn. to U.S.A., April to July, 1945.

MAHER, JOHN EDWARD, Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Madras) (b. 5th Sept., 1904).—Educ. at Cheltenham, and Keble Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928; sub.-collr., Apl., 1931; dist. and sess. judge, Orissa, Dec., 1939; dist. and sess. judge, Tinnevelly, Mar., 1946.

MAHIDA, UDAYSINH NARSENHBAYA, B.E., Indian Service of Engineers (b. 20th Apl., 1904).—Apptd. assistant exec. engr., Bombay, 1st Oct., 1929; dep. secty., govt., Bombay, (p.w.d.), June, 1938.

MAHONY, FRANCIS VINCENT, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 2nd March, 1886).—Retd., March, 1941.

MAINPRICE, FREDERICK PAUL, B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 22nd Aug., 1915).—Educ. at Haileybury and Peterhouse Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 6th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Dec., 1938, and served in the C.P. as asst. commr.; apptd. to I.P.S. on probn., Apl., 1942; under-sec. to resdt., Eastern States, Apl., 1942; Brit. trade agt., Gyantse, Oct., 1942; and again, May, 1944; confd. in the I.P.S., Mar., 1945; on depn. to Assam govt., since, 1943.

MAITLAND, VICTOR KENNARD, M.A., M.C., Indian Forest Service (consvr., Central Provs.) (b. 12th June, 1897).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 16th Dec., 1921; dep. consvr., Dec., 1924; ditto, and dir. of forest school, Balaghat, March, 1937; consvr., March, 1940.

MAITRA, SANKAR NATH, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Assam) (b. 7th June, 1912).—Educ. at Mitra Instn., Bhowanipur, Calcutta, Univ. of Calcutta, King's College, London, and St. Catherine's College, Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Sept., 1935; arrived in India, Oct., 1935, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; dep. commr., Aug., 1945.

MAJEED, Abdul, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 26th Sept., 1914).—Educ. at Govrmt. Intermdt. Coll., Allahabad, Allahabad Univ., and Downing Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 6th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939; served with govt. of Bengal, Mar., 1944; reverted to Madras, Dec., 1945; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Jan., 1946.

MAJEED, SYED ABDUL, Khan Bahadur, Ind. Posts and Tels. (b. 2nd Sept. 1893).—Joined the serv. as proby. sept. Jul., 1918; confd. Dec., 1919; Khan Bahadur, June, 1944; dep. p.m.g. Apl., 1945; dir. posts and tels., May, 1946.

MAJID, A. (see Abdul Majid).

MAJID, HAFIZ ABDUL, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 17th Oct., 1907).—Educ. at Punjab Univ. and Christ Church,

Oxford; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub. divl. offr., Dec., 1933; dep. sec. to govt., Punjab (med. educn. depts.), Feb., 1942; rationing contr., Lahore, Jan., 1944.

MAJID, INAN-UL, M.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Assam) (b. 11th May, 1895).—Educ. at Perse School, and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 10th Dec., 1921; arrived, 5th Jan., 1922, and served in Assam as asst. commr., under-secty. to govt., Apl., 1929; offg. dir. of indus., etc., Nov., 1930; offg. dep. commr., Sept., 1935; secty., public dept., office of high commr., Oct., 1937; actg. dep. high commr. for India, March-May, 1938; confd. as dep. commr., Aug., 1938; Indian govt. trade commr., Alexandria, Jan., 1939; again dep. commr., 1945.

MAJIDULLAH, SARDAR, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 14th Oct., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Punjab, 1st Oct., 1923; exec. engr., Oct., 1932; addtl. dep. transp. contr., June, 1944.

MAJOR, JOHN, India Office (actg. hr. exec. offr.) (b. 13th March, 1888).—Apptd. clerical offr., 28th Sept., 1921; actg. higher ditto, Jan., 1935; confd., July, 1935; actg. hr. exec. offr., May, 1945; assessor of income tax, Jan., 1946.

MAJUMDAR, DWIJENDRA LAL, M.A. (Cal.), B.A. (Cantab.), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 25th Jan., 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov. 1929, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1930; offg. addl. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1936; commr. of workmen's compensation, Bengal, Apl., 1938; secty., jute, paddy and rice enquiry cttee., Sept., 1938; special offr., fin. dept. (in addn.), June, 1939; secty., Ind. cent. jute cttee., May, 1940.

MAJUMDAR, NRIPENDRA NATH, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. Feb., 1897).—Joined the service, 1st March, 1922; asst. acct.-genl., Bengal, Sept., 1923; ditto, posts and tels., Nov., 1928; dep. acct.-genl., Bengal, Jan., 1931; asst. dir., army audit. W. Cmd., Jan., 1932; attd. officer, office of the ch. auditor, E.I. rly., March, 1936; dep. govt. examr., B.N. rly., Apl., 1936; ch. auditor, E.B. rly., Feb., 1938; dep. acct. gen., Burma, March, 1939; comptr., posts and tels. acct., Burma, Apl., 1939; dep. acct.-gen., Burma, June, 1939; contr. of mily. accts., Burma, June, 1939.

MAJUMDAR, SANTOSH KUMAR, B.Sc., (Hons.) Burma Audit and Accts. serv. (Cl. I).—Joined 13th Jul., 1938; confd. 15th Jul., 1940; senr. time scale 13th Jul., 1943; dep. acct. genl. (jr.) 27th May, 1946.

MAJUMDAR, SUDHENDU JYOTI, B.A. Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 8th Feb., 1917).—Educ. at Pabna Zilla Sch., Pabna, Calcutta Univ., Univ. Coll., London, and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Oct., 1939; confd., 27th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr. and under-sec., home and fin. depts., Orissa, Jan., 1944.

MAKAND, SAMUEL NORMAN, M.B., Ch.B., Lieut.-Col. (ret'd.), late I.M.S., Medical Dept., Central Provs. (b. 10th July, 1886).—Retd., 10th July, 1941.

MAL, DEBI DATTA (see Debi Datta Mal).

MALCOLM, AUSTIN KENNETH, Indian Police

(b. 5th Feb., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal, on probn., Dec., 1937; confd., May, 1940.

MALCOLM, HUGH WAUDBY, India Office (exec. offr., acct.-genl.'s dept.) (b. 21st May, 1900).—Apptd. clerical offr., 23rd Apr., 1920; actg. exec. offr., Feb., 1934; confd., Dec., 1934; actg. hr. exec. offr., July, 1940.

MALCOLM, KENNETH ROBERT, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provinces) (b. 17th Dec., 1908).—Educ. at Eton and New College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Apr., 1935; labour commr., Nov., 1944.

MALET, GERALD RION LILLINGSTON, A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 14th Oct., 1889).—E. B. Rly.; ret'd., Nov., 1939.*

MALHAN, FAQIR CHAND, Rai Bahadur, late Indian Railway Accts. Service (b. 28th May, 1883).—Ret'd., May, 1938.*

MALHOUTRA, GOPAL DAS, Lt.-Col., O.B.E., M.B., M.R.C.S., I.M.S., (b. 3rd Mar., 1893).—Date of first commn. 17th Apr., 1930; in civ. employ. in U.P. (confd.), 1st Apr., 1937; O.B.E., Jan., 1941.

MALIK, ABDULLA KHALID, O.B.E., M.A., Ind. C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 7th Jul., 1910).—Educ. at Government High Sch., Gujrat, Govtmt. Intermdt. Coll., Gujrat, Univ. of the Punjab and Magdalene Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub-divl. offcr., May, 1937; served with govt. of India from March, 1939. offr. on spcl. duty, Indian stores dpt. Apr., 1941; dep. ch. admin. offr. (purchase), dept. of supply, Sept., 1941; O.B.E., Jan., 1946.

MALIK, A. R., Khan Bahadur, M.A., B.Sc. (Edin.) (b. 4th Apr., 1893).—Joined Agric. serv. 21st July, 1923 in an offg. capacity, confd. in Bengal Higher Agric. serv., 15th Mar., 1926; dep. agric. marketg. advr., govt. of India, 1st Sept., 1943; agric. marketg. advr., govt. of India, Aug., 1945.

MALIK, BIDHUBHUSAN, apptd. judge, high ct., Allahabad, Apr., 1944.

MALIK, HARDIT SINGH, C.I.E., O.B.E., B.A. (Oxon.), Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 23rd Nov., 1894).—Educ. at Eastbourne Coll., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; arrived in India, 6th Jan., 1922; and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Apr., 1926; dep. commr. (provvl.), Nov., 1927; dep. trade commr., London, Jan., 1931 to May, 1934; actg. trade commr., May-Sept., 1932; and again, Nov., 1933; dep. secy. to govt. of India, commerce dept., June, 1934; O.B.E., Jan. 1938; trade commr., New York, July, 1938; C.I.E., June, 1941; prime minister, Patiala state, Apr., 1944.

MALIK, JASVANTSINGH, O.B.E., B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Sind) (b. 13th Apr., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., 21st Jan., 1921; offg. exec. engr., July, 1923; confd., Oct., 1929; in foreign service as muncl. engr., Ahmedabad from Feb., 1930 to May, 1938; O.B.E., Jan., 1944; ret'd., 1945.

MALIK, SIR TEJA SINGH, SARDAR BAHADUR, C.I.E., B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (chief engr., Central P.W.D.) (b. 1st Sept., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 4th Nov., 1910; exec. engr., 1st Oct., 1918; C.I.E., Jan., 1930; exec. engr., central p.w.d., Apr., 1930; offg. supt. engr., Sept., 1931, and again, Jan., 1933;

confd., Jan., 1934; ch. engr., July, 1940; kt., June, 1942.

MALLAM, GEORGE LESLIE, C.I.E., Barr.-at-law, Lieut.-Col. I.A. Indian Political Service (b. 13th Dec., 1895).—First commn. dated 14th Nov., 1916; joined pol. dept., 14th March, 1921; asst. commr., Bannu, June, 1921; under-sec. to pol. agent, Persian Gulf, Jan., 1923; dist. judge, Abbottabad, Dec., 1926; asst. commr., Tonk, June, 1927; ditto, Mardan, May, 1928; under-secy. to A.G.G. and C.C., N.W.F.P., Jan., 1929; census agent, N.W.F.P., Apr., 1930; counsellor, Brit. legn., Kabul Apr., 1930; dep. commr., Kohat, Oct., 1934; senior sub. judge, Peshawar, Dec., 1938; addl. fin. secy. to govt. N.W.F.P., March, 1939; fin. secy. to govt. N.W.F.P. and jun. advr. to the local admn. N.W.F.P.; Apr., 1939; pol. agent, Dir., Swat and Chitral, Nov., 1939; ch. sec. to govt., N.W.F.P., Nov., 1941; commr. and sec., dev. dept., N.W.F.P., Feb., 1946.

MALLICK, A. H., M.B.E., Maj., I.M.S. (I.A.M.C.) (b. 3rd Feb., 1907).—Entered the serv., 13th June, 1940; on mil. serv., Nov., 1940 to Sept., 1945; asst. to senr. med. offr., Port Blair.

MALLICK, SUBHOD KUMAR, M.A., Indian C.S.—Educ. at Calcutta Univ.; apptd., on probn. after exam. of 1943, and served in Assam.

MALLIK, BHOLA NATH, B.A., Indian Police (supr., Orissa) (b. 9th Apr., 1905).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 13th Apr., 1927; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1932; transferred to Orissa, May, 1939; confd., supt. Oct., 1939.

MALLIK, HARENDRA KRISTO, M.A., late Indian Audit Dept. (b. 16th March, 1886).—Ret'd., March, 1941†

MAN MOHAN, RAI BAHADUR, M.A., late Punjab Educl. Service (b. 27th July, 1888).—Joined the service, 13th Sept., 1911; asst. prbr. of econ., govt. coll., Lahore, Jan., 1913; lecturer, ditto, Oct., 1921; principal, Khalsa Coll., June, 1924; inspr. of schools, Jan., 1931; asst. dir., pub. instrn., Nov., 1936; C.I.E., June, 1943; commr., post-war planning, Nov., 1944; ret'd., 28th July, 1943.

MAN SINGH, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. 9th Nov., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on probation, 7th Dec., 1922; asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1926; exec. engr., Oct., 1931.

MANAVEDAN RAJA, KISHAKKA COVILAGATH, Rao Bahadur, late Madras C.S. (b. 1st Oct., 1884).—Ret'd., Oct., 1939.*

MANDAL, S. K., M.A., B.L.—Apptd. solict. to the Central govt. at Calcutta, Feb., 1946.

MANGALMURTI, KESHAO TUKARAM, B.Sc., LL.B., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Central Provs.) (b. 7th Jan., 1897).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ. and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 4th Dec., 1923, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr., offg. dep. commr., May, 1927; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1929; and again, June, 1932; confd., Jan., 1936.

MANGAT RAI, EDWARD NIRMAL, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 30th March, 1915).—Educ. at R.I.M. Coll., Dehra Dun, Delhi Univ. and Keble Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 10th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; addtl. under-sec. fin. commrs., June, 1941; asst. price contr. etc., June, 1942; asst. dir. civil supplies,

etc., June, 1943; dep. ditto, 1944; dir., ditto, June, 1945.

MANI, NATESA SUBRAHMANIAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 11th July, 1913).—Educ. at Banadurai High Sch., Kumbakonam, Madras Univ., and Univ. Coll., London; joined the service, 20th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937; sub-collr. and jt. mag., March, 1939.

MANI, RANGIAH SUBRA, B.A., B.Sc., Indian C.S. (sec. public. dept., off. of high commr. for India) (b. 14th Aug., 1907).—Educ. at Madras Univ., Imperial College of Science and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; under-secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, Aug., 1937; dep. secty. genl. and educn. depts., Bombay, June, 1940; exp. trade contr., Bombay, Apr., 1943; on spec. duty, commerce dept., Dec., 1945; trade dept., office of high commr., for India, London, Jan., 1946.

MANI, TIRUCHENDURAI MUTHUKRISHAN SUBRA, O.B.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (Madras) (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 1st Aug., 1908).—Educ. at University College, London, and School of Oriental Studies, London, joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr., sub. collr. and jt. mag., Apr., 1933; under. sec. rev. dept., Madras, Apr., 1936; under-sect., govt. of India, communications dept., Apr., 1940; dept. sec., ditto (planning and devel.) Aug., 1944; O.B.E., June, 1945.

MANICO, EDWARD LESLIE, late Indian State Rlys. (N.W. Rly.) (b. 12th Nov., 1887).—Retd., 11th May, 1944.

MANINDRA LAL SEN GUPTA (see Sen Gupta, M. L.).

MANIKIKER, NARAYAN SANTAPPA, B.Sc., B.E. (b. 7th March, 1910).—Joined the serv., Oct., 1937; asst. inspr. explosives (confd.) Mar., 1939; tech. offr., and ch. ditto, factory A.R.P., May, 1942 to July, 1945; inspr. of explosives (confd.) Feb., 1945; dep. ch. advr. (factories) and ch. advr. ditto, Aug., 1945 to Oct., 1945; offg. ditto and dep. sec. govt. of India, lab. dept., Aug., 1946.

MANKAR, WAMAN, KESHAVJI, M.A., LL.B. (b. 23rd July, 1884).—Late presdy. mag., Bombay.—Retd., Sept., 1939.

MANLEY, EDWARD LOVEL, M.I.C.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 29th June, 1886).—Retd., Oct., 1939.

MANLEY, FELIX BERNARD, Indian Police (Punjab) (b. 23rd June, 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Oct., 1939.

MANMATHA NATH MITRA, L.M.S. (Punj.), L.M. (Dublin), D.P.H. (London), Public Health Dept., United Provs. (b. 23rd May, 1885).—Joined the service as health officer on probn., 1st March, 1914; confd., March, 1915; asst. dir. of public health, 12th March, 1930.

MANN, MAJ. NAUNIHAL SINGH (b. 30th Sept., 1899).—Non. mag. 1st cl. Punjab, 1929–1946; joined A.I.R.O., 1931; member legis. assembly, 1937; member nat. def. council, 1941–1945; mil. duty to Nov., 1945; addl. temp. memb., fedl. public serv. commn., Mar., 1946.

MANNING, DONALD EDMUND BELFORD, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 9th Feb., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 24th Dec., 1923; dep. consvr., March, 1928; on mil. service, Feb., 1942 to Dec., 1945.

MANNOOCH, GEOFFREY HERBERT, C.I.E.,

Indian Police (inspr.-genl., Bengal) (b. 23rd Aug., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 30th Nov., 1910; supt., Feb., 1920; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., variously, from 1932; confd., dep. inspr.-genl., Apr., 1941; confd., inspr.-genl., Apr., 1943; King's police medal, 1941; C.I.E., June, 1943.

MANOHAR DAS CHATURVEDI, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., United Provs.) (b. 9th Dec., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 28th Dec., 1923; silviculturist, March, 1927; dep. consvr., Dec., 1931; offr. on spcl. duty at govt. h.q., (rural devel.).

MANOHAR, LAL, Barr. (judge, high ct., Patna).—Apptd., June, 1939.

MANOHAR LAL SOOD, M.B.E., B.A., Ind. Serv. of Engrs. (exec. engr., Un. Provs.) (b. 28th Jan., 1905).—Joined the serv. as appr. engr. 19th Nov., 1927; engr. student, Nov., 1928; proby. asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1928; confd., Jan., 1930; exec. engr., Oct., 1937; M.B.E., June, 1945.

MANSER, THOMAS JAMES STEDMAN, late India Posts and Tels. (b. 24th Oct., 1883).—Retd., Oct., 1938.

MANSFIELD, PHILIP THEODORE, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A. (Cantab.), late Ind. C.S. (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 1st February, 1892).—Educ. at Charterhouse and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived 11th Dec., 1915; and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; on mil. duty, Oct., 1918 to Jan., 1919; ditto, and addl. pol. agt., feudatory states, Oct., 1919; jt. mag., Jan., 1923; offg. dir. of land records and surveys, March, 1928; confd. Jan., 1929; mag. and collr. (provl. sub.), Jan., 1929; confd., Nov., 1930; offg. sec. to govt. rev. dept., Apr., 1931; dir. of land records and surveys, Apr., 1933; sec. to govt. Bihar and Orissa, reforms dept., Jan., 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1936; ch. sec. to govt. Orissa, Apr., 1936; C.S.I., Jan., 1941; offg. advr. to govr., Bihar, March, 1944; retd., Jan., 1946.

MANSON, FREDERICK PERCY, A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 4th Dec., 1883).—Retd., Apr., 1939.

MANSON, JOHN ALEXANDER SHAND, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bombay) (b. 19th Aug., 1901).—Joined the service, as asst. exec. engr., Bombay, 1st Oct., 1924; offg. exec. engr., May, 1929; confd., Oct., 1933.

MARAR, KOTTIL WALLAPIL PARAMESWARA, O.B.E., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 7th Nov., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Madras and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 4th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Apr., 1933; offg. under secty. to govt., Assam, in depts. under ch. secty., Oct., 1933; awarded K.-i.-H., gold medal, Jan., 1935; apptd. as prov. supt. of census operations, Assam, Dec., 1939; dep. secty., home dept. Sept. 1941; sec. supply, dept. Feb., 1943; O.B.E., Jan., 1945; dep. sec. to govt. of India, dept. of food, May, 1945; jt. sec. ditto, June, 1945.

MARCHINTON, WILLIAM FRANKLIN, late Indian Service of Engineers (Bihar) (b. 14th Oct., 1884).—Retd., Oct., 1939.

MARJORIBANKS, ALAN GEORGE, Indian Police (b. 28th Oct., 1904) (dist. supt., Central Provs.).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., 11th Dec., 1924; offg. dist. supt., Dec., 1928, Jan., 1933, and July, 1933; confd., March, 1941.

MARKS, HORACE, Ind. Posts and Tels. (b. 20th July, 1897).—Joined, Oct., 1913; asst.

supt., Oct., 1942; dep. dir. tele. traffic, Nov., 1944; ch. supt. Feb., 1946.

MARLOW, WILLIAM, Office of High Commr. for India (suptg. exec. officer., general dept.) (b. 8th July, 1889).—Educ. at Brentwood Gr. Sch., Monoux Sch., Walthamstow, and East London Coll.; apptd. sec. div. clerk, board of educ., 29th Apl., 1907; 2nd class clerk, India Office, 29th Oct., 1907; on mil. service from Dec., 1916; transfid. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; attd. to Indian del. to League of Nations, 1st Assembly, 1920; personal asst. to high commr., Apl., 1921; higher exec. officer, June, 1927; on special duty in connection with the building of India House, March, 1929 to Aug., 1930; services lent to Indian del. Impl. Economic Conf., May to Sept., 1932; asst. sec., ditto, July, 1932; suptg. exec. officer., Oct., 1938.

MARRIOTT, SIR ROBERT ECKLIN, B.Sc., late Indian State Railways (b. 15th Oct., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1910; exec. engr., Dec., 1924; offg. divl., supt., Apl., 1929; offg. dep. ch. engr., Oct., 1932; ditto (prov. perm.), Apl., 1936; confd., Aug., 1937; chief engr., March, 1938; genl. mgr., E.I. Rly., Aug., 1941 to Apl., 1946; kt., Jan., 1943.

MARROW, WILLIAM ALFRED NOEL, M.R.C.S., F.R.C.S., Maj., I.M.S. (b. 25th Dec., 1904).—First commn. 2nd Feb., 1932; in mil. employ to Nov., 1939; spec. (junr) in Obstetrics and gynaecology, govt. hosp. for women and children, Madras, Dec., 1939; on mil. duty June, 1940 to May, 1946; spec. (junr) as above, June, 1946.

MARSDEN, PERCY, C.I.E., B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (commr., Punjab) (b. 26th Nov., 1888).—Educ. at Cheltenham and St. John's Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1912, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.; personal asst. to pol. agent, Phulkian states, Dec., 1914; sec., municipal cttee., Amritsar, March, 1935 to May, 1917; on mil. duty from July, 1918 to Apl., 1919; dep. commr. (prov.), July, 1925; offg. sec. to govt. trans. depts., Punjab, Dec., 1930; confd., Oct., 1932; offg. commr., Oct., 1935; commr., sub-perm., Dec., 1941; C.I.E., June, 1942; addl. fin. commr., Nov., 1945.

MARSH, SIR PERCY WILLIAM, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 14th Oct., 1881).—Educ. at Wellington and Wadham Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1904; arrived 26th Nov., 1905 and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr. and asst. commr.; jt. mag., Oct., 1914; temp. employed under War Office from Apl., 1916 to Dec., 1918; mag. and collr., Sept., 1922; C.I.E., June, 1929; offg. commr., March, 1931; commr. (prov. subs.), May, 1933; confd., Nov., 1934; memb. bd. of rev., United Provs., Dec., 1938; C.S.I., Jan., 1939; retd., 1st Nov., 1942; chairman, Punjab and N.W. Frontier jt. pub. serv. commn.; kt., Jan., 1946.

MARSH, WILFRED, Indian Police (dep. commr. of police, Rangoon) (b. 20th July, 1906).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, 25th Nov., 1925; offg. dist. supt., Apl., 1934; dep. commr. of police, Rangoon, March, 1939; confd. June, 1939; civ. aff. serv. to Dec., 1945; asst. inspr.-genl., Dec., 1945.

MARSH-SMITH, REGINALD NORMAN, C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian Police (United Provs.) (b. 24th Aug., 1891).—Joined the service as asst.

supt., Nov., 1911; asst. dep. inspr.-gen., C.I.D., Sept., 1920; supt., Aug., 1923; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1926; inspr.-gen., Gwalior Durbar, May, 1936; confd. as dep. inspr.-gen., Oct., 1940; C.I.E., Jan., 1942; C.S.I., Jan., 1946; retd., Aug., 1946.

MARSHALL, FREDERICK, B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Burma) (b. 14th Nov., 1889).—Retd., 14th Nov., 1944.†

MARSHALL, SIR JOHN HUBERT, Kt., C.I.E., M.A., Litt.D., F.S.A., Hon. A.R.I.B.A. (b. 19th March, 1876).—Retd., March, 1931.†

MARSHALL, JAMES ROBERT, Burma Police (cl. I) (b. 9th June, 1922).—Apptd. on probn. after sehn. Aug., 1946.

MARSHALL, REV. NORMAN EDWYN, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain) (b. 31st March, 1887).—Joined the service as junr. chaplain, Punjab, 2nd Jan., 1915; senr. chaplain, 6th June, 1927.

MARTEN, SIR ALFRED AMBERSON BARRINGTON, Kt., M.A., LL.D. (Barr., 1895) (Bombay Judl. Dept.) (b. 8th Dec., 1879).—Retd., June, 1930.*

MARTEN, ERIC CHARLES, Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Lahore) (b. 14th Feb., 1899).—Educ. at Uppingham Sch. and R.M.C., Sandhurst; joined the service, 17th Sept., 1923; arrived, 21st Nov., 1923, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; judge, small cause ct., Simla, Apl., 1927; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1930; Oct., 1932; and again, May, 1933; addl. ditto, Sept., 1933; confd. as dist. and sess. judge Oct., 1935; on spec. duty, legal remembr. office., May, 1938; sec. to govt. legisl. dept., Sept., 1940; addtl. judge, Lahore high ct., Sept., 1943.

MARTIN, CHARLES DE CARTERET, M.B., Lieut.-Col., retd., late I.M.S. (b. 3rd Jan., 1888).—Retd., 3rd Jan., 1943.†

MARTIN, FREDERICK GEORGE STEPHEN, C.I.E., M.C., Indian State Rlys. (contr. of stores, E.I. Rly.) (b. 26th Aug., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. works mang., G.I.P. Rly., 14th Dec., 1923; offg. works mang., May, 1925; offg. dep. ch. mech. engr., Feb., 1926; on spl. duty under railway bd., 19th March, 1927; dep. ch. mech. engr., E.I. Rly., Feb., 1928; offg. contr. of stores, Sept., 1930; confd., Oct., 1931; contr. of supplies, Bengal circle, Calcutta, Nov., 1939; dep. dir.-genl., munitions prodcn., dept. of supply, July, 1940; C.I.E., June, 1941.

MARTIN, THE VEN. FREDERICK WILLIAM, M.A., late Eccles. Dept., Central Provs. (b. 16th Jan., 1886).—Retd., May, 1940.†

MARTIN, HARRY WALTER, Office of High Commr. for India (dep. ch. accountg. officer) (b. 26th May, 1884).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, acctnt'-genl.'s dept., 13th Sept., 1902; minor staff clerk, Oct., 1919; staff clerk (actg.), Apl., 1920; services lent to high commr. for India from Apl., 1921; higher exec. officer., 1st Apl., 1922; suptg. exec. officer., 21st Apl., 1922; asst. ch. acctg. officer., Nov., 1934; dep. ditto, Nov., 1937.

MARTIN, HUGH BELLASIS, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 6th Oct., 1915).—Educ. at Harrow and Oriel Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 17th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr.; under sec., supply dept., Sept., 1943; dep. sec. supply and price

control dept. and food contr., Nov., 1944; reg. grain supply, offr., July, 1946.

MARTIN, OLAUS MACLEOD, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (commr., Bengal) (b. 1st Feb., 1890).—Educ. at Oban High Sch. and Edinburgh Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 10th Dec., 1913; and served in Bengal as asst. mag., and collr.; I.A.R.O., Aug., 1916 to March, 1919; employed in Assam from Aug., 1920; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Aug., 1920; offg. mag. and collr., Oct., 1923; offg. labour intell. offr., Bengal, Nov., 1925; addl. dep. secty. to govt. of Bengal, pol. and appt. depts., Nov., 1925; mag. and collr., Aug., 1927; dep. commr., Apl., 1930; secty. to govt., rev. dept., May, 1934; C.I.E., Feb., 1937; commr. (confd.), Oct., 1940; commr., post-war reconstrn., Apl., 1944; dev. commr. and ex-officio addl. ch. sec. and advr. to govr., Aug., 1945.

MARTIN, THOMAS DUKE, Burma Front. Serv. (b. 19th Feb., 1917).—Apptd. on probn., after seln., Aug., 1946.

MARTIN, REGINALD VICTOR, C.I.E., M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (insp.-genl. prisons, Bombay) (b. 20th March, 1889).—First commn. dated 26th July, 1913; in milty. employ to July, 1924; supt. of prison, March, 1927; offg. insp.-genl. of prisons, Apl., 1931; confd., Sept., 1937; C.I.E., Jan., 1938.

MARTYN, PHILIP DOCTON, C.I.E., O.B.E., B.A. (Man.), Indian C.S. (dep. sec., home dept., Bengal) (b. 7th Apl., 1904).—Educ. at Stockport Gr. Sch., Victoria Univ., Manchester, and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. ch. mang., Dacca Nawab estate, Jan., 1933; offg. mag. and collr., July, 1934; dep. secty., home dept., Bengal, Jan., 1938; O.B.E., Jan., 1941; repres. of govt. of Bengal with h.-q., eastern army, Oct., 1944; C.I.E., Jan., 1946; spec. offr., home dept., Jan., 1946.

MARVIN, EDITH ANNA, M.B.E., B.A., (London), India Office (staff officer for estb. duties) (b. 20th Apl., 1893).—Educ. at Notting Hill High Sch. and Bedford Coll.; apptd. clerical officer., 11th July, 1921; higher clerical officer. (acting), Apl., 1922; confd., Dec., 1924; staff officer for estab. duties (temp.), June, 1933 ditto (permt.), June, 1936; M.B.E., Jan., 1935.

MARWOOD, SIDNEY LIONEL, C.I.E., B.A. (Oxon.), Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 8th Apl., 1891).—Educ. at St. Pauls' Sch., and Hertford Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 15th Nov., 1915, and posted to Bihar and Orissa; on mily. duty with the I.A.R.O., Nov., 1915, to Oct., 1919; offg. mag. and collr., Nov., 1924; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1925; offg. pol. agt., Orissa feudatory states, Oct., 1926; offg. mag. and collr., Apl., 1920; confd. (provl. sub.), Nov., 1929; confd., Feb., 1931; commr. of inc.-tax, Nov., 1931; K.-i-H. medal, 1st cl., June, 1934; C.I.E., Jan., 1941; rev. commr., Orissa, Apl., 1943.

MASCARENHAS, WILLIAM ZAVIAR, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bombay).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bombay, 22nd Dec., 1926; offg. exec. engr., Apl., 1932; confd., Oct., 1935; dep. secty. to govt., Bombay (roads and bldgs., p.w.d.), Dec., 1935, to Dec., 1937; profir. of engrg., coll. of engrg., Poona, June, 1938.

MASON, LAWRENCE, SIR C.I.E., Q.B.E., M.C., B.A., late Indian Forest Service (United Provs.) (b. 27th Aug., 1886).—Retd., Aug., 1941.†

MASON, NOEL, O.B.E., M.A., late Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. 24th Apl., 1889).—Joined the service as mil. acct., 2nd cl., Feb., 1913; attd. for duty, mil. dept., India Office, Dec., 1918 to Aug., 1919; on depn. to India Office, Aug., 1919 to Sept. 1920; confd. as cl. I. officr., Oct., 1935 dep. finl. advr., mil. fin., Oct., 1937; revtd. to mil. accts. dept., and promoted cmd., contr., July, 1940; O.B.E., Jan., 1943; retd., Sept., 1946.

MASON, PHILIP, M.A., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 30th Nov., 1882).—Retd., 8th May, 1942.†

MASON, PHILIP, C.I.E., O.B.E., Ind. C.S. (jt. secty., Govt. of India) (b. 19th March, 1906).—Educ. at Sedburgh and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1928; arrived, Dec., 1928, and served in the United Provs. as asst. collr. and mag.; under-secty. to govt. of India defence dept., Nov., 1933; offg. dep. secty., defence dept., March, 1936; offg. dep. commr., Sept., 1936; confd., Dec., 1937; dep. secty., govt. of India, Sept., 1939; ditto defence/ war, March, 1940; confd. as mag. and collr., Nov., 1941; O.B.E., Jan., 1942; sec., plans S.E.A.C., Nov., 1943 to July, 1944; jt. sec. govt. of India (war) July, 1944; C.I.E., Jan., 1946.

MASTER, JAL ARDESHIR, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (consvr., Madras) (b. 23rd Aug., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 23rd Nov., 1915; dep. consvr., Nov., 1920; offg. consvr., March, 1936; confd., Sept., 1944; actg. ch. consvr. variously, 1944 and 1945.

MASTERMAN, CHRISTOPHER HUGHES, C.S.I., C.I.E., Indian C.S. (collr. and mag., Madras) (b. 7th Oct., 1889).—Educ. at Winchester and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived 12th Dec., 1914; on mil. duty from July, 1917, to Dec., 1919; sub-collr., March, 1922; collr. of salt revenue, Apl., 1924; offg. collr. and dist. mag., July, 1932; ditto (provl. subs.), July, 1933; confd., Feb., 1935; secty. to govt., educn. and public health depts., Madras, Aug., 1936, to March, 1939; C.I.E., June, 1939; collr. from June, 1939, to Feb., 1943; C.S.I., Jan., 1944; advr. to govr. Madras, Feb., 1946, member, bd. of rev., May, 1946.

MASUD, MOHAMMED, B.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (collr. and dist. mag.) (b. 25th June, 1916).—Ed. at Cent. Model High Sch., Lahore, Punjab Univ. and St. John's Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 21st Oct., 1939; confd., 30th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; collr. and dist. mag., Sind, May, 1946.

MASWOOD, MUHAMMAD ABDUL HAI, B.Sc., Indian Police (b. 1st Oct., 1912).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal, on probn., 1st March, 1935; confd., 1937.

MATHER, WILLIAM MCKENZIE, O.B.E., Office of High Commr. for India (estabt. officer) (b. 12th March, 1885).—Apptd. temp. pte. secty. to High Commr., Oct., 1920; confd., Apl., 1927; O.B.E., Feb., 1937; suptg. exec. officr., accts dept., Nov., 1937; estabt. officr., Apl., 1938; on spl. duty, March to July, 1941.

MATHESON, REV. ROBERTUS WILLIAM, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (Madras), Church of Scotland (junr. chaplain) (b. 21st Apl., 1904).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 20th Jan., 1934; junr. chaplain, Feb., 1936; on mil. serv., Sept., 1942, to Sept., 1944.

MATHEW, KANIANTHRA THOMAS, D.Sc.,

Ind. For. Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 12th Dec., 1899).—Joined the service, 15th Sept., 1924; dep. consvr. Sept., 1929.

MATHEW, PUTHENVEETIL CHANDAPILLA, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 30th June, 1913).—Educ. at Church Missionary Society High Sch., Mavelikara, Madras Univ., and Univ. Coll., London; joined the service, 16th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub. collr. and jt. mag., March, 1939; agent, govt. of India, Ceylon, Apl. 1945 to May, 1946.

MATHEWS, HENRY MEADS, C.I.E., M.I.E.E. (b. 16th Feb., 1903).—Joined Sept., 1940, as tech. advr., min. of supply (munitions) mission; apptd. govt. of India, dept. supply, Jan., 1941; chairman cent. tech. power bd., addl. to duties as elec. commr., Nov., 1944; C.I.E., June, 1944; works mines and power dept., Apl., 1946.

MATHIESON, LLEWELLYN CHARLES FLETCHER, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 6th Sept., 1883).—Retd., Sept., 1938.*

MATHRA DAS, DIWAN BAHADUR, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 13th Nov., 1887).—Retd., Nov., 1942.†

MATHRANI, HARBHAGWANDAS PRIBHDAS, O.B.E., B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (suprg. engr.) (b. 12th July, 1901).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1923; offg. exec. engr., Apl., 1927; confd., Oct., 1932; O.B.E., Jan., 1941; dep. sec. to govt. of Sind, Aug. to Nov., 1941; suptg. engr., Feb., 1945.

MATHRANI, KEWALRAM PRIBHDAS, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 21st Aug., 1911).—Educ. at Government High Sch., Shikarpur, Edinburgh Univ., and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 21st Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Nov., 1936, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; settlt. offcr., Kanara, Feb., 1940.

MATHRANI, MITHARAM PRIBHDAS, O.B.E., B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Sind) (b. 10th Nov., 1895).—Joined the provl. service as apprentice engr., 3rd Aug., 1918; asst. engr. (provl. subst.), Aug., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; offg. exec. engr., 13th Dec., 1923; confd., Aug., 1928; O.B.E., Jan., 1933; dep. sec., govt. Sind, Oct., 1939; confd. as suptg. engr., May, 1943; retd. 1944.

MATHUR, D. P. Ind. State Rlys. (b. 1st Jan., 1906).—Joined 10th Apl., 1930; jt. dir. rly. bd., Nov., 1944.

MATHUR, DHATRI SARAN, Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 13th Nov., 1912).—Educ. at Government Intermediate Coll., Etawah, Agra University, Thomason Civil Engineering Coll., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 16th Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Oct., 1936, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr.

MATHUR, GIRISH PRASAD, B.A., LL.B., RAI BAHADUR, (b. 4th Jan., 1888).—Joined the serv. as Munsif, 3rd Apl., 1911; confd. 16th June, 1916; dist. and sess. judge (confd.), Feb., 1940; addl. judge, high ct. Allahabad, Jan., 1943.

MATHUR, H. K., RAI Bahadur, United Provs. C.S. (b. 11th Sept., 1903).—Joined the serv. 16th Apl., 1926; spec. duty offr. (claims), food dept., Aug., 1944; co-ordin. and claims offr., ex-officio dep. sec., food dept., Feb., 1945; ditto, food, Apl., 1946.

MATHUR, JAGDISH CHANDRA, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 16th May, 1917).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1941; served in Bihar as asst.

mag. and collr.; served in Orissa as civ. supplies offr. Nov., 1943; transf. to Bihar, S.D.O., July, 1944; regl. grain supply offr., Dec., 1945; under sec., supply and price control dept., Aug., 1946.

MATHUR, KALKA PRASAD, M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., D.P.H., late Public Health Dept., United Provs. (b. 15th Nov., 1884).—Retd., Nov., 1939.*

MATHUR, KRISHNA BEHARI LALL, M.I.E. (India), Indian State Rlys. (gout. inspr.) (b. 24th May, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 30th Sept., 1913; asst. exec. engr., July, 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1922; offg. dep. ch. engr., June, 1935; provl. perm., July, 1938; confd., May, 1939; transf. to commss. dept. as govt. inspr. of rlys., May, 1941; govt. inspr. (confd.) (Sr. Sc.), Jan., 1944; retd., Jan., 1945 and re-employed as govt. inspr. of rlys.

MATHUR, MATHESANDRA SHANKAR, B.Sc., LL.B., Indian Police (supl.) (b. 17th Oct., 1906).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., United Provs., 5th Jan., 1931; confd., March, 1933; supt. (provl. subs.), July, 1944.

MATHUR, MANMOHAN SARUP, RAI Bahadur, C.I.E., Ind. Serv. of Engrs. (suprg. engr., Central p.w.d.) (b. 15th July, 1898).—Joined the service 29th Oct., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. exec. engr., March, 1932; transf. to central p.w.d., Aug., 1933; exec. engr., Jan., 1935; suptg. engr., Dec., 1941; C.I.E., Jan., 1946.

MATTHAL, GEORGE, M.A. (Cantab.), late Indian Educ. Service (b. 13th Nov., 1887).—Apptd. prof. of zoology, govt. coll., Lahore, 16th Sept., 1918; retd., 13th Nov., 1942.

MATTHAI, JACOB, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 3rd March, 1884).—Retd., March, 1939.*

MATTHAI, JOHN, C.I.E., B.A., B.L., D.Sc., B.Litt., late Indian Educ. Service (b. 10th Jan., 1886).—Retd., 1941†; indus. and supplies member, govr. gen.'s council, Sept., 1946.

MATTHEW, KANIANTHRA THOMAS, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 12th Dec., 1899).—Joined the service, 15th Sept., 1924; dep. consvr., Sept., 1929.

MATTHEWS, HORATIO KEITH, M.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag.) (b. 4th Apl., 1917).—Educ. at Epsom Coll. and Gonville and Caius Coll., Camb.; apptd. on probn., 4th Oct., 1939; confd., 27th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940; sub-collr. and mag., Apl., 1942; dep. dir. war publicity, Mar., 1944; pub. relns. offr., food dept., Apl., 1946; M.B.E., June, 1946.

MATTHEWS, VICTOR GEORGE, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (fin. dept., govt. of India) (b. 3rd March, 1907).—Educ. at Latymer Secondary Sch., Edmonton, University Coll., London, and Clare Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; under-secty. to govt., Central Provs., Aug., 1935; and again, Aug., 1936; pte. secty. to govr., Central Provs., March, 1936; under-secty., dept. of e., h., and l., govt. of India, Oct., 1937; confd., Apl., 1938; asst. fin. advr., mily. fin., Oct., 1938; under-secty., fin. dept., govt. of India, Apl., 1939; addl. dy. secty., fin. dept., govt. of India, June, 1941; offcr. on spl. duty, ditto, Oct., 1941; collr., customs, Madras, Apl., 1943; ditto, Bombay, Apl., 1944.

MATTHEWS, WILLIAM, M.B.E., late India Office (b. 23rd Sept., 1878).—Retd., Sept., 1938.*

MAUGER, WALTER KYLE, Indian Police (supl.) (b. 1st Dec., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 25th Nov., 1922; offg.

supt., March, 1929, and again, Apl., 1933; confd., Nov., 1934; senr. supt., police, Lahore, June, 1941; Indian police medal, 1943; asst. inspr.-genl., civic guards, Lahore, July, 1944.

MAUNG BA AYE, Burma Police (Cl. I) (asst. supt.).—Apptd. on probn., 10th Jan., 1939.

MAUNG, MAUNG HLA, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 11th Feb., 1911).—Educ. at Government High Sch., Akyab, Rangoon Univ., and Jesus Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 5th Sept., 1935; arrived in India, Oct., 1935, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; asst. warden, oil fields, Feb., 1939; dep. sec. ind. and lab. dept., Oct., 1945; addl. sec., fin. and rev. dept., July, 1946.

MAUNG, MAUNG OHN, B.A., Burma C.S. (Cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 2nd Feb., 1913).—Educ. at Rangoon Univ.; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 9th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Oct., 1938, and served as asst. commr.; under-secty., commerce dept., June, 1941; dep. sec. commns. and transp. dept., Oct., 1945; civ. aff. serv. to Oct., 1945.

MAUNG, MAUNG SAN, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Burma) (b. 26th Apl., 1904).—Educ. at University of Rangoon and Queen's Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dep. regr., high ct., Rangoon, Sept., 1933; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1936; confd., Oct., 1939; civ. aff. serv., June, 1945; dist. and sess. judge, 1946.

MAUNG MAUNG, U, Burma Judl. Serv. (b. 21st July, 1897).—Apptd. 19th Dec., 1923; dist., and sess. judge, 11th Sept., 1940.

MAUNG SAN LIN (see LIN, Maung, San).

MAUNG SEIN TUN, Burma Police (Cl. I) (asst. supt.).—Apptd. on probn., 10th Jan., 1939.

MAUNG SET, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 24th Nov., 1884).—Retd., Nov., 1939.*

MAUNG, U AYE, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (ch. engr., Burma) (b. 26th Dec., 1891).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1914; asst. exec. engr., June, 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; offg. supt. engr., Jan., 1935; confd., Feb., 1937; ch. engr., May, 1939.

MAUNG, U AYE (2), B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (ch. engr. Burma) (b. 31st May, 1896).—Joined the service, Oct., 1919; asst. engr., Dec., 1919; asst. exec. engr., March, 1921; exec. engr. Oct., 1928; on mil. serv., May to Nov., 1945; ch. engr. (irrig.), Feb., 1946.

MAUNG, U BA (C.5), B.A., Indian Police (b. 9th Nov., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, 27th May, 1929; left in Burma; civ. aff. serv., Aug., 1945.

MAUNG, U CHIT (A.2), B.A., Burma Commn. (dep. commr.) (b. 25th March, 1895).—Joined the service, 22nd Jan., 1917; extra asst. commr., June, 1921; dep. commr., March, 1934; secty. to govt., judl. dept., Burma, March, 1936; chairman, Rangoon development trust, March, 1939; and again, Nov., 1945.

MAUNG, U KIN, Burma Front. Serv. (b. 3rd Nov., 1897).—Apptd. asst. supt. Feb., 1927; left behind in Burma 1942-1944; contacted and arrived in India, June, 1944; dep. sec. social services, dept., Sept., 1945.

MAUNG, U MAUNG, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Burma) (b. 19th Aug., 1899).—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

MAUNG, U MAUNG (B.7), Barr., late Burma Judl. Dept. (b. 5th Oct., 1884).—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

MAUNG U MYA, B.A.(Hons.), Burma Audit

and Accts. Serv. (cl. I).—Joined 14th July, 1938; confd. 15th July, 1940; left behind in Burma, served in civ. aff. serv. from May, 1941; comptr. p. and t. accts. 15th May, 1946.

MAUNG, U SAN, B.A. (Hons.), Burma Audit and Accts. Serv. (cl. I) (b. 14th Jan., 1917).—Joined 4th July, 1939; left behind in Burma; served in civ. aff. serv. from Aug., 1945; asst. acct.-genl., 6th Apl., 1946.

MAUNG, U THEIN, (b. 6th Aug., 1897).—Joined Ind. Police, 1st Apl., 1922; joined Burma Frontier service July, 1923; sub. divl. offr., May, 1938; civ. aff. service, Apl., 1945.

MAUNG, ZAW WIN, Burma Police (Cl. I).—Apptd., asst. supt., Burma, on probn., Dec., 1937.

MAUNSELL, ANTHONY CHARLES KER, Capt., I.A., Indian Pol. Service (b. 23rd Oct., 1907).—First commn., 1st Sept., 1927; pers. asst. to the A.G.G., E. States, Apl., 1934; pol. probr. under trng. in for. and pol. dept., Oct., 1934; ditto, asst. collr., Bareilly, March, 1935; asst. commr., Kohat, June, 1936; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, Oct., 1937; confd., March, 1938; asst. commr., Kohat, Dec., 1938; under-secty. to resdt. for Cent. India, Apl., 1940; pol. agt., Malwa, Nov., 1941; sec. to resdt. for Cent. India, July, 1942; ditto, eastern states, March, 1943, and again, Sept., 1943; to the resdt. for Hyderabad, Dec., 1944.

MAVLANKAR, SADASHIV WAMAN, RAO BAHADUR, M.A., Ind. Posts and Tels. (b. 15th Apl., 1892).—Joined the serv., Oct., 1916; dep. p.m.g., Jan., 1946; Rai Bahadur, Jan., 1946.

MAXTED, DENIS SYDNEY, late Indian Police (b. 2nd Aug., 1912).—Retd., Sept., 1942.†

MAXWELL, SIR REGINALD MAITLAND, K.C.S.I., G.C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (advr. to sec. of state for India) (b. 24th Aug., 1882).—Educ. at Marlborough and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived, 26th Nov., 1906, and served in Bombay as asst. coll. and mag. and asst. settl. offr.; compiler of genl. admn. report, 1908-9; on depn. to Madras to study working of salt and excise depts., Aug. to Oct., 1910; offg. collr. of salt rev., Bombay, Nov., 1916; dep. commr. of salt and excise, Bombay, Sept., 1917; pte. sec. to H.E. the Govr., Sept., 1920; spl. duty, Bombay sect., Feb., 1921; sec., retrenchment cttee., Sept., 1921; C.I.E., June, 1923; offg. collr. and mag. and pol. agent, Jan., 1924; confd., Oct., 1926; offg. secty. to govt., genl., etc., depts., June, 1928; pte. secty. to govr. of Bombay, March, 1929; offg. secty. to govt. of Bombay, genl. and educ. depts., Oct., 1931; secty. to govt. of Bombay, home and eccles. depts., Apl., 1932; C.S.I., June, 1933; secty., home dept., govt. of India, Oct., 1936; member, council of state, Oct., 1936; commr., Dec., 1936; temp. member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, June, 1937; secty., home dept., govt. of India, Oct., 1937; member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, Apl., 1938; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1939; G.C.I.E., Jan., 1944; retd., Apl., 1944; advr. to sec. of state for India, June, 1944.

MAXWELL, SIR WILLIAM, K.C.I.E., M.V.O., late Indian C.S. (Punjab and N.W.F.P.).—Retd., Sept., 1918.*

MAY, PAUL ROBERT BUCHAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Punjab) (b. 19th May, 1905).—Educ. at Westminster and Christ Church Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 16th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in the

Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1932; addl. ditto, Oct., 1932; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1936.

MAYA DAS, C. P. (see Das, C. P. M.).

MAYBURY, MAURICE ALFRED, Burma C.S. (cl. I), (dep. commr.) (b. 10th Nov., 1914).—Educ. at The Common Weal Secondary Sch., Swindon, and Pembroke Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 30th Sept., 1938; sub-divl. offr., Kawkareik, 1941; under sec., reconstrn. dept., June, 1942; dep. commr., Jan., 1946.

MAYNE, GEN. SIR A. G. O. MOSLEY, K.C.B., C.B.E., D.S.O., A.D.C.—Apptd. princpl. staff offcr. to the sec. of state for India and for Burma and sec. mil. dept., 1st Jan., 1945 to 1st Jan., 1947.

MAZMUDAR, BIDHAN PRASHAD, L.M.E., D.P.H., D.T.M., Public Health Dept., Bihar (asst. dir.) (b. 22nd Oct., 1887).—Joined the service. 15th March, 1915; asst. dir. of public health, May, 1925.

MAZAMDAR, RAI BAHADUR KHVIODA CHANDRA, B.Sc., C.E., A.M.I.E.(Ind.) (b. Mar., 1896).—Apptd. asst. engr., Irrigation, U.P., Oct., 1919; exec. engr. ditto, Dec., 1935; Rai Bahadur, Jul., 1940; dep. irrig. advr., govt. of India, Nov., 1944.

MAZUMDAR, DWIJENDRA LAL, M.A., Ind. C.S. (b. 25th Jan., 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta and Jesus coll., Cambridge; joined the serv., 11th Oct., 1929; arrived Nov., 1929; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1930; addl. dist. mag. and collr., 1937; commr., workmen's compensn., Bengal, Apl., 1938; sec., Jute etc. enquiry cttee., Sept., 1938; spl. offr., fin. dept., Bengal (in addn.), June, 1939; sec. Indian central Jute cttee. (govt. of India), 1940-42; dep. dir. civil supplies, Bengal, 1942-43; dep. sec. govt. of India, lab. dept., Apl., 1943; jt. sec., ditto, Sept., 1945; ditto, works, mines and power, Apl., 1946.

MAZUMDAR, KHAGENDRA NATH, M.A., Barr. (first asst. sec. to govt. of Bengal, legisl. dept.).—Joined the service as asst. sec., Bengal legisl. council, 1st May, 1919; 2nd asst. sec., legis. dept., May, 1924; offg. 1st ditto, Apl. to Nov., 1930; confd., Sept., 1932; offg. secty., ditto, Nov., 1935.

MAZUMDAR, NALINI NATH, O.B.E., Rai Bahadur, late Indian Police, (b. 1st July, 1884).—Retd., July, 1939.*

MAZUMDAR, SUDHENDRA NATH, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 9th Nov., 1896).—Educ. at Canning Coll., Lucknow, and Peterhouse, Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 13th Jan., 1922, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-secty., fin. dept., offg. dep. commr., March, 1932; dept. secty. to govt., Orissa, Apl., 1936; dir. of development, Orissa, Nov., 1936; mag. and collr., Feb., 1937; lab. commr., Bihar, March, 1941; sec., educn. etc. dept., Feb., 1944; dev. commr. and addl. sec., educn., etc., Mar., 1946.

MEAKINS, HAROLD WHAYMAN, Indian State Rlys. (traffic manager, E.B. Rly.) (b. 9th Oct., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., on 18th July, 1908; dist. ditto, Apl., 1918; offg. dep. traffic manager, E.B. rly., variously from Oct., 1932; confd., Jan., 1937; traffic manager, ditto, Dec., 1939.

MEASURES, SIR PHILIP HERBERT JOSEPH, C.B.E., Indian Police (inspr.-genl., United Provs.) (b. 2nd Jan., 1893).—Joined the service, Nov., 1913, as asst. supt.; supt., March, 1925; C.B.E., Jan., 1931; dep. inspr.-genl. (confd.);

inspr.-genl., June, 1945 (confd.) kt., June, 1946.

MEDD, H. A. N., late Consulting Architect, Central P.W.D. (b. 21st Sept., 1892).—Consulting architect to govt., Central Provs., 14th Dec., 1935; transf. to govt., Central P.W.D., Oct., 1939; retd.,

MEEHAN, ROBERT LYS WILLIAM, V.D., Indian State Rlys. (ch. mechl. engr., E.B. Rly.) (b. 30th Apl., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 3rd Jan., 1914; dist. loco. supt., Dec., 1922; supt., mechl. records, Apl., 1925; pers. asst. to dep. ch. mechl. engr., Dec., 1926; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., June, 1929; confd., May, 1931; offg. ch. mechl. engr., E.I. rly., Jan., 1936; ch. mechl. engr., E.B. rly., Jan., 1938.

MEEK, ARTHUR STANLEY, C.M.G., Lieut.-Col., I.A. (ret'd.), late Indian Pol. Service (b. 7th Oct., 1883).—Retd., Oct., 1938.*

MEEK, SIR DAVID BURNETT, C.I.E., O.B.E., M.A., D.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (Indian trade commr.) (b. 10th March, 1885).—Joined the service, 11th Feb., 1911, as profr., Dacca Coll.; asst. contr. of munitions, govt. of India, Oct., 1918, to Apl., 1919; dir. of industries, Bengal, Jan., 1920; O.B.E., June, 1924; dir.-genl. of comml. intell., Apl., 1926; C.I.E., June, 1933; Indian trade commr., Jan., 1935; representative of the govt. of India to commonwealth statistical conf., Ottawa, Sept., 1935; kt., May, 1937; dep. high commr. for India (in addn.), Jan., 1944; ret'd. and re-employed, Apl., 1945.

MEGAW, SIR JOHN WALLACE DICK, K.C.I.E., M.B., B.Ch., B.A., K.H.P., Maj.-Gen., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 8th Feb., 1874).—K.C.I.E., Jan., 1933; ret'd., Nov., 1933; presd't. medl. bd., India office, Nov., 1933, to Nov., 1939.†

MEGGITT, FREDERICK JOSEPH, M.Sc., Ph.D., Indian Educl. Service (b. 10th Aug., 1890).—Joined the service as lecturer in biological science, Univ. Coll., Rangoon, 5th Feb., 1923; on mil. service, Feb., 1941.

MEHER, MANEKSHA RUSTAMJI, M.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bombay) (b. 10th Dec., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Bombay and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 15th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1935; confd., Aug., 1936; served in Sind as dist. and sess. judge, March, 1944.

MEHKRI, MUHAMMAD ASADULLAH, B.A., Indian State Rlys. (dist. contr. of stores, G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 14th Jan., 1902).—Joined service, June, 1926; asst. contr. of stores, June, 1929; dist. contr. of stores, senior scale, Oct., 1938.

MEHTA, Dr. A. R. (Punjab).—Med. offr. of health, Oct., 1921; study abroad; dist. med. offr. of health, Punjab (confd.), Apl., 1927; organising sec. King George thanksgiving (anti-T.B.) fund, Delhi, Apl., 1931 and Feb., 1936; asst. dir. of pub. health, Aug., 1942.

MEHTA, BHAG MALL, B.A., (b. 27th Dec., 1924).—Held non-gaz. appts. in commerce dept. to 1941; held minor gaz. appts., 1942; ch. supt., comm. dept., March, 1945; asst. sec., govt. of India, commerce dept., July, 1945.

MEHTA, SIR CHUNILAL VIJHBUKHANDAS, K.C.S.I., M.A., LL.B.—Apptd. member of govt.'s exec. council, 22nd June, 1923; ret'd., Sept., 1928.*

MEHTA, DADIBA CURSETJEE, M.A., LL.B., late Bombay C.S., Judl. Branch (b. 27th Nov., 1878).—Retd., Nov., 1938.*

MEHTA, DESRAJ, O.B.E., B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Orissa) (b. 21st

Nov., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bihar and Orissa, 6th Nov., 1926; offg. exec. engr., March, 1933; confd., Oct., 1935; under-sec. to govt. P.W.D., Apl., 1936; ex. engr., P.W.D., Orissa.

MEHTA, GUR SARAN DAS, Rai Bahadur, late Indian Audit Dept. (b. Oct., 1883).—Retd., Nov., 1938.*

MEHTA, INDRAVADAN NARAYANBAI, B.A., LL.B., Barr., late Bombay Judicial Dept. (b. 20th Jan., 1886).—Retd., May, 1941.†

MEHTA, JAMNADAS MADHAVJI, M.A., LL.B., Barr.-at-law (b. 3rd Aug., 1884).—Member, cent. legis. assembly, 1923-30; again, 1941; Mayor of Bombay, 1926-27; member, nat. def. council, 1941; rev. and fin. minister, Bombay govt., 1937; repr. of govt. of India with Burma govt., 1944.

MEHTA, KANHAIYA LAL, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. sec. fin. branch, United Provs.) (b. 15th March, 1913).—Educ. at Maharana's Inter. Coll., Udaipur, Agra Univ., and London Sch. of Economics; joined the service, 23rd Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; dep. sec. fin. branch, July, 1944.

MEHTA MUKAND LAL, Ind. Serv. of Engrs. apptd. asst. research offr., Nov., 1929; land reclam. offr., Sept., 1936; dep. dir. land reclam. Apl., 1940; dir. ditto, Jan., 1945.

MEHTA, NAMANLAL CHAMANLAL B.A., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 17th Sept., 1891).—Retd., 1st July, 1944.†

MEHTA, NATWAR LAL, M.Sc., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 2nd Dec., 1901).—Joined the service, 25th Feb., 1926; dep. chief auditor, E.I. rly., Oct., 1933; asst. acctnt.-genl., United Provs., 2nd Jan., 1935; dep. acctnt.-genl., United Provs., Nov., 1937; dep. ch. audr., N.W. rly., Sept., 1939; and again, Sept., 1940; ch. audr., rly. clg. accts., March, 1940; asst. acctnt.-genl., in office of dep. acctnt.-genl., posts and tels., Calcutta, Nov., 1941.

MEHTA, PERSHOTAM LAL, Indian Police (supt.) (b. 1st March, 1907).—Apptd. proby. asst. supt., Bengal, 18th Jan., 1930; confd., March, 1932; asst. inspr.-genl., Feb., 1943; confd., supt., Jan., 1944; Indian police medal, 1945.

MEHTA, SHREENATH Indian C.S. (ch. contr. imports, New Delhi) (b. 28th Oct., 1904).—Educ. at Univ. of Allahabad; Univ. of Nagpur and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 28th Sept., 1928; arrived, 25th Oct. 1928, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; prime minister, Kotah state, July, 1942; dep. contr., civ. supplies, Jan., 1944; dep. ch. contr. imports, Dec., 1944; jt. ch. contr., exports, New Delhi, Nov., 1945; ch. contr., imports, ditto, June, 1946.

MEHTA, SHRIMUKHRAO LAXMILAL, B.A., Indian C.S. (dir. of industries, Assam) (b. 1st Nov., 1892).—Educ. at Bombay and Clare Coll., Cambridge; apptd. to the I.C.S. by nomination, 15th Oct., 1917; arrived in India, 21st Dec., 1917, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1929; again Jan., 1930; confd. as def. commr., Nov., 1934; dir. of industries, Assam, Feb., 1935; sec. educ. and l.s.g. depts., Mar. 1942.

MEIKLEJOHN, WILLIAM, C.I.E., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (consvr.) (b. 5th Dec., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 23rd Dec., 1910; in mil. employ from 1st Jan., 1918, to 14th Apl., 1919; dep. consvr., Oct., 1920; offg. consvr., Apl., 1930; transfed.

N.W.F.P. as offg. consvr., Dec., 1930; ditto, United Provs., Nov., 1934; ditto, Bengal, Apl., 1935; consvr., Aug., 1935; senr. ditto, Dec., 1938; C.I.E., June, 1941.

MELDRUM, JAMES WHITE, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Cent. Provs.) (b. 12th Apl., 1908).—Educ. at Ayr Academy, Edinburgh Univ., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr. under-secty. to govt., Central Provs., Jan., 1935; dep. commr., Feb., 1942; sec. to high commr. for India, in S. Africa, Dec., 1943.

MELLOR, RAYMOND GEORGE, M.B.E., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 6th Apl., 1912).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, 10th Nov., 1931; confd., Nov., 1933; M.B.E., Jan., 1943.

MENESSE, NORMAN HAROLD, O.B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr.) (b. 20th Sept., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bombay, 1st Oct., 1925; awarded K.-i.-H. medal, 2nd class, June, 1928; offg. exec. engr., Oct., 1929; confd., Sept., 1934; in for. service as admin., Shikarpur municipality, Nov., 1934, to March, 1937; O.B.E., May, 1937; suptg. engr., Mar., 1945.

MENON, AMBADY GOPAL, B.Sc. (Engr.), govt. of India, agric. dept., (b. 18th Sept., 1911).—Joined the serv. May, 1943, dep. agric. prodn. advr. (implements), govt. of India, educn., health and lands dept., Aug., 1945; ditto dept. of agric., Sept., 1945, offr. on spec. duty (Tractors) agric. dept., Mar., 1946.

MENON, ATCHUTH MADHAVA, B.A., LL.B., A.S.A.A., Office of High Commr. for India (higher exec. officer, accts. dept.) (b. 10th July, 1892).—Apptd. to office of high commr. for India, 15th Nov., 1920; higher clerical officer, Apl., 1922; higher exec. officer (temp.), May, 1925; confd., June, 1927.

MENON, A. V. GOVINDA (see Govinda Menon, A. V.).

MENON, C. R. B., B.A. (b. 1st July, 1904).—Held non-gaz. posts in commerce dept.; addl. asst. shipping master, June, 1940; asst. ditto, July, 1940; sec. Indian rubber prodn. bd., Nov., 1942; asst. sec., commerce dept., govt. of India, Jan., 1946.

MENON, KIZHAKKEPAT RAMUNNI, C.I.E., Ind. C.S. (collr., Madras) (b. 2nd June, 1896).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 26th Oct., 1920; arrived, 27th Dec., 1920; sub.-collr. and jt. mag., July, 1922; offg. under-sec. to govt., law dept., Nov., 1924; under-sec., govt. of India, home, dept., Apl., 1927; addl. dep. secty., govt. of India, educn. etc., dept., Oct., 1930, and again, June, 1934; secty., public dept., office of H.C. for India, Apl., 1931, to March, 1934; adviser and secty. to govt. of India delegation to internatl. labour conf., Geneva, 1932 and 1933; sec., rev. dept., Madras, May, 1937; ditto, P.W.D., Oct., 1937; confd. as collr., Dec., 1939; inspr., muncpl. cls., July, 1941, to March, 1944; sec. P.W.D., again, May, 1944; C.I.E., Jan., 1946; ch. sec. to govt., Feb., 1946.

MENON, KIZHAKKEPAT SANKARA (see Sankara Menon, K.).

MENON, KOMATTIL GOVINDA, M.B.E., M.Sc., B.A., Indian C.S. (sub.-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 19th September, 1909).—Educ. at B.M. High Sch., Palghat, Madras Univ., University Coll., London; and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 2nd Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933,

sub-collr., Jan., 1936; under-secty. to govt., Madras, P.W.D., July, 1938; govt. of India, branch direc., eastern gp. supply counc., Aug., 1941; M.B.E., June, 1944; dep. ch. contr. exp., Dec., 1943; dep. sec. govt. of India, commerce dept., Sept., 1945.

MENON, KONNANATH RAMAKRISHNA, C.I.E., M.B.E., M.A., B.L., Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. June, 1901).—Joined the serv. as offr. cl.II, May, 1917; A.M.A.G., i/c M.A., sec., June, 1933; D.M.A.G. (junr.), Apl., 1936; addtl. ditto (junr.), Oct., 1936; M.B.E., 1938; asst. commr. of income tax, Bombay, Jan., 1939; commr., ditto, and apptd. to fin. and comm. depts., Nov., 1939; dir. of inspn. (income tax) June, 1943; C.I.E., June, 1946.

MENON, KUMAR PADMA SIVASANKARA (see Sivasankara Menon, K. P.).

MENON, MOHAMED BACHAL, B.A., LL.B., (judl. dept., Sind) (b. 6th Oct., 1898).—Joined Aug., 1924; sub-judge (1st Class), (confd.), Mar., 1933; asst. judge and addl. sess. judge (confd.), Dec., 1938; offg. from June, 1942.

MENON, MUHAMMAD BAKHSH ALLAHVAKHIO, B.A., LL.B., (judl. dept., Sind) (b. 12th Dec., 1897).—Joined Feb., 1928; sub-judge (1st Cl.) (confd.), May, 1941.

MENON, MANAKAT KRISHNA, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 14th Dec., 1906).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Madras, Jan., 1931; confd., Jan., 1933.

MENON, MANGAT GOPAL, Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 26th Dec., 1919).—Educ. at Montfort Boys' High Sch., Madras Univ., and Christ's Coll., Camb.; apptd. on probn., after seln. in Aug., 1941; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Sept., 1944.

MENON, MULLASSERI MADHAVA, Local fund audit dept., Burma (b. 8th July, 1888).—Apptd. asst. examr., 19th March, 1927.

MENON, PARAKAT ACHUTHA, Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 2nd Jan., 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Madras and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service 9th Oct., 1929; arrived Nov., 1929; sub-collr., May, 1931; under-sec. (P.W.D.), Madras, Jan., 1934; ditto, home dept., govt. of India, Apl., 1937; dep. sec. I. Supply Mission in U.S.A., July, 1943.

MENON, PARAKAT MADHAVA, M.B.E., Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 7th Jan., 1906).—Educ. at Madras University and New College, Oxford; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930; sub-collr., Feb., 1932; under-secty. to govt. (p.w.d.), Madras, Jan., 1937; attd. govt. of India, lab. dept., Aug., 1938; under-secty. to govt. of India, dept. of lab., Dec., 1938; M.B.E., Jan., 1942; dir. of ind. and commerce, Madras, Apl., 1942; dep. secty., govt. of India, dept. of educn. health and lands; Feb., 1943.

MENON, THARAVANAT ACHUTHA, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 4th Jan., 1911).—Educ. at the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 23rd Nov., 1936; arrived in India, Dec., 1936, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1938; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1942; addl. dist. mag., May, 1943.

MENON, TOTTAKAT NARAYARA, B.A., Office of the High Commr. for India (exec. officer, store dept.) (b. 6th Oct., 1896).—Apptd. to office of high commr. for India, Aug., 1924; actg. exec. officer, Apl., 1926; confd., Oct., 1930.

MENON, VADAKKE KURAPATH ROMUNI, B.A., Ind. C.S. (jt. sec., govt. of India, dept. of lab.

(b. 29th Aug., 1903).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service 19th Oct., 1926; arrived, 22nd Nov., 1926, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-secty. to govt., fin. dept., B. and O., Oct., 1931; offg. secty. to govt., ditto, July, 1933; offg. mag. and collr., Apl., 1934; offg. secty. to govt., local self govt. dept., Apl., 1936; dep. commr., Sept., 1939; sec. to govt. fin. dept., Aug., 1940; mag. and collr., Jan., 1941; inspr.-genl. regn. and commr. of excise, Oct., 1944; dep. dir.-genl. (disposals), govt. of India, supply dept., Mar., 1945; jt. sec., govt. of India, dept. of lab., Oct., 1945.

MENON, VAPAL PANGUNNI, C.S.I., C.I.E., Rao Bahadur (reforms commr. and sec. govr.-genl.) (b. 30th Sept., 1894).—Joined the serv., 8th Sept., 1914; asst. sec., govt. of India, reforms office, Jan., 1933; under-secty., ditto, Sept., 1934; dep. secty., ditto., Sept., 1936; jt. secty., ditto, June to Oct., 1937; dep. secty., ditto, Oct., 1937; jt. secty., ditto, June to Oct., 1938; dep. secty., ditto., Oct., 1938; dep. secty., sectt. of the govr.-genl. (reforms), March, 1940; jt. secty., ditto, Feb. to June, 1941; dep. secty., ditto, June, 1941; C.I.E., June, 1941; reforms commr., Sept., 1942; reforms commr. and sec. govr.-genl. (public) June, 1945; C.S.I., June, 1946.

MERCHANT, FRAMROZ RUSTOMJI, F.S.A.A., late Income Tax Dept., Bihar and Orissa (b. 12th Nov., 1888).—Retd. Nov., 1943.†

MEREDITH, HERBERT RIBTON, B.A., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Patna) (b. 8th Apl., 1890).—Educ. at Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 17th Dec., 1914, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Sept., 1922; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1923; addl. ditto, Apl., 1925; offg. judl. commr., March, 1929; dist. and sess. judge, March, 1931; offg. regr., high ct., Patna, Apl., 1932; offg. secty. to govt., judl. dept., Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1934; regr., high ct., Patna, Nov., 1934; addtl. judge, ditto, July, 1939; judge, ditto, Oct., 1940.

MERRELLS, GEORGE LUEN, B.A., Burma C.S. (cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 14th Dec., 1915).—Educ. at Colfe's Gr. Sch., Lewisham, and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 6th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Nov., 1938, and served as asst. commr.; on mil. serv., Nov., 1940; on depn. in C.M.A.'s office, July, 1941; asst. supt. and sub-divl. offr., Naga Hills dist., 1943; civ. aff. serv. 1944.

MERRIMAN, JOHN LONGSHAW, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bihar) (b. 26th Dec., 1886).—Retd. June, 1939.*

MERRINGTON, HERBERT FAGENT, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 5th May, 1904).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Punjab, 17th Oct., 1927; exec. engr., Oct., 1936; reg. camouflage offr., Oct., 1941; on depn. to govt. of India, civ. def. dept., March, 1943; services at disp. of C.-in-C., Nov., 1943 to Sept., 1945; under sec. to govt., P.W.D. (irrign.), March, 1946.

MERSH, CHARLES MELMOTH BAILEY, M.B.E., (Central Provs.) (b. 25th Oct., 1884).—Late electrical adviser; retd., Oct., 1939.*

METCALFE, SIR HERBERT AUBREY FRANCIS, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., M.V.O., B.A., Indian C.S., retd., late Indian Political Service (b. 27th Sept., 1883).—Retd., Nov., 1943.†

METCALFE, ROY DOUGLAS, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 9th Feb., 1909).—

First commn., 31st Jan., 1929; pers. asst. to pol. resdt. in Persian Gulf, Dec., 1934; asst. pol. agent, Bahrain, Aprl., 1935; under trng. in Punjab, Nov., 1935; under-secty. to resdt. for Central India, Sept., 1938; confd. in Indian political service, May, 1939; publ. officr. in Persian Gulf, Aprl., 1940, and again, Aprl., 1941; pol. officr., Trucial Coast, Oct., 1940; secty. to resdt., eastern states, March, 1942; asst. pol. agt., Chhattisgarh states, Aug., 1942; pol. agt., ditto, in addn., May, 1943; secty. to resdt., eastern states, Aug., 1943; pol. agt., Muscat, Nov., 1943; pol. agt. and dep. commr. Sibi, Aug., 1945; pol. agt. Chagai, and commdt. Chagai Levy Corps, Oct., 1945; H.M. consul, Zahidan, May, 1946.

MEYER, P. M. ROSE (see Rose Meyer, P. M.).

MIABHOY, NOMANBAI MAHMADBAI, B.A., LL.B.—Joined Bombay judl. dept. from Dec., 1941; dist. and sess. judge, (confd.) Dec., 1942.

MIAN FATCH SINGH, B.A., (b. 4th May, 1899).—Apptd. asst. regr., 4th Jan., 1926; confd., Oct., 1929; asst. dir. petroleum directorate, D.G. Supply, New Delhi, July, 1942; dep. dir. containers, Aprl., 1943; asst. sec. govt. of India, supply dept., Aug., 1943; dep. agric. prodn. advr., govt. of India, dept. of e.h. and l. Sept., 1944.

MIAN, MUHAMMAD TASDIQUE HUSSAIN, M.Sc. (Punj.), Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Central Provs.) (b. 1st June, 1905).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Central Provs., 5th Nov., 1929; dep. consvr., Nov., 1934.

MICHAEL, JAMES DONBAR, Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 19th Nov., 1899).—Asst. exec. engr., centr. Indian coal field rly. survey, Oct., 1922; ditto (junr. scale), E.I. rly., Oct., 1927; dep. dir., rly. board, Aprl., 1939; exec. engr., provl., July, 1939.

MIDDLETON, ARTHUR PURLING, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bihar) (b. 14th Oct., 1884).—Retd., July, 1944.†

MIDDLETON, LEONARD, B.A., late Indian C.S. (N.W.F.P.) (b. 13th March, 1884).—Retd., Aug., 1939.*

MIDDLETON, WILLIAM EDWARD, B.A., Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 2nd Oct., 1907).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Madras, 5th March, 1929; confd., Aug., 1931; offg. dist. supt., June, 1934; confd., Jan., 1943.

MIDDLETON-STEWART, DONALD JERMOND, Burma Serv. Engrs. (b. 13th Aug., 1907).—Apptd. asst. exec. engr. Nov., 1930; confd., Oct., 1933.

MIDGLEY, ERIC ATKINSON, M.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 25th Mar., 1913).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital, Horsham, and Merton College, Oxford; joined the service 15th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; mgr. Balrampur State, Nov., 1945; M.B.E., Jan., 1946.

MILLARD, CLIVE NEWCOME, B.A., late Bombay C.S. (b. 8th Aug., 1891).—Joined the service as dep. collr., 22nd Aug., 1916; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Aprl., 1929; confd., Dec., 1939; adtl. collr. and dist. mag., Aprl., 1945; retd., Aug., 1946.

MILLER, GEORGE WESLEY, M.D., D.P.H., Maj., I.M.S. (princl. medl. officr., R.I.N.) (b. 23rd Aprl., 1904).—First commn. dated 4th Aug., 1931; in milty. employ to 7th Feb., 1938; civil surg., Chhindwara, Feb., 1938; port health officer, Bombay, July, 1939; offg. ch. ditto, Delhi prov., Aprl., 1940; offg. dep. public health officr. with govt. of India, Nov., 1940;

princl. medl. officr., R.I.N., with rank of surgn.-commdr., R.I.N., Feb., 1941.

MILLER, HAROLD BELLETT, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 4th May, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, 28th Feb., 1921; offg. supt., rly. police, May, 1927; supt., Nov., 1931; asst. inspr.-genl., Jan., 1942, to Feb., 1943.

MILLETT, HUMPHREY JOHN CURNOW, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 29th June, 1897).—Joined the service, 21st Jan., 1921, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Jan., 1925.

MILLS, JAMES PHILIP, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (advr. to the govr., Assam) (b. 18th Feb., 1890).—Educ. at Winchester Coll., and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; apptd. after the exam. of 1912; arrived, 10th Dec., 1913, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1924; and again, March, 1930; confd., Aug., 1932; offr. on spl. duty, reforms offr., Nov., 1935; secty. to the govr., Aprl., 1937; C.I.E., Jan., 1941; advr. to govr. (tribal areas and states), Oct., 1943.

MILLS, PERCY STRICKLAND, C.I.E., M.B., Col., I.M.S., ret'd., late Civil Med. Dept., Bihar (b. 28th May, 1883).—Retd., Aug., 1941.†

MILNER, CHARLES EDWARD, late Indian Forest Service (Burma) (b. 17th Sept., 1887).—Retd., Sept. 1942.†

MILTON, HENRY JOSEPH, Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 21st Dec., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 28th Nov., 1922; offg. supt., March, 1930; confd., June, 1934.

MIN, MAUNG KYAW, R.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (Burma) (b. 15th Nov., 1899).—Educ. at St. Xavier's College, Calcutta, and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; joined the service 12th Dec., 1923, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-sec. to govt. fin. dept., Oct., 1927; offg. dep. commr., May, 1931; dep. sec. educ. dept., Burma, June, 1936; sec. ditto, Oct., 1936; dep. sec. to govt. Burma, Jan., 1937; sec. to the premier, Sept., 1937; sec. labour dept., May, 1941; dep. commr. Oct., 1941; sec. to premier, Sept., 1942; reconstrn. offr., 1943; on depn. to U.K. and U.S.A., 1944; sec. ind. and labour dept., Oct., 1944; depn. to U.K., 1945; commr., Dec., 1945.

MINCHIN, ALFRED ALYSON FENNELL, late Indian Forest Service (b. 25th Aug., 1887).—Retd., Jan. 1940.†

MINISTER, CYRIL JOHN, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 31st Oct., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th March, 1921; offg. supt., June, 1924; confd., Sept., 1930; asst. to d.i.g., March, 1942, to March, 1944; Indian police medal, 1944.

MINNITT, G. C., A.M.I.C.E., M.I.Struct.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 10th May, 1887).—Retd., Jan., 1940.†

MINSHULL, WILLIAM TRAVERS, B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 31st Dec., 1884).—Retd., March, 1939.*

MIRAJKAR, VAMAN RAGHUNATH, O.B.E., F.R.C.S., M.R.C.P., Lieut.-Col., ret'd., late I.M.S. (b. 13th Oct., 1887).—First commn. dated 15th March, 1920; in milty. employ to 28th June, 1926; profr., King Edward Medl. Coll., Lahore, June, 1926; O.B.E., Nov., 1935; ret'd., and re-empld., Jan., 1943.

MIRCHANDANI, BHAGWANDAS DAYARAM, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 25th Feb., 1906).—Educ. at Univ. of Bombay and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov.,

1929, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; asst. judge, under trng., July, 1934; asst. judge and addtl. sess. judge (confd.), July, 1940; joint ditto, var., from Dec., 1940; dist. and sess. judge, Sind, Sept., 1943.

MIRCHANDANI, TNAUMAL SHEWAKRAM, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (supltg. exec. engr., Sind) (b. 3rd March, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1911; exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. suptg. engr., variously from March, 1925; confd., Dec., 1937.
