MIRCHANDANI, TOLARAM JETHANAND, O.B.E., M.Sc.(Lond.), A.M.I.E.E., (b. 1st Oct., 1896).—Engaged on contracts as personal asst. to the chief engineer for electricity from 1st Sept., 1931; confd. as exec. engr., Sept., 1933; suptg. engr., May, 1943 (ch. elec. inspr.); O.B.E., June, 1941; gen. supt., operating system, Dec., 1944; senr. engr., Bombay elec. grid.

MIRCHANDANI, UDHARAM MANIRAM, Indian C.S. (collr., Sind) (b. 26th Sept., 1896).—Educ. at St. Patrick's High Sch., Karachi, and Trinity Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 14th Dec., 1921; arrived, 23rd Jan., 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Oct., 1927; offg. dep. secty. to govt., fin. dept., Bombay, Feb., 1932; collr., Sind, March, 1936; settlt. commr. and dir., land records, June, 1942; municipal commr., Bombay, Dec., 1944.

MIR SAEED ALAM KHAN, NAWABZADA, Barr.-at.-Law, Indian Political Service (b. 28th Dec., 1892).—Joined the service, 15th Oct., 1923; asst. to A.G.G., Madras states, July, 1928; asst. commr., Peshawar, Nov., 1930; ditto, Bannu, Apl., 1931; offg. under-secty. to A.G.G., Punjab states, Apl., 1933; under-secty. to A.G.G., states of W.I., Aug., 1934; addl. pol. agent, Sabar Kantha agency, Jan., 1936; under-secty. to A.G.G., states of W.I., May, 1936; guardian and comp. to heir apparent of H.H. the Maharaja Morvi, Nov., 1936; secty. to resdt. for Kolhapur and the Deccan states, May, 1938; senior sub-judge, Peshawar, Apl., 1939; addtl. dist. and sess. judge, ditto, Nov., 1939; dist. and sess. judge, Peshawar, Sept., 1940; ditto, Rajputana and Baroda, W.I. and Gujarat States Agency, Mar., 1945.

MIRZA, SAHIBZADA SYED ISKANDAR ALI (see Syed Iskander Ali Mirza, S.).

MIRZA, SYDNEY J., B.A., LL.B., late Income Tax Dept., Bombay (b. 21st Apl., 1886).—Retd., Apl., 1941.†

MISHRA, BRAJABIHARI, Indian Police (Orissa) (b. Sept., 1916).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., March, 1940.

MISRA, KRIPA SINDHU, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 22nd July, 1908).—Educ. at the Patna Univ., and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 7th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. Apl., 1935; dep. sec. govt. of U.P., Oct., 1942; dep. sec. govt. of India, supply dept., Nov., 1945; ditto, war transpt. dept., July, 1946.

MISRA, LAKSHMI SHANKAR, M.A., LL.B. (judge, ch. ct., Oudh).—Apptd., May, 1943.

MISRA, SIR LAKSHMIPATI, B.Sc., late Indian State Rlys. (E.B. Rly.) (b. 4th July, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 9th Oct., 1912; offg. exec. engr., O. and R. Rly., Dec., 1918; services lent to Baroda state as engr.-in-chief, Baroda State Rlys., from Apl., 1924; exec. engr., E.I. Rly., Apl., 1928; offg. contr. of stores, Nov., 1930; offg. dep. agent,

June, 1932; confd., Nov., 1932; offg. divl. supt., May, 1935; confd., Jan., 1936; dep. chief engr. (provl. perm.), Apl., 1936; genl. manager, Sept., 1939; member, rly. bd., Nov., 1943; kt. June, 1944; ret'd., Oct., 1945.

MISRA, NARESH CHANDRA, B.A., Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 10th July, 1903).—Joined the service as temp. dep. supt. of police, 1st Jan., 1926; confd., June, 1928; I.P. medal, Feb., 1937; supt. of police, (confd.) July, 1940.

MISRA, RATTAN KUMAR, Lt.-Col., M.B., F.R.C.P., (Edin), I.M.S., (b. 23rd Sept., 1892).—Date of first commission, 11th Jan., 1933; in civil employ. in U.P. (confd.), 2nd Jan., 1939.

MISRA, SHARAD CHANDRA, M.A., Indian Police (b. 7th Apl., 1910).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., United Provs., 25th Jan., 1933; confd., Jan., 1935.

MISRA, TIKA RAM (see Tika, R. M.).

MITCHELL, ALEXANDER, V.D., M.D., late Indian State Rlys. (E.I. Rly.) (b. 19th Jan., 1888).—Retd., Apl., 1938.*

MITCHELL, ALFRED NORVAL, O.B.E., Indian C.S., Indian Pol. Service (b. 18th Dec., 1906).—Educ. at Shrewsbury Sch., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. under-secty. to govt., Central Provs., Oct., 1933; under-secty. to govt., N.W.F.P., Feb., 1936; offg. ch. secty., ditto, June, 1936; home secty. to govt., N.W.F.P., Apl., 1937; confd., Feb., 1938; asst. pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Oct., 1938; senr. sub-judge, Peshawar, Nov., 1939; admin. Bastur state, Apl., 1940; O.B.E., June, 1943; pol. agt., Subar Kantha agency, Jan., 1942; pol. agt., Orissa states, March, 1942, to July, 1943; on foreign service in Kolhapur states, Apl., 1944; jt. sec. to govt. N.W.F.P., March, 1946; home sec., ditto, June, 1946; fin. sec., ditto, Aug., 1946.

MITCHELL, SIR DAVID GEORGE, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., V.D., B.Sc., late Indian C.S. (Central Provs.) (b. 31st March, 1879).—Retd., July, 1937.*

MITCHELL, DAVID THOMAS, O.B.E., late Veterinary Dept., Burma (b. 16th March, 1885).—Retd., Mar., 1940.†

MITCHELL, HAROLD CHARLES, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 7th March, 1896).—Joined the service, 21st March, 1920; offg. supt., May, 1923; supt. (provl. sub.), July, 1930; confd., July, 1931; asst. to dep. inspr.-genl., C.I.D., United Provs., Oct., 1932; cent. intell. offr., United Provs. and Ajmere, Jan., 1937.

MITCHELL, JOHN EBENEZER MILLER, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 27th March, 1897).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 11th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., Dec., 1924; chief for offr., Coorg., Aug., 1933; served in R.N. from Aug., 1939, to May, 1946.

MITCHELL, JOHN FOWLER, C.I.E., B.Sc., late Indian C.S. (b. 30th Dec., 1886).—Retd., March, 1937.†

MITCHELL, SIR KENNETH GRANT, K.C.I.E., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 28th Aug., 1885).—Retd. Aug., 1942† re-empld. as ch. contr. road devel. and transport, Aug., 1942; K.C.I.E., June, 1946.

MITRA, AKHIL CHANDRA (see Akhil, C. M.).
MITRA, ASOK, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 1st March, 1917).—Educ. at Burdwan Town Sch., Calcutta Univ., and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 26th Oct., 1939; confd., 23rd Aug., 1940; arrived in

India, Nov., 1940, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1941; dep. dir. of rationing, Calcutta.

MITRA, BIRENDRA MOHAN, B.Sc., India, C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 28th Aug., 1899).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ., and Magdalen Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 4th Dec., 1923, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1929; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1932; ditto, Assam, Oct., 1933; addl. ditto, Oct., 1932; confd. as dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1936;

MITRA, BIRENDRA NATH, B.A., late Indian Fin. Dept. (b. 29th Aug., 1883).—Retd., Feb., 1939.*

MITRA, SIR DHIRENDRA NATH, C.B.E., B.A., B.L., Legis. Dept., apptd. solicitor to the govt. of India, Apl., 1937; C.B.E., June, 1939; kt., June, 1944.

MITRA, HIMANSHU, MOHAN, B.Sc., late Dept. of Mines in India (b. 31st March, 1884).—Retd., May, 1940.

MITRA, MANMATHA NATH Manmatha, (see N. M.).

MITRA, MONORANJAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Assam) (b. 1st Aug., 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. Coll., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 8th Dec., 1923, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; offg. addl. dist. mag., Oct., 1931; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1933; confd., Nov., 1938; jt. sec. (home), Oct., 1944; again dep. commr., Aug., 1946.

MITRA, NARENDRA KUMAR, O.B.E., B.Sc., late Indian State Ry. (E.I. Ry.) (b. 4th Sept. 1887).—Joined the service, 1st April, 1913; resdt. engr., Nov., 1921; exec. engr., Aug., 1927; provl. perm. dep. ch. engr., May, 1939; confd., Aug., 1941; ch. engr., Nov., 1941; O.B.E., Jan., 1943; retd.

MITRA, PRAN KUMAR, Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 15th Oct., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 8th Dec., 1924; offg. supt., Apl., 1932; and again, March, 1933; confd., May, 1937.

MITRA, RABINDRA KUMAR, O.B.E., B.A. (Cal.), Barr., Ind. C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 15th Dec., 1904).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta, University Coll., London, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1931; offg. addl. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1936; secty., bd. of rev., Bengal, March, 1939; contr. of printing and stationery, March, 1941; confd. Sept., 1941; O.B.E., June, 1945; sec. addl. sec., home dept., Apl., 1946.

MITRA, SAMARENDRA LAL, M.B., B.Sc., D.T.M. & H., D.P.H., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., Public Health Dept., Bihar (dir., public health) (b. 23rd Dec., 1887).—First comm. dated 1st Nov., 1920; in mil. employ prior to 5th Sept., 1925; offg. dir. of public health, Sept., 1925; offg. dir. of public health, Assam, March to Nov., 1929; ditto, Bihar and Orissa, Oct., 1930; and again, Feb., 1933; dir. of public health, Bihar, Feb., 1937; also inspr.-genl. of civil hosp., Feb., 1941.

MITRA, S. K. M.S. (Cal.), Ph.D. (Ohio), Indian Agricl. Service (dir. of agric.) (b. 15th Feb., 1887).—Joined the service as economic botanist, Assam, 28th Feb., 1921; dir. of agric., Assam, Sept., 1937.

MITRA, SATYENDRA NATH, M.B., Ch.B., D.F.N. (asst. dir. of public health, Bengal) (b.

11th Nov., 1889).—Apptd. asst. dir. of public health, 13th Sept., 1920; confd., Sept., 1925.

MITRA, SHAILENDRA NATH, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 17th Jan., 1909).—Educ. at Government High Sch., Partabgarh, Government Intermediate Coll., Fyzabad, Allahabad Univ., Imperial Coll. of Science, London, and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 7th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bengal as asst. collr. and mag.

MITRA, TINCORI, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. Jan., 1900).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 19th Dec., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Dec., 1925; offg. exec. engr., June, 1929; confd., Dec., 1934.

MITTER, SIR BROJENDRA LAL, K.C.S.I., Barr. (late fed. adv. genl.).—Apptd. advocate-gen. Bengal, Dec., 1925; kt., Jan., 1928; member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, Dec., 1928; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1932; delegate of India at assembly of League of Nations, 1933; member, govr.'s exec. council, Bengal, May, 1934; fed. advocate-genl., Apl., 1937; retd., Mar., 1945.

MITTER, GANESH CHANDRA, O.B.E., M.Sc., M.I.M., Mint and Assay Dept. (ch. assayer, Bombay) (b. 1st Aug., 1897).—Joined the service as dep. assay master on probn., 28th March, 1922; confd., Feb., 1923; offg. assay master, Bombay, Aug., 1927; ch. assayer, Apl., 1932; O.B.E., Jan., 1939.

MITTER, MOHAN LALL, M.I.L.E., Indian State Ry. (transpn. (power) supt., senr. scale, E.I. Ry.) (b. 3rd May, 1899).—Asst. loco. supt., 15th Aug., 1924; supt. (power), senr. scale, July, 1936.

MITTER, SIR ROOPENDRA KUMAR, Judl. Dept., Bengal (judge, high ct.).—Apptd. offg. judge, high ct., Calcutta, 31st July, 1934; addl. judge, ditto, Nov., 1934, and Aug., 1936; high ct., judge, Bengal, Nov., 1937; kt. Jan., 1946, actg. ch. justice, Feb., 1947.

MITTER, S. C., O.B.E., B.Sc. (Eng.) Lond. (dir. of indus., Bengal) (b. 10th Dec., 1900).—Joined the service as indus. engr., 9th Oct., 1925; dep. dir. of indus., Bengal, Aug., 1934; dir., ditto, May, 1937; O.B.E., Jan., 1943.

MITTON, P. D. Indian State Ry. (b. 28th Jan., 1899).—Joined 25th Mar., 1920; dep. mangr. B.B. and C.I. Ry., Feb., 1946.

MOBBS, ERIC CHARLES, B.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (b. 10th Sept., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 11th Dec., 1922; services lent to Tehri Garhwal state for two years from May, 1925; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927; principl., for coll., Dehra Dun, Apl., 1938; dir. forest edic., F.R.I. and Coll., Dehra Dun, Apl., 1945.

MOCKETT, SIR VERE, Barr., Judl. Dept., Madras (judge, high ct., Madras).—Apptd. judge, high ct., Madras, 21st July, 1934; kt., Jan., 1943; apptd. ch. justice, Madras high ct., 13th to 30th Sept., 1943; retd., 1945.

MODAK, BHASKAR LAKSHMAN, A.M.I.C.E., M.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bombay) (b. 29th Sept., 1884).—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

MODAK, EMMANUEL SUMITRA, B.A., Indian Police, Bombay (b. 25th March, 1920).—Apptd., asst. supt. on probn. after exam. of 1940.

MODAK, SATYENDRA NATH, M.A. (Cal.), B.A. (Cantab.) late Indian C.S. (Bengal) (b. 24th Dec., 1891).—Educ. at Emmanuel College, Cambridge; apptd. by nomination: arrived Dec., 1916, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Aug., 1925; confd., May, 1927; commr.

for workmen's compensation, Bengal, Sept., 1938; spec. offr. judl. dept., Dec., 1942; retd., Dec., 1945.

MODDER, EUGENE ASHLEY CLIVE, late Indian Forest Service (Bengal) (b. 3rd Apl., 1883).—Retd., 1938.*

MODI, JAL RUSTOMJI KAVASJI, B.A., On spec. duty, commerce dept., Sept., 1942; Indian Govt. Trade Commr., Buenos Aires, Nov., 1942.

MODI, LONJI SHAHPURIJI, F.R.C.S.I., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., retd. (b. 9th March, 1884).—Retd., May, 1939.*

MOHAMMED, ALI, Indian Police (b. 26th May, 1914).—Apptd. asst. supt., Madras, on probn., 1st Mar., 1938; confd., Mar., 1940.

MOHAMAD ALI, C.I.E., O.B.E., Indian Audit and Accts. (b. 15th July, 1905).—Joined the service 6th Feb., 1928; under sec. fin. dept., Apl., 1938; dep. fincl. advr. mil. fin., Nov., 1939; jt. fincl. advr. ditto, Mar., 1941; addl. fincl. advr., ditto, Sept., 1943; O.B.E., Jan., 1942; fincl. advr. war and supply, Apl., 1945; C.I.E., June, 1945.

MOHAMMAD HASHIM, H.R., Abbasi (Sind) (b. 15th June, 1898).—Joined June, 1917; dep. collr., Jan., 1945; gen. asst. to rev. commr. and asst. sec. to govt., rev. dept., June, 1946.

MOHAMMAD SHARIF, B.A., LL.B.—Apptd. pte. secty. to the law member, Oct., 1939; asst. solicitor, govt. of India, legisl. dept., May, 1941.

MOHAN LAL, BATRA, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 1st July, 1903).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., Oct., 1926; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1927; exec. engr., May, 1937; under sec. P.W.D., (irrign.).

MOHAN LAL, KUNJ BEHARI, M.B.E., B.Sc., Indian Forest Serv. (b. 25th Jan., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Assam, 14th Nov., 1930; dep. consvr., Nov., 1935; M.B.E., June, 1945.

MOHAN, MAN (see Man Mohan).

MOHAN, NETER PARKASH (see Neter Parkash M.).

MOHAN RAO, PEJAVAR, M.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 25th May, 1887).—Joined the service, 28th Oct., 1910; asst. acctnt.-genl., May, 1911; dep. acctnt.-genl., posts and tels., Aug., 1918; ditto, Madras, Sept., 1921; ditto, Nagpur, Jan., 1922; asst. acctnt.-genl., United Provs., Oct., 1922; ditto, Madras, March, 1923; ditto, Bengal, Jan., 1924; dep. acctnt.-genl., posts and tels., Madras, Apl., 1925; dep. acctnt.-genl., Cent. Provs., Apl., 1928; audit offcr., Indian stores dept., Oct., 1928; offg. dep. ch. accts. offcr., E.I. rlys., Nov., 1932; offg. ch. ditto, Apl., 1933; offg. acctnt.-genl., Bombay, May, 1934; govt. examr. of accts., M. & S.M. and S.I. rlys., Oct., 1934; offg. ch. accts. offcr., E.I. rly., Feb., 1935; acctnt.-genl., Bengal, Sept., 1936; ditto, Bihar, March, 1938; ditto, Central Provs. and Berar, Aug., 1939; ditto, Central revs., Nov., 1939.

MOHAN SINGH, SARDAR BAHADUR, C.I.E.—Apptd. member of Council of India, March, 1935; advr. to sec. of state for India, Apl., 1937, to March, 1940; C.I.E., Jan., 1941.

MOHAN, YADAVA (see Yadava Mohan).

MOLE, ROBERT FREDERIC, B.A., Burma C.S. (cl. I) (dep. commr.) (b. 10th Aug., 1914).—Educ. at Clifton Coll., and Hertford Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 16th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Nov., 1938, and served as asst. commr.; on

military service, Nov., 1940; sub. divl. offr., Bassein, Mar., 1941; on spec. duty, office of repr. of gov. of Burma, Calcutta, May, 1942; civ. aff. serv., May, 1943; dep. commr., Oct., 1945.

MOLES, SAMUEL, B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 31st May, 1914) (asst. commr. Punjab).—Educated at Royal Academical Institution, Belfast, and Belfast University; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under-sec. (transport), Sept., 1942; addl. dep. sec. fin. dept., 1944; sec. (rev.) to fin. commrs., Mar., 1946.

MOLLOY, OSCAR HUGH, Burma C.S. (cl. I) (b. 16th May, 1915).—Educ. at St. Joseph's Coll., North Point, Darjeeling, and Rangoon Univ.; apptd. on probn., 30th Sept., 1938; asst. supt., Shan states, July, 1940; on military service, Nov., 1940; on duty with front. admin. Sept., 1942; asst. supt. and sub-divl. offr., July, 1943; civ. aff. service, 1944.

MOLLOY, PATRICK REGINALD HEMBROUGH, B.A., Burma C.S. (cl. I) (dep. commr.) (b. 16th Oct., 1912).—Educ. at St. Joseph's College, Naini Tal, India, and Rangoon Univ.; joined the service, 30th Sept., 1937; arrived in Burma, Nov., 1937, and served as asst. commr.; asst. supt., Kyaukme, Dec., 1940; training in office of acct.-genl., Punjab, Jan., 1943; civ. aff. serv., Jan., 1944; dep. commr., Oct., 1945.

MO MYIT, U, Burma C.S. (cl. I).—Apptd. on probn., Rangoon, exam. Jan., 1940; Serv. commenced 8th Apl., 1942; S.D.O. Victoria Point, Apl., 1946.

MOLONEY, JOHN EDMUND, C.I.E., (b. 24th Aug., 1886).—Apptd. to the late R.I.M. as asst. engr., from 1st Sept., 1911; held various engr. and ship surveyor appts., 1929-1938; apptd. ch. surveyor with the govt. of India, 31st July, 1938; promtd. engr. capt., R.I.N. (supernumerary) 30th Apl., 1938; C.I.E., June, 1946.

MONANI, MAHOMEDALI GULAMHUSAIN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 29th Oct., 1910).—Educ. at St. Xavier's High Sch., Bombay, St. Vincent's High Sch., Poona, Bombay Univ., and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; asst. judge (under trng.), Nov., 1939.

MONDAL, GOPI BALLAV, Indian Service of Engrs. (supgt. engr., Bengal) (b. 2nd Feb., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bengal, 7th Oct., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1931; confd., suptg. engr., Aug., 1944.

MONE, NARAYAN TRIMBAK, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 16th Apl., 1906).—Educ. at Univ. of Allahabad, Univ. of Nagpur, and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, 16th Dec., 1929, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; dep. commr., provl., July, 1941; dep. sec., govt. of India (food), June, 1943; again, Sept., 1944; sugar contr. for India, May, 1944.

MONG, Capt. SAO SAI, Burma Front. Serv. (b. 13th Nov., 1913).—Apptd., 1st Mar., 1946.

MONRO, ALEXANDER, C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 17th Feb., 1890).—Retd., March, 1939.*

MONRO, WALTER COLIN, late Indian Forest Service (United Provs.) (b. 27th Sept., 1888).—Retd., 27th Sept., 1943.†

MONTAGU, AINSLEY MARSHALL RENDALL,

C.I.E., A.M.I.C.E., A.M.I.M.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 6th Nov., 1891).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1914; on mil. duty from 24th March, 1915, to 11th May, 1920; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; secty. (tempy.), cent. board of irrign., May, 1931; ch. engr. and sec., Punjab p.w.d. (irrgn.), March, 1943; C.I.E., Jan., 1945.

MONTEATH, SIR DAVID TAYLOR, K.C.B., K.C.M.G., C.V.O., O.B.E., B.A., India and Burma Office (actg. perm. under-sec. of state for India and for Burma) (b. 7th Apr., 1887).—Educ. at Clifton Coll. and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. to Admiralty, Dec., 1910; junr. clerk, mil. dept., India Office, 5th Dec., 1911; transfed. to pol. dept., Nov., 1912; resdt. clerk, Apr., 1914, to Feb., 1915; on duty in mil. dept. from Oct., 1914; services tempy. lent to the Admiralty, Feb., 1915; on mil. service, 1918; O.B.E., Jan., 1918; pte. sec. to Lord Sinha, Apr., 1919; senr. clerk, pol. dept., Dec., 1919; princpl., Apr., 1921; actg. dep. clerk of the council, June, 1916; pte. sec. to sec. of state, Dec., 1927; actg. asst. secty., public and judl. dept., Apr., 1931; asst. secty., finl. dept., July, 1931; C.V.O., June, 1931; secty. to Burma round table conf., London, Dec., 1931; joint secty., milty. dept., Sept., 1934; asst. under-sec. of state for Burma, Apr., 1937; C.B., June, 1938; actg. under-secty. of state for Burma, June, 1940; ditto for India and for Burma, Jan., 1942; K.C.M.G., Jan., 1942; K.C.B., June, 1944.

MONTEATH, JOHN, B.A., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (b. 9th Oct., 1878).—Educ. at Clifton and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1901; arrived, 29th Nov., 1902, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag., and asst. to the collr. of Bombay and chief insp. of factories; asst. pol. agent, Kathiawar, March, 1908; 1st asst., Nov., 1909; municipal commr., Ahmedabad, Apr., 1915; offg. postmaster-genl., Punjab, Nov., 1915; ditto, Madras, June, 1916; confd., Sept., 1918; collr. and dist. mag., Dec., 1922; collr., dist. mag. and pol. agent, Nov., 1923, and again, July, 1928; sec. to govt., home and eccl. depts., Oct., 1926; member, legis. council, 1927 and 1932; offg. commr., Apr., 1932; C.I.E., Feb., 1937.

MONTFORD, (HORACE MOUTRIE, India Audit Office (suptg. exec. offcr.) (b. 4th June, 1900).—Apptd. asst. clerk, 14th Aug., 1919, after previous service from 24th Apr., 1918; second-class clerk, 29th Apr., 1920; transfed. to India audit office, March, 1922; exec. offcr., Apr., 1922; higher exec. offcr., Aug., 1933; suptg. ditto, March, 1936; loaned to min. of infm., Jan., 1944.

MONTGOMERY, ROBERT ERNEST, C.I.E., late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 9th July, 1878).—Retd., Sept., 1938.*

MOODIE, ADAM WILSON, O.B.E., M.A., B.Sc., late Indian Forest Service (Burma) (b. 17th May, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 16th Dec., 1911; dep. consvr., Dec., 1916; O.B.E., June, 1919; offg. consvr., Apr., 1933; confd. Nov., 1935; ch. consvr. (confd.), Feb., 1939; retd., Aug., 1941.

MOODY, BASIL, M.A., V.D., Indian State Rlys. (ch. optg. supt., N.W. Rly.) (b. 13th Oct., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 11th Jan., 1912; asst. dist. traffic supt., N.W. rly., Jan., 1922; offg. dist. ditto, Nov., 1923; offg. dep. dir. of traffic and statistics, rly. bd., Feb., 1926; divl. comml. officer, N.W. rly.,

Nov., 1929; offg. divl. supt., N.W. rly., Jan., 1934; confd., Nov., 1936; offg. secty., rly. bd., March, 1935, and again, Oct., 1936; ch. optg. supt., Jan., 1938; retd., Apr., 1945.

MOOKERJEE, BIJAN KUMAR (judge, high ct., Calcutta).—Apptd., July, 1939.

MOON, EDWARD PENDEREL, O.B.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 13th Nov., 1905).—Retd., Jan., 1944.†

MOONEY, HERBERT FRANCIS, C.I.E., O.B.E., Ind. For. Serv. (asst. consvr., Orissa) (b. 6th Nov., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., March, 1921; agency forest officer, Nov., 1923; forest advr., eastern states, Apr., 1935; O.B.E., June, 1939; C.I.E., June, 1946.

MOORE, C. S., Indian State Rlys. (b. 14th May, 1890).—Joined 1st Apr., 1927; supt., transpn., B.N. Rly., July, 1945.

MOORE, DENIS BENJAMIN, Indian Police (b. 21st March, 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bihar, on probn., Dec., 1937; confd., Oct., 1941; a.d.c. to govr., Orissa, March, 1940.

MOORE, ERNEST ARTHUR, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 21st Dec., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bengal, 4th Oct., 1924; exec. engr., Oct., 1933; tempy. suptg. engr., July, 1944.

MOORE, FREDERICK THOMAS, Office of High Commr. for India (exec. offcr., general dept.) (b. 17th Feb., 1897).—Apptd. tempy. clerk, India Office, Jan., 1920; transfed. to H.C.'s Office, Apr., 1922; clerical officer, Jan., 1924; exec. ditto, June, 1927.

MOORE, G. W. O. Indian State Rlys., (b. 25th Dec., 1901).—Joined 17th May, 1935; dep. ch. accts. offr., S.I. Rly., Jan., 1946.

MOORE, JAMES PATRICK, Indian Police (Madras) (b. 31st Oct., 1916).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Oct., 1939.

MOORE, JOHN RICHARD, Office of High Commr. for India (hr. exec. officer, store dept.) (b. 16th Jan., 1888).—Apptd. 2nd-class clerk, 4th Apr., 1908; transfed. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. officer, Apr., 1922; hr. ditto, Feb., 1938.

MOORE, LEONARD ALFRED JOHN, Office of High Commr. for India (exec. officer, general dept.) (b. 11th Oct., 1902).—Apptd. clerical officer, India office, 27th Apr., 1920, after previous service, from 25th Feb., 1918; transfed. to office of high commr. for India, Apr., 1922; exec. officer, Apr., 1924.

MOORE-GILBERT, SAMUEL MALCOLM, Indian Police (b. 22nd July, 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., Nov., 1938; confd., Mar., 1941.

MOORTHY RAO, SRINIVASARAO SRINIVASA, B.E. (Mech. Mysore), Indian Posts and Telegraphs (ch. electrician, wireless) (b. 21st Oct., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. div. engr., wireless (tempy.), 10th Nov., 1926; confd. div. engr., wireless, Apr., 1928; ch. elec., wireless, Mar. 1939; confd., Feb., 1946.

MOOS, PESTJONI NANABHAI, C.I.E., M.A., LL.B., Ind. C.S. (judge and sess. judge, Bombay) (b. 29th Aug., 1894).—Educ. at Elphinstone Coll., Bombay, and University Coll., London; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived 6th Jan., 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; doing duty as asst. judge, Aug., 1925; offg. judge and sess. judge, Apr., 1928; confd., Nov., 1929; sec. to govt. (legal), and remembrancer of legal affairs, Jan., 1941; C.I.E., June, 1946.

MOOS, SORAB NANABHOY, C.I.E., M.A.,

late Indian Educ. Service (b. 25th Sept., 1890).—Joined the service, 14th May, 1919; vice-princl., D.J. Sind College, May, 1919; inspr. of science teaching, Bombay presdy., Dec., 1925; offg. asst. dir. of public instrn., Apl., 1926; and again Sept. 1933; educ. inspr., Jan., 1927; offg. dep. dir. of public instrn., Mar., 1932; offg. dir., Nov., 1936; dep. dir., public instrn., Poona, Dec., 1937; dir. ditto, confd., Mar., 1940; C.I.E., Jan., 1943; retd., Sept., 1945.

MORAN, ARTHUR VIVIAN, late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 30th March, 1879).—Retd., March, 1939.*

MORAY, VISHWASRAO DINKARRAO, Indian Police (b. 11th May, 1914).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., 14th March, 1938; confd., Mar., 1940.

MORE, IAN ANDREW HANSON, Burma Office (actg. princpl., Burma office) (b. 14th Jan., 1915).—Educ. at Fettes Coll., Edinburgh, and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. asst. princpl., 11th Oct., 1938; served with H.M. Forces; actg. princpl., Jan., 1944 (in absentia); rejoined and posted to Burma Office, Apl., 1945.

MOREHEAD, FREDERICK THOMAS, O.B.E., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service, (consvr., Burma) (b. 30th June, 1885).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 18th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., July, 1925; O.B.E., June, 1932; civ. aff. serv., June, 1945; consvr. (confd.) Oct., 1945.

MORGAN, REV. BASIL IVOR, Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain) (b. 9th Dec., 1887).—Apptd. junr. chaplain, 16th Jan., 1922; senr. chaplain, Jan., 1932.

MORGAN, DAVID EVAN, India Office (exec. officer. acnt.-genl.'s dept.) (b. 4th March, 1917).—Apptd. exec. offr., 31st Aug., 1936; asst. editor, Indian & Burma office list, Aug., 1946.

MORGAN, DONALD LINDSEY, late Indian Police (b. 5th Nov., 1888).—Retd., May, 1937.*

MORGAN, FRANCIS DAVID PATERSON, Indian Police (asst. supt., Madras) (b. 14th Aug., 1914).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Madras, 22nd Nov., 1934; confd., Jan., 1937; a.d.c. to govt., March, 1940; served under pol. dept. of govt. of India from Jan., 1943; asst. pol. agt., Orissa States, Jan., 1946; under sec. to resdt. for Rajputana, June, 1946.

MORGAN, HUGH CAREY.—Apptd. solicitor to the govt. of Bengal, Apl., 1935; retd., 1938.

MORGAN, JOHN ANTHONY PATERSON, late Burma Police (cl. I) (b. 26th July, 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Nov., 1938; trans. to mily. dept., Oct., 1940; retd., June, 1943.

MORGAN, MAURICE DAVID, late Indian Police (Central Provs.) (b. 2nd Dec., 1889).—Retd., Oct., 1940.

MORGAN, PAUL ROBERT JAMES, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 1st Feb., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 6th Dec., 1920; offg. supt., Apl., 1925; confd., Aug., 1926; asst. inspr.-genl. (provl.), Jan., 1940.

MORLEY, ALEXANDER FRANCIS, B.A., Burma Office (asst. sec.) (b. 6th Jan., 1908).—Educated at Rugby and Queen's College, Oxford; apptd. asst. princpl., 20th Oct., 1930; pte. sec. to parly. under-sec. of state, Dec., 1933; actg. princpl. March, 1936, and posted to economic and overseas dept., Aug., 1936; advr. and sec. to Indian govt. del. to 21st and 22nd international lab. conf., 1936; advr., ditto, 23rd and 24th internatl. lab. conf., June, 1937, and June, 1938; confd. princpl., Oct., 1937; secty. to Indian del. to Brussels nine-power conf., Nov., 1937; lent to min. of

aircraft production, July, 1940, to March, 1942; actg. asst. sec., Burma Office, Dec., 1945.

MORLEY, WILLIAM PATRICK, late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 9th Aug., 1888).—Joined the service, Dec., 1905; proby. supt., Dec., 1912; confd., March, 1915; dep. post-master-genl., Jan., 1939; p.m.g., Oct., 1943; retd., Nov., 1943.

MORRIS, AUSTIN ROBERT, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Burma) (b. 7th Dec., 1885).—Retd., March, 1939.*

MORRIS, FREDERICK WILLIAM AUBREY, Indian C.S. (collr. and dist. mag., Madras) (b. 26th Aug., 1907).—Educ. at Cardiff High Sch., and Corpus Christi Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 17th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930; sub-collr., Aug., 1932, commercial tax officer, Madras, July, 1939; collr. and dist. mag., Nov., 1941.

MORRIS, HENRY FRANCIS, M.A., Burma C.S. (cl. I) (b. 12th Feb., 1918).—Educ. Cheltenham Coll. and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. on probn. after seln., Aug., 1946.

MORRIS, JAMES ARCHIBALD, A.M.I.M.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 26th Sept., 1888).—Joined the serv. 1st Jan., 1924; asst. wks. mangr., E.I. rly, Nov., 1932; wks. mangr., Aug., 1934; retd., Sept., 1944.

MORRIS, RALPH CLARENCE, C.M.G., late Indian Police (Burma) (b. 10th March, 1889).—Retd., 10th March, 1944.†

MORRIS, WILLIAM HERBERT, M.B.E. (b. 17th March, 1894).—Joined Mint Service as asst. engr., Nov., 1912; head engr., Oct., 1930; dep. mint master (tempy), 3rd Jan., 1941.

MORRISON, ROBERT VICTOR, M.D., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., retd., late Burma Medl. Dept. (b. 1st Sept., 1887).—Retd., 1st Sept., 1942.†

MORSE, HENRY MERRET RAVENSBURY, Indian State Rlys. (dep. ch. mechl. engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 31st May, 1893).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 5th Oct., 1915; divl. rolling stock offcr., Dec., 1927; offg. supt., workshops, N.W. rly., March, 1936; and again, March, 1937; dep. ch. mechl. engr., provl., Nov., 1940; dep. ch. optg. supt., May, 1944.

MORTLOCK, REV. ARTHUR GEORGE, late Indian Eccles. Estabt.—Retd., Apl., 1941.†

MORTON, A. F., THE REV., Burma Eccles. Estabt. (b. 2nd March, 1908).—Apptd. chaplain, on probn., 5th Oct., 1940.

MORTON, JOHN PERCIVAL, O.B.E., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 15th May, 1911).—Joined service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, 24th Nov., 1930; confd., Nov., 1932; Ind. police medal, Sept., 1935; bar, Sept., 1940; O.B.E., June, 1946.

MORTON, KENNETH VALENTINE FREELAND, Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 13th May, 1907).—Educ. at Edinburgh Academy and University Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 14th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under-secty. to govt., Punjab, pol. and home depts., Nov., 1934, to Oct., 1936; colonization offr., Apl., 1938; dep. commr. (sub provl.), Nov., 1941; dep. sec., devl. dept., Apl., 1943.

MORTON, W. E., M.B.E., Impl. Sectt. Serv. (b. 9th Sept., 1893).—Joined the serv., 6th Sept., 1914; asst. fincl. advr., mil. fin., Apl., 1929; M.B.E., Jan., 1946.

MOSELY, SIR ARCHIE GERARD, late Indian C.S. (b. 6th March, 1883).—Retd., March, 1943.†

MOSS, CHARLES HENRY DE VERE, O.B.E., Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 30th Oct.,

1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, 16th June, 1923; offg. supt., Apl., 1929; confd., July, 1933; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931; O.B.E., June, 1941; princpl., trng. sch., Nasik; Sept., 1936, to June, 1939; again from Oct., 1945.

MOSS, ERIC DE VERE, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 13th Apl., 1896).—Educ. at Dulwich Coll., and Victoria Coll., Jersey; joined the service, 15th Oct., 1923, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., Oct., 1925; asst. commr., Apl., 1926; offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1926; offg. secty., bd. of rev., United Provs., March, 1932; mag. and collr., Dec., 1934; C.I.E., Jan., 1943; sec. to govt., indus. dept., and war prodn. commr., Apl., 1943.

MOTI LAL, AGGARWAL, LALA, Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 7th Jan., 1906) (asst. exec. engr., Punjab).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 19th Nov., 1927; proby. asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1929.

MOTI RAM, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 16th Feb., 1897).—Joined the service, 19th Nov., 1920, as apprentice engr.; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1922; offg. exec. engr., May, 1928; confd., Jan., 1931; p.a. to ch. engr. and under-secty. to govt. (I.B.), July, 1937; suptg. engr., Nov., 1940.

MOUNTAIN, MICHAEL HAROLD, Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 14th Aug., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Oct., 1939.

MOWBRAY, ROBERT, C.I.E., M.A., India Office (rly. adviser and govt. dir. of Indian rly. companies) (b. 31st March, 1877).—Educ. at Manchester Gr. Sch. and Brasenose Coll., Oxford (scholar, 1896–1900; Green prize, 1905); apptd. junr. clerk, acctnt.-genl.'s dept., India Office, 29th Oct., 1900; joint editor of India Office List, Nov., 1907 to July, 1913; assessor of income-tax, March, 1910 to June, 1917; senr. clerk, July, 1913; clerk to the commrs. of income-tax, Oct., 1920; principal, Apl., 1921; actg. dep. clerk of Council, 1st Dec., 1928; confd., Feb., 1931; rly. adviser and govt. dir. of Indian rly. companies, June, 1931; member, Indian staty. rly. bd. cttee., June, 1933; ret'd., June, 1945; C.I.E., Jan., 1945.

MOWDUDUR RAHMAN, B.A., Barr., Bengal High Judl. Dept.—Joined the service as judge, Calcutta small cause ct., 14th Jan., 1923.

MOYNIHAN, MARTIN JOHN, M.A. (Oxon), India Office (principal) (b. 17th Feb., 1916).—Educ. at Birkenhead Sch. and Magdalen Coll., Oxford; apptd. asst. principal, 27th Feb., 1939; served with H.M. Forces to Nov., 1945; actg. princpl., Nov., 1945; on loan to Treasury, serving with high commr. for U.K. in India, 1st Oct., 1946.

MOZAFFAR, M. A., Indian Audit and Accts. Serv.—Apptd. under sec. govt. of India, fin. dept., Apl., 1945.

MRA, MAUNG SHWE, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 18th Feb., 1910).—Educ. at National High Sch., Akyab, Rangoon Univ., and Christ Church, Oxford; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty., educ. dept., Apl., 1938; addl. dy. contrl. of finance (defence) June, 1941; served with def. and ext. aff. dept., Aug., 1946.

MUAZZAM HUSSAIN KHAN, M.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 1st Sept., 1903).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 1st July,

1928; confd., Feb., 1931; supt. (temp.), May, 1936.

MUBAYI, P. N. (v. 31st Dec., 1901).—Joined the serv., as asst. exec. engr. Oct., 1924; exec. engr. (Jr. Sc.) Feb., 1935; supt. Way and Works (provl.) Mar., 1943; confd., Dec., 1945.

MUDALIAR, SIR RAMASWAMI, K.C.S.I., Diwan Bahadur (b. 14th Oct., 1897).—Memb. legis. council, Madras, 1920–26; member, council of state, 1930; member, Indian legislative assembly, 1931–34; member, round table conference, all sessions, and federal structure committee; member, Indian franchise committee; member, special textile tariff board; member, council of India, July, 1936; Kt., Feb., 1937; adviser to secty. of state for India, Apl., 1937; member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, May, 1939; K.C.S.I., June, 1942; reptive., govt. of India, imp. war cabinet and Pacific war cl., Aug., 1942 to July, 1945; supply member, govr.-genl.'s exec. cl., Aug., 1943 to July, 1946.

MUDIE, SIR ROBERT FRANCIS, K.C.S.I., K.C.I.E., O.B.E., Indian C.S. (govr. of Sind) (b. 24th Aug., 1890).—Educ. at Fettes Coll., and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 1st Nov., 1915; on mil. duty with territorials to Apl., 1919; asst. mag. and collr., United Provs., Apl., 1919; O.B.E., June, 1919; joint mag., Dec., 1920; dep. commr. of income-tax, Dec., 1921; offg., dep. commr., March, 1922; special rent officer in addn., July, 1924; offg. mag. and collr., Oct., 1925; confd., May, 1932; offg. dep. sec. to govt., rev. dept., Apl., 1926; offg. settlement offcr., Oct., 1926; jt. secty., Indian round table conf., London Nov., 1930–Jan., 1931; C.I.E., June, 1935; on spl. duty with rly. bd., Apl., 1936; mag. and collr., Dec., 1937; rev. sec. to govt., United Provs., Apl., 1938; chief ditto, Nov., 1939 to Nov., 1941; C.S.I., Jan., 1941; actg. govr. of Bihar, Sept., 1943 to Jan., 1944; home member, govr.-genl.'s exec. cl. July, 1944; K.C.I.E., June, 1944; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1946; govr. of Sind, Jan., 1946.

MUEENUDDIN, GHULAM, Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 6th May, 1906).—Educ. at Aitchison Coll., Lahore, Punjab Univ., and Oxford Univ.; joined the service, 13th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., variously, from May, 1935; to Apl., 1937; colonization offr., Apl., 1938; rev. sec. to fin. commrs., Sept., 1941; dep. commr. (sub-provl.) Dec., 1941; dir. of panchayats, Apl., 1945; dir.-genl. of civil supplies and addl. sec., civil supplies, dept., June, 1946.

MUHAMMAD ABDUL AZIZ (see Abdul Aziz, M.).

MUHAMMAD ABDUL GHANI ANSARI, B.A., LL.B., Income Tax Dept., United Provs. (asst. commr.) (b. 19th Oct., 1890).—Joined the service as proby. dep. collr., 23rd May, 1913; confd., May, 1915; inc.-tax offr., May, 1926; asst. commr., July, 1927.

MUHAMMAD ABDUL HAMID, SHAIKH, Khan Bahadur, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 16th Sept., 1897).—Joined the service, 6th Nov., 1921; asst. engr., Nov., 1922; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1923; on depn. to Bahawalpur state, Apl., 1930; exec. engr., Nov., 1931; under-sec. to Govt., Apl., 1937; proftr., Punjab coll. of engrg., Jan., 1944 to March, 1944; offr. on spec. duty irrign. secretariat, Feb., 1946; dep. sec. to govt., P.W.D. (irrign.), March, 1946.

MUHAMMAD ABDUL KHALIK, B.A., K.B., late Indian Police (Bengal) (b. 25th Jan., 1886).—Retd., Jan., 1941.

MUHAMMAD ABDUL MAJID, KHAN SAHIB, Khwaja, M.B.E., B.A., late Punjab C.S. (b. 24th Aug., 1884).—Retd., Aug., 1939.*

MUHAMMAD ABDULLAH, KHAN SAHIB HAFIZ, CHAUDHRI, late Punjab Agric. Service (b. Oct., 1885).—Retd., Oct., 1940.†

MUHAMMAD ABDULLAH, SYED, B.A., (dist. and sess. judge, Punjab) (b. 22nd Jan., 1892).—Held non-gaz. appts. Oct., 1916 to Mar., 1921; munsif, Apl., 1921; sub-judge, Jan., 1923; offg. and addl. dist. and sess. judge, ditto, (permt.) July, 1945.

MUHAMMED ABDUR RAHMAN, Sir (see Abdur Rahman, Sir Muhammed).

MUHAMMAD ABOO ABDULLAH, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 1st Sept., 1905). Apptd. proby. asst. supt., Bengal, 6th Feb., 1930; confd., Apl., 1932; asst. dir., intell. bureau, home dept., June, 1938.

MUHAMMED, ABU ZAFAR, see Zafar, M.A., MUHAMMAD, APZAL HUSSAIN, M.Sc. (Punjab), M.A. (Cantab.), Dept. of Agric., Punjab (entomologist to govt., Punjab) (b. 10th March, 1889).—Joined the service, 6th Jan., 1919; entomologist to govt., Punjab, Sept., 1919; ditto and princpl., Punjab agric. coll., Lyallpur, Apl., 1933.

MUHAMMAD AHMAD, (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 25th Sept., 1893).—Joined the U.P. civil (exec.) serv., 1st Nov., 1917; mag. and collr. (confd.) Dec., 1944.

MUHAMMAD, AHMAD SAID KHAN (see Ahmad, S. K. M.).

MUHAMMAD AKRAM KHAN, KHWATA, B.A., late Indian Police (b. 15th May, 1884).—Retd., May, 1939.†

MUHAMMAD ALI KHAN, Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 1st Sept., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 15th June, 1924; offg. supt., Apl., 1932, and again, Feb., 1933; supt., Apl., 1937.

MUHAMMAD ANWAR ALI, Indian Police (b. 1st Nov., 1906).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, 14th Jan., 1930; confd., Jan., 1932.

MUHAMMAD ASLAM KHAN, NAWABZADA, Indian Polit. Serv., (b. 11th Mar., 1925).—Asst. pol. agt. Zhob., Dec., 1944; ditto, Zhob., July, 1945; on for serv., in Kalat State, Sept., 1945.

MUHAMMAD AZAM, KHAN, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 3rd Feb., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., N.W.F.P., 1st Oct., 1924; exec. engr., Oct., 1933; on depn. to central P.W.D., June, 1945.

MUHAMMAD AZIM HUSAIN, B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 5th Oct., 1918).—Educated at Model Central School, Lahore, Punjab University and Christ's College, Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Sept.; arrived in India, Dec., 1937, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr. dir. of panchayats, June, 1941; under sec. to govt. of India, def. dept., Sept., 1942; ditto, infm. and broadcasting, Oct., 1944; dep. sec., govt. of India, infm. and arts. dept., Dec., 1945.

MUHAMMAD, AZFAR, O.B.E., B.A., LL.B., Ind. C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 1st Apl., 1909).—Educ. at the Queen's Intermediate Coll., Benares, Allahabad Univ. and Jesus Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to Orissa, March, 1940; dir. of dev. and elections offr., 1941; dep. sec. home dept.,

publicity offr., 1941 to Apl., 1942; sec. health and local-self govt. dept., 1945; O.B.E., Jan., 1946.

MUHAMMAD, BAKHSH ILLAHI BAKHSH, Sardar Bahadur (Sind), (b. 1st Aug., 1891).—Joined, 19th Sept., 1917; served in Sind as proby. dep. collr., May, 1918; confd. May, 1920; settlmt. offr., Nov., 1936; collr. (confd.) Aug., 1941; Sardar Bahadur, Jan., 1946.

MUHAMMAD BAZL-UL-LAH SAHIB, Sir Khan Bahadur, B.A., C.I.E., O.B.E., late Madras Civil Service (b. 31st Jan., 1875).—Retd. 30th Jan., 1935.*

MUHAMMAD DIAM ALI BAKHSH, SIDIKI, Khan Bahadur (Sind), (b. 11th Sept., 1893).—Joined, Mar., 1913; dep. collr. (2nd gr.), Nov., 1938; genl. asst. to rev. commr., Sept., 1938; and again, Mar., 1939; sec. to govt., genl. dept., Sept., 1943; genl. asst. to rev. commr. and ex-officio asst. sec. to govt., rev. dept., Jan., 1944; sec. to govt., educn., health and local self-govt. dept., Aug., 1945.

MUHAMMAD EHSANUR RAHMAN, B.A., Impl. Customs Service (collr.) (b. 15th Sept., 1896).—Joined the service, 17th Jan., 1917; asst. collr., March, 1923; offg. collr., Oct., 1934; and again, Apl., 1937; collr. (confd. provl.), Oct., 1944.

MUHAMMAD FAKHAR-UD-DIN, MIAN, late Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 28th July, 1889).—Joined Oct., 1913, as asst. engr.; asst. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1922; under-secty. to govt., irrign. branch, Apl., 1928; retd., 28th July, 1944.

MUHAMMAD, GHULAM, see Ghulam, M. MUHAMMAD, GUL (see Gul Muhammad).

MUHAMMAD HABIBULLAH, Sir Sahib Badahur, K.C.S.I., K.C.I.E.—Apptd. member of exec. council, Madras, 17th Dec., 1920; knighted, June, 1922; member of royal commn. on the superior public services in India, 1923-24; K.C.I.E., June, 1924; member of govr.-genl.'s exec. council, 31st Dec., 1924 to 31st March, 1930; K.C.S.I., June, 1927.

MUHAMMAD HUMAYUN, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A. late Madras Civil Service, (b. 4th Aug., 1886).—Offg. dep. collr., November 1918; confd. July, 1921; sub-collr., March, 1937; retd., Aug., 1941.

MUHAMMAD HUSAIN, KHWAJA, B.A., Indian Police (dist. supt., Central Provs.) (b. 18th March, 1897).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., 14th June, 1920; offg. dist. supt., Feb., 1924; confd., March, 1928; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., July, 1946.

MUHAMMAD IBRAHIM, Mian, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 7th June, 1899).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 15th Oct., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. exec. engr., Sept., 1933; confd., Oct., 1933; retd., May, 1945.

MUHAMMAD IDRIS, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal).—Joined, 13th May, 1939; confd., May, 1941.

MUHAMMAD, INAMULLAH KHAN, Khan Bahadur, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 7th Aug., 1908).—Joined the serv. as asst. exec. engr., Bihar and Orissa, on probn., 4th Apl., 1932; confd., Aug., 1933; on depn. to cent. P.W.D., exec. engr., May, 1942.

MUHAMMAD INAMUR RAHIM (see Rahim, M. I.).

MUHAMMED ISHAQ BADRUDDIN, Khan Sahib (Sind) (b. 1st Oct., 1894).—Joined the serv., 16th Jan., 1924; city mag., Hyderabad, July, 1941; dep. collr., Aug., 1941; asst. provincial

press advr., Dec., 1941; city dep. collr. and asst. supt., stamps, Mar., 1942; rent contr., June, 1945; administrator, Hyderabad, municip., June, 1946.

MUHAMMAD ISMAIL, B.Sc., A.M.I.E.S., Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Punjab (b. Nov., 1901).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 4th July, 1927; apptd. to I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., Punjab, July, 1931.

MUHAMMAD ISMAIL, Khan Bahadur, Barr.-at-Law (late judge high court, Allahabad).—Apptd., Aug., 1937; retd., June, 1944.

MUHAMMAD JAMIL SYED, M.A., LL.B., Indian Audit Dept. (b. Feb., 1900).—Joined the service, 26th Feb., 1926; currency officer., Madras, March, 1931; asst. acct. genl., United Provs., Jan., 1937; asst. acct.-genl., posts and telegraphs, Delhi, Oct., 1938; dep. comptr., Sind, Oct., 1940; accts. officer., E.I. Rly., Nov., 1941.

MUHAMMAD KHAN, SAHIBZADA SARDAR, Bombay C.S. (collr. and dist. mag.) (b. 22nd May, 1886).—Joined the service as proby. dep. collr., 28th Aug., 1910; confd., June, 1913; offg. dep. commr., Feb., 1929; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Apl., 1930; confd., Dec., 1931.

MUHAMMAD MOOSA KHAN, Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., retd., late Jail Dept., Madras (b. 3rd Oct., 1887).—First commn., dated 8th Dec., 1915; in milty. employ to 27th July, 1925; supt., central jail, Clannanore, June, 1928; ditto, Vellore, June, 1931; supt. of the penitentiary, Madras, Jan., 1938; seln. grade, June, 1941; on mil. duty, July, 1941; retd., Oct., 1943.

MUHAMMAD NUR, Sir KHWAJA, C.B.E., KHAN BAHADUR, late Judl. dept., Bihar.—Apptd. dep. president, legislative council, 8th Aug., 1922; president, ditto, 21st Nov., 1922; C.B.E., March, 1929; judge, high ct., Oct., 1930; knighted, Feb., 1937; retd., Sept., 1939*; apptd. chmn., jt. publ. serv. commn. for Bihar, C.P. and Berar, and Orissa, Jan., 1940.

MUHAMMAD SALEH AKBAR HYDARI, Sir, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., Indian C.S. (b. 12th Oct., 1894).—Educ. at Bombay Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1919; arrived, 9th Feb., 1920, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Jan., 1922; offg. under-sec. to govt., development dept., Madras, Oct., 1923; under-sec., govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, June 1924; offg. dep. sec. ditto, Nov., 1925; agent to govt. of India in Ceylon, Oct., 1927; secty. to impl. council of agricl. research, June, 1929; secty. to the state delegation to the round table conf., from the Hyderabad state, July, 1931 to Jan., 1932; dep. secty., govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, Apl., 1932; secty. to the state delegation to the round table conf., from the Hyderabad state, Oct., 1932 to Nov., 1933; offg. jt. secty. to govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, June, 1934; confd., Oct., 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1935; collr. (provl. subs.), Oct., 1935; confd., Oct., 1936; offg. secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, Apl. to Sept., 1937; secty. to govt. of India, dept. of labour, May, 1938; repres. of India on eastern group supply council, Feb., 1941; C.S.I., June, 1941; K.C.I.E., June, 1944; infm. and arts memb. (temp.), the Viceroy's exec. council, Oct., 1945; lab., wks., mines and power, infm. and arts member, ditto, July to Sept., 1946; govr. designate of Assam, Jan., 1947.

MUHAMMAD SANA ULLAH, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., M.Sc., F.C.S., Archaeological Survey

Dept. (b. 16th Nov., 1886).—Apptd. archæological chemist in India, 29th June, 1917.

MUHAMMAD SHAHAB-UD-DIN, B.A., B.L. Indian C.S. (puisne judge, hg. ct., Madras) (b. 13th May, 1895).—Educ. at Madras Christian College and Law College; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 2nd Jan., 1922, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., June, 1925; on judl. training at Salem, July, 1929; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1931; confd., Jan., 1935; addl. judge, high ct., Feb., 1943; puisne judge, Madras, high ct., Oct., 1945.

MUHAMMAD SHARIFF, SHAIKH, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 23rd Nov., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1919; asst. exec., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1931.

MUHAMMAD SIRAJUDDIN SAHIB, M.A., B.L., Ind. Police (dist. supt.) (b. 7th June, 1904).—Joined the serv. as proby. asst. supt., Madras, 14th June, 1930; confd., June, 1932; confd. as dist. supt., Oct., 1944; supt. of police, govt. rly. office, Madras.

MUHAMMAD SULAIMAN, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (addl. ch. engr., Central P.W.D.) (b. 5th June, 1892).—Joined the service, 1st Sept., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. exec. engr., March, 1926; confd., Oct., 1929; offg. suptg. engr., Aug., 1936; confd., July, 1940; addl. ch. engr., Aug., 1942.

MUHAMMAD USMAN, Sir, Sahib Bahadur, Khan Bahadur, K.C.S.I., K.C.I.E., (b. 1884).—Apptd. memb. of govr.'s exec. cl., Madras, 30th March, 1925; Kt., June, 1928; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1933; actg. govr. of Madras, May to Aug., 1934; memb., nat. def. council, July, 1941; posts and air memb., govr.-genl.'s exec. council, July, 1942 to July, 1946; K.C.S.I., June, 1945.

MUHAMMAD, WALI (see Wali Muhammad). MUHAMMAD, YACOB AGHA, B.A., (Sind) (b. 1st July, 1904).—Joined, Apl., 1927; dep. collr., Oct., 1944; rev. asst. to rev. commr. and asst. sec. to govt. rev. dept.

MUHAMMAD ZAHIRUDDIN AHMAD FARUQI (see Zahiruddin, A. F. M.).

MUHSIN ALI, B.A., M.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 10th Aug., 1888).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1912; asst. engr., Nov., 1912; exec. engr., Oct., 1921; prof. of civil engrg., Thomason Coll., Roorkee, Oct., 1928; offg. suptg. engr., March, 1935; confd., Dec., 1939; retd., 10th Aug., 1943.

MUIR, DAVID IAN RENNIE, O.B.E., Indian Civil Service (collr., Madras) (b. 11th Feb., 1903).—Educ. at George Watson's Coll., Univ. of Edinburgh, and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., July, 1932; jt. secty., bd. of rev., Madras, Apl., 1936; secty. to high commr. for India in Union of S. Africa, Nov., 1940 to Dec., 1943; O.B.E., June, 1943; secty. post-war reconstrn. dept., Aug., 1944; jt. sec. to govt. of India, def. dept., Sept., 1945 reverted to Madras, collr., May, 1946.

MUIR, GEORGE BASIL FAIRLIE, late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 29th Aug., 1882).—Retd., Feb., 1938.*

MUIRHEAD, ALEXANDER KERSHAW, late Indian State Rlys.—Retd., Aug., 1941.†

MUIRHEAD, Brig. J. I., C.I.E., M.C.—Apptd. pers. asst. to sec. mil. dept., India Office, Feb., 1945 to Mar., 1947.

MUKERJEE, AMULLYA CHARAN, Rai Baha-

dur, B.Sc., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 20th Feb., 1885).—Retd., Feb., 1940.†

MUKERJI, BHARMADEVA, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 30th Oct., 1912).—Educ. at Govt. Intermediate Coll., Allahabad, and Allahabad Univ., joined the service, 21st Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in B. & O. as asst. mag. and collr.; posted to Orissa, May, 1938; under-sec. to govt., Apl., 1942; dep. contr. supply dept. and dep. sec. ditto, Apl, 1943; dep. sec. home and fin. depts., July, 1945.

MUKERJI, PARESH NATH, Rai Bahadur, C.B.E., M.A., late India Posts and Tels. (b. 22nd Dec., 1882).—Retd., Apl., 1939.*

MUKERJI, TARANANDA, M.B., D.P.H. (Port Health Officer, Chittagong) (b. 1st Oct., 1893); joined present post, 26th June, 1928.

MUKHARJEE, BASANTA KUMAR, M.B.E., late Bengal civ. serv. (b. 31st May, 1889).—Chief refugee administrator, Burma refugee org., under govt. of India (Bengal), Aug., 1944; M.B.E., 1944; also protector of immigrants, Calcutta, Apl., 1946.

MUKHDUM, NURUDDIN MUHAMMAD ANWAR SIDIKI, B.A. (Sind) (b. 19th June, 1892).—Joined, 1st Nov., 1915; dist. dep. collr. (1st gr.) Oct., 1930; regr. co-op. societies, Apl., 1936; manager, encumbered estates, (confd.) Dec., 1938.

MUKHARJI, ABHAHAPADA, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bihar (b. 1st Dec., 1899)).—Educ. at Patna Univ. and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 16th Dec., 1924, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, March, and again Nov., 1932; dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1935.

MUKHARJI, AMULYA CHANDRA. O.B.E., B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 5th March, 1898).—Joined the service, 29th Oct., 1921; offg. exec. engr., Apl., 1927; confd., Jan., 1932; suptg. engr. (temp.), July, 1943; O.B.E., Jan., 1945.

MUKHARJI, ASHUTOSH, M.A., late Indian Educ. Service (b. 16th Apl., 1885).—Retd., Apl., 1940.

MUKHARJI, BHABANI CAHRAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (commr., Orissa) (b. 1st August, 1901).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Oxford (non-collegiate) joined the service, 28th Oct., 1925; arrived, 6th Dec., 1925, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt. finl. dept., Sept., 1929; addl. under-sec. to govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, July, 1931; offg. dep. commr., May, 1932; offg. mag. and collr., Sept., 1932; and again, March, 1933; offg. dep. secty. to govt., pol. and appts. depts., July, 1935; secty., local self-govt. dept., Bihar, March, 1939 to Oct., 1939; mag. and collr., 1939; sec. local self-govt. dept., Aug., 1942; commr. and dist. mag., Jan., 1944; commr., Apl., 1945; sec. L.S.G. dept., Apl., 1946; under Orissa, from Aug., 1946.

MUKHARJI, BONBEHARI, B.A., Rai Bahadur, Indian Police (sup. (b. 29th Jan., 1887)).—Joined the service, 1910; confd., as supt., Bengal, Oct., 1937; dep. commr. of police, Calcutta; awarded King's police medal, 1919.

MUKHARJI, CHARU CHANDRA, O.B.E., B.A., Rai Bahadur, late Bihar Civil Service (b. 18th Nov., 1882).—Retd., March, 1938.*

MUKHARJI, NIRMAL KUMAR, M.A., Indian C.S. (b. 9th Jan., 1921).—Educ. at Delhi Univ.;

apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1943, and served in Punjab.

MUKHARJI, SATISH CHANDRA, B.A., late Bihar C.S. (b. 3rd Nov., 1881).—Retd., March, 1937.*

MUKHARJI, UPANANDA, M.A., Indian Police (b. 21st Dec., 1909).—Joined the service as asst. supt. of police, Bengal, on probn., 12th March, 1934; confd., Feb., 1936; addl. supt., Apl., 1940; King's police medal, 1943.

MUKHERJEA, ARUN KUMAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 20th Jan., 1915).—Educ. at Zillah Sch., Mymensingh, Calcutta Univ. and London Sch. of Oriental Studies, apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 5th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Sept., 1938, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1939; jt. magt. and dep. collr., Nov., 1939; dep. contr., rationing, May, 1944; settlement offr., Bakarganj, Nov., 1945.

MUKERJEE, J. N., C.B.E., D.Sc., (b. 23rd Apl., 1893).—Joined the serv. as director, Imp. Agric. Research Inst., 15th Oct., 1945.

MUKERJEE, PRASANTA CHANDRA, M.A. (Cantab.) (b. 30th Oct., 1904).—Joined the serv. 26th Nov., 1925 as asst. engr. (temp.) E.I. rly.; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1927; exec. engr., Jan., 1936; supt. staff (senr.) May, 1939; personal offr. ditto, Mar., 1940; on spec. duty, Aug., 1940; dep. dir. engrg. (civil) Aug., 1940; dir. civil engrg., Nov., 1942; dep. dir. genl., Oct., 1945.

MUKERJEE, PHANINDRA MOHAN, Rai Sahib, M.A., (b. 9th Dec., 1896).—Joined the serv. 15th July, 1921; held non-gaz. appts. to Sept., 1941; asst. sec. commerce dept., govt. of India, May, 1941; under sec. ditto, Mar., 1944; second sec. cent. bd. of rev. and ex officio under sec. govt. of India fin., dept. Apl., 1944; under sec., ditto, Nov., 1944; asst. sec., ditto, Sept., 1945; dep. ch. contr. imports, July, 1946.

MUKHERJEE, R. S. A. C., Imp. Sectt. Serv. (b. 25th Apl., 1894).—Joined the service, 11th Dec., 1916; asst. fincl. advr. mil. fin., Apl., 1940.

MUKHERJI, ATUL KUMAR, Imperial Cust. Serv. (b. 29th Dec., 1916).—Joined as asst. collr. of customs (on probn.), Aug., 1941.

MUL CHAND BIJAWAT, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 15th Jan., 1886).—Joined the service, 13th Oct., 1909; asst. engr., Oct., 1910; exec. engr., Oct., 1918; under-sec. to govt. p.w.d., United Provs., Feb., 1931; offg. suptg. engr., July, 1934; confd., Nov., 1937; profir. civ. engrg., Thom. Coll., Roorkee, Oct., 1939; retd. from I.S.E., 13th Jan., 1941; re-empld., Jan., 1941.

MULK RAJ, CHOPRA, LALA, Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 18th Aug., 1906).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 24th July, 1930; apptd. to I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., Punjab, July 1933; exec. engr., July, 1940; served under cent. govt., Dec., 1942; addtl. under-sec., govt. Punjab, Sept., 1944; under sec. to govt., P.W.D. (irrign.), Apl., 1945.

MULKANI, GOPALDAS GURBOMAL, M.A., LL.B., Judl. Dept., Bombay (asst. judge) (b. 20th Nov., 1889).—Joined the service, 1st Apl., 1918; asst. judge, Dec., 1934; offg. dist. and sess. judge, variously, from May, 1934.

MULKY, M. A., (b. 13th Sept., 1908).—Joined the serv., 1st Aug., 1942; held non-gaz. appt. to Apl., 1944; research offr. Apl., 1944; ch. ditto, Dec., 1944; addl. under sec., govt. of India, comm. dept., Aug., 1945.

MULLA, T. N. (see Tej Narayan Mulla).

MULLAN, CHARLES SEYMOUR, C.I.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. 17th June, 1893).—Educ. at Trinity Coll., Dublin; on mil. service from Nov., 1915; joined the service, 7th Oct., 1919; served in Assam as asst. commr., from 4th Dec., 1919; presdnt., Manipur durbar, June, 1921 to Sept., 1922; offg. under-sec. to govt. of Assam, May, 1924; confd., Jan., 1925; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1929; and again, March, 1933; provincial census supt., Assam, Apl., 1930; commr. of excise, etc., Assam, Nov., 1933; dep. commr., Apl., 1935; reform officer and addl. secty. to govt., Assam, March, 1935; secty. educn. and local self-govt. depts., Apl., 1937; commr. of inc.-tax, Sept., 1939; member centr. bd. rev., Sept., 1941–Oct., 1941; C.I.E., June, 1942.

MULLEN, NORMAN ARTHUR JOHN, Indian Police (asst. supt., Burma) (b. 15th Aug., 1909).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, 1st Dec., 1930; confd., June, 1933; civ. aff. serv. to Dec., 1945.

MULLICK, SUKUMAR, B.A., B.L., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 27th Oct., 1916).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn. in 1940, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

MULLINGS, SIR CLEMENT TUDWARD, C.S.I., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Madras) (b. 9th Apl., 1874).—Retd. July, 1929.*

MUMTAZ HASAN, Ind. Aud. and Accts. Serv. (b. 6th Aug., 1907).—Joined the serv., 6th Mar., 1931; dep. fincl. advr., mil. fin. Dec., 1943.

MUNDLE, INDU BHUSAN, B.A. late Indian C.S. (b. 12th June, 1881).—Retd., Dec., 1940.†
MUNIR, MUHAMMAD (judge, high ct., Lahore).—Apptd., July, 1943.

MUNISHWAR CHAND, LALA, Rai Bahadur, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 28th Sept., 1891).—Joined the service, 2nd Dec., 1916; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1931; under-sec. to govt., irrign. bch., Punjab, Feb., 1935 to March, 1937.

MUNN, JAMES, Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 27th July, 1920).—Educ. at High Sch. of Stirling and Glasgow Univ.; apptd. on probn. after seln., in June, 1941, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; under sec. supply and price contr. dept., Oct., 1944.

MUNN, NAPIER (see Napier-Munn).

MUNRO, ALEXANDER SINCLAIR, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 4th Sept., 1910).—Educ. at Edinburgh Academy and University Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., March, 1937.

MUNRO, CHARLES ALEXANDER, late Public Works Dept., Punjab (b. 14th Aug., 1889).—Joined the service as inspr. of draglines, 29th March, 1928; exec. engr., dragline divn., Oct., 1933; retd., 14th Aug., 1944.

MUNRO, DONALD GEORGE, B.Sc., late Indian Agric. Service (b. 4th Apl., 1895).—Retd., Dec., 1938.†

MUNRO, JOHN BENNETT LORIMER, late Indian C.S. (Madras) (b. 20th May, 1905).—Retd., June, 1939.*

MUNRO, J. (b. 22nd Aug., 1900).—Apptd. inspr. of stores, Ind. Stores Dept., Apl., 1926; dep. dir.-gen. (disposals) July, 1946.

MUNSEY, SYDNEY THOMAS HENSMAN, C.I.E. B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs.

(United Provs.) (b. 12th Oct., 1889).—Retd., 11th Oct., 1944.†

MURDOCH, JAMES DUNCAN, O.B.E., M.B., Ch.B.(N.Z.), F.R.C.S.(Edin.), Maj., I.M.S. (profr. obst. etc., Patna medl. coll.) (b. 19th Sept., 1900).—Date of first commn., 1st Feb., 1933; granted an ante-date of one year, civil employ in Orissa from 12th May, 1939; profr. of obstetrics, Orissa medl. sch. Bihar, Dec., 1939; O.B.E., June, 1946.

MURISON, TAYLOR DAVID, Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., retd. (b. 7th Nov., 1882).—Retd., Nov., 1937.*

MURPHY, ALLAN FRANCIS, Survey of India, Supt. (b. 25th Oct., 1891).—Proby. extra asst. supt., Nov., 1910; confd. Nov., 1913; on duty to Persian Survey Party, Nov., 1916 to Jan., 1918; Mesopotamia, ditto, Sept., 1918 to Dec., 1919; on for. serv., various dates from Jan., 1920 to May, 1933; supt. confd., Dec., 1942.

MURPHY, GERALD PATRICK, C.I.E., Lieut.-Col., I.A., retd., late Indian Political Service (b. 8th May, 1888).—Retd., Nov., 1943.†

MURPHY, RAYMOND CLIVE, Capt., I.A. (b. 4th May, 1912).—Apptd. to I.P.S. on probn., Oct., 1938; asst. pol. agt., Orissa states, Aug., 1943, and again Sept., 1944; pol. offr. Trucial Coast, Apl., 1945; confd. in the I.P.S., Mar., 1946.

MURPHY, SIR STEPHEN JAMES, Kt., late Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 13th June, 1875).—Retd., June, 1935.*

MURPHY, TERENCE ARTHUR, late Income Tax dept., Bombay (b. 29th Dec., 1888).—Appointed to income tax dept. of central board of revenue, 12th May, 1907; asst. commr. of income tax, Sind, Apl., 1924; ditto, Bombay city, Dec., 1932; retd., 10th Oct., 1943.

MURRAY, SIR ALEXANDER ROBERTSON, K.C.I.E., C.B.E., (b. 29th Nov., 1872), late presdnt., spl. tariff bd.*

MURRAY, COLIN ROBERT BAILLIE, C.I.E. Ind. Pol. (inspr.-gen., Orissa) (b. 12th Feb., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 17th Nov., 1911; supt., Feb., 1923; cent. intell. offr., B. and O., Feb., 1936; dep. inspr.-gen., March, 1938; inspr.-gen., Orissa, Sept., 1944; C.I.E., June, 1946.

MURRAY, DUNCAN CAMERON, Indian C.S., (dep. commr. Assam) (b. 26th Apl., 1916).—Educ. at Hymer's Coll., Hull, and Oriel Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 14th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; dep. commr., May, 1945.

MURRAY, HERBERT EDWARD, C.I.E., Lieut.-Col. I.M.S. (surg. supt. P.G. hosp., Calcutta) (b. 19th May, 1889).—Joined the service, 8th Dec., 1915; apptd. surg. supt., P.G. Hospital, Calcutta, March, 1933; C.I.E., June, 1944.

MURRAY, JOHN JOSEPH, Comdr. R.N.R., O.B.E., Burma Marine Serv. (b. 17th Nov., 1893).—Joined 14th Aug., 1930; princpl. engr. and ships surveyor, Apl., 1935; nautical advr. and princpl. offr. mercantile marine dept., June, 1939; ditto supt. light houses etc., Oct., 1945; O.B.E., 1st Jan., 1945.

MURRAY, PETER, B.A., Burma C.S., Cl. I. (dep. commr.) (b. 18th July, 1915).—Educ. at Portsmouth Gr. Sch., and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 6th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Dec., 1938, and served as asst. commr.; on naval service, Aug., 1940; sub.-divl. offr., 1943; civ. aff. serv., Jan., 1945; dep. commr., Oct., 1945; again, 1946.

MURRELL, WILLIAM LEE, O.B.E., B.C.E., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (supvg. engr., Bihar) (b. 26th Feb., 1893).—Joined the

served as asst. engr. 1st Oct., 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1925; suptg. engr., March, 1939. O.B.E., Jan. 1941.

MURSHED, KHONDKAR GHOLAM (see Khondkar Gholam Murshed).

MURTI, NORI GOPALAKRISHNA, B.E., Ind. Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr.,) (b. 16th Feb., 1910).—Asst. exec. engr., Bombay, Aug., 1932.

MURTI, N. V. SHRINIVAS, B.A., B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bombay) (b. 5th Nov., 1895).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 21st July, 1920; asst. exec. engr., July, 1921; offg. exec. engr., Dec., 1925; confd., July, 1930.

MURTRIE, MERVYN DAVID, India Posts and Telegraphs (postmaster-general) (b. 14th Sept., 1893).—Joined the service, Oct., 1914; gazetted postmaster, Oct., 1925; presidency postmaster, Jan., 1938; p.m.g., Feb., 1942.

MUSHRAN, SHAMNATH, Barr., late Legislative Dept., Govt. of India (b. Nov., 1883).—Retd., Sept., 1938.*

MUSHTAQ AHMAD, B.Sc., B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 14th Feb., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Bengal, 4th Dec., 1925; transferred to Punjab from 19th Oct., 1920; dep. consvr., Dec., 1929; soil consvrn. offr., Oct., 1944.

MUSPRATT, SIR SYDNEY FREDERICK, K.C.B., C.S.I., C.I.E., D.S.O., General, I.A., ret'd. (b. 11th Sept. 1878.)—Sec., mil. dept., India Office, Sept., 1931 to Nov., 1933; and again, Oct., 1937 to Dec., 1941.*

MUSTAFA, GHULAM, KHAN SAHIB CHAUDHRI, B.A., Punjab C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. Apl., 1889).—Joined the service, 10th Feb., 1913; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1929; confd., May, 1936.

MUSTAFA, SAIDY GHULAM, A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (ch. engr., Sind) (b. 14th July, 1895).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1926; suptg. engr. (confd.), Jan., 1942; jt. ch. engr. and jt. sec. to govt. P.W.D., Sind, March, 1945; ch. engr. and sec. ditto, Oct., 1945.

MUSTILL, FREDERICK JOHN, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 6th Oct., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 27th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Nov., 1928.

MUSTO, SIR ARNOLD ALBERT, Kt., C.I.E., M.Inst.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 4th Oct., 1883).—Retd., Aug., 1934.*

MUTKEKAR, SATWAJI GUNDONJI, B.Ag. (Bom.), M.Sc. (Mass.), late Indian Agric. Service (Central Provs.) (b. 22nd March, 1886).—Retd., March, 1941.

MUTSADDI, LAL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 6th Aug., 1913).—Educ. at Shambhoo Dayal High Sch., Ghazia-bad, Agra Univ., Allahabad Univ., London Sch. of Oriental Studies, and Fitzwilliam House, Cambridge; joined the service, 20th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

MUZAFFAR HUSSAIN, C.I.E., KHAN BAHADUR, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 8th Nov., 1886).—Retd., June, 1942.†

MUZAFFAR, SHAIKH-UD-DIN, M.A., M.Sc. (Punjab), Ph.D. (Cantab.). Public Works Dept., Punjab (b. 24th Sept., 1896).—Apptd. prof'r. of science, Maclagan engrg. coll., 22nd June, 1924.

MUZUMDAR, V. D. (asst. commr. of income-tax) (b. 4th Feb., 1893).—Joined the service, June, 1923; held non-gaz. posts, Apl., 1918, to May, 1923; income-tax offr., Feb., 1924 to Feb., 1934; asst. commr., Sind, March, 1937.

MYAING, U THAN, Indian Police (asst. supt., Burma).—Joined the serv. as proby. asst. supt., 26th Jan., 1933; left in Burma; civ. aff. serv., Apl., 1945 to Oct., 1945; asst. supt., Oct., 1945.

MYERS, MISS KATHLEEN MABEL, K.-i-H., gold medal, M.A., late Indian Educ. Service (princpl.) (b. 14th Jan., 1891).—Apptd. addl. prof'r., Queen Mary's coll., Madras, 26th Mar., 1921; prof'r. ditto, Dec., 1925; princpl., ditto, March, 1936, K.-i-H. medal (gold) Jan., 1943; ret'd., Jan., 1946 and re-employed for six months.

MYSORE SUBRA, RAO, B.A. (Mysore), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 25th Oct., 1907).—Educ. at Govt. High Sch., Bangalore, Mysore Univ. and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1930; joined the service, Oct., 1931, and served in B. and O. as asst. mag. and collr.; dir. of recruitment, May, 1942; dep. sec. govt. poll. and appt. and provcl. press advr., Apl., 1945; regr. co-op. soc., Feb., 1946.

NADKARNI, LAXMIKANT MADHAVBAO, B.A., M.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 3rd March, 1915).—Educ. at Elphinstone High Sch., Bombay, Bombay Univ., London Sch. of Economics and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; appointed on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 12th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

NAG, BALWANT SINGH (see Balwant, N. S.).

NAGARKAR, CHANDRAKANT BALVANTRAO, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bombay) (b. 28th Aug., 1894).—Educ. at Wilson Coll., Bombay, and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 6th Jan., 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; judge and sess. judge, May, 1930; regr. high ct., Bombay, June, 1931 to June, 1935; dist. and sess. judge, June, 1945.

NAGARKATTI, KRISHNA NARAYANA, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 5th March, 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Mysore and Peterhouse Coll., Cambridge; joined the service 10th Oct., 1929; arrived 15th Nov., 1929, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr. June, 1933; offg. sec., govt. devel. and resettlmt. dept.

NAGARVALA, JAMSHID DORAB, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Sind) (b. 13th Nov., 1914).—Apptd. on probn., 2nd Feb., 1937; confd., Sept., 1938; offg. var. in Sind from Apl., 1944; enquiry and enforcement offr. and dep. sec. to govt., food etc., dept., Aug., 1945.

NAGENDRA SINGH, MAHARAJ, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., C.P.) (b. 18th March, 1914).—Educ. at Ajmer Coll., Agra Univ., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 15th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in the C.P. as asst. commr.; served with govt. of India, March, 1946.

NAGLE, JAMES NICHOLAS EASTMAN (see Eastman Nagle).

NAIDU, G. NARASIMHULU (see Narasimhulu Naidu G.).

NAIDU, SIRAM LAKSHMINARASINGHA RAO, Indian State Rlys. (dist. traffic supt., E.B. rly.) (b. 7th Dec., 1890).—Joined the service, 3rd July, 1911; dist. traffic supt., March, 1931; statistical offr., E.B. rly., March, 1931.

NAIFF, JOHN CALVERLEY, B.A., Burma C.S. (Cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 31st Oct., 1913).—Educ. at Hanley High Sch., Stoke-on-Trent, and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 28th Sept., 1937; arrived in Burma, Nov., 1937,

and served as asst. commr.; interned by Japanese, Dec., 1941 to Aug., 1945.

NAIK, ATMARAN SHRIDHAR, B.Sc., B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr. and mag.) (b. 19th May, 1917).—Educ. at N.M.V. High Sch., Poona, Bombay Univ. and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn. after seln., in Aug., 1940, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

NAIK, RAMA PRASANNA, M.A., Indian C.S. (b. 20th Dec., 1920).—Educ. at Nagpur Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1943 and served in Madras.

NAIR (see also Nayar).

NAIR, PALAT GOVINDAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 20th May, 1916).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 27th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938; sub-collr., Jan., 1940; under-sec., public dept., Oct., 1942; dep. sec., ditto, May, 1946.

NAIR, THEKATH KUMARAN, B.A. (Mad.), B.Sc. (B'ham), late Indian State Rlys. (b. 16th March, 1889).—Retd., 23rd Dec., 1942.†

NAIR, VALLILATH MADHATHIL MADHAVAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 8th Oct., 1919).—Educ. at Christian Coll. Sch., Madras, Madras Univ., Brasenose Coll., Oxford, and Gonville and Caius Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn. after seln. in July, 1942, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.

NAKRA, D. S. Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. 8th Apr., 1914).—Joined the serv., 21st Aug., 1937; asst. fincl. advr., mil. fin., Jan., 1945.

NAKULSEN, B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 14th Aug., 1910).—Joined the serv. on 6th Sept., 1935; arrived in India, Oct., 1945, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.

NAMBIYAR, AMANDA KALOTH KUNHIRAMAN (see Kunhiraman Nambiyar, A.K.)

NANAK, SINGH, Sardar Sahib Sardar, late Punjab C.S. (b. 1st March, 1889).—Retd., Jan., 1939.*

NANA RAO, TANJORE KRISHNARAO, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 15th March, 1892).—Joined the service, 16th Dec., 1916; dep. acct. genl., B. and O., Jan., 1934; ditto, Madras, May, 1935; dep. govt. examr. of accts., B.B. and C.I., Rly., July, 1937; chief auditor, Burma Rlys., Oct., 1938; comptr., p. and t. accts., Burma, Nov., 1939; dep. acct. genl., Burma, May, 1940; dy. acct. genl., posts and tels., Nagpur, Jan., 1942.

NANAVATI, D. H., B.A., LL.B.—Apptd. solicitor to central govt., Bombay, Jan., 1940.

NANAVATTY, KAIKHUSHRU JEHANGIR, B.Sc. Indian Police (b. 10th March, 1907).—Joined as dep. supt., 2nd Dec. 1930; apptd. to Indian Police as supt., 15th Apr., 1941; dep. commr., Bombay, Apr., 1945; supt., spec. duty, Ahmedabad, July, 1946.

NAND GOPAL, DIWAN, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr. central P.W.D.).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 24th July, 1931; apptd. to I.S.E., as asst. exec. engr., Punjab, July, 1932; transf. to central p.w.d., Apr., 1933; exec. engr., July, 1941.

NAND, GOPAL, LALA, A.M.I.E. (Ind.), Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 1st March, 1894).—Joined the service, 8th Oct., 1917; asst. engr., Oct., 1918; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1927.

NANDA, BADRI NATH, (b. 6th Feb., 1903).—Joined the service, 1st Apr., 1930; supt. 23rd

Apr., 1942; offg. asst. sec., dept. of commonwealth relations, 13th Jan., 1945.

NANJAPPA, VENKATASUBRAMANIER, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 26th Jan., 1911).—Educ. at Government Collegiate High Sch., Bangalore, Mysore Univ., University Coll., London, and Jesus Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; on active service from Feb., 1940.

NAPIER, ALEXANDER, Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 7th Sept., 1904).—First commn., 26th Aug., 1924; in mil. employ to Nov., 1930; under-sec. to A.G.G. in C.I., Apr., 1932; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, Dec., 1933; asst. commr., Kohat, Dec., 1936; asst. commr. and city mag., Peshawar, Apr., 1937; under-sec. to resdt., Hyderabad, Nov., 1937; v. consul, Khoramshar, Dec., 1938; asst. commr., Tank, May, 1941; secty. to govt., N.W.F.P.; civil defence, May, 1942; home sec. to ditto, June, 1942 (addtl.); sec. and excise asst. to resdt. C.I., March, 1943; 1st sec. to agt.-genl. for India in China, May, 1944; sec. to resdt. for E. states, Apr., 1946.

NAPIER-MUNN, REV. WILLIAM ERNEST, late Indian Eccl. Estabt. (b. 25th Apr., 1886).—(United Provs.)—Retd., Apr., 1941.

NAQVI, ABU TALIB, O.B.E., B.A., Ind. C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 1st March, 1907).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ. and Oriel Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 14th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr.; on spec. duty at govt. h.q., Nov., 1937; O.B.E., June, 1942; dep. sec., dep. of supply (aircraft) Dec., 1943.

NAQVI, GHAZANFAR ALI (see Ghazanfar, A. N.).

NARA SIMHAM, RAMASWAMY LAKSHMI, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bihar) (b. 27th Sept., 1906).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1935; dist. and sess. judge (confd.), Oct., 1940; sec., law commn. and lab. dept., Orissa, Nov., 1945.

NARAHARI, RAO VYAKARANA, C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., Ind. Aud. Dept. (b. 6th July, 1893).—Joined the serv., 5th Mar., 1917; dep. acct. genl. posts and tels., May, 1923, under-sec., fin. dep. govt. of India, Aug., 1924; offg. asst.-sec. ditto, Nov., 1927; offg. under-sec. govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., Apr., 1929; addl. dep. sec., ditto, March, 1933; temp. jt. sec., ditto, in addn., Aug., 1936; addtl. dep. sec., and Crown fin. offcr., pol. dept., Apr., 1937. C.I.E., May, 1937; offr. on spl. duty, pol. dep. and Crown fin. offr., March, 1940; addtl. sec. fin. dept., July, 1944; sec., govt. of India, fin. dept., Jan., 1946; C.S.I., June, 1946.

NARAIN, GOVIND, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 5th May, 1917).—Educ. at A.P. Mission High Sch., Mainpuri, Allahabad Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 21st Oct., 1939; confd., 24th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940 and served in U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

NARA SIMHAMURTHI, NUGGELI RANGA AYYANGAR, B.Sc., (elec. dept., Madras) (b. 7th Apr., 1903).—Joined as asst. engr., Apr., 1933; exec. engr., July, 1937; suptg. engr., Apr., 1944.

NARASIMHAM PANTULU, MANTRIPRAGADA, Rao Bahadur, late Madras C.S. (b. 1882). Retd., March, 1940.†

NARASIMHAN, CHAKRAVARTHI VIJIRACHAVA, M.B.E., B.A., Ind. C.S. (under-sec. devel. dept. Madras) (b. 21st May, 1915).—Educ. at National High School, Trichinopoly, Madras Univ., and St. Catherine's Society, Oxford; joined the service, 23rd Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., March, 1939; under-sec., devel. dept., Sept., 1942; M.B.E., Jan., 1946.

NARASIMHULU, NAIDU G., O.B.E., Diwan Bahadur, B.A., B.I., late Indian Posts and Telegraphs (b. 9th Oct., 1887).—Joined the service as proby. supt., 22nd Dec., 1910; confd., 3rd July, 1912; asst. dep. dir.-genl., Sept., 1935; dep. p.m.g., July, 1937; dir. posts and tels., S. and B. circle, June, 1938; dep. dir.-genl., war, Sept., 1939; on depn. to defence dept., March, 1941; O.B.E., Jan., 1944; retd., Feb., 1944.

NARAYAN, BRIJ (see Brij Narayan).

NARAYAN, JAGAT (see Jagat N.).

NARAYAN, RAJ (see Raj).

NARAYAN, SHIV, M.A., B.Sc. (Punj.), B.E., M.Sc. (U.S.A.), Mem. A.I.E.E., A.M.I.E.E. (Lond.), A.M.I.E. (India), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 12th Nov., 1883).—Retd., Nov., 1938.*

NARAYAN, S. L. (see Lokur, Narayan Swamirao).

NARAYAN, VAIDYANATH, Audit and Accts. Serv., (b. 1st July, 1903).—Joined the serv., Apl. 1927; asst. acct.-genl., Madras, Jan., 1928; dep. ch. audr., G.I.P. Rly., Nov., 1939; dep. govt. examr. rly. accts., B.B. and C.I. Rly., Apl., 1940; asst. fin. offr. mil. fin. dept., June, 1940; dep. fin. advr., supply fin. Dec., 1940; dep. sec. govt. of India, lab. dept., Apl., 1946.

NARAYANA KUDVA, VENKATARAYA (see Kudva, V. N.).

NARAYANA RAI, AJILADY, Indian Police (supt., Madras) (b. 28th Jan., 1908).—Apptd. proby. asst. supt., Madras, 7th March, 1932; confd., March, 1943; dist. supt. police, (confd.), July, 1945.

NARAYANA RAO, Rao Sahib, (Elec. Dept., Madras) (b. 17th June, 1903).—Joined the serv. as asst. engr., Mar., 1935; exec. engr., Nov., 1937; ditto (confd.), Apl., 1938.

NARAYANAN NAIR, KOYAMAN, Diwan, Bahadur, B.A., late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 16th Nov., 1888).—Joined the service as proby. supt., Nov., 1912; confd., Apl., 1916; depy. postmaster-genl., Apl., 1939; retd., July, 1944.

NARAYANASWAMI AYYAR, OMBATHIVELI RAMASWAMI AYYAR, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 2nd Aug., 1904).—Apptd. asst. exec. engr., Madras, 16th Aug., 1929; exec. engr., Aug., 1938.

NARAYANSWAMI, BRAHMADESAM SUBRAMANYA, M.A., Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. 10th Dec., 1899).—Joined the service as offr., Cl. II, Oct., 1923; promoted, cl. I, Mar., 1945.

NARAYANASWAMI PILLAI, T. M., Dewan Bahadur.—Apptd. member Madras public serv. commn., Dec., 1944.

NARAYANASWAMY, R., Military Accts., Dept.,—Apptd. dep. fin. advr. (commens.), Apl., 1945.

NARENDRA NATH SEN, B.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., United Provs.) (b. 1st Feb., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 5th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Apl., 1929.

NARGOLWALA, SAVAK DINSHAW, B. Com., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 5th June, 1915).—Educated at Zoroastrian High Sch., Deolali, Bombay Univ., London Sch. of Econ. and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 8th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

NASH, PHILIP GEOFFREY ELWIN, O.B.E., Indian C.S. (b. 20th Sept., 1906).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch. and Worcester Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Dec., 1931, and served in Burma as asst. commr., under secty. to govt., home and pol. dept., Burma, March, 1934 to May, 1936; on spec. duty with the govr. of Burma, May, 1936 to Apl., 1937; secty. to Burma delegate Imperial conf., Apl.-June, 1937; addl. asst. pte. secty. to Viceroy, Aug., 1937; asst. ditto, Jan., 1938; dep. ditto, June, 1939, to Aug., 1939; O.B.E., Jan., 1941; under-sec. A.G.G. Baluchistan, Jan. to Feb., 1941; a.r.p. and spec. war duties, Baluchistan Feb. to Aug., 1941; commr.'s asst. Fed. Shan States, Sept., 1941 to May, 1942; on depn. to U.K. with govt. of Burma, June to July, 1942; ditto, under govt. of India as sec. to Ind. rep. at War Cabinet, Sept., 1942 to Feb. 1943; principl.
