SAHAY, VISHNU, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bombay) (b. 22nd Nov., 1901).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ., and Lincoln Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 23rd Oct., 1925; arrived, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1928; offg. mag. and collr., Jan., 1934; confd., March, 1939; offg. regr., co-op. soc., United Provs., Aug., 1934; dir. of agric., June, 1939; sugar contr. for India, Sept., 1944; dir.-gen. (food) and ex-officio jt. sec. to govt. of India, food dept., Feb., 1946.

SAHGAL, AMRIT LAL, B.A., LL.B., A.C.A., R.A. (b. 20th Jan., 1904).—Joined the service, 21st Sept., 1935, as sec., Indian acc. bd. and ex-officio asst. sec. to govt. of India.

SAHGAL, DR. G.C., (Punjab).—Dist. bd. serv. from Oct., 1921; dist. medl. offr. of health, Punjab, (confd.), Apl., 1927; asst. dir. of pub. health, Aug., 1942.

SAHGAL, HARA NARAYAN, late Indian State Rlys. (E.B. Rly.) (b. 21st Nov., 1886).—Retd., Apl., 1942.†

SAHGAL, NAROTTAM, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 18th Nov., 1918).—Educ. at Bishop Cotton Sch., Simla, Punjab Univ., and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; apptd. on probn. after seln. in Aug., 1940, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.

SAHI, INDRANDEVA NARAIN, M.A., Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 27th Sept., 1916).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1940; commr. Madura, municip., Mar., 1946.

SAHIB, ABDUR RAHIM (see Abdur Rahim Sahib).

SAHIB KHAN NOON, MALIK, M.B.E., Punjab C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. Nov., 1896).—Extra asst. commr., May, 1911; confd., Apl., 1913; M.B.E., Jan., 1919; dep. commr., June, 1935.

SAHIB, MUHAMMAD SIRAJUDDIN (see Muhammad S.S.).

SAHIB, SAIYID ABDUL QADIR (see Saiyid Abdul Qadir S.).

SAHIB, SHARIF MUHAMMAD ALI (see Sharif, M. A. S.).

SAHIBZADA, AHMED KHAN, O.B.E., M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (ass. dir. gen.) (b. 15th Oct., 1891).—First commn. dated 1st March, 1922; in milty. employ to Apl., 1925; civil medl. offr., Bannu, Apl., 1925; ditto, Tochi Agency, Apl., 1928; ditto, N. Waziristan, Nov., 1929; civil surgeon, Hazara, Feb., 1933; O.B.E., Jan., 1935; asst. dir. gen., I.M.S., Jan., 1944.

SAHNEY, CHUNI LAL, M.Sc., Rai Bahadur, United Provs. educ. serv., cl. I (b. Sept., 1893).—Prof. Muir cent. coll., educn. serv., cl. II, Jul., 1921; inspr. sch., U.P., educn. serv., cl. I, Apl., 1933; educ. expence offr., Aug., 1944; dir. pub. instruction, U.P., Apl., 1946.

SAHNI, MULK RAJ, M.A., D.Sc., Geol. Surv.

of India (b. 1st March, 1899).—Joined the serv. as asst. supt. (geologist) 14th Oct., 1929.

SAHNI, NARSING DASS M., B.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 12th Oct., 1900).—Joined the service, 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

SAID, AHMAD, MAJ., M.B., L.R.C.P., F.R.C.S., (civil surgeon) U.P., (b. 19th Feb., 1905).—Date of first commn., 24th Apr., 1933; in civil employ. (confd.), in U.P., 15th Feb., 1939.

SAIDULLAH, MOHAMMED, B.A., Khan Bahadur, Indian Posts and Tels. (b. Nov., 1895).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Mar., 1920; confd. Feb., 1925; dep. p.m.g. (asst. dir genl.), Jan., 1946; Khan Bahadur, Jan., 1946.

SAID ULLAH KHAN, B.A. (Oxon), Barr., Indian C.S. (commr., Punjab) (b. 15th July, 1896).—Educ. at Chief's Coll., Lahore, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 2nd Oct., 1922, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., July, 1927; dep. commr. (prov.), Apr., 1929; confd., Nov., 1932; sec., med., etc., depts., Feb., 1941; addtl. commr., Nov., 1942; commr., Apr., 1944.

SAIGAL, DEVI DAYAL (see Devi Dayal, S.).
SAIN, KANWAR LALA (see Kanwar Sain, L.).
ST. JOHN, SIR HENRY BEAUCHAMP, K.C.I.E., C.B.E., Lieut.-Col., I.A. (ret.d.) (late Ind. pol. service) (b. 26th Aug., 1874).—Retd., Nov., 1930.*

ST. JOHN, OLIVER CHARLES BEAUCHAMP, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 22nd Oct., 1907).—First commn., 2nd Feb., 1928; in mil. employ prior to 1st June, 1931; under-sec. to A.G.G. in Baluchistan, June, 1931; offr. on spl. duty, govt. of India, in home dept. (temp.), May, 1933; asst. pte. sec. to H.E. the Viceroy, May, 1933; under trng. in the United Provs., Nov., 1934; under-sec. to the A.G.G. in Baluchistan, June, 1935; asst. to the dep. A.G.G. in Baluchistan, July, 1935; asst. commr., Ajmer, Apr., 1936; on for. service in Alwar State, from 1st Sept., 1936, to 18th Nov., 1936; asst. commr., Ajmer, Nov., 1936; under-sec. to A.G.G., W.I. States Agency, Jan., 1937; pol. agent, Sabar Kantha Agency, Sept., 1937; under-sec. to the resdt. for the States of W.I., Nov., 1937; pol. agent, W. Kathiawar, March, 1938; under-sec. to the resdt. for the States of W.I., June, 1938; asst. for Mekran to the pol. agent in Kalat and ex-officio comdt., Mekran levy corps, Oct., 1938; non-localised asst. pol. agent in Baluchistan, Nov., 1939; asst. commr., Mansehra, Oct., 1941; sec. to govr., N.W.F.P., Aug., 1943; ch. sec. to govr. N.W.F.P., (addl. charge), Nov., 1944.

SAIYID, ABDUS SALAM (see Abdus Salam Saiyid).

SAIYID ABDUL QADIR SAHIB, B.A., late Indian Forest Service (Madras) (b. 15th Sept., 1885).—Retd., Sept., 1940.†

SAIYID, ABDULLAH ABU (see Abdullah, A. S.).

SAIYID ALI AMIR, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (supg. engr., Bihar) (b. 1st Aug., 1895).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 20th Oct., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1929; supg. engr., May, 1942.

SAIYID AMINUDDIN, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (collr. and dist. mag., Bombay) (b. 21st Apr., 1895).—Educ. at Aligarh Collegiate Sch., and Downing Coll., Cambridge; joined the service 14th Dec., 1921; arrived, 6th Jan., 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr., offg. collr. and dist. mag., March, 1926; confd., July, 1936;

settl. commr. and dir., land records, etc., May, 1938, to May, 1940; again, Oct., 1944.

SAIYID, MUHAMMAD AHSAN QULI, Khan Bahadur, Indian Police (sup., Bihar) (b. 1st July, 1884).—Held non-gaz. appt. to 30th June, 1921; dep. supt., 1st July, 1921; sup., 4th Feb., 1938; confd., 8th Nov., 1938.

SAIYID MUHAMMAD SHU'AIB RIZAWI, Khan Bahadur, Indian Police, ret.d. (b. 11th Nov., 1885).—Retd., Nov., 1938.*

SAIYID MUJIBUR RAB, M.B.E., M.A., Indian Police (sup., Orissa) (b. 1st Sept., 1899).—Joined the service, 1st Nov., 1922; offg. supt., Feb., 1930; confd., Nov., 1932; M.B.E., Jan., 1931; transfd. to Orissa, Feb., 1941.

SAIYID MUNIRUDDIN SIRAJUDDIN MAULVI, M.A., Bombay C.S. (collr. and dist. mag.) (b. 25th March, 1889).—Dep. collr., Jan. 1924; collr. and dist. mag., May, 1937.

SAIYID, NASIR-UD-DIN SAHIB, B.A., Indian Police, Madras, (b. 4th July, 1903).—Joined the service, 2nd Nov., 1926; promoted to Indian Police as sup., June, 1943.

SAJBA SHANKAR RANGNEKAR (see Rangnekar, S. S.).

SAKER, RICHARD KENNETH MAITLAND, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 30th Dec., 1908).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1932; in mil. employ prior to 15th Nov., 1933; under trng. under the A.G.G., Gujerat States, and resdt., Baroda, Nov., 1933; asst. mag. and collr., Meerut, June, 1934; under-sec. to A.G.G., Rajputana, Jan., 1936; confd., Apr., 1937; under-sec. to the rest. for Baroda and the Gujerat States, Nov., 1937; sec., March, 1939, to Apr., 1939; transfd. to Quetta, June, 1939; under-sec. to A.G.G., rest., and ch. commr. in Baluchistan, July, 1939; under-sec. ext. affairs dept., Apr., 1940; Brit. trade agent, Gyantse, June, 1941; pol. agt. for Kalat and Bolan Pass, Oct., 1944; H.M.'s consul Meshed and Birjand, July, 1945; ditto, Zahidan, Aug., 1945; and Zabul-Zahidan (addl. charge), Nov., 1945.

SAKSENA, BHAGWATI PRASAD (see Bhagwati, P. S.).

SAKSENA, NIGMENDRA SEN, M.A., Indian Police, United Provs. (b. 17th May, 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt. on prob., after exam. of 1940. SAKSENA, PREM CHANDRA, Indian Police (b. 26th Dec., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., 3rd Sept., 1925; offg. dist. supt., March, 1928; confd., Aug., 1941.

SALAHUDDIN AHMAD YUSUF, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bengal) (b. 28th Jan., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 4th Dec., 1925; dep. consvr., Nov., 1929.

SALAMAT ULLAH, HAJI MOHAMMAD, M.C., M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., Jail Dept., United Provs. (inspr. genl. of prisons) (b. 16th Dec., 1892).—Apptd. supt., central prison, Lucknow, 14th Feb., 1926; inspr. genl. of prisons, United Provs., Feb., 1935.

SALDANHA, CHARLES J. (b. 2nd March, 1897).—Joined the service, 1st Mar., 1921; mangr., govt. cent. press, Bombay and Yaravda, Apr., 1935; offg. supt. govt. printing and staty., Bombay, Apr., 1937.

SALE, STEPHEN LEONARD, B.A., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Lahore) (b. 30th Sept., 1889).—Educ. at Marlborough and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 30th Nov., 1914, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; on mil. duty from May to Aug., 1918; ofg.

dist. and sessions judge, Dec., 1922; provl. ditto, Sept., 1924; legal membr. and sec., legisl. dept., Sept., 1928; addl. judge, high ct., Lahore, June, 1934; judge, ditto, Nov., 1939.

SALISBURY, ALAN JACK, B.A. (Oxon), Indian C.S. (regr., high ct., Patna) (b. 9th Apl., 1905).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital, St. John's Coll., Oxford, and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, 8th Nov., 1929, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and coll.; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1935; dist. and sess. judge, Aug., 1936; regr., high ct., Patna, Dec., 1943.

SALISBURY, ARTHUR GEORGE, O.B.E., Ind. Office (supg. exec. offr., acct.-genl.'s dept.) (b. 29th Oct., 1885).—Educ. at Elizabeth Coll., Guernsey; apptd. 2nd class clerk, 16th July, 1906; minor staff clerk, Oct., 1915; staff clerk (acting), Apl., 1920; confd., Apl., 1921; higher exec. offr., Apl., 1922; suptg. exec. offr., March, 1927; apptd. assessor of inc. tax, March, 1927; actg. asst. acct.-genl., Jan., 1941; clerk to the commr. of inc. tax., March, 1941; actg. dep. acct.-genl., Nov., 1945. O.B.E., June, 1946.

SALISBURY, REV. MARK, LL.D., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain, Punjab) (b. 16th Oct., 1883).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 12th Nov., 1921; junr. chaplain, Dec., 1923; senr. chaplain, Dec., 1933.

SALMOND, HUBERT GEORGE, C.I.E., A.M.I.C.E., A.C.G.I., late Indian State Rlys., (b. 3rd Jan., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1911; in mil. employ from July, 1915 to June, 1919; exec engr., Oct., 1923; dep. dir. civil engrg., rly. bd.; offg. dep. ch. engr., Oct., 1932; dep. agent, works, E.B. rly., March, 1933; dep. ch. eng., (provl. perm.) Apl., 1938; on spec. duty, commns. dept., Apl., 1941; transfld. as ch. govt. inpsr. of rlys., commns., dept. May, 1941; C.I.E., Jan., 1944; retd., Aug., 1945.

SALOWAY, REGINALD HARRY, O.B.E., Indian C.S. (reg. dir. resettlement and employment United Provinces) (b. 26th October, 1905).—Educ. at Exeter Sch., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in the United Provs. as asst. collr. and mag.; asst. commr., March, 1930; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1933; offg. dep. commr., Sept., 1935; offg. sec., bd. of rev., United Provs., Apl., 1936; rev. and fin. min., Rampur state, 1937; O.B.E., Jan., 1942; mag. and collr. (confd.), Aug., 1943; offg. commr., Apl., 1945; reg. dir. of resettlement and employment, U.P., Aug., 1945.

SALTER, MALCOLM GURNEY, B.A., Indian Educl. Service (princpl., Daly coll., Indore) (b. 10th May, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. master, Daly coll., 26th Jan., 1913; on mil. duty from 5th Dec., 1916, to 29th Oct., 1919; princpl., Daly coll., July, 1930.

SALUSBURY, CHARLES VANNE, C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (Punjab) (b. 15th Feb., 1887). Educ. Hertford Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 27th Nov., 1911, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; city mag., Delhi, Sept., 1915; asst. coln. offr., Lower Bari Doab Canal colony, Apl., 1916; on spl. duty for Upper Chenab Canal colony work, Lahore, June, 1917; on spl. duty, Punjab civil sec., Dec., 1917; on spl. duty on staff of lieut.-govr., March, 1918; dep. commr. (provl.), Feb., 1925; deputed to Bikaner State, Oct., 1929, to March, 1931; offg. sec. to govt., transfld. depts., Punjab, May, 1932; offg.

commr., May, 1934; and again, Apl., 1936; offg. sec. to govt., Punjab, elec. and indus. dept., Jan., 1936; rev. and div. commr., N.W.F.P., Nov., 1936; commr. (perm.), Nov., 1941; C.I.E., Jan., 1942; spl. duty secretariat, April, 1945; ch. sec. to govt., Apl., 1945; add. fin., commr. June, 1945; C.S.I., June, 1946, retd., Apl., 1947.

SAMLER, WILLIAM HADLEY GOODLIKE, M.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 18th Apl., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 15th Dec., 1922; on depn. to Kashmir State from 31st Jan., 1924; dep. consvr., Oct., 1927.

SAMPSON, EPHRAIM OSWIN, M.B.E., late Indian Forest Service (Bombay) (b. 14th Aug., 1886).—Retd., Aug., 1941.†

SAMS, SIR HUBERT ARTHUR, Kt., C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (Punjab) (b. 3rd May, 1875).—Retd., March, 1934.*

SAMS, RICHARD HUBERT, B.Sc., MAJ., R.E., Survey of India, (b. 1st Aug., 1903).—First commn., 1st Feb., 1924; in mil. employ to Mar., 1929; proby. asst. supt., Mar., 1929; confd., Mar., 1931; supt., Sept., 1938; in mil. employ, Apl., 1941 to Dec., 1942.

SAMSON, SAMUEL, Indian Posts and Tel. (b. 21st Dec., 1893).—Joined the service, Sept., 1913; supt., June, 1943; ch. supt., March, 1946.

SAMUEL, GEORGE, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 26th Aug., 1908).—Educ. at Hamilton Academy, Glasgow Univ., and Baliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1932; arrived in India, Dec., 1933, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-sec., defence dept., Apl., 1937; served in Sind as dep. motor transpt. contr., Dec., 1942; provl. rationing authy. July, 1943; dep. commr., Feb., 1946; addl. sec. transpt. and commns. dept., Feb., 1946; dep. commr., (confd.), July, 1946.

SAMUEL, JOHN AUGUSTUS, C.I.E., B.A., LL.B. (Cantab.), Barr., late Bihar Provl. Ser. (b. 3rd Feb., 1887).—Retd., July, 1943.†

SAN, MAUNG BA, B.A., Burma C.S. (cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 31st March, 1914).—Educ. at Rangoon Univ.; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 5th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Oct., 1938, and served as asst. commr. W.Sub. divl. mag., Rangoon, Jan., 1941; dep. commr., Aug., 1946.

SANDEMAN, RONALD FREDERICK, B.A., Dip., Forestry, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 3rd Nov., 1897).—Joined the service, 10th Dec., 1923, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Nov., 1925.

SANDERS, REV. HOROLD MARTIN, M.A. (Oxon.) B.A. (London) late Eccles. Dept., Central Provs., (b. 7th Jan., 1900).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 3rd Feb., 1929; junr. chaplain, Jan., 1931; senr., chaplain Jan., 1941; retd., May, 1945.

SANDYS, CHARLES STAINTON CUMMING, Burma Frontier Service, (b. 5th Sept., 1919).—Apptd. on probn. after seln., Aug., 1946.

SANER, ROBERT MORTON, O.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. reg. dir. of resettlmt. etc., United Provs.) (b. 30th Dec., 1911).—Educ. at Westminster and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1934; arr. in India, Oct., 1935, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; attaché, def. dept., Aug., 1940; under-sec., ditto, Oct., 1940; M.B.E., 11th June, 1942; ch. admin. offr. war dept., govt. of India, Sept., 1943 to Apl., 1945; dep. reg. dir., resettlmt. and employment U.P., June, 1945; O.B.E., June, 1946.

SANGAL, HARA NARAYAN, B.A., Indian State Ry's. (exec. engr., E.B. Ry.) (b. 21st Nov., 1886).—Asst. eng., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; exec. engr. (prov.), Nov., 1935.

SANGAT SINGH, SARDAR SAHIB.—Apptd. Indian Govt. Trade Commr., Mombasa; Sardar Sahib, Jan., 1945.

SANJANA, BOMAN S., Dept. of Industries, Bihar (b. 18th Sept., 1887).—Apptd. prof., Bihar coll. of engr., 7th July, 1925.

SANJANA, KAIKOBAD EDALJI JAMSHEDJI, B.A., Barr., Khan Bahadur, late Central Provs. C.S. (b. 11th May, 1883).—Retd., May, 1938.*

SANJIVA RAO, BENEGAL, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 12th Dec., 1883).—Retd., Dec., 1938.*

SANJIVA ROW, KODIKAL, C.I.E., M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (member, federal public serv. commn.) (b. 18th March, 1890).—Joined the service, 3rd Sept., 1914; pers. asst. to contr. of currency, Jan., 1925; supt. fin. dept., Dec., 1925; asst. secty. to the govt. of India, fin. dept., Dec., 1932; offg. budget offr., fin. dept., variously from Apl., 1931; confd., March, 1933; C.I.E., June, 1935; apptd. representative of the govt. of India, applicn. cttee. for the Indo-Burma finl. award, Jan., 1936; dep. sec., fin. dept., govt. of India, Apl., 1936; addl. jt. sec., ditto, Apl., 1937; jt. sec., fin. dept., govt. of India, Apl., 1939; member, federal public services commn., Sept., 1940; chairman fedl. public service commn., Apl., 1945; member ditto, Sept., 1945; Indian audit and accts. serv., cl. I (confd.) Nov., 1945.

SANJEVI PILLAI, TIRUPATTUR GANGAHARAM, Rao Bahadur, M.A., Indian Police (dep. commr., Burma) (b. 28th Dec., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Madras, 1st Sept., 1922; offg. dist. supt., March, 1929; confd., Sept., 1932; supt., sel. grade, Oct., 1944; awarded Indian police medal, Jan., 1944.

SANKARA AYYAR, TIRUNELVELI SELLAMIER, C.I.E., B.A., B.E. (b. 1st Dec., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. examr., 17th Aug., 1909; asst. acct.-genl., United Provs., March, 1914; asst. auditor, N.W. rly., June, 1918; dep. auditor, E.B. rly., Oct., 1921; govt. examr. of accts., M. & S.M., and S.I. rlys., Nov., 1922; ditto, B. and N.W. and R. & K. rlys., July, 1924; divl. audit offr., N.W. rly., Nov., 1924; dep. acct.-genl., posts and tels., March, 1925; offg. dep. auditor, N.W. rly., Nov., 1926; asst. auditor, ditto, Dec., 1926; dep. ch. accts. offr., E.I. rly., March, 1928; offg. dir. of finance, rly. bd., Nov., 1930; confd., May, 1931; dir., rly. bd., Apl., 1932; offg. finl. commr. of rlys., Oct., 1935; C.I.E., June, 1938.

SANKARA NARAYANA, Rao Bahadur, B., C., Barr.-at-Law, Judl. Dept., Madras (b. 25th Nov., 1893).—Master, high ct., Madras, Jan., 1941; member, inc. tax appeal. tribl., Bombay, April, 1946.

SANKARAN NAIR, KINATTINKARA, B.A., Indian Police, Madras (b. 20th Dec., 1920).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., confd., Apl., 1945.

SANSON, ADAM JOHN WALKER, M.C., late Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 28th May, 1897).—Retd., Nov., 1939.*

SANT PRAKASH SINGH, SARDAR, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 1st May, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 14th Apl., 1920; offg. supt., Nov., 1926; confd., May, 1929; Indian police medal, June, 1941; asst. inspr.-genl., rly. police, May, 1944; dep. inspr.-egn. of police, May, 1945.

SANT SINGH, SARDAR BAHADUR, late Indian Police (Central Provs.) (b. 15th July, 1886).—Retd., July, 1941.*

SANTOS, JOHN, B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 19th Jan., 1890).—Joined the service, 2nd Nov., 1914; asst. acctnt.-genl., Sept., 1925; examr., outside audit, Bombay, June, 1926; offg. asst. sec., fin. dept., Apl., 1929; offg. under-sec., ditto, Nov., 1932; dep. acct.-genl., Bombay, Apl., 1933; services lent to the govt. of Bombay, March, 1936; comptr., Sind, Oct., 1940; acct.-genl., Madras, March, 1941.

SANWAL, BHAIRAVA DAT, B.Sc., B.A., Barr.-at-Law, Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 25th March, 1917).—Educ. at Allahabad and London Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1941; served in United Provs. as asst. commr.

SAPRU, ANAND NARAYAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (educn. sec. to govt., United Provs.) (b. 31st March, 1901).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 23rd Dec., 1924, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr., jt. mag., July, 1927; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1928; services at disposal of A.G.G., Punjab States, for employment in Patiala State, Apl., 1931; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1932; offg. excise commr., United Provs., March, 1935, and inspr.-genl. of regn. in addn., Apl., 1935; collr. and mag. (confd.), Dec., 1938; dir. of indus. Oct., 1939; educn. sec. to govt., U.P., Feb., 1942 to Nov., 1943; ditto Sept., 1945.

SAPRU, SIR TEJ., Bahadur, P.C., K.C.S.I., LL.D.—Law member of govr.-genl.'s exec. council, 1920-23.*

SARAN, REDHA KANTA (see Redha Kanta Saran).

SARAN, SHANKAR.—Apptd. addl. judge, high ct., Allahabad, May, 1946.

SARDAR SINGH, M.A., Indian Police (b. 1st Feb., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 27th May, 1927; offg. supt., Apl., 1933.

SARDARI LAL, MALHOTRA, LALA, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 2nd Dec., 1901).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 24th Oct., 1924; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1925; exec. engr., Oct., 1934; under sec. (contr.) to govt. P.W.D. (irrig.), March, 1945.

SARDHANA, MADAN GOPAL (see Madan, G. S.).

SARDESAI, VIDYADHAR NARHAR, M.A., Ind. C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bombay) (b. 28th July, 1905).—Ed. at Univ. of Bombay and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, Dec., 1929, and served as asst. collr., Bombay; asst. judge, Sept., 1934; dist. and sess. judge, May, 1939, again, Apl., 1942; under govt. of India, legis. dept., May to Oct., 1940; on depn. Apl., 1945; dist. and sess. judge, confd., April, 1945.

SARGENT, SIR JOHN PHILIP, C.I.E., D.Litt., M.A., (sec. educn. dept., govt. of India) (b. 27th Dec., 1888).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch. (Foundation Scholar) 1903-08; Oriel Coll., Oxford (Open Scholar), 1908-12; organising inspr. of schools, E. Riding of Yorkshire education cttee., 1913-20; assist. educn. offr., city of Birmingham, 1920-27; dir. of educn., Southend-on-Sea city. borough, 1927-31; dir. of educn., county of Essex, 1931-38; apptd. offr. on specl. duty under the E.H. and L. dept., govt. of India, Nov., 1938, to Jan., 1939; educn. commr. with the govt. of India, Jan., 1939;

ex-officio joint sec., dept. of educn., h. and l., March, 1941; C.I.E., June, 1941; educnl. advr. to govt. of India, Jan., 1943 to Aug., 1945; sec. educn. dept., Sept., 1945; kt., Jan., 1946.

SARIN, HARISH CHANDRA, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 27th May, 1914).—Educ. at Govt. Intermediate Coll., Allahabad, and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 3rd Oct., 1938; confd., 9th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr.; under-sec., pol. and appts. dept., Sept., 1943; dep. sec. ditto, Apl., 1945.

SARKAR, BASANTA BIHARI, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 5th Aug., 1901).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta, Univ. Coll., London, and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Dec., 1927; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1932; offg. mag. and collr., Sept., 1933; jt. sec. to govt., co-op., etc., dept., Bengal, July, 1940; sec., comms. etc. dept., March, 1944; sec. dept. works and buildings, irrign. and waterways, Oct., 1945.

SARKAR, BHABADEV, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., late Bihar C.S. (b. 16th May, 1883).—Retd., May, 1938.*

SARKAR, BINOD BIHARI, M.B.E., Rai Bahadur, Bengal C.S. (mag. and collr.) (b. 22nd July, 1888).—Joined the service, Dec., 1908; dep. mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1912; mag. and collr., March, 1938; M.B.E., June, 1942.

SARKAR, HIRENDRA NATH, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 18th Jan., 1905).—Joined the service as proxy. asst. supt., 1st May, 1928; confd., Sept., 1930; offg. addl. supt., Feb., 1934.

SARKAR, SIR JADU NATH, Kt., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian Educl. Service.—Joined the service, 30th June, 1898; prof. of history, Ravenshaw Coll., Cuttack, July, 1919; ditto, Patna coll., Oct., 1923; C.I.E., Jan., 1926; vice-chancellor, Calcutta Univ., 1926; kt., June, 1929.

SARKAR, PRAFULLA KUMAR, M.A., Indian Rly. Accts. Service (senr. accts. offr.) (b. 14th Sept., 1900).—Joined the service, May, 1926; accts. offcr., Apl., 1929; senr. ditto, Feb., 1936.

SARKAR, SUBODH CHANDRA, Judicial Dept., Bengal (judge, Calcutta small cause ct.) (b. 1st Sept., 1886).—Joined the service, 24th May, 1915; dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1928; judge, Calcutta small cause ct., Jan., 1934.

SARMA, ANANTANARAYANA, A.N. (see Anantanarayana, S. A. N.).

SARMA, DURGESHWAR, R.B., B.L., late Assam C.S. (b. 18th Feb., 1885).—Retd., Feb., 1940.†

SARMA, G. K., SESHADRI (see Seshadri Sarma, G. K.).

SARMA, TIRNOSTTIYUR RAMASWAMI AIYAR VRIIDHAGIRI, B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 16th Nov., 1887).—Ch. accts. offr., E.I. rly., Sept., 1939.

SARRE, LIONEL W., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 17th Apl., 1909).—Joined the service as proxy. asst. supt., Bombay, 18th Jan., 1930; confd., Aug., 1931; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1938; confd. as supt., Dec., 1940; dep. commr., C.I.D., Bombay, June, 1944.

SARUP SINGH, BHAI, Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Punjab) (b. 27th Apl., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 27th

Nov., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1928; regr., p.w.d., Punjab, Dec., 1939; perm. suptg. engr., July, 1944; on depn. to Patiala State, Feb., 1944 to Jan. 1946.

SATHE, DATTATRAYA LAXMUN, M.A., B.Sc., late Indian Forest Service (Madras) (b. 27th May, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 14th March, 1914; dep. consvr., March, 1919; offg. consvr., Aug., 1933; confd., Jan., 1935; ret'd., May, 1944.

SATHE, DINKER DATTATRAY, B.Sc., B.A., Ind. C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 23rd Sept., 1918).—Educ. at St. Joseph's High Sch., Bangalore, Agra Univ., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn. after seln. in Aug., 1940; under sec. to govt., Feb., 1946; asst. commr., civil supplies, Madras, Mar., 1946.

SATHE, SIR JAGANNATH LAKSHMAN, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 20th Apl., 1886).—Educ. at Bombay University and St. John's College, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 8th Oct., 1910 and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Apl., 1917; mag. and collr., Dec., 1924; employed as sec., bd. of rev., from Nov., 1923; offg. excise commr., Apl., 1927; confd., May, 1928; dir., bureau of statistics and economic research, Apl., 1932; sec., fin. dept., Apl. 1933; confd. commr., Dec., 1938; C.I.E., June, 1943; advr. to govr., Dec., 1944; member bd. of rev. (confd.), Dec., 1944; ret'd., Nov., 1946; kt., June, 1946.

SATHIANATHAN, WILLIAM RATNAM SAMUEL, Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 15th March, 1900).—Educated at Madras University, Peterhouse Coll., Cambridge, and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 15th Nov., 1924; sub-collr., March, 1928; dir. of land records, Madras, Dec., 1931; collr. and dist. mag., June, 1934, again Aug., 1940; estate collr., Vizianagram, Oct., 1935; regr., co-op. societies, Jan., 1942.

SATTANATHAN, ARMUGA NAYAKAR, B.A. (Hons.), Imperial Customs Service (export trade contr., Calcutta) (b. 15th May, 1905).—Joined the service, May, 1928; asst. collr. of customs, 1929.

SATYANARAYAN CHOWDARY, CHELSANI, Rao Sahib, B.A., B.L., Jud. Dept., Madras (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 28th Nov., 1898).—Joined the service, Feb., 1937; apptd. dist. and sess. judge on probn., Feb., 1937; confd., Feb., 1938.

SATYAWADI, SHEO CHARAN, M.A., Indian Customs Service (collr. of customs) (b. 5th Nov. 1894).—Joined the service, 6th Oct., 1911; asst. collr., Oct., 1913; offg. collr. for customs, Chittagong; March, 1924; ditto, Rangoon 1931; ditto, Calcutta, June, 1933; ditto (prov. perm.), Karachi, Sept., 1940; confd. as collr., May, 1941; export trade contr., Karachi, Nov., 1942.

SAUDAGAR SINGH, RAI BAHADUR, M.A. B.L., late Bihar C.S. (b. 3rd Jan., 1885).—Retd., Jan., 1940.†

SAUDAT-UL-LAH KHAN, Indian Agric. Service (b. 14th Apl., 1898).—Joined the service as dep. dir. of agric., Madras, 24th Jan., 1922; with govt. of Baluchistan as agricl. offr., Quetta, Apl., 1930.

SAUMAREZ SMITH, WILLIAM HANBURY, M.B.E., Ind. C.S. (under sec. home dept., Bengal) (b. 31st Dec., 1911).—Educ. at Winchester and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the serv., 11th Oct., 1934; arr. in India, 3rd Dec., 1934, and

served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1936; under sec., home dept., Bengal, Jan., 1939; under sec. to govr. genl. (public), Sept., 1940; M.B.E., 1943; addl. dep. sec., home dept., Aug., 1944.

SAUNDERS, CHARLES HUMPHREY AUGUSTUS, late Indian State Ryis. (b. 8th March, 1886).—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

SAUNDERS, RT. REV. CHARLES JOHN GODFREY, M.A., late Bengal Ecclesi. Dept. (b. 15th Feb., 1888).—Retd., Aug., 1940.*

SAUNDERS, HOWARD FAUNLEROY, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (Madras) (b. 15th Apr., 1885).—Retd., Apr., 1940.†

SAUNDERS, JOHN ALFRED, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 28th May, 1887).—Retd., March, 1938.*

SAUNDERS, JOHN FREDERICK, M.B.E., B.A. Ind. C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 21st Apr., 1910).—Educ. at Dunstable Gr. Sch., and Selwyn Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, sub. collr. and jt. mag., Apr., 1937; comm. tax offr., Nov., 1941 to Feb., 1943; senr. [commr. civil supplies, Mar., 1943; M.B.E., Jan., 1946.

SAUNDERS, PERCY TUNSTALL, O.B.E., M.R.C.V.S., late Indian Vety. Service (Madras) (b. 8th Sept., 1884).—Retd., Sept., 1939.*

SAUNDERS-JACOBS, RUSKIN ATKINSON, B.Sc., Indian State Ryis. (exec. engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 20th May, 1897).—Joined the service, 19th Aug., 1921; asst. engr., Jan., 1924; exec. engr. (prov.), Apr., 1936; confd., Feb., 1939.

SAVAGE, GERALD ROBERT, Indian Police (b. 1st Aug., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., Dec., 1937.

SAVARA, A. N. (see Amar Nath S.).

SAVIDGE, CECIL ARTHUR GRANT, M.B.E., M.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 20th May, 1905).—Educ. at Aberdeen Gr. Sch., Univ. of Aberdeen and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1929, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; asst. commr., Bannu, Apr., 1934; dep. commr., Bannua, Aug., 1935; asst. commr., Nowshera, Nov., 1935; ditto, Bannu, July, 1936; confd., Apr., 1937; under sec. to govt. of India, ext. affairs dept., Oct., 1937; again, from Sept., 1938; dep. ditto, Aug.-Sept., 1938; asst. pol. agt. and asst. commr., Quetta-Pishin, Apr., 1940; M.B.E., Jan., 1941; on depn., 1941; and again, Nov., 1944.

SAVOOR, SNANKAR RAO ULLAL, B.A., D.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (princpl. govt. collr., Kumbakonam) (b. 14th Jan., 1893).—Joined the service as profr., presdy. coll., Madras, 18th Feb., 1921; princpl., govt. coll., Kumbakonam, June, 1929; confd., Jan., 1936; offg. dep. dir. of public instrn., Apr., 1931; princpl. govt. Vic.-coll., Palghat July, 1935; princpl. Presdy. Coll., Madras, Jan., 1945; offg. dir. public instrn., Madras, Oct., 1945.

SAWHNEY, DHAN RAJ, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 13th Dec., 1882).—Retd., Dec., 1937.*

SAXENA, A. L. Indian audit and accts. service.—Apptd. asst. fincl. advr. (food), Jan., 1943; dep. fincl. advr. (food), Sept., 1944.

SAYER, MICHAEL WYNNE, B.A., late Indian Agric. Serv. (b. 10th Sept., 1885).—Retd., Sept., 1940.†

SAYER, ROY AUBREY, Burma Frontier Service, (b. 3rd Apr., 1913).—Apptd., 30th Dec., 1936.

SAYERS, SIR FREDERICK, C.I.E., late Indian

Police (Madras) (b. 22nd July, 1885).—Joined the service, 3rd Dec., 1906; asst. supt., 1908; supt., Nov., 1916; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1927; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., June, 1929; and again, March, 1933; confd., Aug., 1933; offg. inspr.-genl., Oct., 1936; C.I.E., May, 1937; commr. of police, Apr., 1937; inspr.-genl. (confd.), Jan., 1938; ret'd., July, 1940; kt., Jan., 1941; apptd. advr. to sec. of state for India, March, 1942 to March, 1947.

SAYERS, RICHARD JOHN Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 12th Feb., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 13th Dec., 1923; dep. consvr., May, 1928.

SCHOFIELD, SIDNEY CHARLES APPS, I.S.O., India Office (higher exec. offr., acctnt.-genl.'s dept.) (b. 7th Feb., 1883).—Educ. at Alleyln's Sch., Dulwich; apptd. clerk, 2nd class, acctnt.-genl.'s dept., 8th Nov., 1901; on mil. service from June, 1915, to July, 1919; services lent to office of chief commr., Baghdad, from July, 1919; resumed duty in acctnt.-genl.'s dept., Aug., 1920; staff clerk (actg.), Aug., 1920; confd., Apr., 1921; higher exec. offr., Apr., 1922; also assessor of inc. tax; I.S.O., June, 1938.

SCHUSTER, SIR GEORGE ERNEST, K.C.S.I., K.C.M.G., C.B.E., M.C., (b. 1881).—vice-pres., govr.-genl.'s exec. council, Aug., 1933 to May, 1934.†

SCOONES, GEN. SIR GEOFFREY A.P., K.B.E., C.S.I., D.S.O., M.C., A.D.C.—Apptd. princpl. staff offr. to the sec. of state for India and for Burma, and sec. mil. dept., 1st Jan., 1947; apptd. A.D.C. to H.M., March, 1947.

SCOTT, ANDREW BENNETT, M.B.E., B.A., Ind. C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 25th Jan., 1913).—Ed. at Perse Sch. Camb., and St. Catharine's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 16th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1939; addl. dist. mag., May, 1942; mag. and collr., Oct., 1944; M.B.E., June, 1946.

SCOTT, ARCHIBALD GIFFORD, C.I.E., late Indian Police (Central Provs.) (b. 21st Apr., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Dec., 1909; dist. supt., Sept., 1921; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., Feb., 1934; confd., Dec., 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1942; ret'd., Sept., 1944.

SCOTT, CHARLES PETER, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 30th Dec., 1917).—Ed. at Weymouth Coll., and Pembroke Coll., Cambr.; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1939; confd., 27th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Sept., 1942; asst. pte. sec. to govr., June, 1945 to Feb., 1946; under sec. to govr.-genl. (Punjab), Apr., 1946.

SCOTT, CHARLES WINTER, O.B.E., D.F.C., B.Sc., late Indian Forest Service (Burma) (b. 7th Jan., 1892).—Joined the army in the summer of 1915, and reported his arrival at Rangoon on 13th Dec., 1919; asst. consvr., Feb., 1916; dep. consvr., Feb., 1921; O.B.E., June, 1932; forest economist, major products, Burma, July, 1933; jt. timber advr., rly. and army depts., Oct., 1934; timber advr. offr., rly. bd., Sept., 1936; consvr. (confd.), Feb., 1939; ret'd., Jan., 1947.

SCOTT, FRANCIS BURGESS, Col., I.A., ret'd., late Survey of India (b. 3rd March, 1885).—Retd., March, 1940.†

SCOTT, FRANCIS WILLIAM, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 9th Nov., 1886).—Retd., Dec., 1942.

SCOTT, GEORGE EDWARD, O.B.E., B.E.,

B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Burma) (b. 10th Oct., 1884).—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

SCOTT, HENRY DONALD MORTIMER, Indian Police (supnt., Punjab) (b. 17th Feb., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th Jan., 1920; offg. supt., March, 1926; confd., July, 1932; King's police medal, Feb., 1937; awarded bar to medal, Jan., 1938; Indian police medal, Sept., 1940; dep. dir., civ. defence, Jan., 1943; served under govt., Baluchistan, Apl., 1943; senr. supt., Baluchistan, Sept., 1945.

SCOTT, HERBERT BODLEY, O.B.E., F.R.C.S.E., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd., late Burma Med. Dept. (b. 14th Dec., 1882).—Retd., Apl., 1937.*

SCOTT, IAN DIXON, B.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 6th March, 1909).—Educ. at Queen's Royal Coll., Trinidad, Balliol Coll., Oxford, and Sch. of Economics, London; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; asst. commr., Bannu, Oct., 1935; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, Apl., 1936; asst. commr., Mansehra, Nov., 1937; confd. in Indian Pol. Serv., July, 1939; census supt., N.W.F.P., Dec., 1939; asst. dir. of intell., govt. of India, Peshawar, July, 1941; princpl., Islamia Coll., Peshawar, Jan., 1943; dep. pte. sec. to the Viceroy, Nov., 1945.

SCOTT, JAMES ALEXANDER, C.I.E., O.B.E., Ind. Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Punjab) (b. 2nd Dec., 1895).—Joined the service, 20th Nov., 1915; on mil. duty from 26th July, 1916, to 4th Feb., 1919; asst. supt., Dec., 1920; supt., Dec., 1924; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1926; princpl., police trng. sch., Dec., 1929; O.B.E., Jan., 1931; senr. supt., Delhi, Oct., 1936; dep. inspr.-genl. (sub. perm.) Jan., 1943; C.I.E., June, 1945.

SCOTT, MURIEL ELENA, M.A., M.B.E., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 18th June, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. lecturer on educn., Univ. Coll., Rangoon, 2nd Apl., 1923; lecturer on educn., ditto, Nov., 1926; lecturer, teachers' training coll., Rangoon, Apl., 1931; ret'd., June, 1943.

SCOTT, SAMUEL GORDON AMAND, Indian Police (dist. supt., Burma) (b. 25th Oct., 1914).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., 5th Dec., 1934; asst. supt. of police Shan states, March, 1940; civ. aff. serv. to Dec., 1945; dist. supt., 1946.

SCOTT, THOMAS FAIRLESS, Burma Police (cl. I) (b. 9th Jan., 1925).—Apptd. on probn. after seln., Aug., 1946.

SCOTT, SIR WALTER LAWRENCE, C.I.E., M.A., B.Sc., late Indian C.S. (Assam) (b. 7th Aug., 1880).—Retd., Dec., 1939.*

SCOTTER, HENRY HAROLD GORDON DILL, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 25th March, 1888).—Retd., June, 1940.†

SCOTT-SCOTT, DOUGLAS, V.D., Indian State Rlys. (works manager) (b. 16th June, 1890).—Joined the service, 11th March, 1921; asst. works manager, Dec., 1928; works manager, G.I.P. rly., provl., Apl., 1935; confd. senior scale, Feb., 1938.

SCRIMSHAW, SYDNEY HENRY, Office of High Commr. for India (higher clerical offr., accis. dept.) (b. 9th Apl., 1891).—Apptd. 1st July, 1925; transf. from the G.I.P. Rly. Co.

SCRIVEN, GEORGE WILLIAM, M.I.C.E., A.K.C., Indian State Rlys. (b. 24th Sept., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. engr. 1st June, 1915; exec. engr. Oct., 1922; trans. to commss. dept. as govt. inspr. of rlys., May, 1941; l.p.r., Sept., 1945.

SCROGGIE, HAROLD FORBES, O.B.E., Indian Police (supnt., N.W.F.P.) (b. 14th Nov., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th March, 1921; offg. dist. officer, frontier constabulary, Jan., 1926; offg. supt., Nov., 1926; confd., Oct., 1931; dist. offr., frontier constab., Oct., 1934; O.B.E., June, 1942.

SCROGGIE, JOHN ADAM, O.B.E., Indian Police (supnt., Punjab) (b. 27th March, 1895).—Joined the service, 20th Nov., 1915; on mil. duty from 26th July, 1916, to 19th Jan., 1919; asst. supt., July, 1921; supt., Apl., 1925; O.B.E., Feb., 1937; asst. inspr.-gen., rly. police, Oct., 1939; supt. (sel. gr.), Dec., 1939; dep. inspr.-gen., June, 1941.

SCRUBY, JOSEPH, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 26th March, 1887).—Retd., July, 1940.†

SEAL, AMARENDRA NATH, O.B.E., B.Sc. (Engng., London) (engr.-in-charge, lighthouse dept., and ch. inspr. of lighthouses in British India) (b. 15th Jan., 1895).—Educ. at Presidency Coll., Calcutta, and Univ. Coll., London; joined service on 2nd March, 1931, as inspr. of lighthouses in British India; engineer-in-chief, lighthouse dept., and chief inspr. of lighthouses in British India, 25th March, 1938; confd., 7th Oct., 1938; O.B.E., Jan., 1946; on depn. to U.K., Jan., 1946.

SEAL, BENOYENDRA NATH, B.A. (Cantab.), Barr., Indian Educl. Service (prof., Elph. Coll., Bombay) (b. 14th Apl., 1892).—Joined the service, 25th March, 1922; prof. of English and logic, Gujarat coll., March, 1922; doing duty as prof. of English, Karnatak Coll., Dharwar, Oct., 1925; confd., Feb., 1926; prof., Elph. Coll., Bombay, June, 1930; princpl. secondary trng. coll.

SEALE, HERBERT JOHN, A.M.I.E.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 9th Apl., 1881).—Retd. Apl., 1938.*

SEALY, WILFRED ARTHUR PRINCE, Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Bihar) (b. 27th May, 1886).—Joined the service, 2nd Dec., 1905, as asst. supt. of police; asst. to dep. inspr.-gen., Bengal, Sept., 1911; ditto, Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1912; supt., Sept., 1914; persl. asst. to inspr.-gen. of police, Bihar and Orissa, Oct., 1918; recd. King's police medal; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., June, 1926; confd., Feb., 1931.

SEAMAN, REV. ALFRED JONATHAN, M.A., (name changed to Nix-Seaman), late Indian Ecclesl. Establt. (b. 14th Jan., 1886).—Retd., Nov., 1939.*

SEARLE, CARLETON STUART, M.C., Maj., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 29th Nov., 1895).—First commn. dated 8th Aug., 1914, joined the pol. dept., 13th June, 1923; asst. pol. agent, Chilas, July, 1924; asst. commr., Kohat, Oct., 1926; ditto, D.I. Khan, Sept., 1928; ditto, Tank, Nov., 1929; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, Sept., 1930; senr. sub-judge, Peshawar, Apl., 1931; jt. dep. commr., Peshawar, July, 1931; pol. agent, Khyber, Jan., 1934; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, Nov., 1938; pol. agent, Orissa States, Jan., 1939; pol. agent, Chagai, Nov., 1939; ditto in Kalat and ditto in charge of Bolan Pass, Apl., 1940; ditto in Zhob, Oct., 1941; pol. agt. and dep. commr., Quetta-Pishin, Oct., 1945; offg. resdt. cl. II, and rev. and judl. commr., Baln, Feb., 1946.

SEARLE, HUMPHREY FREDERIC, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Burma) (b. 1st March, 1886).—Retd., July, 1938.*

SEIN, HOE MIN, MAJ., Burma Medl. Serv. (b.

26th Dec., 1898).—Date of first commn., 27th Apl., 1931; in civ. employ Feb., 1934; on mil. duty, Dec., 1941; first physician, govt. hosp., Rangoon, 1st Feb., 1946.

SEIN, MAUNG BA, T.P.S., Indian State Ryis. (statistical offr) (b. 30th Aug., 1881).—Joined the service, 1st Aug., 1907; asst. engr., Burma Ryis., Apl., 1921; offg. statistical offr., Apl., 1925; confd., March, 1931.

SEKSENA, RAMJI RAM, M.A., LL.B., (Indian Govt. Trade Commr., Sydney) (b. 15th June, 1897).—Joined the service 20th Jul., 1920; asst. inc. tax offr., Apl., 1922; asst. collr., customs Mar., 1925; first sec., cent. bd. of rev. and ex officio under sec. govt. of India, fin. dept., Nov., 1934; first sec., on spec. duty, cent. bd. rev., May, 1935; first sec. ditto, and ex-officio jt. sec. govt. of India, fin. dept. Apl., 1936; on spec. duty office of dir.-gen. comml. intell. and stats., Calcutta, Jan., 1937; Indian govt. trade commr., Osaka (Japan), Apl., 1937; ditto, Sydney, Australia, Jan., 1941.

SELWYN, JOHN SIDNEY AUGUSTUS, M.B.E., late Indian Police (Punjab) (b. 17th Oct., 1908).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, 20th Nov., 1928; transfed. to N.W.F.P., Jan., 1930; confd., Nov., 1930; offg. dist. offr., Frontier constab., July, 1932; confd., Nov., 1935; M.B.E., Jan., 1939; ret'd., 1946.

SEN, APURBA KINNAR, M.Sc., (b. 11th July, 1895).—Joined the service as inspr. of explosives July, 1926; dep. ch. ditto, May, 1940; ch. ditto in India, Aug., 1945.

SEN, AMARENDRA NATH, Bengal Jud. Service (b. 13th May, 1891).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1928; judge, high ct., Calcutta, Nov., 1938; judge, ditto, Oct., 1942.

SEN, BHIM (see Bhim Sen).

SEN, BHUPATI MOHAN, M.B.E., M.A. (Cantab.), M.Sc., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 1st Apl., 1888).—Joined the service as prof'r., Dacca Coll., 9th July, 1915; prof'r., presdy. coll., Calcutta, Aug., 1923; princpl., ditto, Aug., 1931; M.B.E., Jan., 1942; ret'd., Apl., 1943.

SEN, BINAY RANJAN, C.I.E., B.A. (Calcutta), Indian C.S. (b. 1st Jan., 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta and Oxford (non-coll.); joined the service, 31st Oct., 1922; arrived, 4th Dec., 1922 and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. mag., Feb., 1928; offg. mag. and collr., Nov., 1929; addl. sec. pol. and appts. dept., Bengal, Nov., 1931; dep. sec., ditto, Nov., 1932; mag. and collr., Feb., 1936; sec., rev. dept., Bengal, Apl., 1940; dir. of civil evac., Apl., 1942; addtl. commr., Nov., 1942; dir.-gen., govt. of India (food), Aug., 1943; C.I.E., Jan., 1944; addl. sec., govt. of India, (food), Apl., 1946.

SEN, DHIRENDRA MOHAN, M.A., Ph.D., (b. 25th Nov., 1901).—Apptd. tech. asst., Aug., 1940; dep. sec. educ. dept. govt. of India, Sept., 1940.

SEN, GIRISH CHANDRA, Rai Bahadur, M.A., late Bengal C.S. (b. Sept., 1886).—Ret'd., Oct., 1941.

SEN, JYOTI LAL, M.C., M.B., Lieut.-Col. (ret'd.), late I.M.S. (b. 22nd Oct., 1883).—Ret'd., Oct., 1938.*

SEN, KARUNAKETAN, M.B.E., B.Sc., Ind. C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 19th Nov., 1911).—Educ. at Narainganj High English Sch., Bengal, Calcutta Univ., King's Coll., London, and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1924; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in

Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1936; dep. contr., distrbn., civ. supplies, Feb., 1944; dir. dist. distribution, dir. of food, dept. of civil supplies, Feb., 1946; M.B.E., June, 1946.

SEN, KSHITIS CHANDRA, B.A., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Bombay) (b. 5th Oct., 1888).—Educ. at Calcutta and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 15th Nov., 1913, and served in Bombay as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. judge and addl. sess. judge, Nov., 1921; asst. remembr. and sec. to legisl. council, Dec., 1923; off. judge and sess. judge, May, 1926; and again, Jan., 1928; confd., Jan., 1929; jt. judge and addl. sess. judge, Nov., 1926; regr., high ct. Bombay, Apl., 1928; offg. judge, high ct., Bombay, July, 1934, June, 1935, June, 1936, March, 1937, and Nov., 1938; offg. sec. to govt., legal dept., Bombay, Feb., 1935; confd., Dec., 1935; addtl. judge, high ct., Bombay, Nov., 1937; judge, high ct., Bombay, Aug., 1941.

SEN, KUMUD KANTA, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 26th Nov., 1896).—Joined the service, 20th Feb., 1922; examr., outside audit dept., Bengal, Apl., 1936; dep. dir., rly. audit, Apl., 1937; dep. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Delhi, July, 1938; dep. contr., rly. accts., June, 1940; ditto, supply accts., Dec., 1940; offg. var., Aug., 1942 to 1944; gen. list, cl. I (prov.), Dec., 1945; Indian audit and accts. serv., cl. I (prov.), Nov., 1945.

SEN, MONISHI MOHAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 16th Dec., 1919).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1943 and served in Bengal; S.D.O., Sept., 1945; asst. sett. offr., Feb., 1946.

SEN, NAKUL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 14th Aug., 1910).—Educ. at Govt. High Schs., Delhi and Simla, Univ. of Delhi, and Magdalene Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 6th Sept., 1935; arrived in India, Oct., 1935, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub. divl. offr., May, 1938.

SEN, NALIN SANKER, M.A., Indian State Ryis. (ch. transpt. supt. G.I.P. Rly) (b. 3rd Sept., 1893).—Joined the service, 1st May, 1917; asst. transpn. supt., G.I.P. rly., junr. Nov., 1922; ditto, senr., Jan., 1930; divl. transpt. supt., March, 1941; dep. ditto, Aug., 1943; ch. transpt. supt., Feb., 1946.

SEN, NALINI KANTA, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 27th Oct., 1895).—Joined the service, 26th Feb., 1920; asst. auditor, E.B. rly., May, 1921; divl. audit offr., N.W. rly., May, 1925; dep. acct.-gen., United Provs., Sept., 1932; asst. contr. of rly. accts., Dec., 1935; dep. acct.-gen., Burma, July, 1936; offg. acct.-gen., Burma, Oct., 1936; re-transf. to India, March, 1939; dep. ch. accts. offr., N.W. rly., March, 1939; dep. ch. accts. offr., E.B. rly., Dec., 1939; ditto, E.I. rly., Dec., 1940; ditto, E.B. rly., Oct., 1941.

SEN, NARENDRA NATH (see Narendra Nath, S.).

SEN, PRANAB KUMAR, M.B.E., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 11th Nov., 1912).—Apptd. on probn., 12th Feb., 1937; confd., Feb., 1939; M.B.E., Jan., 1943.

SEN, SACHINDRA NATH, M.Sc. (Cal. and London), Ph.D. (London), Meteorological Dept. (meteorologist) (b. 5th Dec., 1891).—Joined the service as meteorologist, 14th Sept., 1925; suptg. ditto, March, 1943.

SEN, SAMARENDRANATH, B.A., B.Sc. Econ., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b.

10th Aug., 1914).—Educ. at Govt. Sch., Comilla, Calcutta Univ., Univ. Coll., London, and Univ. Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 7th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte. and dep. collr., May, 1941; addl. dep. dir., civ. supplies, March, 1944; reg. contr., procurement, Jan., 1945.

SEN, SISIR KUMAR, Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 3rd Feb., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of the Punjab, and King's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 20th Oct., 1927; arrived, Nov., 1927, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1933; ditto, Assam, Jan., 1935; dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1937; confd., Nov., 1941.

SEN, SUKUMAR, B.A. (Cal.), Ind. C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 2nd Jan., 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta and London Univ.; joined the service, 30th Oct., 1922; arrived, 13th Dec., 1922, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1928; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1931; offg. ch. presy. mag., Calcutta, Apl., 1934 (confd., Dec., 1934) to Nov., 1937;

SEN, SURENDRA NATH (see Surendra Nath Sen).

SENAPATI, NILAMANI, B.A., B.Sc., F.R.G.S., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 19th Feb., 1897).—Educ. at Ravenshaw Coll., Cuttack, Patna Coll., and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 15th Jan., 1922, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. settlt. offr., Nov., 1925; jt. mag., Jan., 1929; offg. mag. and collr., July, 1929; ditto (provl. subs.), Apl., 1936; dep. sec., pol. and appt. depts., Bihar, Apl., 1939; jt. ditto and provl. press advr., Oct., 1939; commr., Jan., 1945; under supply dept. as food commr., Bihar, March, 1946.

SENDAK, MOSES, O.B.E., M.B., B.S., M.R.C.S., D.P.H., MAJ., I.M.S., (b. 18th Mar., 1904).—First comm., 2nd Feb., 1932; in mil. employ prior to July, 1938; Mayo hosp. and cent. jail, July, 1938; civ. surg. and supt. dist. jail, Port Blair, May, 1939; on spec. duty, home dept. Apl., 1945; senr. medl. offr. Port Blair, Dec., 1945, O.B.E., June, 1945.

SEN GUPTA, ATUL CHANDRA, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 14th Feb., 1887).—Retd., Feb., 1942.†

SEN GUPTA, BIRENDRA NATH, M.Sc., Indian Audit Dept. (b. Jan., 1896).—Joined the service, 21st Sept., 1920; asst. dir. of audit, Defence Services, E.C., Apl., 1936; dep. acct.-genl., central rev., May, 1938; asst. ditto, Apl., 1940; dep. acct.-genl., comm. and rev., Jan., 1941; comptr., Orissa, Nov., 1941.

SEN GUPTA, DEBENDRA NATH, B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bengal) (b. 31st Dec., 1888).—Retd., Dec., 1943.†

SEN GUPTA, MANINDRA LAL, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Orissa) (b. 1st Sept., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., July, 1930.

SEN GUPTA, MOHIT KUMAR, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 4th Apl., 1894).—Joined the service, 27th Feb., 1919; asst. acct.-genl., Central Provs., July, 1925; dep. contr., Assam, May, 1929; dep. acct.-genl., central revs., Sept., 1932; audit offr., Indian stores dept., Feb., 1933; and again, Oct., 1935; offg. dep. dir.-genl. (finance), posts and tels., May, 1935;

finl. advr. and sec., local reconstruction cttee., Quetta, Feb., 1936; finance offr., comm., June, 1939; again, March, 1940; finl. advr. to ch. commr., Delhi, Aug., 1939; again, June, 1940; finl. advr., communications, March, 1940; confd. as acct.-genl. (cl. II), Sept., 1944.

SEN GUPTA, NAGENDRA NATH, B.A., (b. July, 1895).—Held non-gaz. appts. in commerce dept., to Jan., 1933; held minor gaz. appts. in commerce dept., to July, 1942; dep. shipping master, Calcutta, Aug., 1942; held gaz. appts. in commerce dept., May, 1943; asst. sec. Dec., 1943; dep. contr. enemy trading, Bombay, Dec., 1944; asst. sec. Jan., 1945.

SEN GUPTA, Sudhir Ranjan, B.Sc., Ph.D., A.M.I.E., (b. 27th Feb., 1907).—Apptd. asst. educ. advr. to govt. of India, Oct., 1945; dep. educ. avr., Mar., 1946.

SENIOR, ARTHUR FAIRFAX, late Indian Police, Punjab (b. 7th Aug., 1897).—Retd., Sept., 1938.*

SENNECK, FRANCIS HARRY, late Indian C.S. (Madras) (b. 30th Dec., 1887).—Retd., Jan., 1939.*

SEPHTON, RALPH, B.A., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 8th Nov., 1882).—Retd., Sept., 1939.*

SEPPINGS, HENRY LOCKYER, Burma Engrg. Serv. (cl. I) (b. 24th Dec., 1895).—Apptd. asst. engr., Feb., 1920; on mil. duty, Oct., 1943; resumed civ. employ. June, 1946.

SESHADRI, RAM MEENAKSHISUNDARA, Ind. C.S. (collr. and dist. mag., Madras) (b. 17th Jan., 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Madras and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1929; arrived, Oct., 1929; sub-collr., Sept., 1932; city (1st class) mag., Madura, Jan., 1939 to July, 1939; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Aug., 1939 to May, 1942; collr. and dist. mag., 1945.

SESHADRI SARMA, GAVARPAT KRISHNASWAMI, C.I.E., B.A., Ind. Aud. Dept., (b. 6th Dec., 1892).—Joined the service, 4th May, 1914; asst. sec., govt. of India fin. dept., May, 1933; services placed at disposal of govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., Oct., 1935; under-sec. (common) to crown and extl. affairs depts.; Apl., 1937; finl. advr. to ch. commr., Delhi, Mar., 1940; crown fin. offr., May, 1944; C.I.E., June, 1946; Indian audit and accts. service, cl. I (confd.), Mar., 1944; offr. on spl. duty, crown fin. dept.; crown fin. offr., ex-officio jt. sec., fin. dept., govt. of India, May, 1944.

SESHAGIRI RAO, PAMIDI HANUMANTA, B.Sc., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 13th Jan., 1898).—Joined the service, 23rd Feb., 1922; on for. service under the Reserve Bank of India, March, 1935; dep. acct.-genl., Madras, Jan., 1938; ditto, Bombay, June, 1938; office of finl. advr., comms. att. to I.S. dept., Nov., 1940; ditto, under mil. fin. dept., Apl., 1940; dep. finl. offr., purchase, June, 1940; dep. contr. rly. accts., June, 1941; dep. ch. accts. offr. E.I. rly., Oct., 1941; Indian audit and accts. serv., cl. I, May, 1946.

SESHU AYYAR, ERODE RAMASWAMY C.I.E., M.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 26th Oct., 1892).—Joined the service, 2nd March, 1914; asst. acctnt.-genl., Burma, March, 1916; asst. acctnt.-genl., posts and tels., Calcutta, May, 1917; asst. acctnt.-genl., Central Provs., Apl., 1922; dep. acctnt.-genl., posts and tels., ditto, Sept., 1925; dep. govt. examr., accts., B.N. rly., March, 1931; offg. dep. dir., rly. clearing accts. office, Nov., 1932; offg. dir., ditto, March, 1933; offg. dep. ch. accts. offcr., E.I. rly.,

Feb., 1934; acctnt.-genl., Bengal, Oct., 1937; dir. rly. audit, Jan., 1940; confd. acctnt.-genl. (cl. I), Sept., 1942; C.I.E., Jan., 1945; acct.-gen. Bombay, Jan., 1945; offg. dep. auditor-gen., India, Nov., 1945; dir., rly. audit, May, 1946.

SET, MAUNG (see Maung Set).

SETALVAD, SIR CHIMANLAL HARILAL, Kt., K.C.I.E., B.A., LL.B.—Member of govt.'s exec. council, Bombay, Jan., 1921, to June, 1923.*

SETALVAD, MOTILAL C., B.A., LL.B.—Apptd. advocate genl. for the Province of Bombay, 12th Dec., 1937; retd., Sept., 1942.

SETH, JAGAT BIHARI, B.A., B.Sc., Indian Educ. Service (prof'r., govt. coll., Lahore) (b. 23rd Sept., 1893).—Joined the service, 21st Oct., 1921; prof'r., govt. coll., Lahore, Apl., 1922.

SETH, KUNJ BEHARILAL, M.A., B.Sc., LL.B., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 20th Nov., 1895).—Educ. at Morris and Hislop Colls., Victoria Coll. of Science, Nagpur, and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; apptd. by nomination in India; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 11th Jan., 1922, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., March, 1927; and again, Apl., 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1928; offg. senr. dep. regr., co-op. societies, Nov., 1934; dep. commr., March, 1937; revenue sec., Nov., 1938; ch. minister, Alwar State, July, 1942; prime minister, Kotah State, Dec., 1943; offg. commr., Oct., 1945.

SETHE, Rai Sahib, Gurdas Ram, Burma Engrg. Serv., (cl. I) (b. 20th July, 1893).—Apptd. engr. P.W.D., Oct., 1917; asst. engr. Feb., 1920; apptd. to Burma Engrg. Serv. cl. I, 1939.

SETHI, DAULAT RAM, C.I.E., M.A., B.Sc., Indian Agric. Service (dir. of agric., Bihar) (b. 25th Apl., 1891).—Joined the service, 30th Oct., 1914; dep. dir. of agric., Nov., 1914; offg. dir. of agric., Apl., 1932; confd., Aug., 1934; served as agricl. mktg. advr. to govt. of India, June to Sept., 1938; dir. of agric. prodn. (food), govt. of India, March, 1943; C.I.E., Jan., 1945; agric. prodn. advr. to govt. of India, Sept. 1945; depn. to Canada, U.S.A., and U.K., Oct., 1945.

SETHI, RAM LAL, M.Sc., M.R.A.S., Indian Agric. Service (Sind) (b. 20th April, 1894).—Joined the service as economic botanist to govt., United Provs., 19th Dec., 1921; asst. agricl. commr., Aug., 1937; confd. in sel. grade, Sept., 1941; cane commr., Sept., 1941; dir. of agric., Sind, Apl., 1945.

SETHNA, M. D., Khan Bahadur, Indian State Rlys. (b. 11th Aug., 1897).—Joined, 22nd Apl., 1925; jt. dir. rly. bd., July, 1944.

SETHU RAO, KAIWAR (see Kaiwar, Sethu Rao).

SEWARD, HERBERT GREGORY, Indian Police (b. 12th Nov., 1908).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 24th Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1936; addtl. asst. to I.G. police, March, 1938; confd. as supt., Jan., 1942.

SEWELL, EDWARD MORTON, M.B., Ch.B. (Edin.), Maj., I.M.S. (b. 27th Oct., 1898).—First commn., 7th Mar., 1927; in mil. employ to Oct., 1937; dist. medl. offr., Madras, Nov., 1937; recalled to mil., June, 1942; reverted to civil, Feb., 1946.

SEYMOUR, ALMERIC HIGH, C.B.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (commr., Burma) (b. 23rd July, 1894).—Educ. at St. Edward's School, Oxford, and Worcester College, Oxford; on mil. service Aug., 1914, to Oct., 1919; joined the service, 11th March, 1921; arrived, 20th Apl.,

1921, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; asst. to commr., settl. and land records, July, 1923; supt. of colonization in addn. from July to Nov., 1924; jt. regr., co-op. societies dept., Jan., 1926; offg. dep. commr., Dec., 1929; confd., Jan., 1934; dep. sec., fin. dept., Burma, March, 1932; offg. sec. to govt. of India, reforms office, July, 1933; sec. fin. dept., Burma, March, 1934, and again, Jan., 1936; addl. sec. to govt., reforms office, Burma, Feb., 1936; offg. sec., ditto, June, 1936; sec., defence dept., Apl., 1937; sec., Burma def. council, Oct., 1939; jt. sec. def. and comm. depts. and contr. supplies, June, 1940; sec. dept. econ. and war supplies, Sept., 1941; depn. to U.S.A., Jan.-June, 1942; sec. commonwealth supply council, min. of prodn., Dec., 1942; sec. govt. Burma, reconstr. dept., Oct., 1943; depn. to U.K., Apl., 1944; C.B.E., June, 1946; commr. (confd.), July, 1946.

SEYS, STANLEY AUGUSTUS, M.B.E., M.C., Ind. Off. (higher exec. offr., accts. dept.) (b. 23rd March, 1890).—Served as sec. div. clerk, Scotch Educn. Office, Apl., to Oct., 1911, and in office of engr.-in-chief, G.P.O., from Oct., 1911; apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 25th Nov., 1912, and attd. to stores dept.; on mil. service from Aug., 1914, to Feb., 1919; transfed. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; transfed. to I.E. Tel. Dept., India Office, Feb., 1922; exec. offr., Apl., 1922; transfed. to mil. dept., Jan., 1927; higher exec. offr. and assessor of inc. tax, Jan., 1938; actg. suptg. exec. offr. Nov., 1945; M.B.E., June, 1946.

SHAFFI, LAWRENCE, O.B.E., (dep. Indian Govt. Trade Commr., New York)—Served with R.A.F.V.R. Jan., 1943 to Dec., 1945; offr. on spec. duty, comm. dept., March, 1945; ditto, office of High commr. for India, London, May, 1946; dep. Indian trade commr., New York, June, 1946.

SHAH, ABUL HASANAT MUHAMMAD ISMAIL, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 13th Feb., 1905).—Apptd. proby. asst. supt., 12th June, 1927; confd., Sept., 1929; offg. supt., Feb., 1934.

SHAH, AGHA SAIYID BAD, O.B.E., Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 23rd Jan., 1903).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1923; in mil. employ to 21st Jan., 1930; asst. commr., Peshawar, Apl., 1932; asst. pol. agent, N. Waziristan, Feb., 1935, and again, Nov., 1933; ditto, Mohmands, July, 1933; asst. commr., Thal, Apl., 1934; under-sec. to A.G.G., Punjab states, March, 1935; asst. pol. agent, Quetta-Pishin, Feb., 1936; pol. agent, ditto, June, 1937; offr. on special duty, Quetta, March, 1938; asst. pol. agent, Quetta-Pishin, Apl., 1938; asst. commr. Nowshera, Feb., 1939; ditto, Tonk, June, 1940; addtl. dep. sec., ext. affairs dept., Aug., 1940; dep. sec., ditto, Sept., 1941; O.B.E., Jan., 1943; counsellor, Brit. legation, Kabul, Dec., 1944.

SHAH, AMBALAL NAROTHAMDAS, B.A., LL.B., Barr., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Central Provs.) (b. 29th Sept., 1896).—Educ. at Bombay Univ., and Queen's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Nov., 1921; arrived in India, 11th Dec., 1921, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., May, 1925; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1932; confd., June, 1934; legal sec., Feb., 1939 to Dec., 1943; apptd. pres. inc. tax. appeal tribunal, Nov., 1945.

SHAH, ASGHAR ALI, M.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 3rd Apl.,

1914).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 19th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; M.B.E., Dec., 1943; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1940; under sec., rev. dept., May, 1943; dep. dir., textiles, Jan., to Aug., 1945.

SHAH, BAGER ZAINULABIEDIN, M.R.C.S. (Eng.), L.R.C.P. (Lond.), Lieut.-Col., ret'd., late I.M.S. (Bombay) (b. 5th Apl., 1885).—Ret'd., Apl., 1940.†

SHAH, HAMID MUKHTAR, Khan Sahib, B.A., Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 15th March, 1886).—Joined the service, 22nd May, 1909; apptd. to I.P. as supt., Apl., 1935.

SHAH, JAKUB (see Jakub, S.).

SHAH, JELAL MOOCHOO, O.B.E., M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Lieut.-Col. I.M.S., ret'd. (Bombay) (b. 17th Jan., 1886).—Ret'd., Jan., 1941.†

SHAH, MAZHAR HUSSAIN, M.B., B.S., M.R.C.P., M.R.C.S., D.P.H., Major, I.M.S. (b. 3rd June, 1902).—First commn., dated 30th Apl., 1931; mil. employ prior to 16th Oct., 1937, when he was apptd. civil surg.; in temp. mil. employ from Sept., 1941.

SHAH, NATVERAL BALUBHAI, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Sind) (b. 22nd Sept., 1900).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 8th Oct., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. exec. engr., June, 1933; confd., Oct., 1933; dep. sec. to govt. P.W.D., Sept., 1945.

SHAH, POPATLAL GOBINDLAL, C.I.E., M.A., B.Sc., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 9th Dec., 1888).—Joined the service, 10th March, 1914; asst. acctnt.-genl., Nov., 1917; dep. acctnt.-gen., Madras, Apl., 1926; asst. ditto, Bengal, Dec., 1926; audit offcr., Calcutta, May, 1927; dep. acct.-genl., Bengal, Aug., 1927; ditto, Bihar and Orissa, Jan., 1928; ditto, Bombay, Apl., 1929; offg. acct.-genl., Bombay, June, 1930; dep. ch. accts. offr., G.I.P. rly., March, 1933; chief auditor, E.I. rly., May, 1938; ch. auditor, N.W. rly. and govt. examiner of accts, B. & N.W. rly., and R. & K. rly., Dec., 1938; acct.-genl., Bombay, Oct., 1939; C.I.E., June, 1944.

SHAH, YAKUB (see Yakub, Shah).

SHAH ZAMAN KHAN, Khan Bahadur, Indian Polit. Serv. (b. 18th Nov., 1907).—Dir. food supplies in Baluchistan and dep. sec. rev., Dec., 1944; asst. commr., Charsadda, Mar. to Sept., 1945; transferred to Baln, Feb., 1946; asst. pol. agt. and colon. offr. Nasirabad, Mar., 1946; dep. dir. food, supplies, Baln, May, 1946.

SHAHA, HIRA LAL, M.A., Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 10th Feb., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, 13th July, 1925; offg. supt., July, 1931; confd., Aug., 1938.

SHAHAB, QUDRAT ULLAH, B.Sc., M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 26th Feb., 1917).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; apptd. on probn., after exam. of 1940, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., served under Bengal govt., Feb., 1944; served under govt. of Orissa, Sept. 1945; under sec. to govt., home and fin. dept.

SHAH, AGA, B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 25th Aug., 1920).—Educ. at Madras Univ.; apptd. on probn., after exam. of 1943, and served in Bombay; served in Sind as asst. collr., Oct., 1944.

SHAIKH, ABDUL HAMID, C.I.E., Lieut.-Col. I.M.S. ret'd. late Jail Dept., United Provs. (b. 5th Feb., 1890).—First commn., dated 22nd Feb., 1921; in mil. employ. prior to 30th Sept., 1927; supt. Oct., 1927; dep.

dir.-gen., I.M.S., Jan., 1937; inspr.-genl. of prisons, Oct., 1940; C.I.E., June, 1942; ret'd., Feb., 1946.

SHAIK, C. H., Infm. offr., Infm. and Broadcasting dept., govt. of India, Nov., 1944; asst. educn. advr. govt. of India, Aug., 1945; supt. of educn. Baluchistan, May, 1946.

SHAIKH, MUHAMMAD ABDUL KARIM, M.A., LL.B., late Sind C.S., Judicial Branch (b. 28th Apl., 1885).—Ret'd., Apl., 1940.†

SHAIKH, MUHAMMAD NAZIR J., B.A., LL.B., ate Bombay C.S., Judl. Branch (b. 20th Jan., 1886).—Ret'd., Jan., 1941.†

SHAIKH, Rahim Bakhsh Illani Bakhsh, B.A., LL.B., (judl. dept., Sind) (b. 30th Aug., 1897).—Joined, June, 1926; sub-judge, (1st cl.) (confd.), Sept., 1939; asst. judge, (confd.), Feb., 1943.

SHAIKH, WAZIR ALI, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 23rd Feb., 1914).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 15th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magt. and dep. collr., Dec., 1939; dep. dir., civil supplies, March, 1944; regnl. contr., procurement.

SHAIKH, ZAFARALI ABDUL RASUL, B.A., LL.B., (judl. dept., Sind) (b. May, 1901).—Joined Feb., 1930; sub-judge, (2nd cl.) (confd.), Feb., 1932; sec. Sind legis. assembl., Feb., 1944 and Dec., 1945.

SHAILES, H. J., M.B.E., Indian State Rlys. E.I. Rly.—Joined, 28th Mar., 1930; dep. regl. contr. rly. priorities, Calcutta (W.) Sept., 1943; M.B.E., Jan., 1946; regl. contr. rly. priorities, Calcutta, Feb., 1946; (under War Transport Dept.).

SHAIN, MAUNG HLA, B.Sc., B.L., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 22nd Oct., 1905).—Educ. at Rangoon Univ. and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 20th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dep. sec., dept. of agric. and forests, Oct., 1938; ditto, fin. dept., March, 1940; addtl. sec., fin. dept., Sept., 1940; dep. sec., ditto, Apl., 1941; offg. sec., ditto, June, 1941; sec. lab. dept., Oct., 1941 to Apl., 1942; civ. aff. serv., June, 1945; addl. sec. fin., and rev., March, 1946.

SHALOM, RALPH E., C.I.E., B.A., Ind. Posts and Tels. (senr. dir.-genl.) (b. 3rd Aug., 1893).—Joined the service as proby. supt., Oct., 1914; confd., March, 1916; depy. postmaster-genl., Feb., 1939; senr. dep. dir.-genl., May, 1944; C.I.E., Jan., 1946; p.m.g., May, 1946.

SHAM LAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 11th Jan., 1900).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1922; apprentice engr., Sept., 1923; asst. exec. engr., March, 1924; offg. exec. engr., Sept., 1928; confd., Oct., 1932.

SHAM SINGH, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. June, 1891).—Joined the service as proby. dep. supt., 1st Aug., 1913; confd., Nov., 1915; promoted to I.P.S. as supt., 1st Oct., 1930; awarded King's police medal, Feb., 1937.

SHAMALDHARI LALL, C.I.E., B.A. (Oxon.), Indian C.S. (sec., govt. of India, lab. dept.) (b. 4th Oct., 1894).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1919; arrived, 13th Jan., 1920, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt. fin. dept., June, 1924; under-sec. to govt. of India dept. of industries and labour, Aug., 1925; offg. dep.

sec., ditto, Nov., 1927; confd., Apl., 1928; jt. sec., royal commn. on labour, June, 1929; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1931; ditto (provl. subs.), Oct., 1933; dir. of industries and labour, Apl., 1933; sec. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, educn. and dev. dept., Apl., 1935; mag. and collr., Oct., 1935; dep. high commr. for India, May, 1938; C.I.E., Jan., 1941; jt. sec. to govt. of India, lab. dept., March, 1944; addl. sec. ditto, Jan., 1945; sec. ditto, Apl., 1946.

SHAMSHER SINGH, KANWAR, Indian Police (b. 23rd Oct., 1913).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., 27th Jan., 1936.

SHAMSODDOHA, A. H. M. (see Abu Hamid Muhammad Shamsoddoha).

SHAMSI, SYED ZAHIRUDDIN, late Indian State Rlys. (N.W. Rly.) (b. 16th Sept., 1891).—Asst. traffic supt., Oct., 1913; divl. transpn. offr., May, 1935; retd., 7th Nov., 1944.

SHAMSUDDIN AHMAD, Khan Bahadur, B.L., late Bengal C.S. (b. Apl., 1881).—Joined the service, 3rd Sept., 1906; dep., mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1908; inspr.-gen. of regn., Bengal, June, 1931.

SHANBHAG, VISHWANATH BABURAO, Indian Police (b. 8th Oct., 1913).—Apptd. asst. supt. of police, Bombay, on probn., 14th March, 1938.

SHANKAR, VIDYA, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 27th Feb., 1909).—Educated at Dayanand Anglo-Vedic Coll., Cawnpore, Allahabad Univ. and St. John's Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 7th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; under-sec., Bombay (rev.), March, 1939; ditto, (fin.), Apl., 1940; under-sec., govt. of India (home), Sept., 1941; dep. ditto, Oct., 1943.

SHANTI PRASAD, M.Sc., Indian Police (b. 16th July, 1909).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., United Provs., 16th Jan., 1933; confd., Jan., 1935.

SHAPURJI, NASARVANJI JAMSHEDJI RATNAGAR (see Ratnagar, S. N. J.).

SHARAN, RADHA KABTA, B.A., B.L., Inc. tax Dept. (asst. commr.) (b. 19th June, 1886).—Joined the service, 11th Jan., 1909; dep. mag. and dep. coll., Aug., 1918; inc.-tax offr., Apl., 1925; asst. commr., Bihar, Aug., 1932.

SHARAN SINGH, LAL RAM, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 20th March, 1906).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ. and Jesus Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; on for service as settlement offr., Chhattarpur State, Dec., 1937; commr. of settlements, Aug., 1944; rev. sec., Sept., 1944.

SHARANGPANI, PRABHAKAR SHRIDHAR, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs., (exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 29th Jan., 1895).—Joined the service, 14th Sept., 1918; asst. engr., Sept., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; offg. exec. engr., May, 1926; confd., Sept., 1928; under-sec., p.w.d., Nov., 1937; supt. of works, July, 1943.

SHAREEF, AHMED ALI SAHIB, K.B., B.A., Madras C.S. (sub.-collr.) (b. 3rd Feb., 1890).—Joined the service, 7th March, 1914; dep. collr., May, 1931 sub.-collr., confd., (1st gr.), Dec., 1939.

SHARIF, MOHAMMAD, see Mohammad Sharif.
SHARIFF, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Shariff).

SHARIF, SHEIKH MOHAMMED, Punjab Educ. Serv. (b. 1901).—Joined the serv., May, 1927; served var. in the Punjab Educ. dept. to Jan.,

1946; dep. sec., govt. of India, lab. dept., Jan., 1946.

SHARLING, ALFRED FRANCIS LESLIE, late Bihar C.S. (b. 1st Nov., 1886).—Retd., Sept., 1938.*

SHARMA, ASHA RAM, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Orissa) (b. 3rd Nov., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 29th June, 1925; dep. consvr., Jan., 1931; transf. to Orissa, March, 1939.

SHARMA, DHYAN SWARUP, Indian Police (United Prov.) (b. 14th Jan., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Feb., 1940.

SHARP, ALEXANDER EASSON, B.Sc., M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th July, 1892).—Retd., Apl., 1938.*

SHARP, EDWIN JAMES, India Office (actg. hr. exec. offr. acct.-gen.'s dept.) (b. 8th Oct., 1895).—Apptd. cler. offr., Sept., 1921; act. exec. offr., Oct., 1936; actg. hr. cler. offr., Apl., 1939; confd., July, 1939; actg. hr. exec. offr., Sept. 1944.

SHARP, FRANCIS EVERARD, C.I.E., late Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 5th Apl., 1890).—Joined the service, 22nd Nov., 1909, as asst. supt.; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1921; supt. and dep. commr. of police, Nov., 1922; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., Nov., 1935; supt. of police, G.I.P. & M. and S.M. rlys., Nov., 1938; C.I.E., Jan., 1942; retd., Aug., 1945.

SHARP, SIR HENRY, Kt., C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A. (Oxon.), late Indian Educl. Service (Bengal).—Retd.*

SHARP, SAMUEL HENRY, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 7th May, 1882).—Retd., May, 1939.*

SHARPE, REGINALD TAAFE, Barr..—Apptd. judge, high ct., Rangoon, July, 1937.

SHARPE, WILLIAM McCORMICK, B.A., D.S.O., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Calcutta) (b. 11th June, 1893).—Educ. at Cookstown Academy, Coleraine Academical Inst., and Trinity Coll., Dublin; on mil. service from Oct., 1914; joined the service, 17th Feb., 1920; arrived, 11th May, 1920, and posted to Bengal; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1924, and again, Sept., 1926; offg. registrar, high ct., appellate side, Apl., 1928; confd., Nov., 1928; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1927; confd., Sept., 1929; communal ratio offr., home dept., Bengal, Oct., 1939; addl. judge, high ct., Jan., 1944; judge, ditto, Jan., 1946.

SHARPLES, CHARLES NORMAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (collr. of customs, Karachi) (b. 29th Aug., 1906).—Educ. at Blackpool Secondary Sch. and Selwyn Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Bombay as asst. coll.; offg. asst. rev. offr., L.B. and C. constrn., Jan., 1934; offg. dep. commr., March, 1936; asst. collr. (Impl. Customs Service), Bombay, Dec., 1936; ditto, Karachi, Nov., 1937; tempy. under-sec. to govt. of India, commerce dept., Nov., 1938; dep. sec., ditto, Nov., 1939; collr. (confd.), Sept., 1939.

SHARPLEY, FORBES WILMOT, B.Sc., Ph.D., F.R.S.E., M.I.E.E., Indian School of Mines (b. 7th Jan., 1897).—Apptd. prof. of mechl. and electrical engrg. on probn., 28th Dec., 1926; confd., June, 1929.

SHATTOCK, JOHN SWITHUN HARVEY, O.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Serv. (b. 21st Nov., 1907).—Educ. at Westminster and Christ Church, Oxford, and School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and

dep. collr., Apl., 1933; offg. under-sec. to govt., Bengal, pol. and appts. dept., Apl., 1934; asst. pte. sec. to govr. of Bengal, Nov., 1934; under-sec. to the Govt. of India, defence dept. and sec., Indian Soldiers' Bd., Nov., 1936; apptd. to Ind. political serv.; subst. and posted as offr. on spec. duty, W.I. States agency, Oct., 1939; sec. to resdt. for Baroda, etc., Sept., 1940; M.B.E., Jan., 1941; dep. sec., pol. dept., March, 1944; O.B.E., Jan., 1946.

SHAVAKSHA, KAIKOBAD SORABJI, (b. 17th July, 1899).—Joined the service as dep. regr. (since designated as regr. of textile tr. marks, Bombay,) 31st Aug., 1940; regr. 5th June, 1943.

SHAW, JAMES O.B.E., B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Orissa) (b. 13th Sept., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bihar and Orissa, 1st Oct., 1926; offg. exec. engr., Jan., 1933; confd., Aug., 1936; O.B.E., Jan., 1941.

SHAW, JOHN, Burma Frontier Service (supt.) (b. 4th Sept., 1890).—Apptd. extra asst. commr., May, 1913; asst. supt. (B.F.S.), Nov., 1922; supt. Oct., 1935; ex. engr., P.W.D., Orissa.

SHAW, JOSEPH, M.A., Barr., Judicial Dept., Burma (judge, high ct., Rangoon) (b. 4th Nov., 1886).—Apptd. asst. govt. advocate, Aug., 1918; addl. asst. sec., legisl. council, Feb., 1920; offg. judge, small cause courts, July, 1920; asst. govt. advocate, Dec., 1922; judge, small cause cts., March, 1924; chief judge, ditto, May, 1926; acting judge, high ct., Rangoon, variously, from Nov., 1932; puisne judge, Jan., 1938.

SHAW, WILLIAM, M.B.E., late Assam C.S. (b. 5th Apl., 1889).—Joined the service, 4th March, 1909; dep. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1911; extra asst. commr., Dec., 1919; dep. commr., July, 1933; commr. of inc.-tax, Apl., 1940; M.B.E., Jan., 1944; ret'd., 5th Apl., 1944.

SHAW, WILLIAM GEORGE, Burma Excise Dept. (b. 19th Apl., 1894).—Apptd. asst. supt. excise, May, 1916; supt. ditto, Sept., 1919; civ. aff. serv. Jan., to Oct., 1945; ch. supt. Oct., 1945.

SHEARCROFT, REGINALD JAMES, M.B.E. (Commissary), Major, I.M.I. (estabt. offr., Govt. of India, def. dept.) (b. 14th Jan., 1893).—Held mins. apptmt. at A.H.Q., Feb., 1919 to Nov., 1934; first commn., 15th Nov., 1935; offr. supvr., Adjt.-Gen.'s Bch. A.H.Q., India, 15th Nov., 1935; apptd. estabt. offcr. to govt. of India, def. dept., Aug., 1937; M.B.E., June, 1938.

SHEARER, JAMES GREIG, M.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (addl. judge, high ct., Patna; judge, Bihar) (b. 9th Jan., 1893).—Educ. at Dundee High Sch., Edinburgh Univ., and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1916; arrived 20th Dec., 1917; and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt., pol., &c., dept., Aug., 1920; offg. mag. and collr., Apl., 1924 and Feb., 1925; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1925, and again, May, 1927; offg. mag. and collr., Feb., 1926; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1927; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1929; confd., Apl., 1932; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1934; regr., high ct., Patna, July, 1936; on for service, Rampur Durbar, Apl., 1939; addtl. judge, high ct., Patna, July, 1940; confd., Jan., 1943.

SHEARER, JOHN BURT, O.B.E., B.A. (Oxon.), M.A. (Glas.), Ind. C.S. (jt. sec. govt. of India, fin. dept.) (b. 28th Dec., 1904).—Educ. at The Acad., Greenock, Univ. of Glasgow and Trinity Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 21st Oct.,

1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under-sec. to govt., Punjab, home and pol. depts., Jan., 1931; under-sec. to govt. of India, finance dept., Apl., 1933; first sec., central bd. of rev., May, 1935; dep. sec., finance dept., Govt. of India, Apl., 1937; on spec. duty, fin. dept., Apl., 1938; apptd. to fin. and comm. pool, May, 1939; commr. of inc.-tax, Oct., 1939; O.B.E., June, 1944; jt. sec. govt. of India, fin. dept., Dec., 1945.

SHEBBEARE, EDWARD OSWALD, late Indian Forest Service (b. 8th March, 1884).—Ret'd., Sept., 1938.*

SHEEHY, EDWIN, M.B.E., Indian Police, Bombay (b. 14th Sept., 1891).—Held non-gaz. appts. to May, 1926; prom. to I.P. as supt., May, 1941; dep. commr., of police, Aug., 1943.

SHEEHY, SIR JOHN FRANCIS, C.S.I., B.A., Indian C.S. (member, central bd. of revenue) (b. 12th Oct., 1889).—Educ. at St. Tarlath's Coll., Tuam; Natl. Univ. of Ireland (St. Patrick's Coll., Maynooth and Univ. Coll., Galway); apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 20th Oct., 1914, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; on mil. duty from Oct., 1917 to Jan., 1920; sec., dev. commn., Rangoon, March, 1922; dep. sec. to govt. (in addn.), Apl., 1924; asst. commr., inc. tax, Dec., 1926; offg. commr., Oct., 1928; confd., June, 1930; member, central bd. of rev., and ex-officio jt. sec., govt. of India, fin. dept. (cent. revs.), Apl., 1937; C.S.I., June, 1939; ditto, addtl. sec., Feb., 1943; kt., Jan., 1943.

SHEEHY, MICHAEL JOSEPH, C.B.E., B.E., Indian Service of Engineers (Burma) (b. 20th Sept., 1893).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Feb., 1921; exec. engr., Nov., 1926; suptg. engr., confd., June, 1940; ch. engr., Dec., 1942; C.B.E., June, 1944; on l.p.r. from July, 1945.

SHEIKH, ABDUL LATIF, B.A., B.Sc. (Edin.), A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Riys. (N.W. Rly.) (b. 1st Oct., 1888).—Joined the service, 3rd July, 1916; asst. engr. Jan., 1921; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1926; exec. engr. (provl.) March, 1938; ret'd., Oct., 1944.

SHEIKH, MOIZZUDDIN, B.A., late Indian State Riys (b. 25th Aug., 1890).—Joined the service, 15th June, 1912; asst. dist. traffic supt., May, 1922; divl. transptn. (traffic comml.) officer, March, 1931; dep. genl. mangr., Sept., 1941 to 1946.

SHELDON, FELIX LUCIEN, M.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 7th Jan., 1915).—Educ. at St. Peter's Coll., Agra, Allahabad Univ., and St. Catherine's Society Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 8th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr.; addtl. dist. mag., June, 1944.

SHELLY, JAMES, M.C., late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 17th Nov., 1894). Ret'd., 5th Feb., 1941.†

SHELSWELL, OSCAR HENRY CLIVE, M.B.E., late Indian Forest Service, Madras (b. 22nd May, 1894).—Ret'd., Sept., 1938.*

SHENOY, JOSEPH PATRICK LASRADO, Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag.) (b. 29th Oct., 1907).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 13th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930; sub-collr., March, 1933; commr., Madura Municipality, Nov., 1934; dep. sec., fin. dept., July, 1940 to June, 1943; ditto, public dept., June,

to Aug., 1943; commr. corpn. of Madras, July, 1940.

SHEO SINGH BEDI, SARDAR BAHADUR, BAWA, Indian Service of Engineers (exec. engr.) (b. June, 1886).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 21st Dec., 1908; asst. engr., Jan. 1923; asst. exec. engr., Jan. 1931; exec. engr., Sept., 1936.

SHEPHEARD, CHARLES WILFRED, India Office (actg. staff offr., fin. dept.) (b. 12th Feb., 1896).—Appdnt. cler. offr., 24th Apl., 1922; actg. hr. ditto, Aug., 1940; actg. staff offr., Mar., 1944.

SHEPHERD, JAMES FORREST, M.B., Ch.B. (Aberd.), M.Ch. (Liv.), Major, I.M.S.
